The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit| | | Back in January the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints. There are reportedly just three lawyers left in the whole department. **[The threats are clear, folks, as states pass more suppressive legislation. This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from _The Guardian_ : "_Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division._ " This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. **Are we surprised? No.** But this action -- _though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years_ \-- highlights how badly **we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens** , from the outside of government. **[Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108196682/547164856/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=omqbpQAIi/9S3hMXWVhHnJyOFGTcwR1Yga5vLNQX1wmKXOzrIS7mqQkwJEd1GbqKEumaoLwouUI33eUXwb8NckrZQfsFkQ4VORN2yqu5Gas=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxN2ZkZTFiLTY5MzctZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRDa0jSHtEeQpIGZpHYlZG2TlmJAGwNPENo6YWKPyNA=&emci=d364c45d-2137-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=217fde1b-6937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

| | The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, **she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.** You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever. **[Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more with $25 or more right now>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108196689/547164863/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=omqbpQAIi/9S3hMXWVhHnJyOFGTcwR1Yga5vLNQX1wmKXOzrIS7mqQkwJEd1GbqKEumaoLwouUI33eUXwb8NckrZQfsFkQ4VORN2yqu5Gas=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxN2ZkZTFiLTY5MzctZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRDa0jSHtEeQpIGZpHYlZG2TlmJAGwNPENo6YWKPyNA=&emci=d364c45d-2137-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=217fde1b-6937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit| | | Back in January the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints. There are reportedly just three lawyers left in the whole department. | | | This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian : "Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. " This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years \-- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities. You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: Save Medicaid via Care in Action
subject: The House GOP just gutted Medicaid. Let’s stop this disastrous bill in the Senate!
body:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108196990/547166145/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM4MDQ3Mi02OTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rbRNg_EZ2SdqGALaz20H4u_P_-1OLCCCMs5EGh4jDk=&emci=65119d04-4337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d4380472-6937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
**Peter, House Republicans just passed their budget bill to gut Medicaid.**
This bill could devastate the lives of millions — over 8 million people, including many domestic workers, will lose their healthcare, care workers will lose their jobs, and the entire healthcare system will suffer from these Republican cuts. All so the GOP can hand billionaires another giant tax break.
**Our fight to save healthcare for millions is now even more urgent as this bill shifts to the Senate.**
There’s still loud disagreement between Republicans about these massive cuts, and this is far from a done deal. **An overwhelming outpouring of public opposition right now can show Senators they need to step up and save Medicaid.**
[**Add your name right now to urge the Senate to save Medicaid.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108196995/547166150/-2019551775?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM4MDQ3Mi02OTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rbRNg_EZ2SdqGALaz20H4u_P_-1OLCCCMs5EGh4jDk=&emci=65119d04-4337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d4380472-6937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108197000/547166155/-2019551775?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM4MDQ3Mi02OTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rbRNg_EZ2SdqGALaz20H4u_P_-1OLCCCMs5EGh4jDk=&emci=65119d04-4337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d4380472-6937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
**The House-passed bill would put 1 in 5 Americans at risk by slashing Medicaid and SNAP, so that Republicans can gift billionaires another round of tax cuts.**
This GOP plan will make it harder for families to afford the in-home care that older adults and people with disabilities rely on. People will face impossible decisions like forgoing paychecks to provide full-time care or sending loved ones to institutional settings. Care workers will lose their jobs (and healthcare coverage) en masse, because Medicaid funds many of these vital care jobs.
Care in Action has fought against Medicaid cuts every step of the way, in vigils, in rallies across the country, and on Capitol Hill, where we were **meeting with lawmakers, telling our stories and demanding our voices be heard into the early hours this morning before House Republicans forced this bill through.**
[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108197005/547166187/-2019551775?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM4MDQ3Mi02OTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rbRNg_EZ2SdqGALaz20H4u_P_-1OLCCCMs5EGh4jDk=&emci=65119d04-4337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d4380472-6937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
The GOP knows these drastic Medicaid cuts are extremely unpopular — and some Congressional Republicans have even said it bluntly to the media. It is crucial that the first thing Senators hear as this bill lands on their desks is overwhelming opposition, so we need to amp up the pressure now.
**[**Add your name to stop the massive Medicaid cuts in the GOP budget bill. The Senate is our last chance to save the healthcare and livelihoods of millions.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108197009/547166192/-2019551775?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM4MDQ3Mi02OTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rbRNg_EZ2SdqGALaz20H4u_P_-1OLCCCMs5EGh4jDk=&emci=65119d04-4337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d4380472-6937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)**

name: George Whitesides
subject: In the cover of night
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

House Republicans just forced through their budget bill in the cover of night.

This legislation will rip health care away from 14 million Americans, take hundreds of millions of dollars away from food assistance programs that thousands in my district depend on to get by, cut Medicaid and Medicare, remove protections for the environment, and grow the national debt by trillions.

It’s shameful.

Not only that, but Republicans snuck disturbing provisions into this bill that would defund Planned Parenthood and bar those on Affordable Care Act plans from covering for the cost of an abortion – even if they pay for their health care from their own pockets.

There is no area left untouched by this disastrous bill – it takes protections away from seniors and children and makes life harder for working families. It makes one thing clear: Republicans are more interested in giving billionaires untold millions in tax breaks than doing right by their communities who are struggling to make ends meet.

I came to Congress to solve problems, cut costs for everyday living, and grow jobs – this bill takes us in the wrong direction.

I want you to know that I’m continuing to fight back in Congress, because CA-27 and all Americans deserve better than this Republican majority.

Thank you,

George

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-5.22.25-all

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Look at this graph
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’ve tried explaining that missing our goals will be devastating for our efforts to organize against Trump.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1644%2E791427%2E1ZPxoR)

Friend — We don’t know what to say.
We’ve tried telling you that we are way behind our fundraising goals.
We’ve tried explaining that missing those goals will be devastating for our efforts to organize against Trump.
So maybe we should just show you this graph:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250522-2-180&t=2&akid=1644%2E791427%2E1ZPxoR)
This graph shows the amount of donations coming into our ActBlue since Trump took office.
**This trend is really worrying.**
We may have come out the gate strong in Trump’s first two months.
But if we can’t keep up a sustained fight against this administration, if we can’t raise the funds necessary to keep our campaign moving forward, will we only continue to fall behind Trump and the GOP over the next four years. We can’t take back the House, the Senate, and eventually the White House if this trend keeps up.
So we’re hoping that by being transparent about this, you’ll understand why your donation today is so important to us, and to Ilhan.
**[Chip in $5, $10, or anything you can afford. Help us get back on track towards hitting our fundraising goal so we can stay focused on holding this corrupt administration accountable.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250522-2-180&t=3&akid=1644%2E791427%2E1ZPxoR)

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Sanctuary Cities = BANNED in New Hampshire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
Today's Big Win!
| | | | [](https://link.emails.granitesolutions._A6A/scre93937da)
---

Derek,
I’m proud to report that Governor Kelly Ayotte has just signed two critical pieces of legislation into law that make one thing crystal clear: **New Hampshire will never become a sanctuary state**.

[](https://link.emails.granitesolutions._A6A/scg026c50dd)

These new laws ban sanctuary city policies in our communities and restore law enforcement’s ability to cooperate fully with federal immigration authorities. I was honored to support these bills every step of the way and speak in favor of their passage in Concord.
Let me be clear—this isn’t about politics. It’s about **public safety** and the rule of law. We’ve taken the handcuffs off our police and given them the tools they need to work with ICE to detain and deport **criminal illegal aliens** who threaten our communities.
As I said at Governor Ayotte's bill signing today:
_“We are taking the handcuffs off of our law enforcement officers, and hopefully, they’ll be able to work with our federal government and ICE to put the handcuffs on the criminal illegal aliens that are violating and disobeying our laws.”_
These laws are a major step forward for our state, and I applaud Governor Ayotte for her strong leadership.
We are the safest state in the country, and this ensures we stay that way. [Can you help keep us on the right path with a donation today?](https://link.emails.granitesolutions._A6A/s8vf63883bf)
Let’s keep fighting for safer communities and a stronger New Hampshire.
Democrats are going to spend millions against us in 2026. [We need to fight for New Hampshire - can I count on your support?](https://link.emails.granitesolutions._A6A/s4k9c2d95b2)
**Rep. Joe Sweeney**
Chairman, Granite Solutions

[Donate Today](https://link.emails.granitesolutions._A6A/sfu702f3ed0)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/terror-in-our-nations-capital-two?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4bd39a33-30bc-4e15-a228-47fa6b570283?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
With heavy hearts, we join in mourning the devastating loss of Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky--two extraordinary young people whose lives were stolen in an act of unspeakable violence on American soil at the Capital Jewish Museum in Washington DC.
They were a couple about to be engaged; their lives were full of promise, purpose, and light. Their murders in the heart of our nation's capital shake us deeply and should shake you. **Their loss is a painful reminder of the evil still driven by hatred of the Jewish people and the Jewish state.**
**It is also a painful reminder how Jews are not safe in America.** Task forces do not solve this problem and it is especially shocking when Israeli friends tell me that they feel safer in Israel than they do in America (_**and we do not have the threat of Hamas and Iran against us**_).
This grief is especially personal as I met Sarah just last week at the Israeli embassy.
She was a remarkable woman--brilliant, kind, and she was passionate in her service to the Jewish state and her people. Sarah was helpful and kind and our brief encounter left a lasting impact.
**Just less than two weeks ago, over 300 pastors and rabbis stood together in Washington, D.C., to advocate for Israel.** The mission was simple - We were there to remind our elected leaders that **Israel 's fight is not just a Jewish issue, but a global one**. **Evangelical Pastors joined hands with Jewish Rabbis**. This was a powerful show of unity and faith for a three-day solidarity conference.
I stood proudly at that conference among a delegation of Connecticut pastors and rabbis as we met with aides to Senator Chris Murphy and Congressman Jim Himes. _**It would have been more meaningful to actually engage with Connecticut 's elected officials as the impact would have been direct.**_ One Rabbi reminded Jim Himes that an 8 year old in Greenwich, Connecticut was threatened by another student who drew a Swastika over a Jewish Star and told him that the Nazis would defeat him - **this hatred is deep within the fabric of the Constitution State.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c8295d54-ff10-4732-a7dd-3cea3fd50fc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_The Connecticut Delegation In Front of Senator Murphy 's Office_
We carried a message of urgent support for Israel, a need for an Iran without nuclear capabilities, a reminder of the hostages still held in captivity and a call to recognize that this cause reaches far beyond borders or religions. We urged them to leverage their voices and take a stand if not for Israel, then for the Americans still held in captivity.
**And now, barely two weeks later, we are mourning the senseless deaths of Sarah and Yaron --two bright lights extinguished near a Jewish museum in the same city where we had just come to speak truth to power and shine light on darkness.**
The Time to Act is NOW - Never Again is Now and it is not an Israel issue - It is an American Issue and it must be stopped throughout our nation and especially on our college campuses.
**This is well beyond a tragedy --it is a summons and it is YOUR CALL TO ACTION. Antisemitism is alive and thriving due to the cowardice of our elected officials whether they be at the State or Federal Level. This is a reality of our present and it is taking lives, here on American soil.**
It demands a response--not of silence, but of unified resolve.
**What Can You Do?**
_**Be that bridge -- extend your hands across faiths, and across your communities. If you need assistance reach out and we can plug you in with those who can use your help. Spread this story of the tragedy of Sarah and Yaron and what you are doing to combat antisemitism and hate in our nation. Our land will not be free if you are not brave to stand up NOW.**_
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164196230&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MTk2MjMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc5NjAyNjYsImV4cCI6MTc1MDU1MjI2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.m0RRN7YOLh3VAchAG5Hp0jxaELSgER3B3sMyj8XDTnQ)
**It is our duty to confront hatred wherever it lies and remember that Israel is the first line of defense. Yesterday 's tragedy demonstrates that we have been breached.**
We cannot and will not be passive. We will not be silent.
_**To Sarah and Yaron 's families, to their colleagues and to all those who knew and loved them, may their memories be a blessing--and a call to action for all of us.**_
May their memories not be in vain.
By Jonathan Goldstein

name: Tina's Throwback Thursday!
subject: Tina’s story 👇
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
That’s why Tina works so hard to protect our state’s public universities and allow every student to earn an excellent education without breaking the bank. |
#
---
Happy throwback Thursday, Peter! Tina fell in love with Oregon almost four decades ago. Her way of giving back to the state that embraced her is to fight hard for our values and make Oregon a place where everyone can be successful. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108197660/547181625/-565570384?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250522_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQxY2NiYS02ZDM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IyjQlpxY7pVL5HcI4aZoX0EI1vczYlITYq7tMMC8O1I=) Tina arrived in Eugene from the East Coast in 1987 and fell in love with the natural beauty of her new home. She eventually went back to school and got her degree at the University of Oregon. She was able to finish school debt-free because of Pell Grants, work-study assistance, and affordable tuition. **Unfortunately, these kinds of opportunities are under attack because Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress would rather give tax cuts to billionaires than support learning and education for millions of hard-working students.** Trump has cut the Department of Education, slashed funding for schools, and sought to eliminate DEI programs that create greater opportunity for every Oregonian. Tina has made it clear: Trump’s efforts to dismantle the Department of Education are only creating uncertainty, chaos, and fear. Elected leaders should provide young people with a quality education, no matter where they live or who they are. **That’s why Tina works so hard to protect our state’s public schools and universities to ensure every student can get an excellent education without breaking the bank.** **[In the face of attacks on public education, Tina needs our support. Pitch in to support her work to keep our education system affordable and accessible to _all students._ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108197661/547181626/1183068119?amount=&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250522_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQxY2NiYS02ZDM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IyjQlpxY7pVL5HcI4aZoX0EI1vczYlITYq7tMMC8O1I=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108197662/547181627/-565570384?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250522_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQxY2NiYS02ZDM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IyjQlpxY7pVL5HcI4aZoX0EI1vczYlITYq7tMMC8O1I=)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Tight Race In Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We always knew this Senate race would be tight

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2749?t=1&akid=166%2E49239%2ER5oFvN)
---
I have some big news to share, null.

**A poll on our battleground Senate race here in Michigan shows me just ahead of MAGA Republican Mike Rogers.**
I’ve spent my entire life fighting for my home state. Now, I couldn’t be more honored that I have such a strong grassroots movement behind me.
**This is a direct result of the grassroots momentum that this team has built since we launched this campaign, and I need your help to keep it up.[Will you pitch in $5 or more now to help us reach our $15,000 goal by midnight and keep pushing this grassroots campaign to victory here in Michigan?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2750?t=2&akid=166%2E49239%2ER5oFvN)**
This race is going to be a tough one. _The Cook Political Report_ has ranked this Senate seat as a pure "Toss Up," and the full force of the GOP and their megadonors are going to dump millions into this race to defeat me.
**But with your grassroots support, I know we can take them on, and I know we can win. That's how I've won every tough battleground race before, and that's how we're going to win this crucial battleground Senate seat.

**[**With experts predicting this race will likely determine Senate control, will you give $5 or more now to help me keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2750?t=3&akid=166%2E49239%2ER5oFvN)

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I've had it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks, I’ve had it.

**Republicans just passed their Tax Scam that includes the largest cut to Medicaid in American history.**

I need you to understand the severity of this situation.

– Their reckless scheme kicks nearly 14 MILLION Americans off health insurance.

– It takes food out of the mouths of children, seniors and veterans.

– All to give a massive tax break to their billionaire donors like Elon Musk.

**In this moment, we need to rise up and prove that when Republicans come for our families – we’re going to come for their seats.**

[There’s nothing more urgent that we could be doing right now than working to flip the House and stop Republicans from jamming their reckless and extreme agenda down the throats of the American people. Everyone is watching to see how Democrats will respond. This is our chance to show the unity and strength of our grassroots supporters and prove that we have the American people’s back. I need a historic response – 3,000 Democratic Members before midnight – to put an end to the cruelty, ensure Democrats have the strong financial resources to reclaim the House and hand Republicans a stunning rebuke. I’m asking you to confirm your membership immediately. Will you split a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90340?t=6&akid=19942%2E878179%2Ei81IDF) | **2025 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER**
---

MEMBERSHIP: **UNCONFIRMED**
[SUGGESTED DONATION: $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90340?t=7&akid=19942%2E878179%2Ei81IDF)
We are at a crossroads.

We can either let Republicans rip healthcare and food away from millions of our fellow Americans, buy their way into power again and tear down all our progress...

Or we can unite, build an unprecedented base of Democratic Members to flip the House and put a much-needed check on this administration.

[Can I count on you to confirm your 2025 Democratic Membership immediately by splitting $10 between me and the Voter Protection Project?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90340?t=8&akid=19942%2E878179%2Ei81IDF)

name: John James
subject: They were WRONG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Friend, **They said I’d never win in Michigan.** _**They said I should abandon Trump.**_ _**They said an America First Black Republican couldn’t get enough votes.**_ **They were wrong.** This is John James. I’m a West Point grad, U.S. Army combat veteran, and the proud son of Michigan. I’ve flown Apaches in combat. I’ve led a family business. I’ve fought every step of the way for the America that gave me everything.
---
[ **STAND WITH ME** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=92eedd15a6144d38918b17c4cf8b68ae&_e=nDHNfwLDIHWhLo7er3aYIoSNJAzNdE26dYcBicgalXFnNRQEBVvJik_2pULe-iWi0fbzXuKHJjzQ7ltfK4W-yyxdlFevP_DC_PeC8E4_lyzhObK2xkNdP4hoqKtQT6IR19H363p8EWPZLDBFpWngZp9u0b9Q1t0z9v8tGURByM0WSW_99pbOC0loTUlBDQ6HR68ikWDBKmEVynLb5ojfRhee424BbELDuDnB1ZSJU1rSJat3ooqVE5lm-jCOf6aizLFnoRgRCANU9YG4Eu3Rhg%3D%3D)
---
**In 2024, we pulled off one of the most critical majority-making WINS in the nation.** Now, the Left is targeting me with everything they’ve got to make sure it doesn’t happen again to the Governor’s Office. The DNC has named me one of their top targets. And the media? They’re already attacking me full-force. **They want a lap dog barking their talking points back at them**** _. Not a fighter._**
---
[ **FIGHT BACK** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=92eedd15a6144d38918b17c4cf8b68ae&_e=nDHNfwLDIHWhLo7er3aYIoSNJAzNdE26dYcBicgalXFnNRQEBVvJik_2pULe-iWi0fbzXuKHJjzQ7ltfK4W-yyOrx4_VOXEfBxWh7schZEzyH2CCifR2JE5b8J7wgtyJ_ZZfshd52wOKoqewzEcoK6WYTNCwn1ehYlSPZqFvQBMQR7SRd8azlbEink6CHGKlm4UQzNH61NU35hDudfxnY7aY488hAd7kaPKbGYuGkr4HQA0VNT8at8fZJLf8QrniG0rh7lR0eD6Q9iBaN_MZkA%3D%3D)
---
**_No matter what they throw at me, I’m not giving up on this mission._** I didn’t give up on President Trump when other Republicans in this race abandoned him. **I kept on fighting, and our movement has been winning ever since.** But that doesn’t mean this is going to be easy. **I’m up against every Democrat donor and political operative in the nation. ** **_That’s how big this race is._** **The pressure is mounting, the attacks have already started. This campaign is in a critical stage right now. ** **[**Can I count on you to chip in a $10 contribution to help me keep fighting?**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=92eedd15a6144d38918b17c4cf8b68ae&_e=nDHNfwLDIHWhLo7er3aYIoSNJAzNdE26dYcBicgalXFnNRQEBVvJik_2pULe-iWi0fbzXuKHJjzQ7ltfK4W-y6tg1pGE4smYrcOCbbkNENZELTmizOqAZVyH98KtatbIkHnuizS0pj9fRfFY4WUCoRTyDKnyk0YEwc0APxNsrKzY72jR04RPxR-iuuod4AwJuPNqWxbp455YqZ58lNGee183Fi7yaexSj8-BQp0m-EHLXoY81UbdMISUMCFUyNTWrVigWkFlKHvFsf7gR2UeNA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Meetings between Trump’s border czar Tom Homan and Proud Boys associates exemplifies the troubling alliance between the administration and extremist groups. According to reports Homan met with an associate of the white nationalist organization, to discuss strategies for deportations. This dangerous and unethical collaboration highlights the administration's willingness to engage with hate groups to enforce a cruel immigration agenda. Local democracy offers a powerful countermeasure to these dangerous trends. By fostering inclusivity, ensuring accountability, and promoting civic engagement, we can resist extremist influences and create communities grounded in compassion and justice. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Homan’s closed-door meetings with Proud Boy associate Terry Newsome signal a broader pattern of working with individuals who promote division and violence, undermining the values of compassion and justice that form the bedrock of our communities and our democracy. Instead of focusing on humane immigration reform, Trump and his allies prioritized fear-mongering and draconian measures that disproportionately affected vulnerable communities. Electing leaders who respect the law and prioritize humane policies is essential to safeguarding democratic values. ** Together, we can make a difference! -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. _**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. body:
Republicans just passed the largest cut to Medicaid in American history.

While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: Republicans just passed their Tax Scam that includes the largest cut to Medicaid in American history. I need you to understand the severity of this situation. | | | | | ---|--- I've had it. Republicans just passed their Tax Scam that includes the largest cut to Medicaid in American history. I need you to understand the severity of this situation. – Their reckless scheme kicks nearly 14 MILLION Americans off health insurance. – It takes food out of the mouths of children, seniors and veterans. – All to give a massive tax break to their billionaire donors like Elon Musk. In this moment, we need to rise up and prove that when Republicans come for our families – we’re going to come for their seats. There’s nothing more urgent that we could be doing right now than working to flip the House and stop Republicans from jamming their reckless and extreme agenda down the throats of the American people. Everyone is watching to see how Democrats will respond. This is our chance to show the unity and strength of our grassroots supporters and prove that we have the American people’s back. I need a historic response – 3,000 donations before midnight – to put an end to the cruelty, ensure Democrats have the strong financial resources to reclaim the House, and hand Republicans a stunning rebuke. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Hakeem Jeffries and DLCC PAC. | | | | | | Keep the faith, Hakeem | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. What if we told you that your $55 donation today could be the difference between Democrats retaking the U.S. House Majority or Republicans continuing to rubber stamp the destructive Donald Trump agenda? = = = = = = Here’s the situation: Control of the U.S. House is almost certainly going to come down to California. In 2024, we were able to flip three seats from red to blue. This ensured that Democrats gained ground in the U.S. House and narrowed Speaker Mike Johnson’s majority to a historically small margin. Now, in 2026, we need to finish the job. If we can hold onto all our vulnerable blue seats and flip just one or two more districts blue, Democrats will almost certainly take control of the U.S. House. But this plan only works if we can replicate our 2024 playbook by opening regional offices and hiring organizers in the year before the election. That means right now! = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. name: Sydney Kamlager
subject: Anything But Beautiful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SYDNEY KAMLAGER-DOVE FOR CONGRESS]( "PAID FOR BY SYDNEY KAMLAGER-DOVE FOR CONGRESS")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3c38701be03c/fighting-for-this-country-14055370?e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Peter: This Majority Republican Congress just served a one-two knockout punch to working Americans. **They just passed the largest tax cut for the rich and the largest cut to Medicaid in the history of this country – and it all went down at 6:26 am in the morning.**

**Shameful.**

Only cowards and thieves operate in the dark. If you are proud of something, if you want to brag on something, if you want people to know all that you have done - you do it in the daylight for all to see. Not like what happened on the House floor last night.

Republicans brought this dangerous bill to the Rules committee at 1 am on Wednesday morning. They complained that Democrats showed up to debate (you kidding me?!). They admitted that they didn’t know all that was in the bill, and then they voted to send it to the floor.

**Shameful.**

At 4 am today, we debated the bill ... and were they shoveling. They claimed immigrants were the only ones who would be cut from Medicaid. They claimed cuts to food assistance would only impact those who don’t deserve to be on it. They said, regardless of the cuts, working people would be grateful for an additional $2,000.

**The nerve.**

Finally, after a rousing speech from Leader Jeffries, we voted on this bill at 6:26 am, although [two Republicans claimed to have “slept” through the vote.](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=6e98181791&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
| [ ](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=8895710c5b&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
Debating the Big Ugly Backstabbing Bill - at 4am!
| **This is a dangerous bill.** It:
* reduces the age of dependency from 18 to 7 – cutting millions of children from food assistance and other supports;
* cuts Section 8 vouchers – snatching housing from low-income tenants; and
* [eliminates taxes on gun silencers and the requirement to register them](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=e3a23c45fc&e=e6ba7d1bc4). I mean, what do you say to that?

That’s not the worst of it. At the last minute, Republicans slipped in a provision to eliminate Medicaid funding for providers like Planned Parenthood, who also offer general health care access. That’s not the worst of it.
**What does the one-two punch look like?**

**🥊🥊🥊 Punch One:** tax cuts passed earlier, followed by higher costs of groceries and other essentials because of arbitrary taxes (tariffs). _This combination economic punch has created an unstable market, made money for expensive, and forced Moody’s to downgraded our country’s credit outlook._

**🥊🥊🥊 Punch Two:** this bill - $600 Billion cut to Medicaid, cuts to Medicare, changes to work requirements (which will cut people off benefits), cuts to housing and food assistance, and more. _These cuts sever the social safety net lifeline upon which so many of us depend and will make life harder and more expensive._

Don’t get it twisted. These punches impact us all.

Hospitals, urgent care and clinics in our communities will close because of these cuts. Doctors are able to provide care to those not on Medicaid because the reimbursements they receive from Medicaid patients allow them to keep their doors open for us. There is an example like this for every cut.

We are all taking these punches, but there are more rounds ahead.

This nasty turd now goes to the Senate. We have another chance to lean in and force them to lessen the blows. Talking about the cuts to Medicaid is working. People are hearing us. We must continue to share our stories, speak up and out on what the cuts mean for our communities and call out the betrayal. The Senators were listening to my colleagues and I debate the bill. They also have been hearing you at town halls and on social media.

**We must now turn up the heat. All the way.**

---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=b197f4388d&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
| | [](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=1fd861061b&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
| | [](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=d57dc5ef3b&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
| | [](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=172ea71138&e=e6ba7d1bc4)

| [CONTRIBUTE TO THE FIGHT](https://sydneykamlager.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=fbf6749cb5&e=e6ba7d1bc4 "CONTRIBUTE TO THE FIGHT")

name: Stand With Warriors
subject: This Navy SEAL needs your help!
body:
a large swath of the bureaucratic brass who infest the Navy don't care about the American warfighter

| | |
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend The Marxists thought they had Captain Brad Geary beat. A decorated Navy SEAL, Capt. Geary served as the commander of BUDs and the SEAL Special Warfare School in Coronado. The bureaucrats in the Biden Pentagon demanded that Geary and the men and women under his command in the SEAL instructor cadre dumb down the famous program to fit their DEI agenda.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg7tu2vp13o0ic9qfrkhlcu029u0kh00m3bp9er0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs)
---
Navy SEAL Capt. Brad Geary served with distinction, commanding the SEAL School in Coronado, CA. Entrenched Biden Pentagon bureaucrats are fighting Geary tooth and nail to dumb down America's best warriors.
You see, a large swath of the bureaucratic brass who infest the Navy don't care about the American warfighter, military readiness, or even national security. To them, the military is nothing more than a tool of social engineering. _These Pentagon bureaucrats don 't care about your freedom, or the men and women who give their lives defending it_. They'll burn it to the ground (and already are) just to push their woke, DEI, America-hating agenda. Just look at what they've already tried on President Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. And these America-hating bureaucrats are winning in many cases. They just launched a new attack against Secretary Hegseth and his much-needed program to end the DEI policies that are killing the military.
---
**[Fill Out YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsbgro6cqerimmdqkb9dg81c4i6m9rdbogs17dmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs)!**
---
But Capt. Geary had the courage to simply say "NO." So the Pentagon bureaucrats tried to give him the axe, even attempting to destroy his ability to retire and trying to wipe out an illustrious SEAL career. **But that 's when Stand With Warriors (SWW) stepped in, raising tens of thousands for Geary's defense.** And on Thursday, we won.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv5rqi19ufdbdn40925m6agft2qik7vm6c7lhjpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs)
---
SEAL Capt. Brad Geary (right), freshly emerged from the surf on the beach at the SEAL School in Coronado, celebrating his retirement with SWW Vice President Zach Lautenschlager (left). Geary is headed for Washington DC and needs your help!
_Thanks to the support of thousands of people like you, Capt. Geary officially retired from active duty**in order to take a new senior position at the Pentagon**_. We forced the woke bureaucrats to back down and forced them to watch as Geary was honored by hundreds of SEALs, service men and women, and citizens at his retirement ceremony at the famous "Grinder" training grounds at the heart of the SEAL School he commanded. And that's not even the best part. **With help from Stand With Warriors, Capt. Geary is now headed to Washington DC where he will serve as a high-ranking Navy official, overseeing and commanding the very bureaucrats who tried to take him out**. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth knows all about Geary's case. It's part of why he wants to purge the Pentagon of the kind of corruption that tried to take down Geary. That's also why Hegseth recruited Geary to help lead the Trump Navy for the next four years. _**But the Biden bureaucratic Navy brass are furious, and they 're already launching an all-out attack to make sure Geary is unable to start at the Pentagon**_**!** Stand With Warriors is standing with Capt. Geary as the Marxists continue trying to tarnish his good name. They already put him through years of legal hell as they tried to destroy him and the SEAL School. But we had his back. Stand With Warriors provided top-notch legal defense and financial support, giving the Pentagon radicals no choice but to leave Geary and his team ALONE.
---
**[Fill Out YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkd7o4hulrm6et6oa74iln49e3oc5ockvv8fv2ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs)!**
---
We didn't just clear Geary's record. We sent a strong message to the Pentagon, showing they can't just push around our patriotic warfighters without America pushing back. We couldn't have done that without your help, and it's time to take it to the next level. **Donate to Stand With Warriors and let us help more heroes like Capt. Brad Geary.** A donation of $100 or $75 would go a very long way. $50 or $35 can make a solid dent. Even $25 or $15 will be put to excellent use. On the same day Stand With Warriors (SWW) Vice President Zach Lautenschlager attended Capt. Geary's retirement ceremony, SWW President Michael Cassidy and General Counsel Davis Younts were in Washington DC to support Under-Secretary of the Air Force nominee Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier at his confirmation hearing.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi0re5d0t2ncti6meua7v1ncd15n34itf495cb4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs)
---
SWW President Michael Cassidy (left) and SWW General Counsel Davis Younts (right) support Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier in his Senate confirmation hearing for Air Force Under-Secretary.
When Lohmeier sounded the alarm about the rising tide of Marxism in our Armed Forces, he was swiftly fired by those exact Marxists. He courageously warned the public that "anti-American" ideologies like the 1619 Project were taking over the military, and not wanting to be exposed, the Marxists had their revenge. But now, like Geary, he'll be over the very same ideologues who tried to take him down.
---
**[Fill Out YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhvpt6bkb02i0nv06itpt5n0m48tl3hd3lmffv48_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs)!**
---
It's just another example of the new climate within the Pentagon of patriotism and a clear focus on the mission at hand, without distractions from woke and weaponized ideology. It's an opportunity we've been privileged to help create. _But the attacks are continuing. The Marxists HATE to lose, and they hate to lose power_. **They 're already trying to renew their attacks on Geary and Lohmeier.** They and countless others need our help. **Donate to Stand With Warriors and let us help more heroes like Lt. Col. Lohmeier.** A donation of **$100 or $75** would go a very long way. **$50 or $35** can make a solid dent.
Even**$25 or $15** will be put to excellent use.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7lodf86avc8q2rgvn907l2r0gfto17kkoph4vjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs)
---
SWW President Michael Cassidy and General Counsel Davis Younts (left end) stand with Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier (center) and friends at his Senate confirmation Hearing.
Lohmeier himself said it best when he testified before the Senate: _" The President has nominated me for this important position... This includes eliminating all unnecessary distractions and enabling military members to focus on their mission."_ _" The American people, like me, want nothing less than to enable our Department's men and women to succeed so that our military can--through strength--deter conflict."_ He also pointed to Hegseth's focus on the warrior ethos and on lethality.
---
**[Fill Out YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvq9asrdfoje4iatmv1a0nn8m9bdefbu9gv44slg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs)!**
---
Needless to say, it's the dawn of an exciting new era in our Armed Forces. With Trump and Hegseth at the helm, and warriors like Geary and Lohmeier close behind them, there's no shortage of pro-America courage FINALLY putting things right at the Pentagon. But that also means there's no shortage of attacks. In just the past few months of Trump's new term, we've seen them come after any effort to fix things in the military. That means it's only a matter of time before the next attack comes. Men like Geary and Lohmeier need your help right now! Stand With Warriors is here to fight every step of the way. _That 's why, more than ever, we need your help_. You can start by filling out **[YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z069d2ja6p8rq7f2qabg3mlpj56n1rudvk1hb9kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob7cjh2bs).** It'll let us send a message of support to Trump and Hegseth, and make sure they know America has their backs. And when you're done with that, consider chipping in to support our work. **Donate to Stand With Warriors and let us help more heroes.** A donation of **$100 or $75** would go a very long way. **$50 or $35** can make a solid dent. Even**$25 or $15** will be put to excellent use. This is a chance to serve our country and save our military. The tyrants and Marxists are losing ground. We've gained it and we'll keep gaining more. We hope that you'll join us. For America, **Michael Cassidy**
President
Stand With Warriors
---

---
| |
---

---

On the same day Stand With Warriors (SWW) Vice President Zach Lautenschlager attended Capt. Geary's retirement ceremony, SWW President Michael Cassidy and General Counsel Davis Younts were in Washington DC to support Under-Secretary of the Air Force nominee Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier at his confirmation hearing. SWW President Michael Cassidy (left) and SWW General Counsel Davis Younts (right) support Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier in his Senate confirmation hearing for Air Force Under-Secretary. When Lohmeier sounded the alarm about the rising tide of Marxism in our Armed Forces, he was swiftly fired by those exact Marxists. He courageously warned the public that "anti-American" ideologies like the 1619 Project were taking over the military, and not wanting to be exposed, the Marxists had their revenge. But now, like Geary, he'll be over the very same ideologues who tried to take him down. ! It's just another example of the new climate within the Pentagon of patriotism and a clear focus on the mission at hand, without distractions from woke and weaponized ideology. It's an opportunity we've been privileged to help create. But the attacks are continuing. The Marxists HATE to lose, and they hate to lose power. They 're already trying to renew their attacks on Geary and Lohmeier. They and countless others need our help. Donate to Stand With Warriors and let us help more heroes like Lt. Col. Lohmeier. A donation of $100 or $75 would go a very long way. $50 or $35 can make a solid dent. Even$25 or $15 will be put to excellent use. SWW President Michael Cassidy and General Counsel Davis Younts (left end) stand with Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier (center) and friends at his Senate confirmation Hearing. Lohmeier himself said it best when he testified before the Senate: " The President has nominated me for this important position... This includes eliminating all unnecessary distractions and enabling military members to focus on their mission." " The American people, like me, want nothing less than to enable our Department's men and women to succeed so that our military can--through strength--deter conflict." He also pointed to Hegseth's focus on the warrior ethos and on lethality. ! Needless to say, it's the dawn of an exciting new era in our Armed Forces. With Trump and Hegseth at the helm, and warriors like Geary and Lohmeier close behind them, there's no shortage of pro-America courage FINALLY putting things right at the Pentagon. But that also means there's no shortage of attacks. In just the past few months of Trump's new term, we've seen them come after any effort to fix things in the military. That means it's only a matter of time before the next attack comes. Men like Geary and Lohmeier need your help right now! Stand With Warriors is here to fight every step of the way. That 's why, more than ever, we need your help. You can start by filling out . It'll let us send a message of support to Trump and Hegseth, and make sure they know America has their backs. And when you're done with that, consider chipping in to support our work. Donate to Stand With Warriors and let us help more heroes. A donation of $100 or $75 would go a very long way. $50 or $35 can make a solid dent. Even$25 or $15 will be put to excellent use. This is a chance to serve our country and save our military. The tyrants and Marxists are losing ground. We've gained it and we'll keep gaining more. We hope that you'll join us. For America, Michael Cassidy President Stand With Warriors | | | (C) Stand With Warriors, 26 N. 9th Street Lemoyne, PA 17043 Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zoqeurh47d8u3jgvpkk6944ftmq60hss30arreh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztl1jkmoujnl2bi1kogvar2vhclvcmdmhl7mle88_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0jpalpnc6r9of9p3maio099o5c7aqmt8vmjrnuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvie4b2bekshutv580fa5b16ngl6jdedgvqamgvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2znpofammajekaenthus9qq10fdnvg5mq3eg7k43g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqhaa2t4diofjf14gldmu8m1eh7dlrjj7gdb6h78_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zc75duf1v44gai9qnu8ghqr7bm10k540op3n6f0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zuqsrkul8cbd8o9i3otu96qpm1qmshmtpdshq3n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)

---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---

The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z32id5vg2365rjgbdpiqhsl5tetfdhlem55cauu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

body:
Your book to expose the Climate Myth. They claim CO2 is a pollutant – but real science proves otherwise.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfrem9vi6j4aptnl46uc2k3bals1016oglgrfcr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)
---
Friend, The Climate Cult is pushing their BIGGEST lie yet: that the very air you exhale - carbon dioxide - is a "dangerous pollutant" that must be regulated and controlled. **_Their real agenda?_**__**_To control every aspect of your life_** _,_**_from the car or truck you drive to the stove you cook on._** The CO2 Coalition is fighting back with an arsenal of truth that the Green Lobby fears most: real science. With over 180 renowned scientists, including 2022 Nobel Laureate in Physics Dr. John Clauser, we're exposing the Climate Fiction that's being used to steal your freedoms. _**[_**Your immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 will help us flood the public sector, schools, and halls of Congress with scientific truth that dismantles their fear-mongering propaganda.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk4s18nfu0v6rbfbon9p3rstrkco74cqns07d89g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)**_

Governments, international organizations, and big businesses are all getting behind the false climate narrative and seeking to silence voices like ours. That's because the science, the facts, and the data dispute what you are being told. **Not only is there NOT a climate crisis** , but the human condition is THRIVING because of modest warming and more CO2.
---

_But the Climate Cult is doubling down._ They're pouring billions into "green" initiatives that will destroy our economy while enriching their political allies. And they're indoctrinating our children from kindergarten through college with their apocalyptic fantasy that seeks to infringe on our individual liberties and control people through fear. Your support today will help us:
* Publish groundbreaking scientific studies

* Launch aggressive education campaigns

* Fight back against Green Lobby propaganda

* Restore scientific integrity in our schools

With your help, we can reach MILLIONS of Americans this year with facts that shatter the Green Lobby's narrative. _**[_**Will you please make an immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 to expose the biggest Climate Fictions, defend the truth about CO 2, and fuel our efforts to preserve freedom?**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z71egqverq4qqlgu76vpdtc9uf9chmg7r3sjqkbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)**_

---
_Time is critical, Friend._ **While we have momentum and truth on our side, the Green Lobby is working overtime to silence voices like ours.** They NEED to silence people like me and my colleagues at the CO2 Coalition because we tell a compelling, fact-based story that confirms _there is no climate crisis_. But we won't be silenced so easily, especially with you standing alongside us. _**If you donate today with an amount of $30 of more, I will send you my newest book as a gift for your support. This book contains all of the facts that you need to stand against the big lie. **_ Thank you for standing with science and truth. Together, we'll defeat the Climate Cult's dangerous agenda. Best regards, Gregory Wrightstone
Executive Director
CO2 Coalition P.S. The Climate Cult fears nothing more than informed citizens armed with scientific facts. Please don't wait - act now to protect our freedoms and restore scientific integrity.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1f23km12pecpshh01svqgaea8a2bibnh0p7ffb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)
---
| |
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrep5cag7hm0drgpjm85kj6im1voa1lqaiksjau8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf4uiuvt6lovt9h5s1c30e0f1ek7hb58p0kdl0no_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob6cjh2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
