Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of " The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," along with the companion map today: By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way. That's why we produced " The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD. Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you there?
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvq2ekcsblk6tfmup1uqsdmsd607rboakmd3u20g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2sjfkc9vks01docjp8nnva5sbd0ctsik63rnh40_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrophed94830cl72bo7v1an6egeetb05m0b31mj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl626qh7b1up1v2kbm91bl4993gv9nhi2rs02dr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmrgfnjmfta8rq4v5g00227utuhikoqphg6ibtm0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zotu4d0nokhjlgo1q2np4c7uuj9ifql0e9dba2n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9lscpbts3ub4h3hcinv2i6vkmp11vs6bgbk7hng_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl2qsdms30sphj7782re6qdivviqa46lb7mho42g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmuo0kqb1qu5sa4dh9kib7b1bct6acecj1ff23so_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z85u86n9i32e76fq6c25vu26s72epb5unfeq3lr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo2mvahjldbbpo2vdlk5tsbsib8b4uia5d88ueo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4cedcketant99pf0kh6betrl928f55bei33kno0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zurndc68fg6ko5g5a73u7edhvjhjuojg0qogp0hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z49boti1sfk3i3qei2fdpm30dgrb93glaea6t4lo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhkmngbgu72talg68440vrie22ksb6n57mqlf6vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zncgu6lblld7aecn3llqgudji4tar37t5e4h8f98_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za7n1b4vjh34o8f44n9qriv44g1abg1ujstbtq80_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5aapv2n3mnnleav4lirtj4le3spn8mhk2ciaikg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)
---|---|---

Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5ssn5dgc35237q9og54boql3fpem9jlo3ft4u98_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob1ctieepj246h22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq24ili9o1fmk9vrt2lh1bgjvq8ahtcgf2g75amg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie2ob3cph2bs)_

And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztlotjgimtldcir4njha5h0h55m1hq4bpg67bo4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjieapj1cdh2bs)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsu18udge4j07nb11qd9ik1isfnn6hp156geuk9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjieapj1cdh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zddfmsn2vqq02je2495oilpvfknk3d67b9lc67b8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjieapj1cdh2bs)**

Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... name: Center for American Liberty
subject: Arrested for a sweatshirt
body:
What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American.

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z32f25rk6hdc0ff9fhq3qkfdtts9ghbuem33jp80_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1o34cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American. **One of our clients, Erica Walsh, was arrested — for peacefully wearing a sweatshirt while standing on a public sidewalk.** She wasn’t blocking doors. She wasn’t shouting. She wasn’t breaking the law. She stood silently near the Norfolk Superior Courthouse — where public attention is currently focused due to the ongoing Karen Read trial — on a sidewalk that a federal court has ruled protesters have a constitutional right to be. But Massachusetts State Police arrested her anyway. I’m Mark Trammell, CEO of the **Center for American Liberty** , and we’re stepping in to make sure the state doesn’t get away with it. Just days before Erica’s arrest, another one of our clients, Jason Grant, was blocked from the very same area simply for holding a sign with a Bible verse. This is not an isolated incident. This is a pattern. **State officials are targeting peaceful Americans for expressing viewpoints state officials don’t like — even after a federal appellate court said they have every right to be there.** We’ve already won a major court victory affirming the First Amendment in this case. But now, Massachusetts officials are ignoring the ruling — and doubling down on their crackdown. We’re taking them back to court. And we need your help. **[Will you make a tax-deductible donation to help us defend Erica, hold the state accountable, and protect the First Amendment for all Americans? ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4krem0q6c490lfm0pgtpof3re8h9ip04vp4nr68_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1o34cph2bs)**Your support will help us:
---
* Defend Erica and Jason in court
* Enforce the federal ruling protecting peaceful protest
* Send a message that constitutional rights don’t disappear when the government finds them inconvenient

---
| | At the Center for American Liberty, we fight every day to protect Americans from government overreach, ideological intimidation, and unlawful censorship. But we don’t take government money. We rely entirely on the support of people like you. **[If you believe in the Constitution — if you believe in standing up when others are silenced — please join us.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ej9126c48emaca2eum55d97c6ktrfgkejg67c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1o34cph2bs)** **Because if we don’t hold the line here, the government will keep pushing further.** Thank you for standing with us. Sincerely,
---
| | **Mark Trammell ** CEO, Center for American Liberty

clean_body: What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American. | | | | | | Dear Friend,What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American. One of our clients, Erica Walsh, was arrested — for peacefully wearing a sweatshirt while standing on a public sidewalk. She wasn’t blocking doors. She wasn’t shouting. She wasn’t breaking the law. She stood silently near the Norfolk Superior Courthouse — where public attention is currently focused due to the ongoing Karen Read trial — on a sidewalk that a federal court has ruled protesters have a constitutional right to be. But Massachusetts State Police arrested her anyway. I’m Mark Trammell, CEO of the Center for American Liberty , and we’re stepping in to make sure the state doesn’t get away with it. Just days before Erica’s arrest, another one of our clients, Jason Grant, was blocked from the very same area simply for holding a sign with a Bible verse. This is not an isolated incident. This is a pattern. State officials are targeting peaceful Americans for expressing viewpoints state officials don’t like — even after a federal appellate court said they have every right to be there. We’ve already won a major court victory affirming the First Amendment in this case. But now, Massachusetts officials are ignoring the ruling — and doubling down on their crackdown. We’re taking them back to court. And we need your help. support will help us: Defend Erica and Jason in court Enforce the federal ruling protecting peaceful protest Send a message that constitutional rights don’t disappear when the government finds them inconvenient | | At the Center for American Liberty, we fight every day to protect Americans from government overreach, ideological intimidation, and unlawful censorship. But we don’t take government money. We rely entirely on the support of people like you. Because if we don’t hold the line here, the government will keep pushing further. Thank you for standing with us. Sincerely, | | Mark Trammell CEO, Center for American Liberty | | | | | | Mark Trammell **CEO, Center for American Liberty | | | P.S. We’ve already won one court victory in this case. Now it’s time to enforce it — and defend the rights of peaceful Americans like Erica and Jason. | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: This Navy SEAL needs your help!
body:
a large swath of the bureaucratic brass who infest the Navy don't care about the American warfighter

| | |
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend The Marxists thought they had Captain Brad Geary beat. A decorated Navy SEAL, Capt. Geary served as the commander of BUDs and the SEAL Special Warfare School in Coronado. The bureaucrats in the Biden Pentagon demanded that Geary and the men and women under his command in the SEAL instructor cadre dumb down the famous program to fit their DEI agenda.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z40sqrk9f3sot3s9177omcp1bmt80lgqi7mdhfao_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1p72cth2bs)
---
Navy SEAL Capt. Brad Geary served with distinction, commanding the SEAL School in Coronado, CA. Entrenched Biden Pentagon bureaucrats are fighting Geary tooth and nail to dumb down America's best warriors.
You see, a large swath of the bureaucratic brass who infest the Navy don't care about the American warfighter, military readiness, or even national security. To them, the military is nothing more than a tool of social engineering. _These Pentagon bureaucrats don 't care about your freedom, or the men and women who give their lives defending it_. They'll burn it to the ground (and already are) just to push their woke, DEI, America-hating agenda. Just look at what they've already tried on President Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. And these America-hating bureaucrats are winning in many cases. They just launched a new attack against Secretary Hegseth and his much-needed program to end the DEI policies that are killing the military.
---
**[Fill Out YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57bnkq4e4chis2rln1ockbbusd1h6dnnvi41b70_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1p72cth2bs)!**
---
But Capt. Geary had the courage to simply say "NO." So the Pentagon bureaucrats tried to give him the axe, even attempting to destroy his ability to retire and trying to wipe out an illustrious SEAL career. **But that 's when Stand With Warriors (SWW) stepped in, raising tens of thousands for Geary's defense.** And on Thursday, we won.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfqkuqc0fjoqa2gknr1ob0n9f54999da0fschgig_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1p72cth2bs)
---
SEAL Capt. Brad Geary (right), freshly emerged from the surf on the beach at the SEAL School in Coronado, celebrating his retirement with SWW Vice President Zach Lautenschlager (left). Geary is headed for Washington DC and needs your help!
_Thanks to the support of thousands of people like you, Capt. Geary officially retired from active duty**in order to take a new senior position at the Pentagon**_. We forced the woke bureaucrats to back down and forced them to watch as Geary was honored by hundreds of SEALs, service men and women, and citizens at his retirement ceremony at the famous "Grinder" training grounds at the heart of the SEAL School he commanded. And that's not even the best part. **With help from Stand With Warriors, Capt. Geary is now headed to Washington DC where he will serve as a high-ranking Navy official, overseeing and commanding the very bureaucrats who tried to take him out**. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth knows all about Geary's case. It's part of why he wants to purge the Pentagon of the kind of corruption that tried to take down Geary. That's also why Hegseth recruited Geary to help lead the Trump Navy for the next four years. _**But the Biden bureaucratic Navy brass are furious, and they 're already launching an all-out attack to make sure Geary is unable to start at the Pentagon**_**!** Stand With Warriors is standing with Capt. Geary as the Marxists continue trying to tarnish his good name. They already put him through years of legal hell as they tried to destroy him and the SEAL School. But we had his back. Stand With Warriors provided top-notch legal defense and financial support, giving the Pentagon radicals no choice but to leave Geary and his team ALONE.
---
**[Fill Out YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zls9fvcce5g9d2qo691irp9ek0r52o9ud2lo84j0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1p72cth2bs)!**
---
We didn't just clear Geary's record. We sent a strong message to the Pentagon, showing they can't just push around our patriotic warfighters without America pushing back. We couldn't have done that without your help, and it's time to take it to the next level. **Donate to Stand With Warriors and let us help more heroes like Capt. Brad Geary.** A donation of $100 or $75 would go a very long way. $50 or $35 can make a solid dent. Even $25 or $15 will be put to excellent use. On the same day Stand With Warriors (SWW) Vice President Zach Lautenschlager attended Capt. Geary's retirement ceremony, SWW President Michael Cassidy and General Counsel Davis Younts were in Washington DC to support Under-Secretary of the Air Force nominee Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier at his confirmation hearing.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zph8lc8bfimncl6444sc7pgvv9gspv0qj9i7je4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1p72cth2bs)
---
SWW President Michael Cassidy (left) and SWW General Counsel Davis Younts (right) support Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier in his Senate confirmation hearing for Air Force Under-Secretary.
When Lohmeier sounded the alarm about the rising tide of Marxism in our Armed Forces, he was swiftly fired by those exact Marxists. He courageously warned the public that "anti-American" ideologies like the 1619 Project were taking over the military, and not wanting to be exposed, the Marxists had their revenge. But now, like Geary, he'll be over the very same ideologues who tried to take him down.
---
**[Fill Out YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaeqt53bafi6l38o781d7jf0uet6i15v7dignqng_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1p72cth2bs)!**
---
It's just another example of the new climate within the Pentagon of patriotism and a clear focus on the mission at hand, without distractions from woke and weaponized ideology. It's an opportunity we've been privileged to help create. _But the attacks are continuing. The Marxists HATE to lose, and they hate to lose power_. **They 're already trying to renew their attacks on Geary and Lohmeier.** They and countless others need our help. **Donate to Stand With Warriors and let us help more heroes like Lt. Col. Lohmeier.** A donation of **$100 or $75** would go a very long way. **$50 or $35** can make a solid dent.
Even**$25 or $15** will be put to excellent use.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0p37cd1b6v9hguql8nlmoojg4tg0es4osun1ebg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1p72cth2bs)
---
SWW President Michael Cassidy and General Counsel Davis Younts (left end) stand with Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier (center) and friends at his Senate confirmation Hearing.
Lohmeier himself said it best when he testified before the Senate: _" The President has nominated me for this important position... This includes eliminating all unnecessary distractions and enabling military members to focus on their mission."_ _" The American people, like me, want nothing less than to enable our Department's men and women to succeed so that our military can--through strength--deter conflict."_ He also pointed to Hegseth's focus on the warrior ethos and on lethality.
---
**[Fill Out YOUR Trump-Hegseth Pentagon Leadership Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfqsavi8ecf49t2h508f0o47lh09gv92h0eu7850_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cjie1p72cth2bs)!**
---
Needless to say, it's the dawn of an exciting new era in our Armed Forces. With Trump and Hegseth at the helm, and warriors like Geary and Lohmeier close behind them, there's no shortage of pro-America courage FINALLY putting things right at the Pentagon. But that also means there's no shortage of attacks. In just the past few months of Trump's new term, we've seen them come after any effort to fix things in the military. That means it's only a matter of time before the next attack comes. Men like Geary and Lohmeier need your help right now! To them, the military is nothing more than a tool of social engineering. These Pentagon bureaucrats don 't care about your freedom, or the men and women who give their lives defending it. But that 's when Stand With Warriors (SWW) stepped in, raising tens of thousands for Geary's defense. And on Thursday, we won. SEAL Capt. Geary is headed for Washington DC and needs your help! Thanks to the support of thousands of people like you, Capt. Geary officially retired from active dutyin order to take a new senior position at the Pentagon. And that's not even the best part. With help from Stand With Warriors, Capt. Geary is now headed to Washington DC where he will serve as a high-ranking Navy official, overseeing and commanding the very bureaucrats who tried to take him out. **I want you to see for yourself what happened inside Project Veritas --the struggles over greed, power, and envy that took over.**

**Recently, we made a huge breakthrough:** a judge allowed us to serve Matt Tyrmand, over X. Tyrmand is a key player in the coup against me, and we've been unable to serve him months. He'll have to sit in a deposition with my attorneys to answer, explain, and defend his actions and words that continue to this day.

**That 's right, we're dragging them into the light, one deposition at a time.
**
Before you go any further, **[**watch the video**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn0oc4lrorjkdiopd990b6vlhktguf7s7ogfu21o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g68or6c5h2bs)**[**I 've posted**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0fj299lca34shc799tke9cbh0t3q1ese85kv6a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g68or6c5h2bs). It's part of my docuseries, _The Truth Behind Veritas_ , and it lays out exactly what's happening. You'll see the deposition footage, the interviews, and the documents that prove this isn't just about me--**it 's about protecting journalism**. **[**Click here to watch the video and donate to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdh682j93fag36rf7drgqlulc4s5196vqgd5ehhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g68or6c5h2bs)**

This fight isn't cheap. We need to depose Tyrmand and other board members to keep unraveling the truth. Each deposition costs **$12,000** , and we're looking at needing **$68,000** to cover all the legal fees. [**Time is running out, and the bills are piling up. But every dollar you donate goes directly to Liberty Guard 's legal defense fund, fighting for my right to speak out.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7pio0dt1kdr3fqv9qaopt3n1tfc84qelffd8060_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g68or6c5h2bs)

This isn't just my fight--it's yours too. **If they can silence me, they can silence anyone who dares to question the powerful**. I've spent years exposing corruption, and **now they 're trying to use the courts to stop me**. [**But with your support, we can defeat this lawsuit and keep the truth alive.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuso15587u7c2c5ic7em0brihvel1od47cq49jg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g68or6c5h2bs)

[**Please,**watch the video** , see the evidence, and then **donate** to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z29q9tk5r3fbvdljfq775flbdl3lt4nqvp25361o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g68or6c5h2bs) Every contribution, no matter how small, helps us fight back against those who want to silence us. We're close to our goal, [**but we need you now more than ever**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh2mogk78ood4qfmkk79vg62pheh0o4an9fqr61g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g68or6c5h2bs).

**[**Click here to watch the video and donate to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkp6mf35s91ig441869fvr9ukhje8egh4ea4hut8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g68or6c5h2bs)**

Thank you for standing with me. **Together, we can win this.**

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

body:
Get ready for your blood to boil!

| | | **May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro!**

The Liberal Mob has declared all-out political war on the Trump Administration - and now they have a new target in the President's interim US Attorney in DC, Judge Jeanine.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfkig4dkdvc5spht01k8omqvq718uk54cbvr7mt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g64pb2clh2bs "Jeanine pirro")

**[The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z70ebf81bmqssbikd2h3ljifjj4ubcnhjl7lam6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1g64pb2clh2bs "The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed in a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:")**
* SNL debuted a DISGUSTING skit attacking her on Mother's Day
* A DNC operative called her an "EMBARRASSMENT"
* A prominent Liberal talking head called her a "LUNATIC"
* The Atlantic fired off a hit piece smearing her as a "PARTISAN HACK"

subject: Let’s call this what it is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
If you and I sat down together, I don’t think we’d just leave as friends...

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)If you and I sat down together, I think we'd walk away as friends...
In fact, I think we'd leave as close allies in a battle for our country's future.
****[This is Vivek Ramaswamy: I 'm a husband, a father, and an America First fighter who's sick and tired of watching our country lose its spine.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-QxA)
Why does the single mom in Toledo have to work two jobs while illegal immigrants get handed luxury hotel rooms, healthcare, and debit cards?
Why are kids in Cincinnati stepping over used needles while bureaucrats lecture them about "inclusion"?
Let's call this what it is: America is being hollowed out from the inside.
And I'm not here to nibble around the edges.
I'm running for Governor to overhaul the system from the ground up. I believe Ohio can be the beating heart of America's revival.
That's why my entire campaign is centered on:
1) Supporting President Trump's America First Agenda.2) Cutting red tape3) Slashing taxes4) Empowering families5) Unleashing innovation
And let me tell you, the Democrat Machine is ENRAGED by this mission. They'll do everything they can to stop me from winning this race.
**[So here's my final pitch to you: if I have ANY chance of winning, I desperately need your help right now.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)**[ GIVE A SMALL DONATION TODAY

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: ⛈️April Showers Bring More than May Flowers!🌷
body:
With all the rain we’ve had the past couple of weeks, it feels like it might still be April, But all around, flowers are blooming,
| | |
---
| |
---
| ⛈️April Showers Bring More than May Flowers!🌷
---
| Friends-
With all the rain we've had the past couple of weeks, it feels like it might still be April, But all around, flowers are blooming, the weather is heating up, and exciting things are happening in the month of May! At the beginning of the month, we were thrilled to hear that Governor Youngkin [signed two bills into law that ban hidden fees](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNcwfQV_40qirzEXQO6m7lS4lsHR2_buq3ZX1c_SLMs14H6jhbnDSERftLkRMsZcsDuOGKb1ixycrjIQlm2BzqP46ZI0dulQ61U2dYCKttCJQIJ18U1FfnwrlqP9xbThPHOkuN2tz4ac6ZAOZD1ZzifDv6RTjp14-RQjwi0uRmelZdYjDU2sXAU60ETrUCGmk4OlkGn-h8q9Ro7U8bCK2yvtpga_TIxfxYhh_R24x7k7rCNUnDq4XranhfIYtUNfNrUl-BT_4vb76F07jSxzSFH-obEpwCvoMlverkiu2jGIC-mPupX6Nw==&c=Re3PzgRiODMKpX-ao3vmyR_uzX4Cva9zzVZrp9z5edUpXMm_zVsUbQ==&ch=TLURP8y_5eCjp8TEa97dM96ejbBWuKCtRjDUXsa618AYEtQ5Sfp7CA==). We've been supporting this legislation for over two years, and we're proud that Virginians will now have truth in pricing.
---
| |
---
| | [Read More Here](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNcwfQV_40qirzEXQO6m7lS4lsHR2_buq3ZX1c_SLMs14H6jhbnDSERftLkRMsZcsDuOGKb1ixycrjIQlm2BzqP46ZI0dulQ61U2dYCKttCJQIJ18U1FfnwrlqP9xbThPHOkuN2tz4ac6ZAOZD1ZzifDv6RTjp14-RQjwi0uRmelZdYjDU2sXAU60ETrUCGmk4OlkGn-h8q9Ro7U8bCK2yvtpga_TIxfxYhh_R24x7k7rCNUnDq4XranhfIYtUNfNrUl-BT_4vb76F07jSxzSFH-obEpwCvoMlverkiu2jEZTXmHIGR4Kw==&c=Re3PzgRiODMKpX-ao3vmyR_uzX4Cva9zzVZrp9z5edUpXMm_zVsUbQ==&ch=TLURP8y_5eCjp8TEa97dM96ejbBWuKCtRjDUXsa618AYEtQ5Sfp7CA==)
---
| Celebrating this victory does not mean the work for an affordable Virginia is over. As we near the end of the month, we ask for your support and contributions to help continue the work we are doing to create a fair and affordable economy in Virginia. [Chipping in $5 today will make a huge impact in the fight for an affordable Virginia](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNcwfQV_40qirzEXQO6m7lS4lsHR2_buq3ZX1c_SLMs14H6jhbnDSPLV39ZohY9SwgJmBbt7qVj4KiO1WRr_VJ5XLivWQG6eJfybOD26uOtWPOpLOhBwlsEJxKlaXy_kWqQud9jYwFqhUdvXIlhqXOW_TlgFnnmSYaGJpjJb9giy6ZoQWyjDtth1ib-XS51AHGr9LjyQ9McmpIcfdMO6CAinyaHRu0BT&c=Re3PzgRiODMKpX-ao3vmyR_uzX4Cva9zzVZrp9z5edUpXMm_zVsUbQ==&ch=TLURP8y_5eCjp8TEa97dM96ejbBWuKCtRjDUXsa618AYEtQ5Sfp7CA==).
---
| | [Contribute Today](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNcwfQV_40qirzEXQO6m7lS4lsHR2_buq3ZX1c_SLMs14H6jhbnDSIseSQVFsmHThfcOBL-OpCfaCcgBBbtNzoQsDjWr0uz5dzU5dIv6PKHPsyatifn8KsbIwv5n9c5tjmWLRhTQeuxKmVblGi1_3Dpz0d7iPddf0RYebes0sJCCs0inJ98zz0iBGtcKzFCRUYV_CdYhlwEsjgYTRPFfGrIPl4gsmpzQ&c=Re3PzgRiODMKpX-ao3vmyR_uzX4Cva9zzVZrp9z5edUpXMm_zVsUbQ==&ch=TLURP8y_5eCjp8TEa97dM96ejbBWuKCtRjDUXsa618AYEtQ5Sfp7CA==)
---
| Whether you support us by chipping in or spreading the word on socials, your contribution makes a difference. Check out our social media and [website](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNcwfQV_40qirzEXQO6m7lS4lsHR2_buq3ZX1c_SLMs14H6jhbnDSPLV39ZohY9SUwxw72Ybd5v6RN0zCERAuuh1i7M3RjVwyrHa6biKL1caJYGjR8PKuCzEeg5ktya6tN9cAB48Cevb1MROGXLyHg==&c=Re3PzgRiODMKpX-ao3vmyR_uzX4Cva9zzVZrp9z5edUpXMm_zVsUbQ==&ch=TLURP8y_5eCjp8TEa97dM96ejbBWuKCtRjDUXsa618AYEtQ5Sfp7CA==) to stay up to date on the work being done for affordability in our Commonwealth.

| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNcwfQV_40qirzEXQO6m7lS4lsHR2_buq3ZX1c_SLMs14H6jhbnDSCOYeZdM9e-4E-7K3IgSsUTm2KvjdnTcAbYaXhVun3VwQUS5a7TsvNcM7RnRCsjYJPCaG8vzCHNzkiQJpOlxr3Q64sZ6sp7TiE49KCpdyVEja6gVD6jhKmI=&c=Re3PzgRiODMKpX-ao3vmyR_uzX4Cva9zzVZrp9z5edUpXMm_zVsUbQ==&ch=TLURP8y_5eCjp8TEa97dM96ejbBWuKCtRjDUXsa618AYEtQ5Sfp7CA==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNcwfQV_40qirzEXQO6m7lS4lsHR2_buq3ZX1c_SLMs14H6jhbnDSCOYeZdM9e-4-xBzm_CyAc0XdDntUKAUowvylUWEc8jtK7ib4scueR9-1qMqIIPga53TRk9ADwMybfKoq3A5bdCItqlVmTKh-Qz7i1uQ6dNs&c=Re3PzgRiODMKpX-ao3vmyR_uzX4Cva9zzVZrp9z5edUpXMm_zVsUbQ==&ch=TLURP8y_5eCjp8TEa97dM96ejbBWuKCtRjDUXsa618AYEtQ5Sfp7CA==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNcwfQV_40qirzEXQO6m7lS4lsHR2_buq3ZX1c_SLMs14H6jhbnDSCOYeZdM9e-4af7cQb7AlpGnvUoboGuCqRq8CH6vp3tFgYGIL4rTCEu3rV79gYMyBfL8_nkcU784Z2yuvqcM3C38V1qytQAv5OHIItTZoX1coPWpKERa4DU=&c=Re3PzgRiODMKpX-ao3vmyR_uzX4Cva9zzVZrp9z5edUpXMm_zVsUbQ==&ch=TLURP8y_5eCjp8TEa97dM96ejbBWuKCtRjDUXsa618AYEtQ5Sfp7CA==)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyckM2umzAUhJ_G7IzM8Q9hwSIRIeoiURVVrbqyTuzjYBUwAnOv8vZVqvsEXc63GM18v672inGM8_OGE7XZ23XONg9U5SHOz1faHc4-5eTxldNmQYDmQnOQdlnTtpDLtip8WzWoKlNQW9WqbhqloC6G1jfSCE8HQtnoEIIwTmrpdNBNQP8wRWzfhUKDrIQQoEv0oVbGgDLOawgPpsS-eMxU5nUnj3F8lTN9bsXYDjkvG5NHBj2DfiO3r1TiTD7l0qWJQf9Y8YP4I6U_G4O-0iEodfA8GHBcKUP8UDXA_UEJCjXWEoHJfs-T3dK-OmKyO3UXfj_fGJg3nsjHfWKyO1-_iMNpwficmey-jgh76i72dD_-PNtvl8vv_l--n2_2-5H_6G7F2vrlM45j3EzNlHhOGMf33iL_r_2PFv4GAAD__2GMkRc)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children 's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyckM2umzAUhJ_G7IzM8Q9hwSIRIeoiURVVrbqyTuzjYBUwAnOv8vZVqvsEXc63GM18v672inGM8_OGE7XZ23XONg9U5SHOz1faHc4-5eTxldNmQYDmQnOQdlnTtpDLtip8WzWoKlNQW9WqbhqloC6G1jfSCE8HQtnoEIIwTmrpdNBNQP8wRWzfhUKDrIQQoEv0oVbGgDLOawgPpsS-eMxU5nUnj3F8lTN9bsXYDjkvG5NHBj2DfiO3r1TiTD7l0qWJQf9Y8YP4I6U_G4O-0iEodfA8GHBcKUP8UDXA_UEJCjXWEoHJfs-T3dK-OmKyO3UXfj_fGJg3nsjHfWKyO1-_iMNpwficmey-jgh76i72dD_-PNtvl8vv_l--n2_2-5H_6G7F2vrlM45j3EzNlHhOGMf33iL_r_2PFv4GAAD__2GMkRc) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyckM2umzAUhJ_G7IzM8Q9hwSIRIeoiURVVrbqyTuzjYBUwAnOv8vZVqvsEXc63GM18v672inGM8_OGE7XZ23XONg9U5SHOz1faHc4-5eTxldNmQYDmQnOQdlnTtpDLtip8WzWoKlNQW9WqbhqloC6G1jfSCE8HQtnoEIIwTmrpdNBNQP8wRWzfhUKDrIQQoEv0oVbGgDLOawgPpsS-eMxU5nUnj3F8lTN9bsXYDjkvG5NHBj2DfiO3r1TiTD7l0qWJQf9Y8YP4I6U_G4O-0iEodfA8GHBcKUP8UDXA_UEJCjXWEoHJfs-T3dK-OmKyO3UXfj_fGJg3nsjHfWKyO1-_iMNpwficmey-jgh76i72dD_-PNtvl8vv_l--n2_2-5H_6G7F2vrlM45j3EzNlHhOGMf33iL_r_2PFv4GAAD__2GMkRc)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: "Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs." It's amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us finish Season Two of ****_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyckM2umzAUhJ_G7IzM8Q9hwSIRIeoiURVVrbqyTuzjYBUwAnOv8vZVqvsEXc63GM18v672inGM8_OGE7XZ23XONg9U5SHOz1faHc4-5eTxldNmQYDmQnOQdlnTtpDLtip8WzWoKlNQW9WqbhqloC6G1jfSCE8HQtnoEIIwTmrpdNBNQP8wRWzfhUKDrIQQoEv0oVbGgDLOawgPpsS-eMxU5nUnj3F8lTN9bsXYDjkvG5NHBj2DfiO3r1TiTD7l0qWJQf9Y8YP4I6U_G4O-0iEodfA8GHBcKUP8UDXA_UEJCjXWEoHJfs-T3dK-OmKyO3UXfj_fGJg3nsjHfWKyO1-_iMNpwficmey-jgh76i72dD_-PNtvl8vv_l--n2_2-5H_6G7F2vrlM45j3EzNlHhOGMf33iL_r_2PFv4GAAD__2GMkRc)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower - please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special "Thank You" for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyckM2umzAUhJ_G7IzM8Q9hwSIRIeoiURVVrbqyTuzjYBUwAnOv8vZVqvsEXc63GM18v672inGM8_OGE7XZ23XONg9U5SHOz1faHc4-5eTxldNmQYDmQnOQdlnTtpDLtip8WzWoKlNQW9WqbhqloC6G1jfSCE8HQtnoEIIwTmrpdNBNQP8wRWzfhUKDrIQQoEv0oVbGgDLOawgPpsS-eMxU5nUnj3F8lTN9bsXYDjkvG5NHBj2DfiO3r1TiTD7l0qWJQf9Y8YP4I6U_G4O-0iEodfA8GHBcKUP8UDXA_UEJCjXWEoHJfs-T3dK-OmKyO3UXfj_fGJg3nsjHfWKyO1-_iMNpwficmey-jgh76i72dD_-PNtvl8vv_l--n2_2-5H_6G7F2vrlM45j3EzNlHhOGMf33iL_r_2PFv4GAAD__2GMkRc)** , I'll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyckM2umzAUhJ_G7IzM8Q9hwSIRIeoiURVVrbqyTuzjYBUwAnOv8vZVqvsEXc63GM18v672inGM8_OGE7XZ23XONg9U5SHOz1faHc4-5eTxldNmQYDmQnOQdlnTtpDLtip8WzWoKlNQW9WqbhqloC6G1jfSCE8HQtnoEIIwTmrpdNBNQP8wRWzfhUKDrIQQoEv0oVbGgDLOawgPpsS-eMxU5nUnj3F8lTN9bsXYDjkvG5NHBj2DfiO3r1TiTD7l0qWJQf9Y8YP4I6U_G4O-0iEodfA8GHBcKUP8UDXA_UEJCjXWEoHJfs-T3dK-OmKyO3UXfj_fGJg3nsjHfWKyO1-_iMNpwficmey-jgh76i72dD_-PNtvl8vv_l--n2_2-5H_6G7F2vrlM45j3EzNlHhOGMf33iL_r_2PFv4GAAD__2GMkRc), I'll also send you a copy of my children's book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books - the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you'll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyckM2umzAUhJ_G7IzM8Q9hwSIRIeoiURVVrbqyTuzjYBUwAnOv8vZVqvsEXc63GM18v672inGM8_OGE7XZ23XONg9U5SHOz1faHc4-5eTxldNmQYDmQnOQdlnTtpDLtip8WzWoKlNQW9WqbhqloC6G1jfSCE8HQtnoEIIwTmrpdNBNQP8wRWzfhUKDrIQQoEv0oVbGgDLOawgPpsS-eMxU5nUnj3F8lTN9bsXYDjkvG5NHBj2DfiO3r1TiTD7l0qWJQf9Y8YP4I6U_G4O-0iEodfA8GHBcKUP8UDXA_UEJCjXWEoHJfs-T3dK-OmKyO3UXfj_fGJg3nsjHfWKyO1-_iMNpwficmey-jgh76i72dD_-PNtvl8vv_l--n2_2-5H_6G7F2vrlM45j3EzNlHhOGMf33iL_r_2PFv4GAAD__2GMkRc)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family - not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---

clean_body: take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | | | | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Millions of families are already watching Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: "Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on Iggy and Mr. Kirk and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs." It's amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. ** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower - please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special "Thank You" for your , I'll send you Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your , I'll also send you a copy of my children's book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books - the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you've seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family - not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart - maybe even yours - is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. body:
A [small Cessna 550 jet crashed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMV3QZGxnbgoXt6HLtlsiY8ZhIgeQ8WKxT79iX2HrI33S-T8f_cNLkvn54d_sSlz6meuWuBTOfRTOx5r8zCH7beJVwtcsO-ceAe0F7AV1P3pJR2-a0UVmZN2wu5Kh-92QhmZyZLTxZGNg8tFqBgIDNA7AAwF7asSdGljUVwCL_9rA_h5wNOFG9uZDUAZ4lLLk9rXIXCaO6Vh2zm1Y3k1yUynrpvR_hZ3CrtbaDkM4N4XdeUZhl2RnhV14GeRqvw_i0mQ3rlVSku1GysDz7SX9iuVPGXaHPwEAAP__NxZxdw) into the Tierrasanta neighborhood of San Diego early Thursday morning, killing multiple passengers and setting at least 15 homes ablaze as residents slept.

# Friday, May 23, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1934, infamous criminals [Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAQxfGnwR0WGeOvgmIbd9l2S4vAOJ7dMVhAYvH2q1zdN7j1Tzo6-v-5r3dLTOH52x5oyhbXgFdmLAXTuhGmerIN6JLNO57kXoHemFZQ0EvVS-hWb4nrqhtvNkTArkFzG_U4z3rsVLMbPc1qmMANUz8ODz1tw2ZH725a6x6n7tGQ-aypHrqbUj1MrUM7O_DaDWM_WOeEVuipxNT-jRTKjhvX-MbUung0bPZSziy6XwIWAct1Xe1OucRUPy5gKTtl6W2VFOS3CFgOWyV0ApYzMjmU_4hZbvaIryzjq7C9snzEEAilDV46rh6bZPx5ETPlYRRaPQ9L_PWi_Cjd28D_AAAA__9FMoTc) were shot to death by Texas and Louisiana state police near Sailes, Louisiana, after a crime spree across multiple states and the alleged murder of 13 people. After 233 years, the penny’s days are numbered. As we report below, the U.S. Treasury has [placed its final order](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL8Gd6x417CYgiIN3Uub0mLhen0jDBbgtfz3kfMLr5lpRjOj8-d7_vaUKL9_-w1tX8qc8WwJe8c6L4T12pPPGKpvK-4UjkwfrDMIUFwoDuMcPaVrlkO0CyLgOKD90lIbI_UohtUiRK8XYaQxftHh-TKjWrRQ_iV9nKZpIHu3CQXjlxAKpkdAbwJEGZ5aPX0ITAqM1Et9_C2U-4pLusoH6yOUbUh27X1vbPzFwDFw53k-juZ7if66Awxc66VeDNxWMt5-zzFw4hYABm7HnC--1xKP0KlkjjlSfvNe0bejXvxofKPceSiUGwM3jXrSRiohNAM3VBv3k1Ki9tRMivfmKf0_139E9GPhXwAAAP__Ww-JqA) for penny blanks. What will you do—hoard them, spend them, or hand them out to wide-eyed kids like buried treasure? Let us know by replying to this email. We're flying today with [Claritox Pro](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M1uqzAUBOCnMbsgc2zzs_AiyhW3iyZSV83OMvYhnNYBZBwQb1_RV-h6Ps1I83k1V0uBxsfNPlGnfjIjbkvAlDCanjDuc7AjumiXAWdyr5FWjAY4qBNXJxDGWwq7kZnXPSKgyFAXlayaRlaCZ4Ouu77oPJYl2KouuBLSKyW46BpVc-hsRvpo4wpEwbmCOndoGwdeurJSpXWOSY6e0hTzr4nGNGAf9mnFmLvpmQU9pDQvTJwZtAzabdty2wXgKX4fgEEL7x8XcWT_L_e32_1wol2mV3RoyDPxrw_7aJNHD-Jqd1DnLGo_bxQCLWXFJH88LYXfufSnj1YNPwEAAP__HK55LA). Take their quick self-assessment below and protect your long-term health.

## Israeli Embassy Staffers Killed in D.C.
Israeli embassy staffers Sarah Lynn Milgrim, 26, and Yaron Lischinsky, 28, were [shot and killed Wednesday night](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFurDAQheGnMd2iYWzjS-HiNnSbNqVlzHiZyGuQcUC8fUReIfWRPun8n0_39Jw4vz78m2yNq8t07olqpeIiU7m25DOF4veFNg7fmQ8qDgH1A_QDpZs9p8upZraRCEk2ZDujzDAoI6FZLJBUWncxdj7GQKZHlP00Qa8BSHps2N4aaJQdgMZ_bSA_BJxV6I3ufQhCAc1c19J-rZzrQjFd60GlDeu7SXapdduF_C9wFDie59lOU7g3geN9RuCY-CCBY7iGo3SQjcTaFDtvJ6fEe2-Egtfbc_oV658yHBZ_AgAA___fYnDO) outside the Capital Jewish Museum in Washington, D.C. The suspect, Elias Rodriguez, 30, of Chicago, was arrested at the scene and reportedly shouted “Free Palestine.” Federal authorities are probing potential terror links. Milgrim, a peace advocate with two master’s degrees, had worked [extensively on interfaith diplomacy and Israeli-Palestinian outreach](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdLMyw9_dwkUauk2bEg32AJMYG9neRbx9RKQ8wW1Oc6Tv6Du_XtOLxEtYf9LOpixxCnxmz6VwmhbhdB2eAttEeeND7DvIh9OEGjvQHWAzORJ_TW3lzMKM3FRs6qEdns92aHS1ma--bsn1c_1kbhDJNgPXXd_rYe6RZ6zE3DTdYVNr3eHXwzI9LbrW9kPXk7Wq1eykxPT4HSWUjRd_xQ-nh4175c1WypFV80PhqHAM1xFzuSuF4w1WOOo7EBWO7wy3n8JxfYfADlw8A0hOxF6A95lyviAXWhZOkCnRBrv4NckOZ0x_2EEMcDBZhvkt3klYYeZyMgc4yHMuEoRCBgruP_eeq5JxxyneS-4H1ep1J_H_BMq3Xv8Y_BsAAP__WE-ZQA). She was killed at an event focused on Gaza assistance. The couple, described as deeply in love, were days away from a planned engagement.
## House Passes Trump’s Budget Bill
House Republicans narrowly passed former President Trump’s [“One Big, Beautiful Bill Act”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0SnCAURp9GOxy84M8WFGnsNm1KB-GiN4PAAK7x7TObV0j9zXxzzvn1Xt-aPIX9pz5RVRfXgHfxWCvm1RHmJ3kd0GRdDkxkrkAfzCtwGBgfGIjVavLPKlurHCKgaFH1k5xeLzkJ3h5Kg5ihh3kc0HE3z6IfAUdpJfauHwS2pL5vfADRcz7A3BnULwNWmnEaRm1MIzlaqjF3vyOFeqDzT_xg7kw8W6-OWlNpxI8GlgaW-747F_98Lb57A0uKniqZ0sBi8Ywm61pYymjJVJZ0KRR2VvN1psI22tmG-qrkLs828p6ZWCo7dXhYxnRtnowOhRXUtbRZ2XST91TGqZF8PzX5f1T1v1J-FPwNAAD__8FejIQ) overnight Thursday in a 215–214 vote. [The package delivers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuhDAQBNCvMd0hs7bxuXCRhu7SpkS-9QJ78QEyDoi_j8gvpBtppCfNfD36R-DE8_gZ3uTLsPQzHVuiUij3A1M-1xRmwhy2iVbGn5l3yj1IMDdpbqD6GDidva6iH4iAVEW-sdo6p62S1eSRomqUU86QoUB31961s86qIbqnVE3F_tKkAdVIaeBeIwWHEDW21rQBUWhJkcuS69fCc5loSOeyU65xeVfJT6Wsm1AfAjoB3XEc9fOJVyegu8YI6EIujImuiOYc5fc4wvxaquzjenBKvLVWaDm-A6c_tfzrit3DbwAAAP__yXtyxw) deep tax cuts, ramps up border security funding, and imposes stricter requirements on Medicaid and food stamp recipients. GOP leaders hailed the bill, but Democrats warned it would hurt poor people. The bill now heads to the Senate.
## Plane Crashes Into San Diego Homes
A [small Cessna 550 jet crashed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMV3QZGxnbgoXt6HLtlsiY8ZhIgeQ8WKxT79iX2HrI33S-T8f_cNLkvn54d_sSlz6meuWuBTOfRTOx5r8zCH7beJVwtcsO-ceAe0F7AV1P3pJR2-a0UVmZN2wu5Kh-92QhmZyZLTxZGNg8tFqBgIDNA7AAwF7asSdGljUVwCL_9rA_h5wNOFG9uZDUAZ4lLLk9rXIXCaO6Vh2zm1Y3k1yUynrpvR_hZ3CrtbaDkM4N4XdeUZhl2RnhV14GeRqvw_i0mQ3rlVSku1GysDz7SX9iuVPGXaHPwEAAP__NxZxdw) into the Tierrasanta neighborhood of San Diego early Thursday morning, killing multiple passengers and setting at least 15 homes ablaze as residents slept. The plane, which departed from Teterboro, New Jersey, and refueled in Wichita, Kansas, was en route to Montgomery-Gibbs Executive Airport when it went down in dense fog just before 4 a.m. Emergency responders reported a massive debris field, vehicles on fire, and widespread jet fuel spillage across the streets. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdI7MYP4KF9vQZdst0cQeYPYaG9lOIt7-itxHuM00o_PpfOfffb4jew7rX9zJlCXOgd7ZUymU5oUpnYfHQDZh3uhg-wz8ojSDglaqVkIzO2R_zrpyZiECaioyda_7cdR9o6rN1PXQ28cyPjrs3YhDpzQMGl3d6EUDUsXmoqkWmlqpFoabJRwtOG27vu3QWqEVOS4x3f5HDmWjxZ_xRelm4155s5VyZNH8ETAJmMJ5xFyul4DpAguY1HUABEzPLC8_AdNHS_54ZcmhRJkxSMe0RrnFnbLMB6YvDqvcn77w4UkunOgKV8m4483ec-56odW6I_tPnfKrDV8GvgMAAP__58qGLQ). While no serious ground injuries have been confirmed, around 100 residents—mostly from military families—have been evacuated, and the National Transportation Safety Board is leading the investigation.

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Israeli Embassy Staffers Killed in D.C. Israeli embassy staffers Sarah Lynn Milgrim, 26, and Yaron Lischinsky, 28, were outside the Capital Jewish Museum in Washington, D.C. The suspect, Elias Rodriguez, 30, of Chicago, was arrested at the scene and reportedly shouted “Free Palestine.” Federal authorities are probing potential terror links. Milgrim, a peace advocate with two master’s degrees, had worked . She was killed at an event focused on Gaza assistance. The couple, described as deeply in love, were days away from a planned engagement. House Passes Trump’s Budget Bill House Republicans narrowly passed former President Trump’s overnight Thursday in a 215–214 vote. deep tax cuts, ramps up border security funding, and imposes stricter requirements on Medicaid and food stamp recipients. GOP leaders hailed the bill, but Democrats warned it would hurt poor people. The bill now heads to the Senate. Plane Crashes Into San Diego Homes A into the Tierrasanta neighborhood of San Diego early Thursday morning, killing multiple passengers and setting at least 15 homes ablaze as residents slept. The plane, which departed from Teterboro, New Jersey, and refueled in Wichita, Kansas, was en route to Montgomery-Gibbs Executive Airport when it went down in dense fog just before 4 a.m. Emergency responders reported a massive debris field, vehicles on fire, and widespread jet fuel spillage across the streets. . While no serious ground injuries have been confirmed, around 100 residents—mostly from military families—have been evacuated, and the National Transportation Safety Board is leading the investigation. The connection is clear, and the implications are serious. play a critical role in maintaining healthy brain function, nerve communication, and balance. When they’re missing, the body’s internal systems begin to misfire. Signals from the brain to vital organs can become disrupted, leading to a cascade of physical decline. subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xi-vORf83pJ6W57IiCBMpg~~/AARclBA~/Uya1jfVuPgPi97CYJ-m-hUNawK4xSWo_efICj01C6HgsP0PIosvvqMUcclh1ADu_q-pv8xI8leOduYfi4ZyIyPtXxMDXywEsUWip188QAm34xTGpGQ1Zyrj1koyCqP2mUvbMrcODLAvZO5NMSfQhV5yPEuJ9peIjXxA8eE5Zq039v5bqIV06XW5F06bUNYkob79TvslumWVSWWn7R32wo2klQ0u6Ni__k1SrQWTD-ktwvqk4HBMgig5JlhNg-QftNSSvp81ZLqy_32ItsvnttVAjtxU4vwBlxGS58rlGuXdtmturNzQjEzRChhIRDr90)

| |
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xi-vORf83pJ6W57IiCBMpg~~/AARclBA~/Uya1jfVuPgPi97CYJ-m-hUNawK4xSWo_efICj01C6HgsP0PIosvvqMUcclh1ADu_q-pv8xI8leOduYfi4ZyIyPtXxMDXywEsUWip188QAm34xTGpGQ1Zyrj1koyCqP2mUvbMrcODLAvZO5NMSfQhV5yPEuJ9peIjXxA8eE5Zq039v5bqIV06XW5F06bUNYkob79TvslumWVSWWn7R32wo2klQ0u6Ni__k1SrQWTD-ktwvqk4HBMgig5JlhNg-QftNSSvp81ZLqy_32ItsvnttVAjtxU4vwBlxGS58rlGuXdtmturNzQjEzRChhIRDr90) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xi-vORf83pJ6W57IiCBMpg~~/AARclBA~/Uya1jfVuPgPi97CYJ-m-hUNawK4xSWo_efICj01C6HgsP0PIosvvqMUcclh1ADu_q-pv8xI8leOduYfi4ZyIyPtXxMDXywEsUWip188QAm34xTGpGQ1Zyrj1koyCqP2mUvbMrcODLAvZO5NMSfQhV5yPEuJ9peIjXxA8eE5Zq039v5bqIV06XW5F06bUNYkob79TvslumWVSWWn7R32wo2klQ0u6Ni__k1SrQWTD-ktwvqk4HBMgig5JlhNg-QftNSSvp81ZLqy_32ItsvnttVAjtxU4vwBlxGS58rlGuXdtmturNzQjEzRChhIRDr90)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

## THC Ban Passes House
The Texas House approved legislation Wednesday to [ban all hemp products containing THC](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuO3DAMRb9G7jTQwxrbhYs07jZtSoOSOWMCehgSPbuTrw-8xf5AGhbEwSEv7p-P9QMoUn7-hoQzfz3KmvGzRWTGuvIePOT9rJUCZHyUigEaQ16NMk4qJ41dN6D4Xvtum73aJt3hrId-mKZRjbrb52nolbpbp-5uGO9m6_00GevGh1Z353vb0XzJlDNWa6X1eAveW6XRofXeabCiV7gRl3rjHRm_oD3iu7yw3kJJXZx35qMJ-0uYRZgllJTOTPymdEDgixFmgbMxZWGWVk7eZcDMFaL8WX9rZcQntQh8VhRmud4SZlHXMOYH2svZUKbywia5SA9ZhpLbmcBHlLwHedSynYGbDJUSZYj0F-VRWsPWqFznujpvxyfFSO0-iF49E1D8jsP_V8JrNv8CAAD__wKFniU), dealing a major blow to an industry that has thrived since the passage of a 2019 law that allowed the sale of cannabis products with less than 0.3% THC. Lawmakers have debated the merits of a ban versus [imposing tighter regulations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAQx0-DOyIY20lcUGzj7m27pTXAYKNHIIJJ_Hz7lSPtCbaZ5qf5f_35Wr4wppjX3_ggwz-hLJn2loiZ6sKbs5i3V63RYaZQKjlsjHkBBaNUo4R-8RjTsQydN1b5SXdk9G24TdNd3XW3mR5DT350MF0nfSVvRwcAFDRgGDSoLppTTI3Qa620vl-ctb3SNFJv7aixF4MiH7nUC2_E9IMtpKO8qV5ceXTJbMzPJvpfAmYB877vl--GfEIB89lGwPx5EzCfVgJmdR6Af0AmWmNLyK9KsmT5prqSLEG68ngmYkqHtJhzzKvkzclnLf7luEkMTFV-0yG38mok34VJwNxV4597TCm2600Man1gTJ-0_H8bvw38DQAA___2mpIm). Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has been a vocal advocate for an outright ban, claiming the products endanger children and threatening to force a special session if the House didn’t pass Senate Bill 3. Opponents argue it ignores the needs of veterans who suffer from PTSD and patients with chronic illnesses, predicting that some may [turn to the black market](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LvO4yAUBOCnwR0RN98Kim3cZdstrQMcB3bBjuAkTt5-lbzCX4_0jWb-XNcrpJz2228oaOm1HeuOZ8tIhHWl6B3s8VFr8rDjdlT00Aj2VQnVc9FzpdcAKb9X0wXrRJhlh1aOZpznSUyyi9ZvAWbZT9I7MZtpVoM0ahqGMPoRvBm6ZD-Y6JWWUkg5XbxzWkjsUTvXS9DMCAyJjnqhiIQvaFt-H0-sF3-ULttIdG9M_2JqYWqhiDHl_MmYWuJR8DOIqaUREPITyEemll5LY5TmX49nOAv8w9q4g51T9DxiufOCIXnIvEBNfx-wA1NLV224nynn1IaRGXErkL5tHf3sv6dV_wMAAP__XvKFSw). CBD products are exempt from the ban. The Texas hemp industry employs 50,000 people and generates [around $8 billion in annual revenue](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUDuuqzAUXI3pjPyBAIWLNHR5r7wlOjaH2JI_yDYh2f0V2cLtRprR_H4eywOcd_H5DwKq-t7SEvEsHmvFvFRrNER75OwMRNxSRgOlQlwEEz1lPRVyWcH5z9I1q9JsnXiDig_dME0jG3ljFTJA0NzcsEfZSTTDKHE1WzdxiUzoxqnLjPVCcs44H1ujtWT8kmvdc5CkY7i6mnJbLVZ8Q9n8J70wtyaFxitb616IvBMxEzGf59mGEi-OiBkjPQoR8zWKiPmLNUSaIq3W0OcRgsNCU7WYqUmxHAG0R2ox7HTPaT1MLXSHUrDQbza16ShIxAyZ3u983vB_abJa99N578ptIB17BnD-267-7dOXEr8BAAD__76Wjkg). Some business associations have threatened to sue the state if Gov. Abbott signs the measure into law.
## Doctor Sentenced for $325M Fraud
Dr. Jorge Zamora-Quezada, a rheumatologist who practiced in the Rio Grande Valley city of Mission, was [sentenced to 10 years in prison](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LvSmzAUBOCnER2MLohLoSINndOmZI7ggJQREpGOje2nz9iv8Pc73-zun9t8Ax983H_DgYaeW5ojXiUgEeaZ3GIhunvOfoGIW8q4QCGIs-RS11zXUs0r-PCa22o1lq-jqNCIvu3HceCDqJzRo-B6aPtus6Ltug1FqxXyQXU4btqKypsPxrVUQnAhhmaxVnGBGpW1WoBiLcfVU8oNOSR8QtnCKz0wN0s6qmAc0VmY-sXkxOR0XVdzvApEiJSiT58Qk9NnFZNTSXdy9RdhcoJMfgnI5PQ35R3rNxwpQ_3vjm9YoS4YCePi415LrtSglWhOd1bZrOflQ_Cl61nL9wN8-Hahnz34MPJ_AAAA__-eeYZf) on Wednesday for orchestrating a $325 million healthcare fraud scheme that harmed thousands of patients while he indulged in a lavish lifestyle. Zamora-Quezada [falsely diagnosed his patients](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O5CAQhJ8GZ4z4sWfswMElzvbSCy1omqF1GEbQu955-5P3FS6pqPSVvvrzsX84ylSev92BK3_Huhc8e0ZmbDsn8K6kz9YIXMFYG4Lr7MpulJmkmqSxe3CU3_s4hNWrsOgBV_0YH8syq1kPafXeOAsLRBtDRPCznvAe7xb84mY14kDrBVOTsVorrecbeG-Vxgmt95N2VowKA3FtN07I-O16zO_6he0G9RjymphfXdhfwmzCbOd53iAT_DWpfnau5WoJs11awmy5gsvCbNemMJu6wmhhth-wDBW4NnmmKqPLHfNbBnLPUjsG-XJMWLjLkzhJSK0WAkk5F-wdu6QitZ4P2SHhgbJjYSyAQXKVr0a9FmG2oa3hdVLO1O8PMarn4Sj_mPD__f-1mn8BAAD__yR2nWA)—many of them elderly and disabled—with rheumatoid arthritis and other chronic illnesses for more than 18 years, prescribing unnecessary treatments that only worsened their suffering. Some of his patients experienced strokes, liver damage, hair loss, and necrosis of the jawbone. Matthew Galeotti, head of the Justice Department Criminal Division, called it "one of the most egregious” cases of its kind, [characterizing the doctor’s conduct](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAQAF-DMyzAZvAEBJc420svtBpoD5wwWNA7Xv_-dPuFfUCVSvXnY_uAlFN5_YYDLX3tdSt49YxE2DaK3kGJn60lDwX32tBDJyibEkpzobmatgAp39s8BOtEeMoBrTSzeT4Xscgh2scsDBiHSu7amUWDeBgfpF7AyAWUH5L9LxNaTVIKKZfROzcJiRon57SEic0CQ6LaRopI-AV9z3d9Yxt9PYZsI9HZ2fSLqZWp9bqu8e9np-RxfNU3U2s9gan1bEyt3zQP1VNt_IqV75A75puHBK9SOwZ-AiUs1HnHQlg8Bi4FvxFa5-k4W-q1HFiIS7kcPCJkitxDw6HZcF4p59Qfhs3idUDK34n0s7Fvq_4FAAD__x5AkD4) as "depraved." With the proceeds of his fraudulent practice, Zamora-Quezada had acquired 13 properties across the U.S., a private jet, and a Maserati. Prosecutors had [sought restitution of $100 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnDAUhJ8GOiNfcIDCRRq6TZsS-XK8HMnYyD5Zdt8-Yl_hr0czmu_7-9geFhPm5x97gKF3LFuGqyUggrrR7p3N-79a0dsMsVTwtpHNm-RSM66ZVFuwmD7b2AfjeFhED0ZM47QsM59Fvxvt46RmH30Et4QgooyLWFQMk5ZiHHWP5h7jWiohuBDz4J1TXIAG5ZwWVnUjh4BU6kA7ELxti-lTXlAHX44-mZ3obJ363cm1k-t1XUMs75vizju5niUhoW-dXL9tFoqnUlmDTJA9BCY4-4CtjZ0VW8msZGBHacQaPjPGG56Ytw0aOy0hZGK7rUdfTTgvTAnbr6kb-fOwmL6n6GcqX0b-DwAA__-b9oyw), but Zamora-Quezada was ordered to pay $28 million.
## NOAA Releases Hurricane Forecast
The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) is predicting an [above-normal 2025 Atlantic hurricane season](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQBuCnsTcswGCbgaFLtnTtaJ3hHCMRiOAaJ29fOVH7Ah3vdLpf3_91ns8QYkiXT7iipcea54R7jUiEZabNLZC271KCg4RrLuigEqRZcqkZ10z2s4cQn7NqvV24N6JFK0Y1GjPxSbSb5U4NWjpjYBj9NA0ahQJjlPc4eJjWNtjjGdeyF4ILMXVuWXouUGO_LFpA3yiOPlAuHW1I-IC6xme-Y-lcvrbRbkS32vQfjTw18rTve7fmx45A2_vkWL4ndtgaeUoZgP2x2K-LvVRAERIFxypCzakt1t_2EGOow9gofrlCiK9k-l9fdyt_AgAA__9ufIGA), with 13-19 named storms, 6-10 hurricanes, and 3-5 major (Category 3 or higher) hurricanes. The above-normal prediction is [attributed to the neutral phase](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9uwyAQBvCnwZstOPyPgaGLt3TtaB34HJAIWEDj5O2rRGpfoOPppO_T7_u6rBf0wcfrJ95I18ee1khnCVQr5bU6azC675y9xUh7ymSxVIwrcBhaPrQg1w19eK59s2nDNyUa0mLqJ6VmPovGaTESKmXBcIUSZrOBnWHku5pmJcZBNV6_wvgAUgguxNxZYyQXNJA0ZhAoWc9p8zXlrjqq9MCyh2e6U-5sujVBu1qPwuQHg4XBcp5nZ11O8fV93YTVUWawYK7eBmKwxITY_rHaQlhSbN-mX2MLXPZ86mV3uKPJejtOH4Iv48R6fr2hD-_2-r_N7hp-AgAA___dU4AY) of the El Niño–Southern Oscillation (ENSO), as well as “warmer than average ocean temperatures, forecasts for weak wind shear, and the potential for higher activity from the West African Monsoon.” On average, between 1991 and 2020, the Atlantic saw 14 named storms, 7 hurricanes, and 3 major hurricanes per year. [Last year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp8GOiP_wAKFizR0N21KNLYHGMnYK3vusvv2ESnyArc9xafvnD9f6xdQpLT_hhMtv7e8JrxqRGYsKx_eQTq-SyEPCbdc0ENlSKuWehByENqsASh-1r4N1skwqxatGvtxnic5qfawD2kQ_ey3IL0G4_xoMGyzGR-DnNzYt2TvMTloo5RUauq8c0YqHNA4NygwTS8xEOfS8YGMb6hb_OQXls7ns432YH7Wxvxq9NLo5bquLmWAbs-vRi-3jSgYESo2egGOkJi8-C8lKkLNSRTwWAVnsVGieoiL-KAbpx1F3sSzYCDPGET6Ph2WmyU4MYjKuZy1LTY8L4qR6mNsermfQPHfQ_5Z15fVfwMAAP__zFqReA) brought 18 named storms, 11 hurricanes, and 5 major hurricanes. The forecast calls for a 60% chance that the number of named storms will be [above average](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUL2SqyAUfhrtdAA1aEFxm3S57ZbOAY6BWcLJwElM3n7HFPsC237z_X9d1gvEFPP1P9zQ8GujNeNeEzJjWTk4Czk8SokOMm5U0EFlyKsSaurE1Klh9RDTex1bb6zwi2zRSD3qZZnFLNtgFmsHoUHYRW969n4WA0jrwHs3iVGPbTSHmZjUIKWQcu7doZA44WDtJGFoRoE-MpWeAzK-oG7pTU8svaNbm0xgvtdm-Neoc6PO-773G73UKdCjMuWDdMAIHLA06pwJoPv0B06QObrud2FXESrljh6ciL7bYvx9jynFetLNKK43iOmTyn_76mnUTwAAAP__dNqAEA), a 30% chance for an average number, and a 10% chance for a below-average number. Hurricane season starts June 1 and lasts through the end of November.

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | THC Ban Passes House The Texas House approved legislation Wednesday to , dealing a major blow to an industry that has thrived since the passage of a 2019 law that allowed the sale of cannabis products with less than 0.3% THC. Lawmakers have debated the merits of a ban versus . Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has been a vocal advocate for an outright ban, claiming the products endanger children and threatening to force a special session if the House didn’t pass Senate Bill 3. Opponents argue it ignores the needs of veterans who suffer from PTSD and patients with chronic illnesses, predicting that some may . CBD products are exempt from the ban. The Texas hemp industry employs 50,000 people and generates . Some business associations have threatened to sue the state if Gov. Abbott signs the measure into law. Doctor Sentenced for $325M Fraud Dr. Jorge Zamora-Quezada, a rheumatologist who practiced in the Rio Grande Valley city of Mission, was on Wednesday for orchestrating a $325 million healthcare fraud scheme that harmed thousands of patients while he indulged in a lavish lifestyle. Zamora-Quezada —many of them elderly and disabled—with rheumatoid arthritis and other chronic illnesses for more than 18 years, prescribing unnecessary treatments that only worsened their suffering. Some of his patients experienced strokes, liver damage, hair loss, and necrosis of the jawbone. Matthew Galeotti, head of the Justice Department Criminal Division, called it "one of the most egregious” cases of its kind, as "depraved." With the proceeds of his fraudulent practice, Zamora-Quezada had acquired 13 properties across the U.S., a private jet, and a Maserati. Prosecutors had , but Zamora-Quezada was ordered to pay $28 million. NOAA Releases Hurricane Forecast The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) is predicting an , with 13-19 named storms, 6-10 hurricanes, and 3-5 major (Category 3 or higher) hurricanes. The above-normal prediction is of the El Niño–Southern Oscillation (ENSO), as well as “warmer than average ocean temperatures, forecasts for weak wind shear, and the potential for higher activity from the West African Monsoon.” On average, between 1991 and 2020, the Atlantic saw 14 named storms, 7 hurricanes, and 3 major hurricanes per year. brought 18 named storms, 11 hurricanes, and 5 major hurricanes. The forecast calls for a 60% chance that the number of named storms will be , a 30% chance for an average number, and a 10% chance for a below-average number. Hurricane season starts June 1 and lasts through the end of November. | Flying together with our sponsor Memorial Day is just days away, a time to honor and remember our friends, neighbors and loved ones that served in our nation’s military. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Federal Judge Blocks Trump Admin’s Efforts to Dismantle U.S. Department of Education
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Federal Judge Blocks Trump Admin’s Efforts to Dismantle U.S. Department of Education (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=a42bc9ddec&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on May 22, 2025 05:29 pm
A federal judge has blocked President Donald Trump’s (R) executive order aiming to dismantle the Department of Education, arguing that doing so requires Congressional approval. Thursday morning, U.S. District Judge Myong Joun of Boston, appointed by former President Joe Biden (D), issued a preliminary injunction preventing Trump Administration from following through with plans announced in [...]
