body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6830584da0bf882efb949980&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6830567d3ad0511d62fea873%26ss_email_id%3D6830584da0bf882efb949980%26ss_campaign_name%3DHelping%2BMichigan%252C%2BOregon%252C%2Band%2BNew%2BYork%2Bfrom%2Bgetting%2BRCV.%2BResolution%2Battach%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-05-23T11%253A13%253A23Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6830567d3ad0511d62fea873&l=en-US&s=O0teBEnFJNk3wUTs_o9jUBxLyB4%3D) |
---|---
|
#### Forged through the alliance of election integrity advocates from Alaska, Maine, Michigan, New York and Oregon, this resolution is a tactical tool for any government body, civic organization, or election official looking to oppose Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).
---
#### **Subject:** Resolution Template to Oppose Ranked Choice Voting Nationwide
#### **Body:**
#### It draws from firsthand experience in Alaska—where RCV increased election costs by over 300%, caused record-low turnout, and led to over 11,000 discarded ballots—and from growing national opposition, with 16 states having already banned it.
#### This generalized resolution is ready to be adopted at the **local, state, or federal level** and provides clear language outlining:
* #### RCV’s complexity and voter confusion
* #### Risks to election integrity and auditability
* #### Real-world data from Alaska, NYC, and Oregon
* #### Why many jurisdictions are rejecting RCV as costly, confusing, and ineffective

#### Together, we can keep our elections simple, secure, and accountable.
#### —
Phil Izon
Author, _(Manufactured) Majority_ & _Field Manual to RCV & 2022-2024 RCV Repeal in Alaska_
---
#### Here is a **general-purpose** resolution, suitable for use at **any level of government—state, local, or federal** —to oppose the adoption of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV):
### **RESOLUTION NO. [Insert Number, if applicable]**
#### **A RESOLUTION OPPOSING THE IMPLEMENTATION OF RANKED CHOICE VOTING IN ANY ELECTIONS HELD WITHIN THE UNITED STATES**
**WHEREAS,** the simplicity, transparency, and integrity of the electoral process are essential to maintaining public trust in our democratic institutions; and**WHEREAS,** Ranked Choice Voting (RCV), also known as Instant Runoff Voting, introduces unnecessary complexity by requiring voters to rank multiple candidates, increasing the potential for confusion, ballot errors, and inadvertent voter disenfranchisement—particularly among senior citizens, first-time voters, non-native English speakers, and low-information voters; and**WHEREAS,** RCV undermines the principle of “one person, one vote” by redistributing ballots through multiple rounds of tabulation, which often results in so-called “majorities” based only on remaining, not total, ballots cast—due to widespread ballot exhaustion; and**WHEREAS,** RCV elections have proven significantly more difficult to audit, recount, or explain under standard election transparency principles and auditing protocols, as seen in jurisdictions such as Alaska, New York City, and San Francisco; and**WHEREAS,** implementing RCV typically results in dramatic increases in election administration costs, requires specialized tabulation software, and imposes substantial burdens on election offices for staff training and voter education campaigns; and**WHEREAS,** jurisdictions using RCV—such as Alaska—have experienced historically low voter turnout, significant numbers of exhausted ballots, and results that often fail to reflect the will of the majority of initial voters; and**WHEREAS,** independent audits and real-world experiences in Alaska, Maine, and New York City have demonstrated that RCV does not reliably increase third-party success, reduce political polarization, or improve voter participation as advertised; and**WHEREAS,** at least sixteen (16) U.S. states—including Florida, Texas, Tennessee, and Missouri—have passed laws banning Ranked Choice Voting due to its proven complications, hidden costs, and disenfranchising effects; and**WHEREAS,** bipartisan opposition to RCV continues to grow among elected officials, election administrators, civil rights groups, and civic organizations across the country;**NOW, THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED** :That [Insert Organization/Governing Body Name] opposes the implementation of Ranked Choice Voting in any local, state, or federal election within the United States; and**BE IT FURTHER RESOLVED** , that [Insert Organization/Governing Body Name] supports maintaining an electoral process that is clear, auditable, accessible, and faithful to the principle of one person, one vote; and**BE IT FINALLY RESOLVED** , that this resolution be transmitted to appropriate legislative bodies, election officials, and the public to affirm this organization's commitment to preserving the integrity and simplicity of American elections.**ADOPTED** this [Insert Day] day of [Insert Month], [Insert Year], by [Insert Organization/Governing Body Name].
---
### **Now we have 105 supporters for “Frozen Odds”**
---
|
---
#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised nearly 40% what we expected for the entire film to cost.****A huge Thank You,****Phil Izon**
---
---
|
---

This ultra-exclusive experience is designed for those who believe in the story, the mission, and want front-row access to something special.
#### **Golden Ticket Benefits:**

subject: Urgent Social Security Alert!

name: Rep. Troy Downing
subject: The MAGA battle has just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
President Trump’s boldest legislative win just cleared the House. Now we need YOU to help us finish the job.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Peter,
The House of Representatives passed President Trump's landmark ‘Big, Beautiful Bill’ early Thursday morning, declaring a major victory for our Nation. This is more than just a legislative achievement — **it's a bold new direction for our country that puts America FIRST.**
President Trump's return to office marked a clear mandate from the American people to take action. In just 100 days, we’re already making good on our promises, taking on the D.C. establishment, and achieving what they said was impossible.
**_Our bill is the most comprehensive conservative legislation in a generation. Here's what it delivers:_**
**✔️ Secures the border** by providing the necessary tools, technology, and manpower to defend American sovereignty and keep our communities safe.
**✔️ Cuts taxes and boosts paychecks** by making Trump's 2017 tax cuts permanent, eliminating taxes on tips and overtime, and providing relief for seniors.
**✔️ Restores American energy dominance** by unleashing America's energy potential and putting American producers and workers back in control.
**✔️ Rebuilds military strength** by revitalizing our defense industrial base and delivering on Trump's promise to protect every American from global threats.
**✔️ Makes government work for you** by slashing waste, eliminating bloated bureaucracies, and forcing the federal government to serve the American people, not special interests.
This bill is a major achievement, but our work is far from over. I'm calling on our loyal grassroots base to stand with me and House Republicans to demand that the Senate pass this monumental legislation.
**[Please add your name and join this movement to secure our borders, revive our economy, restore American energy dominance, and defend the freedoms that make this nation great:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)** [ BACK THE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._S_zcowzw) Together, we will finish what we started and deliver the bold, lasting change America needs.
Thank you,
**Troy Downing** U.S. Congressman, Montana’s Second District Combat Veteran | America First Conservative | | |

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/23/2025
body:
Analyst to reveal altered Arapahoe 2020 CVR at Tuesday Capitol press conference
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Friday,
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado’s [election integrity fight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is back in the spotlight as a data analyst prepares to reveal altered 2020 cast vote records from Arapahoe County at the Capitol next week. Meanwhile, Mesa County is [pushing back on SB3](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—dubbed an “aptitude test for your rights”—in a formal letter to the DOJ challenging its constitutionality. And speaking of gun rights, two local gun shop owners were sentenced to federal prison for [selling firearms illegally](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

Denver is facing rising homelessness, with a []()[150% increase in families on the streets](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) since 2022. The city is scrambling to respond amid [ongoing budget concerns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And in a blow to city pride, Colorado Springs fell from [#5 to #406](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) on U.S. News’ “Best Places to Live” list.

🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** The House [passed Trump’s “One Big, Beautiful Bill”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a narrow 215–214 vote, delivering a major legislative win that includes tax cut extensions, Medicaid work requirements, a ban on taxpayer-funded transgender procedures, and $1,000 “Trump accounts” for newborns. Meanwhile, two Israeli Embassy staffers were [fatally shot](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) outside the Capital Jewish Museum in D.C. by a gunman shouting “Free, free Palestine."
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Drake Hunter calls on readers to be the miracle Pastor John Waters needs. The beloved Fort Morgan pastor and radio DJ is urgently seeking a [living liver donor](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Hunter urges the faith community to pray, get screened, and take action—because real faith shows up when it matters most.

This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, May 23, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Analyst to reveal altered Arapahoe 2020 CVR at Tuesday Capitol press conference](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A nationally recognized computer scientist will present what he says is direct evidence of vote data manipulation in Arapahoe County’s 2020 election – and altered ballot records in a newly released 2025 file – at a May 27 press conference at the Colorado State Capitol.
Dr. Walter Daugherity, a Harvard-trained expert in computer science and election auditing, is set to speak at 2:30 p.m. Tuesday on the west steps of the Capitol. According to a press release circulated Wednesday, Daugherity will walk the public through four exhibits that show what he describes as “a manipulated cast vote record” and evidence that votes were changed at the ballot level.
Cast vote records (CVRs) are digital spreadsheets that show how a tabulation system interpreted each individual ballot. There are 354,247 ballots in Arapahoe County’s 2020 election – and the CVR is expected to show that many lines of ballot data. But according to Daugherity, there are now two public versions of that file: one released shortly after the election in 2020, and one published on the county website in April 2025.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[“Aptitude test for your rights?” Mesa County pushes back on SB3 in letter to the DOJ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* County commissioners sent a letter to the DOJ calling Colorado’s new gun permit law—requiring a 90% written test score and recurring approval—a civil rights violation and “grotesque misuse of government power.”
* The letter compares SB3 to literacy tests once used to suppress voters, arguing it imposes unconstitutional barriers on Second Amendment rights, especially for the disabled and low-income residents.
* While no lawsuit is announced, Mesa officials say they may join legal action and insist SB3 lacks historical precedent and fails the constitutional test set by key Supreme Court decisions.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Hunter: Will you be the miracle Pastor John Waters needs?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Pastor John Waters, a beloved Fort Morgan worship leader and local radio DJ, is in critical need of a living liver donor after complications halted an initial transplant plan.
* Hunter urges healthy individuals ages 18–60 to get screened as potential donors, noting that a portion of the liver can be safely donated and will regenerate.
* Framing the situation as a spiritual calling, Hunter asks the broader church community to respond with love—by praying, sharing the message, and stepping forward to help save a life.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Cargill and BBD show what private-sector solutions to housing really look like](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV NE CO NEWSROOM****| LOCAL | MAY 21** _As Colorado’s housing crisis continues to stretch families, employers, and communities thin, a powerful story of unity is rising from the plains of Northeastern Colorado. In Fort Morgan, a strategic partnership between global food giant Cargill and Brush-based contractor Building By Design (BBD) is addressing the problem with practical solutions that turn vision into reality, giving us all confidence in the project’s success._
__
**[“They didn’t think I had it”: Tina Peters on evidence, betrayal and faith behind bars](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | MAY 21** _In a jailhouse visit marked by resilience, revelation and restrained emotion, former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters offered a window into the chapter of her life that has largely unfolded behind bars. For two-and-a-half hours on May 18, we sat across from each other in a controlled visitation room._
__
**[Out on bond, out of control: Decades of Colorado’s soft-on-crime policies under fire](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SHAINA COLE | LOCAL | MAY 20** _A series of violent incidents in Denver during April 2025 has intensified scrutiny of Colorado’s criminal justice reforms, with critics contending that lenient policies on bail and sentencing have compromised public safety._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🔌 DID YOU KNOW?** Buffalo became the **first U.S. city powered by widespread electricity** on Nov. 16, 1896, when Nikola Tesla’s AC system—generated from Niagara Falls—lit up the city, starting with its street railway.
|
---

---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m now forced to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

........................
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl4ov1051ase0kd37nj35ls5sgdik9hphd6n3ik0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1i6eo74cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---

But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.

My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.

This seat is currently held by a far-right, anti-choice Republican named Winsome Earle-Sears who is now the Republican frontrunner for Governor.

**_Hashmi has a history of overcoming the odds._** When she first ran for office, she surprised political pundits when she defeated the party establishment’s hand-picked candidate for the nomination. She then went on to win in the general election in a swing district that had been represented by a Republican for decades – by TEN points. As a result, Democrats gained a critical one-seat majority in the Chamber, and **Hashmi was able to cast a tie-breaking vote to enact abortion rights into law.**

Hashmi was motivated to run for office initially in opposition to Trump, and has challenged the Trump and Youngkin agenda in the General Assembly ever since.

**If she wins the primary election, Hashmi will face off against an extremist Republican talk-radio host, John Reid.** His campaign website features MAGA-inspired rhetoric against Democrats, how he wants to “free education from leftist indoctrination,” stop “wokeness,” and continue “his fight against boys in girls sports and the extreme trans-agenda being forced upon our children.” Additionally, he had made it clear that he is anti-choice.

His campaign website states, **“Who better to make our conservative moral case than a man like John Reid?”**

Virginia is a competitive state – and Hashmi’s primary is no joke. It will take all of us to ensure that we win this seat, take back the executive offices, and protect and expand the pro-choice majority in the House of Delegates. We are so proud to stand with Senator Hashmi in this fight.

[**Hashmi has taken on the MAGA agenda before, and now she’s ready to do it again as Lieutenant Governor. Help us ensure her TV ad can reach as many voters as possible by rushing $25 or more today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-hashmi/?refcode=EM_F_250523hashmi_N_EH_90DO_11_G_N_L2&amount=25)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor

clean_body: We’re asking for your help to stand up for seniors, families, and working people! | = Hi team, We’re reaching out to you today because what’s happening right now in Washington is serious. MAGA Republicans passed a reckless budget this past week that will devastate everyday Americans while enriching the top 1%. It will: –Slash Social Security and Medicare, harming millions of Americans and seniors –Cut food stamp benefits, making it harder for working people to put food on the table –AND it will give the top 1% a hefty tax cut while cutting benefits for vulnerable communities and giving working people a tax INCREASE We know you’re busy,but we’re asking for your help because we know you care deeply about protecting people who will be hit hardest by this budget. | New Dems in the House are fighting back and standing up for commonsense policies and fighting to protect families and working people – but we cannot succeed without your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, New Dems | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. name: Signature Due @ 11:59pm (VPP)
subject: WOW! Bernie Sanders just dropped the hammer:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Answer his call to action
| **_BERNIE SANDERS JUST DROPPED THE HAMMER!_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90345?t=6&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08) [**Are YOU with Sen. Sanders?? You’ve been hand-selected to sign our card THANKING Bernie for his hard work and joining his fight against Trump! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90345?t=7&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90345?t=8&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90345?t=9&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90345?t=10&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
If we don’t hit our 500 signature goal, **Bernie Sanders may think Democrats are abandoning his fight.** Please sign by MIDNIGHT!

_\- The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19943%2E878179%2Eb3Av08)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m now forced to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

........................
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdhak2d0mpdidjftajojdd18g2dj2rhuicjng1l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1i69or2c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0toq46tbfjnc30eji7eenugio20hc067hodrks8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1i69or2c9h2bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me WIN the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice against the Deep State as they attempt to JAIL me for the rest of my life in Arizona.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z66s8rmhqcgv5pie3tboj4nr32mj8e0f3mp9bi9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1i69or2c9h2bs)

But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: Help Grow Virginia’s Reproductive Freedom Movement
body:
🌱Grow the Movement. Bring Others In. Join Us June 5.
| | |
---
| |
---
| 🌱Grow the Movement. Bring Others In. Join Us June 5🌱
---
| Friends-
At Freedom Virginia, we are a proud part of Virginians for Reproductive Freedom. The fight for reproductive freedom in Virginia is only getting stronger. Every time someone new joins us, our movement becomes more powerful.
At this month's Virginians for Reproductive Freedom Power Hour, we're focusing on just that. Join us on Wednesday, June 5 at 6:30 PM for a virtual gathering where volunteers, advocates, and supporters come together to share, learn, and build collective power. Whether you're just getting started or already involved, this Power Hour is for you. Together, we will:

* Build toward a future where reproductive freedom is protected in our constitution
* Explore how to welcome others into the movement
* Share stories and lessons from the field
* Connect with new volunteer opportunities across Virginia

Where we stand now:
---
| |
---
| |
---
| The fight is far from over!
We need more voices, more stories, and more people in this movement to get the constitutional amendment across the finish line. We are strongest when we grow together. Let's keep moving forward.
Wednesday, June 5 | 6:30 - 7:30 PM | Virtual on Zoom

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- May 23
body:
|

---

Dear Friends,
I've said it before, and I'll say it once more: Robert F. Kennedy is a threat to the health and wellbeing of our nation. He has fired scientists who do critical lifesaving research, he has spread conspiracy theories about vaccines, and he has single-handedly perpetuated the spread of the worst measles outbreak we've seen in years. He is not qualified to serve as the Secretary of Health and Human Services - he is the wrong person for the job. Unfortunately, my colleagues on the other side of the aisle are satisfied with the cuts to cancer research. The cuts to IVF research. They're satisfied with scientists being fired - the very ones who find cures for life-threatening diseases impacting Americans. They're fine with someone leading the agency who has no clue what critical work actually happens within his agency. And they made their position clear when they [blocked my attempt](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1925003230787813636&redir_log=745398163327332) to file a resolution making painfully clear just how awful RFK Jr. is.
We are living in perilous times. Lives are on the line because we know that cancer is the second-leading cause of death in the U.S. The cuts to NIH will impact all of us, and they will impact us for decades to come. Cuts that will be especially felt by the family of that child with cancer, and the children of that mother suffering from Alzheimer's; that father battling ALS. All of us praying for a cure will be impacted. All of us. We must continue to make our voices heard. I vow to continue using every tool at my disposal to push back against these callous actions that are harming the American people. Read about the cuts to NIH in an Axios article [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.axios.com%2f2025%2f05%2f19%2fnih-cuts-cancer-research-hhs&redir_log=825388698483410). **In Case You Missed It**
Last week I [demanded answers](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1922787550793445871&redir_log=02469968384334) from Secretary Kennedy during a Senate Health, Education, Labor and Pensions (HELP) Committee hearing, on his callous disregard for the health of Americans and his obvious inability to safely and efficiently run his department.
Read more about it below:
_**The Huffington Post** [RFK Jr. Insists He Hasn't Fired 'Any Working Scientists' ? After Firing Hundreds Of Them](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.huffpost.com%2fentry%2frfk-fired-scientists-angela-alsobrooks_n_68253fc0e4b0a84e35c73dc8&redir_log=675858096959637)_ _**The Baltimore Banner** [Alsobrooks, RFK Jr. spar during testy Senate hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.thebaltimorebanner.com%2fpolitics-power%2fnational-politics%2fangela-alsobrooks-rfk-kennedy-3QX3SJX7PBBRTKLETVSA72PGDY%2f&redir_log=600083772028835)_ _**Baltimore Sun** [Kennedy spars with Maryland Democrats during congressional hearings](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.baltimoresun.com%2f%3fp%3d11445308&redir_log=056096163944254)_ _**MSNBC** [Dem Senator Alsobrooks explains to RFK Jr. his own aunt's legacy during Senate hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.msnbc.com%2fthe-last-word%2fwatch%2fdem-senator-alsobrooks-explains-to-rfk-jr-his-own-aunt-s-legacy-during-senate-hearing-239602757615&redir_log=84193764187937)_ _**NBC4 Washington** [Sen. Alsobrooks says Kennedy is 'wrong person' for HHS job](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.nbcwashington.com%2fnews%2fnational-international%2ftrump-administration-saudi-arabia-qatar-tariffs-rfk-jr-testifies-14-2025-live-updates%2f3913237%2f%3fcardId%3d1%3a1%3a10481030&redir_log=459914422981119)_ _**The Associated Press** [Lawmakers question Kennedy on staffing cuts, funding freezes and policy changes at health department](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fapnews.com%2farticle%2frfk-jr-hhs-senate-vaccines-layoffs-measles-8c99853031507ecb5408b4132329cdea&redir_log=575514448326650)_ _**USA Today** [Recap: RFK grilled over vaccines, lead, job cuts, as protesters tackled at HHS hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.usatoday.com%2fstory%2fnews%2fpolitics%2f2025%2f05%2f14%2frfk-health-budget-house-senate%2f83599066007%2f&redir_log=123808703692636)_ **Working in a Bipartisan Way** As I've said from the beginning, I will always work to put Marylanders first. I'm putting your health and wellbeing first by calling on RFK Jr. to resign or be fired. I'm also working across the aisle to get things done, like expanding access to capital.
Bipartisan Access to Small Business Investor Capital Act I was proud to introduce the Bipartisan Access to Small Business Investor Capital Act alongside Pennsylvania Senator Dave McCormick. This legislation would support small -and middle- market businesses by making it easier for business development companies to attract capital. In 1980, Congress authorized the incorporation of business development companies (BDCs) to facilitate the flow of capital to small- and middle-market businesses. BDCs are required to hold at least 70% of their investments in certain eligible assets, including private U.S. companies or public U.S. companies with equity market capitalization of up to $250 million, and must provide substantial managerial assistance to their portfolio companies. Currently, there are more than 130 BDCs that have made over $300 billion of investments in middle-market companies across the United States. BDCs, however, have a disadvantage for potential investors because their fees and expenses are both incorporated into their share price and required by law to be reported by acquiring funds in their fee table. This effective double counting of BDC fees and expenses can make them less attractive for investment by overstating fund expenses. This bill would remove the requirement that investment funds acquiring a stake in business development companies include its fees and expenses in the acquiring fund's expense ratio. Eliminating this requirement will ensure that investors receive an accurate picture of a fund's true costs and eliminate an impediment for institutional investors to provide capital to BDCs that, in turn, will be used to support small- and middle-market business. I am so proud to work with Senator McCormick on this bipartisan legislation that will make it easier for Maryland businesses to thrive and grow. For too long, community businesses have been trapped by red tape and unable to access the capital and support they need. Our bill ensures an easier flow of capital to small- and medium-sized companies, so more Marylanders cannot just get by but can truly thrive. **Fighting Through Legislation** I continue to work with my colleagues to fight for you. Here are some of the bills I've cosponsored this week:
•S. Res. 224, a resolution calling for the urgent delivery of humanitarian aid to address the needs of civilians in Gaza This resolution calls on the Trump administration to use all tools at its disposal to bring about the immediate cessation of the blockade on food and humanitarian aid for Palestinian civilians and to bring about the release of all remaining hostages in Gaza.
• S. 1804, a bill to prohibit the use of funds to procure or modify foreign aircraft for presidential airlift Introduced by Senate Minority Leader Schumer, this bill would prohibit a foreign aircraft from being used as Air Force One. This follows the news that President Trump planned to accept a $400 million luxury jet from Qatar to serve as a temporary replacement for Air Force One.
• Henrietta Lacks Congressional Gold Medal Act This legislation would posthumously award a Congressional Gold Medal to Henrietta Lacks in recognition of her immortal "HeLa cells" which have made invaluable contributions to global health, scientific research, our quality of life, and patients' rights.
• S. 463, Protect Our Letter Carriers Act (bipartisan) This bill will provide $7 billion in funding over five years for enhanced security measures to include high-security collection boxes which will remove the ability to steal a key from a postal worker to gain access to a mailbox and replace hard copy items carried by postal workers with more secure electronic versions. The bill would also require the Attorney General to appoint an Assistant Attorney General in each judicial district to prioritize cases that involve an attack on a postal worker and standardize and strengthen sentencing guidelines for these crimes to ensure that they are treated in the same manner as assaults on federal law enforcement officers. **In the Community** I had the privilege of meeting with young Marylanders from the National Youth Summit. They came to Washington advocating for education, the environment, human rights, and more. It was important to hear their concerns directly from them. I am in this fight for them and for all of the young people of our state. It was my honor to speak at the National Council of Churches legislative breakfast. People who know me know that my faith is deeply intertwined with my responsibilities as a public servant. I know people are hurting right now. If there's ever a time when our love must drown out the other noise, it's now. I toured Naval Air Station Patuxent River and learned more about the critically important work done there to protect our nation. I was reminded too of my forever gratitude for our servicemembers and civilian defense workforce at home and abroad that serve tirelessly every day. **Here to Serve You** Our constituent services team stands ready to assist you! If you are a veteran who needs help navigating the Department of Veterans Affairs, if you're having trouble navigating Social Security, the IRS or immigration, please reach out to our team by filling out the applicable form [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fservices%2fcasework%2f&redir_log=48139330565369). **Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14251.8965802.5370564.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=983830187668200). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator
clean_body: | Dear Friends, I've said it before, and I'll say it once more: Robert F. Kennedy is a threat to the health and wellbeing of our nation. He has fired scientists who do critical lifesaving research, he has spread conspiracy theories about vaccines, and he has single-handedly perpetuated the spread of the worst measles outbreak we've seen in years. He is not qualified to serve as the Secretary of Health and Human Services - he is the wrong person for the job. Unfortunately, my colleagues on the other side of the aisle are satisfied with the cuts to cancer research. The cuts to IVF research. They're satisfied with scientists being fired - the very ones who find cures for life-threatening diseases impacting Americans. They're fine with someone leading the agency who has no clue what critical work actually happens within his agency. And they made their position clear when they to file a resolution making painfully clear just how awful RFK Jr. is. We are living in perilous times. Lives are on the line because we know that cancer is the second-leading cause of death in the U.S. The cuts to NIH will impact all of us, and they will impact us for decades to come. Cuts that will be especially felt by the family of that child with cancer, and the children of that mother suffering from Alzheimer's; that father battling ALS. All of us praying for a cure will be impacted. All of us. We must continue to make our voices heard. I vow to continue using every tool at my disposal to push back against these callous actions that are harming the American people. Read about the cuts to NIH in an Axios article . In Case You Missed It Last week I from Secretary Kennedy during a Senate Health, Education, Labor and Pensions (HELP) Committee hearing, on his callous disregard for the health of Americans and his obvious inability to safely and efficiently run his department. Peter, did you see Mitch’s message about PBS earlier this week? We know that PBS is a powerful tool in raising the next generation, and we’re not letting it go down without a fight. **[If you’re able, click here to help us fight against Trump’s BS plans, then read Mitch’s message below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108213837/547233981/-1402533371?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250523_ENG_PBS_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZkY2NlMy1kNzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3oimZb6QYinONwEO7lttx_eXqwvGmn0rVJQdrH9Rbk=)**
* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_**

Peter,

From Mr. Rogers to Sesame Street to Julia Child and more, PBS has long been a cultural backbone of our society.

**Now, Trump is trying to make them the enemy.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108213845/547233988/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250523_ENG_PBS_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZkY2NlMy1kNzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3oimZb6QYinONwEO7lttx_eXqwvGmn0rVJQdrH9Rbk=&emci=cf3b703f-4937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=52fdcce3-d737-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296) **More than that, he’s making empathy and education the enemy.**

If we’re not careful, a whole generation will be raised without these values.

[**Here at PA Dems, we’re working hard to keep PBS, education, and empathy afloat. So, we want to know: What was your favorite PBS show? What did you learn from PBS?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108213853/547233998/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250523_ENG_PBS_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZkY2NlMy1kNzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3oimZb6QYinONwEO7lttx_eXqwvGmn0rVJQdrH9Rbk=&emci=cf3b703f-4937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=52fdcce3-d737-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296) | [SHARE YOUR PBS STORY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108213856/547234007/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250523_ENG_PBS_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZkY2NlMy1kNzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3oimZb6QYinONwEO7lttx_eXqwvGmn0rVJQdrH9Rbk=&emci=cf3b703f-4937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=52fdcce3-d737-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296)
---
We have to push back against Trump’s authoritarian BS every single time.

Limiting access to educational television is an attempt to control what our kids learn, and I’m not standing for it.

And I know you won’t either.

So, as we prepare to fight back, please, [**share your PBS story with us by clicking here!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108213857/547234008/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250523_ENG_PBS_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZkY2NlMy1kNzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3oimZb6QYinONwEO7lttx_eXqwvGmn0rVJQdrH9Rbk=&emci=cf3b703f-4937-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=52fdcce3-d737-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296)

Thank you,

Mitch

clean_body: | | Peter, did you see Mitch’s message about PBS earlier this week? We know that PBS is a powerful tool in raising the next generation, and we’re not letting it go down without a fight. = Begin Forwarded Message: Peter, From Mr. Rogers to Sesame Street to Julia Child and more, PBS has long been a cultural backbone of our society. Now, Trump is trying to make them the enemy. More than that, he’s making empathy and education the enemy. If we’re not careful, a whole generation will be raised without these values. | We have to push back against Trump’s authoritarian BS every single time. Limiting access to educational television is an attempt to control what our kids learn, and I’m not standing for it. And I know you won’t either. So, as we prepare to fight back, please, Thank you, Mitch = | Follow us on , , and ! Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party. | | Friend, What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American. **One of our clients, Erica Walsh, was arrested — for peacefully wearing a sweatshirt while standing on a public sidewalk.** She wasn’t blocking doors. She wasn’t shouting. She wasn’t breaking the law. She stood silently near the Norfolk Superior Courthouse — where public attention is currently focused due to the ongoing Karen Read trial — on a sidewalk that a federal court has ruled protesters have a constitutional right to be. But Massachusetts State Police arrested her anyway. I’m Mark Trammell, CEO of the **Center for American Liberty** , and we’re stepping in to make sure the state doesn’t get away with it. Just days before Erica’s arrest, another one of our clients, Jason Grant, was blocked from the very same area simply for holding a sign with a Bible verse. This is not an isolated incident. This is a pattern. **State officials are targeting peaceful Americans for expressing viewpoints state officials don’t like — even after a federal appellate court said they have every right to be there.** We’ve already won a major court victory affirming the First Amendment in this case. But now, Massachusetts officials are ignoring the ruling — and doubling down on their crackdown. We’re taking them back to court. And we need your help. **[Will you make a tax-deductible donation to help us defend Erica, hold the state accountable, and protect the First Amendment for all Americans?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-PmzAQxT-NuYHs8R_ogUOyhEhtdrXNbrfqXpDB48QVDqxxkubbV0Qolzm8-b1587Qfe2dvJcnXBODozEQACF8RgK8_Vx_Of_2PbTr47236pV68nLfwtKAXeMCnTovP3Vv--e_9ddLVT3d42T1f2AOPtxEf8BKaodeun9W8SkzJraEiwZLloqBUKV4kx5IidsZ-ywFVB5oKKTgrwAiaW2tYaxNXAgVJJXDGAajMaKENFVyAxLzVRhFB7zmZ9hhcp9kUrzqEYfBZN_ikL48xjtP9sZpArU9ohpj1rsUQbx2eIoZsCAcCNRXMSgs21Yy1qUCh09YymxpBreGFsFKp-Qivz9E303AOHRJerattut98EFCz7NG4sye82jwvSqf9qN3hRHi1VIFmXW2bp3q1aza_f702-81H8_a-2qfzWFwRg787JGfNNbAklGa8ur53k8qJoId757nhpYT_AQAA__8OVJHh)** Your support will help us:

* Defend Erica and Jason in court

name: Jason Miyares
subject: Arlington’s new policy is reckless — see for yourself 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
The Arlington County Board just voted to limit local police cooperation with ICE — even in cases involving violent crime. | | | Peter, **The Arlington County Board just voted to limit local police cooperation with ICE -- even in cases involving violent crime.**
_You heard that right._
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/ca3ki1D-U_irFxxRLRb8W6qCTK6H4alYtlvEzHT5JZkR7wpRmbeJ3LEuZVfC5Tzi3c9M4XTaZicxpr-bG8I2roTqvx_R7k-TCgg-BoiP7U15fdYYowdXzQ7U6harO8FMMG2xsvBFDYWCFyK6GOOnn129_EKLwj1DndHcoex5DoApC3howL4VFFW_4N_uHGaFTKRdnF57Nj5MhnTYPRhAxpZzc4H_0wklW3Fxoyxpv9HxeN3-QiedV0RE0Y0qyxZ3tHXiYCtsqp1-0tUs0rWjIEWKzQasJG75JZScn_HQKMzCNGC3SDJ0jql__8VNBjI1ye0FHWEhzgojKbql3HoyHQte6MyArN3ggVdpCifBMis82eJoG46MC15PU_gJDmPbOaDVHvq4MEJ9-vYkGAKR_DazfuvIFvCDHkM/57veZermLbDaR5klARE2gqMWKXeBMoCU/9)
---
This reckless policy _ties the hands of local police and puts our communities at risk_ -- all to score points with political far-left activists.
As Virginia's Attorney General, _I have always stood up for law enforcement, held violent criminals accountable, and fought to make our neighborhoods safer._
While Arlington politicians turn their back on common sense, I am standing with the brave men and women in blue. Our law enforcement officers deserve back up, not bureaucrats that make their jobs harder.
Let's send a message: [_**We stand with law enforcement, not lawlessness.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/POobzehPts8aioQqGVsRx6FPd_KcvFgvNya9pp5_xutBerjUrMryBZ0TLdMMzQmWSwdy6PfWPJka3v4l0ttumSH13CIoVqGoRKsNr-iljs6jW0nE4de_G3OJAAaySna9vLtWMs9N7fug6nQYiqCWLub60QM8UBqFrHD3Nd_Y-pimJNxlwK4WFiKR8kBoUFYKX7BUfB0WTOYQtLp10lJbYtLPZEGvnGiAjHHAfITG7T5gG5hXIT4ZH4aQJaw5iEqKdxt35XNSimDtZ7CGfnsfeQY4aXMjV6IYhSXThR5HpY6HIiIn74LKVDAUKQ14sUp_QENG3s1SYTz7TA7b3I72o6NuviOjiLdct7DOZNlm2Dd0FCi6x2muqtejrJVqgYAmtE4lJSKLyIsy_REk_22SuFuoUyAokvPKFvE/Hj4ksF7y33MwbgybVTeMQFyAtKITWux-/9)

clean_body: The Arlington County Board just voted to limit local police cooperation with ICE — even in cases involving violent crime. | | | Peter, The Arlington County Board just voted to limit local police cooperation with ICE -- even in cases involving violent crime. You heard that right. This reckless policy ties the hands of local police and puts our communities at risk -- all to score points with political far-left activists. As Virginia's Attorney General, I have always stood up for law enforcement, held violent criminals accountable, and fought to make our neighborhoods safer. While Arlington politicians turn their back on common sense, I am standing with the brave men and women in blue. Our law enforcement officers deserve back up, not bureaucrats that make their jobs harder. Let's send a message: Together we can keep Virginia safe. -- Jason Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | . | |

name: Katie Porter
subject: May fundraising deadline coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39748%2E3422442%2EjKSpev)
Dear Derek,
Statewide campaigns in California see tens of millions of dollars in spending. That’s what it’s going to take for our campaign to be competitive in next year’s election.
Every month, I work with my team to set a fundraising goal to keep us on track for raising the resources we need to win. **For May, we’re trying to raise $100,000 over email.**
The good news is that we are already one-third of the way to our goal, thanks to Porter Supporters like you who have been chipping in. With a strong push in this final stretch, I’m confident we can hit our target.
For a campaign like ours, which rejects money from corporations, lobbyists, and Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Bank CEOs, our grassroots fundraising number is especially important.
**[So please, will you make a $5 donation today to help us meet our May fundraising goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250523_1_ak?refcode=em20250523-39748&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39748_3422442_jKSpev&akid=39748%2E3422442%2EjKSpev)**
Thanks for considering,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250523-39748&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39748_3422442_jKSpev&akid=39748%2E3422442%2EjKSpev)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39748&t=5&akid=39748%2E3422442%2EjKSpev)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23081%2E4449941%2E_XkZie) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23081%2E4449941%2E_XkZie) [**WE 'RE SO THANKFUL - Rachel Maddow returns to once a week on _MSNBC_ now that Trump's first 100 days are up**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61407?t=3&akid=23081%2E4449941%2E_XkZie)

This is huge!

_MSNBC_ host Rachel Maddow covered the Trump administration every day for his first 100 days since taking office in January! **For 100 days,** Maddow covered Trump's disastrous policies and terrible actions. She's helping Americans understand just how dangerous this man and his MAGA cronies are acting.

And that's nothing new for Rachel Maddow. For 17 years, she has been a source of truth and accountability -- standing up to Republicans on a daily basis.

And during Trump's last presidency, we were SO grateful for the honest reporting she did.

[**_So today, we 're calling for all good Democrats in your area to sign our massive Thank You Card to Rachel Maddow by MIDNIGHT - to show our support and appreciation!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61407?t=4&akid=23081%2E4449941%2E_XkZie) | [SIGN THE CARD >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61407?t=5&akid=23081%2E4449941%2E_XkZie)
---
**And we saved a spot just for you! ↘↘↘**
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61407?t=6&akid=23081%2E4449941%2E_XkZie)
-- _Fight for Reform_

_MSNBC_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication. | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=7&akid=23081%2E4449941%2E_XkZie) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=8&akid=23081%2E4449941%2E_XkZie)

FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Please let us explain
body:
Here it goes:
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)

Peter --
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee. Please let us explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here it goes:
In just a few days, the DNC will close the books on an important FEC fundraising deadline. And when it ends, they are legally required to report what they've raised. How many donations they received -- and when they received them -- will be public as well.
Everyone will be watching: Republicans, outside spending groups, and the press as well.
And what we want EVERYONE to see is an overwhelming number of donations made to the DNC on May 23, 2025 -- today. Donations made in the immediate aftermath of the House Republicans slashing Medicaid and nutrition programs to fund tax cuts.
Because this fight is not over. It goes to the Senate and then back to the House. And we want every Republican to see the overwhelming grassroots opposition to what they are doing. Make them think twice before voting. And if they do it again, that money will be used to hold them accountable at the ballot box.
So please. Let's make today a day of an overwhelming number of donations to the DNC.
[**Please contribute to the Democratic National Committee today. Their average online donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. But there is no donation too small. It is the number of donations that matters most today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250523&refcode2=623_2563979_dED_3D&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em250523&refcode2=623_2563979_dED_3D&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em250523&refcode2=623_2563979_dED_3D&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em250523&refcode2=623_2563979_dED_3D&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em250523&refcode2=623_2563979_dED_3D&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em250523&refcode2=623_2563979_dED_3D&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250523&refcode2=623_2563979_dED_3D&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)**
---
****
Thank you,
Team Kamala

Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=623%2E2563979%2EdED_3D)**

Every day feels like a new headline designed to distract us—and this week, _Slingshot The Podcast_ is cutting through the noise. >From floating **illegal ideas like sending U.S. citizens to foreign prisons** , to **reintroducing child labor** , to **defunding the Department of Education and college DEI programs** , hosts **Kadida Kenner** and **Charles Gregory** break down the chaos with clarity and urgency. This isn’t conspiracy. This is the long game—strategized, intentional, and already in motion. In this episode:
* Why talk of imprisoning U.S. citizens abroad violates the Constitution
* The dangerous rise of child labor and the targeting of immigrant workers
* How gutting public education and DEI policies is about power—not policy
* A clear breakdown of how to protect your rights and freedoms before it’s too late
* The “3-person hack” to pressure your elected officials into action

This episode is loud, unfiltered, and unapologetically real—because the distractions are working, and it's time we fight back with facts. This isn’t just a podcast. It’s a movement. clean_body: | | | | | | "WTF Are They Doing?" | | Don't miss episode 4 of Slingshot the Podcast: “WTF Are They Doing?” — where the misunderstood voice becomes the culture’s power is hosted by our Founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, and Charles Gregory , from Every day feels like a new headline designed to distract us—and this week, Slingshot The Podcast is cutting through the noise. >From floating illegal ideas like sending U.S. citizens to foreign prisons , to reintroducing child labor , to defunding the Department of Education and college DEI programs , hosts Kadida Kenner and Charles Gregory break down the chaos with clarity and urgency. This isn’t conspiracy. This is the long game—strategized, intentional, and already in motion. In this episode: Why talk of imprisoning U.S. citizens abroad violates the Constitution The dangerous rise of child labor and the targeting of immigrant workers How gutting public education and DEI policies is about power—not policy A clear breakdown of how to protect your rights and freedoms before it’s too late The “3-person hack” to pressure your elected officials into action This episode is loud, unfiltered, and unapologetically real—because the distractions are working, and it's time we fight back with facts. This isn’t just a podcast. It’s a movement. Listen to us on , , , , and . Plus, watch us on Connect with us: Instagram: Facebook: Youtube: TikTok: Email: info@newpaproject.org | | | Our Contact Information** New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | | | | | ---|---|---

body:
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0b468361b464504a59d51ee2ec7fa2b&_e=ql2vRqnR9fom4IiywSkn9X1E9Q-KsUba-v98Lu8TjE1iPGmej2hodIz2uyFVjQumNZJ62KGu_pUlvR8u09DPuDDkvgiCDRBXHZnfSbPexK29bm3gTnCtzx2h1FKprMC7QYYTyV6jhWp_Egg-XYoeIvxZuDwpBqsCLt_Vo9eWzbaIGG1i5y3JRoTfHjeOoqTM3VQqTnBr8MHX5kzjoRBfIra_GM2FnVKMk0D3Q5rnXVWuzRWRFYRBHgTST3APguHsWeCdfSgQU2B84DW5xCBK2CgWzixvsDEckT08XkhIx4GH0P3Mk0Al6MRT1gPOJKa3MRWIMrZGqjZsuRSFBU-L0WCFRGFucCGc0ntPTQzBKzkEnweuVbtYf5DEuUzvYJE_)
Peter,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0b468361b464504a59d51ee2ec7fa2b&_e=ql2vRqnR9fom4IiywSkn9X1E9Q-KsUba-v98Lu8TjE1iPGmej2hodIz2uyFVjQumNZJ62KGu_pUlvR8u09DPuDDkvgiCDRBXHZnfSbPexK29bm3gTnCtzx2h1FKprMC7QYYTyV6jhWp_Egg-XYoeIvxZuDwpBqsCLt_Vo9eWzbbxs9n_z0W7hluAdIKohhEKA2MQHiYR4nvYalv6OtmNVgzpj9iW_YD8XLOk56IDHODLbIxUxpaQOr5Ht66-uAHUCm6iNfR3qCGa8U2Y-s7A4A7ndXTVYvb6CFhjbf0PHTQVExqGoeykVKrGtunpyjeFfD03mJuQSYosWUMLmlzKADhJYfj-0q_VeVmgfMQ0qqYWLKY3B70ILkhjbRDvnMNX)

[Donate >>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0b468361b464504a59d51ee2ec7fa2b&_e=ql2vRqnR9fom4IiywSkn9X1E9Q-KsUba-v98Lu8TjE1iPGmej2hodIz2uyFVjQumNZJ62KGu_pUlvR8u09DPuDDkvgiCDRBXHZnfSbPexK29bm3gTnCtzx2h1FKprMC7QYYTyV6jhWp_Egg-XYoeIvxZuDwpBqsCLt_Vo9eWzbYXx2DQ2Uwg4n6KUMNr2QvPPJWyqqY2YL_eT89B1EsKBSMlC8lqe8LVcanD0M5JulYpg5wLoJlshdDjjQUhq7G01CGqyXNta69l7QmRHeWRyfMrrYk3SOzezsCWTRlfvyQFkJK9SuFdebbOWdrWdHY6jOkozFsT1nlBGVnOyC1cXpz7YnjpFSaSIkSKFDB1bG-M7ndXGKZX3zmRAHcUq_Y6)

Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."

**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).

Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:

[Donate $10 >>>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0b468361b464504a59d51ee2ec7fa2b&_e=ql2vRqnR9fom4IiywSkn9X1E9Q-KsUba-v98Lu8TjE1iPGmej2hodIz2uyFVjQumNZJ62KGu_pUlvR8u09DPuDDkvgiCDRBXHZnfSbPexK29bm3gTnCtzx2h1FKprMC7QYYTyV6jhWp_Egg-XYoeIvxZuDwpBqsCLt_Vo9eWzbYPsjY5cx52OWOSg-uEUrYPi86ilLYGBInnCcSQ5f_xbwJC5bS0sMY_BK8xyZDTSpJC3gsrVaJGB4o7QVc2lIkzOWhXlPPqzVgpWhfjG6BPqbh7YcrCc2iHKzhhbjJUYQdOhIEwnfDIP9ZG21sho--1Nk0nm7J-1Ufb1AdLaO0v9Ap6KCQERJvn1s59W3NXqf_6y3kFLbqdGJi-0vMp5yyo)

clean_body: Peter, I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine. When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me. FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. Make no mistake: They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for. They failed. SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech. One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society. Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of The Fountainhead by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity. Which is why I am personally reaching out to you. I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country. I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before. So keep reading! My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways. Have you ever read Ayn Rand's Atlas Shrugged or The Fountainhead? These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it. But they are 700+ pages long! Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me: Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today. So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers." Skimmers: Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration. Swimmers: Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets." Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate: Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR: Free market capitalism Rational self-interest Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST: Cancel Culture Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas * Big government I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount. As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000. Thank you for everything, James O'Keefe P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders. These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity. Well, NOT these students. The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.
