subject: I’ll never stop fighting for this country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108222510/547254445/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzg3OGI5OC1kZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxNcDND7So9M1Pu6NXAYJ3uJQGNZwsEmgl2EVyKSMEM=&emci=3b878b98-de37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=57878b98-de37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894) Hey Derek, I know you’re about to head out for the long weekend, but I was hoping you would take just a minute to read this message before logging off: [**I’m Chris Deluzio, an Iraq War veteran and a Congressman representing my home district in Western Pennsylvania. And I’ve dedicated my life to serving this country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108222511/547254446/-1558066259?refcode=email_052325_vetbio&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzg3OGI5OC1kZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxNcDND7So9M1Pu6NXAYJ3uJQGNZwsEmgl2EVyKSMEM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108222512/547254447/-1558066259?refcode=email_052325_vetbio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzg3OGI5OC1kZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxNcDND7So9M1Pu6NXAYJ3uJQGNZwsEmgl2EVyKSMEM=) After the 9/11 attacks happened during my senior year of high school, I felt a call to serve. So I headed off to the Naval Academy as a teenager. I served in the Navy—two deployments at sea, one on the ground in Iraq. I learned to put the mission first and those I served alongside ahead of myself. The motto was, “Ship. Shipmate. Self.” That same commitment drives me in Congress every single day to fight for my fellow veterans and the hardworking people of Western Pennsylvania. **But right now, Republicans in the House are threatening critical programs that so many Americans rely on—just so they can give a bigger piece of the pie to huge corporations and billionaires.** They’re bringing a chainsaw to the Social Security Administration and the VA, threatening the hard-earned benefits and care of millions of seniors and veterans. And now, they’re pushing a fiscally reckless plan that would cut billions of dollars from Medicaid, leaving millions of Americans without healthcare coverage. Derek, my time in the Navy taught me to stand up for what’s right and to never shy away from a righteous fight for the hardworking people of our country. And I won't stop now. **[I’m working every day to protect working families in Western PA and ensure our government works for the people, and I need you with me, Derek. Stand with me and defend hardworking Americans by pitching in now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108222513/547254448/-1558066259?refcode=email_052325_vetbio&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzg3OGI5OC1kZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxNcDND7So9M1Pu6NXAYJ3uJQGNZwsEmgl2EVyKSMEM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **** | **** | **** | **[Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108222514/547254449/-1558066259?refcode=email_052325_vetbio&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzg3OGI5OC1kZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxNcDND7So9M1Pu6NXAYJ3uJQGNZwsEmgl2EVyKSMEM=)**

clean_body: Hey Derek, I know you’re about to head out for the long weekend, but I was hoping you would take just a minute to read this message before logging off: = = After the 9/11 attacks happened during my senior year of high school, I felt a call to serve. So I headed off to the Naval Academy as a teenager. I served in the Navy—two deployments at sea, one on the ground in Iraq. I learned to put the mission first and those I served alongside ahead of myself. The motto was, “Ship. Shipmate. Self.” That same commitment drives me in Congress every single day to fight for my fellow veterans and the hardworking people of Western Pennsylvania. But right now, Republicans in the House are threatening critical programs that so many Americans rely on—just so they can give a bigger piece of the pie to huge corporations and billionaires. They’re bringing a chainsaw to the Social Security Administration and the VA, threatening the hard-earned benefits and care of millions of seniors and veterans. And now, they’re pushing a fiscally reckless plan that would cut billions of dollars from Medicaid, leaving millions of Americans without healthcare coverage. Derek, my time in the Navy taught me to stand up for what’s right and to never shy away from a righteous fight for the hardworking people of our country. And I won't stop now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ** | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@chrisforpa.com** to your address book. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you no longer want to receive our messages, you can . This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. subject: Republicans advanced Trump’s Medicaid cuts out of the House on Wednesday night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|

**Peter —** **Republicans advanced Donald Trump’s cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, Pell Grants, and so much more out of the House of Representatives over to the Senate, on _razor thin margins_ while most Americans were asleep.** | [PITCH IN TO BUILD A BLUE MAJORITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108222622/547254848/-1074210638?amount=&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250523_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBmNGU3Mi1kZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AqL6ZMmmEErpq6NV0yX-Xst1vsqsagCMEsMe3B_w2vE=)
---
I voted NO on this legislation because it’s heartless, cruel, and rips away healthcare for over 13 million people nationwide – all to pay for handouts to the billionaire donors the Republican Party actually serves.
Not a single Republican joined us in opposing this disastrous legislation. They know this agenda is deeply unpopular, that’s why they’re taking votes in the dead of night and _**why taking back the majority is so important.**_
**_**[Now it’s up to the Senate, Peter — so please let leaders know exactly how you feel about Donald Trump’s cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and the safety nets we rely on. And if you’re standing with us in this work to take back the House and deliver the majority that will put a stop to this chaos, pitch in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108222623/547254853/1386253589?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250523_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBmNGU3Mi1kZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AqL6ZMmmEErpq6NV0yX-Xst1vsqsagCMEsMe3B_w2vE=)**_**

More than 300,000 people in our district will be affected by the cuts to Medicaid. Democrats submitted __hundreds__ of amendments to this legislation that would stand up for communities and the hardworking people who rely on these programs, and Republicans stayed silent and beholden to Donald Trump’s extreme and authoritarian agenda.
[**This bill is dangerous, and Americans are rightfully angry. subject: LAPSED MEMBERSHIP --- Renew NOW.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

name: Ted Cruz
subject: 2026 Senate Race Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
FOR TEAM CRUZ ONLY ---

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el8yMDI2LVNlbmF0ZS1SYWNlLVVwZGF0ZV8yMDI1MDUyMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjYtU2VuYXRlLVJhY2UtVXBkYXRlJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTEwMCZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/ixLdb7izPhiCPahFphaTJA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, The 2026 midterm elections will decide more than who and which party controls the United States Senate. The midterm elections will also decide whether President Trump is able to successfully implement his America First agenda and restore American Greatness. As you know, activist judges from the radical Left are blocking many of President Trump's anti-illegal immigration policies with an unprecedented slew of nationwide injunctions. Many of these orders are lawless and merely designed to give Democrats time to retake the Senate in 2026- _their plan is to**delay and then to destroy the America First agenda** in this twofold manner. _ _**Make No Mistake**_**:** If Democrats take control of the United States Senate in 2026, they will be able to take vicious revenge on President Trump and on all of us patriotic Americans who love our country. They _will _rip open_ the border_ and release a wave of criminal aliens on us. _And of course, they 're already plotting to impeach Trump again..._ **We must hold the Senate to stop the Democrats** and to save America. Here is the best way we can do that, according to my political team: We must win the 'Open Seat' Senate races in Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, and then beat far-left Jon Ossoff in Georgia. Right now, __The Cook Political Report_ _is listing Michigan and Georgia as "Toss-Up" and is listing Minnesota and New Hampshire as "Leans-Democratic" - all four are winnable if we start working right away! **My team worked hard to win my race in Texas. And we couldn 't have done it without grassroots supporters like you at our side.** **Now it 's time for us to focus on helping our Republican friends do the same in Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire & Georgia. ** ** ** __[_**Please - will you step up again to help us in this fight? Peter, Mother’s Day might be over, but the fight for working moms isn’t. As I wrote in the [_Washington Post_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108223909/547258457/1087501492?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250523_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZjZjJkZC1kZjM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rEUZFAfIIbMkqJHumYALRuM8bNFO3a6rn4zAXLYhCrQ=&emci=e38cc9d6-df37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8dfcf2dd-df37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30620316) last week, American motherhood is in crisis. And Republicans are making it worse. They’ve attacked reproductive freedom, driven up the cost of living, and gutted support for child care, maternal health, and working families. Now, they’re proposing cuts to Medicaid — a program that pays for _41% of all births_ in the U.S. Donald Trump’s tariffs are hiking up prices on car seats, diapers, and strollers, all while slashing food assistance and defunding programs moms rely on every day. **This isn’t a coincidence. It’s a choice.** Republicans chose tax cuts for billionaires over paid family leave. They chose corporate donors over equal pay for women. They chose political power over reproductive freedom. But we can choose differently. We can choose moms — and we can start by electing a Democratic House in 2026. **[Fair Shot PAC is working every day to flip seats, support strong Democratic candidates, and stop the extreme GOP agenda. # [How Chevron's Exit From Venezuela By May 27th, 2025 Threatens US Energy Independence And Hands China A Strategic Victory](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=163126709&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMTI2NzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgwMDk4MjYsImV4cCI6MTc1MDYwMTgyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6vYo1qV952Qs_6JVnBZEw5NJcdpmiHVzF00XVlkABEw)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40e78afd-168b-4a7a-b57c-c35e668a45c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On May 27, 2025, Chevron, the last major American oil company operating in Venezuela, will be forced to wind down its operations in the South American nation, marking a significant blow to U.S. energy interests and a dangerous step backward for American energy independence. This deadline, set by the U.S. Treasury Department under President Donald Trump's administration, stems from the revocation of Chevron's OFAC-issued license to operate, move tied to escalating sanctions against Venezuela's Maduro regime. While the intent behind these sanctions was to punish what many view as a corrupt and anti-democratic government, it is clear the ultimate consequences of this license revocation could undermine America's strategic position in the global energy market, cede critical influence and power to China, and weaken our nation's ability to secure affordable, reliable energy for the American people and initiate another migrant crisis at our borders. Rather than America First, this policy shift signals a China First approach that should be avoided at all costs.
For over a century, Chevron has been a cornerstone of American energy presence in Venezuela, a country sitting atop the world's largest proven oil reserves--some 300 billion barrels. Chevron's joint ventures with Venezuela's state-owned PDVSA produce approximately 242,000 barrels per day, accounting for roughly a quarter of Venezuela's total oil output. In 2024 alone, Venezuelan crude made up 13% of imports to U.S. Gulf Coast refineries, providing a vital supply of heavy crude to American refiners like Valero Energy, PBF Energy, Phillips 66, and ExxonMobil which is simply unavailable in large, commercially viable quantities from US domestic oil producers.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OurRZFVMjaZlXv1SMiA2jKiQLjIc7hLKpKW73TsptTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163126709)
This steady flow of oil has helped stabilize domestic fuel prices and ensured that American consumers aren't left at the mercy of volatile global markets. But, with Chevron's forced exit, this critical supply chain is at risk, threatening higher energy costs for American families and businesses at a time when economic stability is paramount and at a time where a global economic showdown between the US and China is festering.
The decision to push Chevron out of Venezuela is rooted in the Trump administration's aggressive stance against Nicolas Maduro's regime, which has been accused of electoral fraud, human rights abuses, and U.S. demands on the repatriation of illegal aliens.
On March 4, 2025, the Trump administration replaced Chevron's General License 41 with a wind-down order, extended to May 27th via General License 41B, signaling a return to the "maximum pressure" sanctions of Trump's first term - arguably one of the few foreign policy failures of the first Trump administration. Additionally, a 25% tariff on countries purchasing Venezuelan oil, effective April 2nd, aims to choke off Maduro's revenue streams. While these measures may hurt Maduro's coffers, they are much more likely to simply drive Venezuela's oil trade underground, reducing transparency and empowering adversaries like China to fill the void left by American companies.
Why would we want to give China the upper hand and allow them to control Venezuela's oil reserves when we can use these reserves to our benefit and negotiate a deal with Venezuela that allows for illegal alien repatriation and US control over Venezuelan oil with strict stipulations that President Trump and his special envoy Ric Grenell can implement and control?
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OurRZFVMjaZlXv1SMiA2jKiQLjIc7hLKpKW73TsptTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163126709)
Grenell's recent visit to Venezuela proved that Maduro, despite his flaws, has a deep respect for President Trump and is willing to comply with illegal alien repatriation and hostage releases. Moreover, he has demonstrated a preference for doing business with American controlled companies over Chinese, CCP controlled companies. Why would we want to further stoke conflict with Venezuela when we can take control of their oil reserves to benefit our long term goal of energy independence?
China, already the largest buyer of Venezuelan oil, stands to gain the most from Chevron's departure. In February 2025, China imported 503,000 barrels per day--55% of Venezuela's total exports--often at steep discounts due to sanctions. With Chevron out, Venezuela's Vice President Delcy Rodriguez has actively courted Chinese investment, and even met with Chinese officials in April to secure increased oil purchases and supplies of diluent needed to process Venezuela's tar-like crude.
This move not only strengthens China's grip on Venezuela's vast oil reserves, but also enhances Beijing's influence in America's backyard, just across the newly proclaimed Gulf of America. As Chevron CEO Mike Wirth recently warned, if American companies are forced out, "the oil production continues, and American companies are replaced" by Chinese and Russian drillers who offer less favorable terms to Maduro but secure strategic footholds in the Western Hemisphere.
Allowing China and Russia to have an increased presence and economic control in the Western Hemisphere poses a national security threat, and it contradicts President Trump and the State Department's recent move to take back the Panama Canal for the explicit purpose of countering Chinese influence in Central and South America and the Panama Canal Zone.
The implications for American energy independence are dire. The United States, the world's largest oil producer, has championed energy dominance under Trump's "America First" agenda. Yet, losing access to Venezuelan crude--a reliable, geographically proximate source that compliments, rather than competes with domestic production--could increase U.S. reliance on more distant suppliers like Saudi Arabia or Iraq, raising procurement costs and exposing American refiners to geopolitical risks due to the perpetual state of chaos and violence in the Middle East.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OurRZFVMjaZlXv1SMiA2jKiQLjIc7hLKpKW73TsptTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163126709)
U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright has downplayed the impact of China gaining more control over oil exports in Venezuela, claiming "small interruptions from other nations" won't affect global supply. However, analysts at TD Cowen have recently warned that Chevron's exit from Venezuela could spike crude prices, hitting U.S. Gulf Coast refineries hard and potentially driving up gasoline and diesel costs for American consumers. At a time where inflation remains a current concern, as the US continues its efforts to recover from Biden's economy, this is a self-inflicted wound we cannot afford. Additionally, why should America forgo the tens of thousands of well-paying jobs that will be created by allowing American companies to do business with Venezuela? These are American jobs in oil-field services, refining, and trading that will instead be sacrificed, once again, to China if the licenses to Americans in the oil industry are not extended in Venezuela.
Moreover, Chevron's departure risks undermining the transparency and efficiency it brought to Venezuela's oil sector. The "Chevron model," which paired joint ventures with PDVSA with strict oversight to curb corruption, boosted Venezuelan production by 70,000 barrels per day in 2023 alone. Without Chevron's expertise and capital, Venezuela's crumbling energy infrastructure could deteriorate further, reducing output and forcing Maduro to rely on opaque deals with Chinese firms controlled by the CCP, or shadow fleets, as seen during earlier sanction periods. These shadow oil fleets operate with a high degree of non-transparency and evade sanctions and regulations. These ships, often older and flagged in countries outside of Western sanctions, are used to circumvent price caps and other restrictions imposed on Russian oil exports.
This will not only enrich corrupt intermediaries, but it also diminishes U.S. leverage over Venezuela's oil market, handing China a free pass to dictate the terms.
From an America First perspective, maintaining a strong U.S. presence in Venezuela's oil sector is not about coddling Maduro, but about securing our national interests. Chevron's operations have kept American companies at the forefront, ensuring that the United States--not China or Russia--benefits from Venezuela's vast resources. By forcing Chevron out, we risk ceding this strategic asset to adversaries who will use it to fuel their own economic and geopolitical ambitions.
As the looming May 27th deadline approaches, the United States must reconsider this path. An extension of Chevron's, and other American's licenses will allow for the Trump administration to have a pragmatic approach with strategic engagement, ensuring that American companies, not Chinese companies, shape the future of Venezuela's oil industry.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OurRZFVMjaZlXv1SMiA2jKiQLjIc7hLKpKW73TsptTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163126709)
The stakes are high. Losing ground in Venezuela not only threatens our energy security but also emboldens China to challenge U.S. leadership in the Western Hemisphere. For the sake of American workers, consumers, national security, and our global standing, we must prioritize energy independence and keep Chevron and other American oil companies in the game to block China from turning Venezuela into their personal oil depot.
President Trump's energy strategy is about dominance--drill, baby, drill, and keep our adversaries at bay. Letting Chevron leave Venezuela is a step backward, and we can't afford to lose ground to Communist China.

The decision to not renew Chevron's oil license in Venezuela is going to give China and the CCP a massive hold over Latin America and the largest oil reserves in the world at the expense of US Energy. | | | May 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- On May 27, 2025, Chevron, the last major American oil company operating in Venezuela, will be forced to wind down its operations in the South American nation, marking a significant blow to U.S. energy interests and a dangerous step backward for American energy independence. This deadline, set by the U.S. Treasury Department under President Donald Trump's administration, stems from the revocation of Chevron's OFAC-issued license to operate, move tied to escalating sanctions against Venezuela's Maduro regime. While the intent behind these sanctions was to punish what many view as a corrupt and anti-democratic government, it is clear the ultimate consequences of this license revocation could undermine America's strategic position in the global energy market, cede critical influence and power to China, and weaken our nation's ability to secure affordable, reliable energy for the American people and initiate another migrant crisis at our borders. Rather than America First, this policy shift signals a China First approach that should be avoided at all costs. For over a century, Chevron has been a cornerstone of American energy presence in Venezuela, a country sitting atop the world's largest proven oil reserves--some 300 billion barrels. Chevron's joint ventures with Venezuela's state-owned PDVSA produce approximately 242,000 barrels per day, accounting for roughly a quarter of Venezuela's total oil output. In 2024 alone, Venezuelan crude made up 13% of imports to U.S. Gulf Coast refineries, providing a vital supply of heavy crude to American refiners like Valero Energy, PBF Energy, Phillips 66, and ExxonMobil which is simply unavailable in large, commercially viable quantities from US domestic oil producers. This steady flow of oil has helped stabilize domestic fuel prices and ensured that American consumers aren't left at the mercy of volatile global markets. But, with Chevron's forced exit, this critical supply chain is at risk, threatening higher energy costs for American families and businesses at a time when economic stability is paramount and at a time where a global economic showdown between the US and China is festering. The decision to push Chevron out of Venezuela is rooted in the Trump administration's aggressive stance against Nicolas Maduro's regime, which has been accused of electoral fraud, human rights abuses, and U.S. demands on the repatriation of illegal aliens. On March 4, 2025, the Trump administration replaced Chevron's General License 41 with a wind-down order, extended to May 27th via General License 41B, signaling a return to the "maximum pressure" sanctions of Trump's first term - arguably one of the few foreign policy failures of the first Trump administration. Additionally, a 25% tariff on countries purchasing Venezuelan oil, effective April 2nd, aims to choke off Maduro's revenue streams. While these measures may hurt Maduro's coffers, they are much more likely to simply drive Venezuela's oil trade underground, reducing transparency and empowering adversaries like China to fill the void left by American companies. Why would we want to give China the upper hand and allow them to control Venezuela's oil reserves when we can use these reserves to our benefit and negotiate a deal with Venezuela that allows for illegal alien repatriation and US control over Venezuelan oil with strict stipulations that President Trump and his special envoy Ric Grenell can implement and control? name: Kelly Morrison
subject: Why I ran for office in the first place + Republicans defunding Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
Kelly Morrison here. Many of you have been so supportive of our campaign since I first ran for State House in 2018, and you have heard me say that one of the reasons I raised my hand to run for office was to protect women's healthcare. I have spent my entire working life working to protect women’s healthcare, and it’s heartbreaking to me that my daughters have fewer reproductive rights than I did.
Last week, Republicans in the Energy & Commerce Committee voted on a provision of the reconciliation bill that would “defund” Planned Parenthood and take away Medicaid from almost 14 million people. This will devastate millions of Americans and harm our entire healthcare system.
Peter, as the first and only pro-choice OB-GYN in Congress, you can count on me to fight back.
Planned Parenthood is a safe haven for women all across this country, and Republicans are working hard to take it away from us. From annual exams to cancer screening to contraception and so much more, Planned Parenthood provides expert and evidence-based care that many people depend on and helps fill in gaps in our system.
Let me be clear - Republicans are willing to take this safe haven away to provide tax breaks for the most wealthy Americans.
Peter, as an OB-GYN for more than 20 years in Minnesota, I know firsthand the dangers women face when they can’t access the care they need. Donald Trump and his allies are following the Project 2025 playbook with regard to abortion and reproductive healthcare. But time and time again, Americans have made it clear that they do not want to restrict access to abortion. We must win the midterm elections in 2026 so people’s rights can be restored.
My team reached out earlier this week to share our May fundraising goal. It is imperative that I show strong fundraising numbers in 2025 to ensure that MN-03 doesn’t garner the attention of national Republicans and become competitive so we do our part to flip the U.S. House of Representatives.
Peter, this grassroots team raised over $3,200 since the last time I reached out, so we now have less than $15,000 to go to reach our May fundraising goal.
Every dollar helps - could you chip in $5, $10, $25, or any amount that works for you today to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=5] Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you so much for your continued support, and for your work to help make this country a place where everyone has the opportunity to thrive.
With gratitude and resolve,
Congresswoman Kelly Morrison, M.D.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/people/091724_Morrison_Minneapolis_MN_CD_1335_cropped-web.jpg]
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=F4g9qGHEkzdilkUjxlV3zzL2iK9rSvJ51Q0vQVwD2xtry%2Fdjcwx6R7NplrS35XGolqMBxyzqDtHfqW6dM5WnoxUH0oNLrpoFogP3hlzvoen5ioqGsWvRm7qaHkeSMMvSsD5XH2IE3h0Pe1aPEraKqn6QTCGWWG2TNTK%2FYI9D95Zyf7YNZXOfPFR9wpwYdahCddNk7RciphRtSU4OSGQ6tB33CGwS7tpZQ0%2BVOCv%2BsRNj6HeBkXZXbFFeDeTRoaJAwteQWhhb%2BtNMYEKjvJ7dUeOsRKcwSnct3%2F3hAe4nlZN9d32s9MFuIbwVk%2Fr5YqbYmoLs%2Fu0oNkLS17ycl7U%2FhWz88176xh3EvPdvBsUidgoO48Fet5z1PNLwV8Rc6NKo92pngalqpU6iELQFQJL%2B9T%2FCB4%2FacYZ2%2Fh86%2FPEC%2BndneGVQy2r%2FNjQrMfgvfXuO] .

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Hegseth is Declaring War on Freedom of Religion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The Secretary of Defense and his personal pastor stood behind the seal of the Department of Defense and held a prayer service in the Pentagon auditorium during work hours on Monday.
#
The Secretary of Defense and his personal pastor stood behind the seal of the Department of Defense and held a prayer service in the Pentagon auditorium during work hours on Monday.
During that prayer service, Donald Trump was acclaimed as a divinely appointed leader.
Yes, that all actually happened. And they want to keep doing it.
Look, we have no issue with Christians in the Military. We have no quarrel with chapels and churches and chaplains and the observance of religion within the Military, even on base.
What we have a problem with is that the Secretary of Defense is clearly endorsing his radical brand of Christianity over other religions.
This is what Hegseth’s culture war is really about. Force the Military and those within it to observe his brand of extremist Christianity, swear fealty to Trump, or face the consequences. Anyone else — Muslim, Sikh, Jewish, Hindu, even other Christian denominations — is clearly meant to feel unwelcome by the Secretary of Defense himself.
Recruitment, unit cohesion, and readiness depend on tolerance — being a valued member of the team because of what you bring to it, not what church you go to. If this continues, it will impact our National Security.
VoteVets has always stood for religious liberty within the ranks. It’s what makes our country great, and our Military the best in the world. We will stand against every effort to favor one religion over another.
We must join together and speak out against Hegseth’s war on freedom of religion.
**[Tell the Pentagon: Stop favoring Hegseth’s radical brand of Christianity over other religions, and get the Military back to what it does best — keeping us safe.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250522_vv_em_hegseth_religion?source=em250523-1&akid=34420%2E3013755%2EnWMkkG)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250522_vv_em_hegseth_religion?source=em250523-1&akid=34420%2E3013755%2EnWMkkG)
---
We have to resist these people as they work to corrupt the Military and bend it to Trump’s will. So much depends upon it.
Thanks for signing on.
The team at VoteVets

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

subject: FIRST → THEN → NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Super PACs, far-right mega-donors, and the entire political establishment have tried and failed to take Ilhan down three elections in a row.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1645%2E791427%2ELC1XcT)

**FIRST →** Ilhan Omar was elected to represent our Minneapolis communities in Congress in 2018, ready to fight for progressive change and bringing with her an energized movement.
**THEN →** Super PACs, far-right mega-donors, and the entire political establishment have tried and failed to take Ilhan down **__three elections in a row.**__
Millions of dollars have been spent on attack ads, smear campaigns and more, but this grassroots team has always answered the call and helped us defend this seat.
**NOW →** Ilhan has officially launched her campaign for reelection, and we are getting ready for a fight that will be as tough as ever.
With Trump cracking down on free speech and billionaires like Elon Musk dominating political spending, we have to be prepared for a long and expensive campaign.
**SO PLEASE →** **[We're urgently asking you to make your first contribution today so we can build a winning campaign. We are approaching an all-important fundraising deadline, and Ilhan needs to know that our movement has her back. name: Sharice Davids
subject: National Republicans rammed through a disastrous bill in the middle of the night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
It is dangerous, irresponsible, and it means higher costs for hardworking Kansas families

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108227078/547265481/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA0ZjJlMy1lMzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QoTi7itx1MupAoJoPBqsMW6mN2sbl0uShEZKIlygMro=) The disastrous budget bill National Republicans rammed through the House early yesterday morning is not just deeply out-of-touch with the needs of the American people. **It is dangerous, irresponsible, and a recipe for drowning hardworking Kansas families in even higher costs.** The extreme GOP budget rips health care away from thousands of Kansans and takes food off the tables of hardworking families, all to hand massive tax giveaways to billionaires and the ultra-wealthy at the expense of our neighbors and communities. Throughout the process, I introduced multiple commonsense amendments to reduce the damage this bill would inflict, including measures to protect the Affordable Care Act from cuts, support rural hospitals, and save Kansas jobs. **House Republicans rejected every single one of them.** I won’t shield you from the truth: This budget vote is a massive setback for our state. But this isn’t the end of the fight. This bill still needs to pass the Senate, and I can promise you that I will keep pushing back every way I can against this devastating budget scheme until the very last minute. [_**That’s why I wanted to ask: Will you sign my petition urging the Senate to vote NO on this Medicaid-slashing, SNAP-gutting budget bill? Despite this setback, we can’t stop pushing for policies that put people first — not billionaires or powerful donors.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108227079/547265482/319382901?refcode=email_052225_Budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA0ZjJlMy1lMzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QoTi7itx1MupAoJoPBqsMW6mN2sbl0uShEZKIlygMro=&emci=947f1e86-6237-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2504f2e3-e337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22117458) | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108227080/547265483/-1405500999?refcode=email_052225_Budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA0ZjJlMy1lMzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QoTi7itx1MupAoJoPBqsMW6mN2sbl0uShEZKIlygMro=&emci=947f1e86-6237-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2504f2e3-e337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22117458)

Thank you,
-Sharice

I'm proud to be a source for all those who seek to bring truth forward. Upgrade your subscription today to access all breaking news and archives, and to help whistleblowers bring their stories forward safely. | May 23 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Mesoscale News is one of Substack's bestselling newsletters, with exclusive investigations, commentary, and breaking news. While prices for monthly access across Substack are being raised, I'm dropping mine. I incur some costs in the work I do, but I have always believed in making information accessible when it's critical for the public to know. That's why I'm dropping the price of my monthly and annual subscriptions for new subscribers. The average Substack subscription costs $8 per month. Unlike the Republican Party, EMILYs List isn't funded by billionaires. We're a community powered by more than _five million_ grassroots supporters — like you! — who fight for progressive change day in and day out.

As we prepare to elect more Democratic pro-choice women this year, I'm reviewing our 2025 donation records to give our candidates an accurate estimate of the level of support they can expect.

Here's what we pulled for you, Peter: **SUPPORTER RECORD** **Prepared for:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2025 Donor Status:** Our records indicate that you _have not_ yet made a donation this year. name: Team Haley
subject: We're sounding the alarm, null
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
URGENT: The DeVos family is gearing up to tip the scales of Michigan's Senate race

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2850?t=1&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
---
**We're sounding the alarm, null:** The DeVos family – MAGA loyalists and one of the wealthiest, most influential families in Michigan – are gearing up to launch a new political operation ahead of the midterm elections.
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2851?t=2&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
The path to Senate control runs directly through Michigan, and Haley Stevens will be the DeVos family's TOP target for defeat – all so they can install Republican Mike Rogers as Donald Trump's puppet in the Senate.
**We need to get ready to fight back, which is why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $15,000 by midnight, and we're counting on your immediate grassroots support.[Rush $5 or more right now to make sure Haley has the resources it will take to defeat the GOP here in Michigan and take back the Senate.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2851?t=3&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2852?t=4&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2853?t=5&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2854?t=6&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2851?t=7&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
---
In Michigan's last Senate race, the GOP poured nearly $80 million into the state to try to buy this seat for Mike Rogers – and they almost succeeded. Now, Rogers is running again, and the DeVos family, along with the GOP's other ultrawealthy allies, are ready to spend even MORE to flip this battleground red.
**With Senate control on the line, we cannot let that happen – not when it would mean another two years of Trump's unchecked chaos. But Haley can't fight back against the deep pockets of the GOP without your help.**
**[That's why we're urgently asking you to rush $5 or more now – every dollar makes a difference – to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and stop Donald Trump.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2851?t=8&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2851?t=9&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
---
Thank you for coming through with your support at such a crucial moment,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2850?t=10&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2850?t=11&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=12&akid=170%2E49239%2EANgaL0)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

subject: Republicans advanced Trump’s Medicaid cuts out of the House early yesterday morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
**Peter — Republicans advanced Donald Trump’s cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, Pell Grants, and so much more out of the House of Representatives over to the Senate, on _razor thin margins_ while most Americans were asleep.** | [PITCH IN TO BUILD A BLUE MAJORITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108227679/547267405/-1074210638?amount=&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250523_AM1_V3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjJjNDY0Yy1lNTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waZoi9uCm7GwiruDRRYFaj2ppazqGCLhrMw_GZ77n_s=)
---
I voted NO on this legislation because it’s heartless, cruel, and rips away healthcare for over 13 million people nationwide – all to pay for handouts to the billionaire donors the Republican Party actually serves.
Every single Democrat opposed this disastrous legislation. Republicans know this agenda is deeply unpopular, that’s why they’re taking votes in the dead of night and _**why taking back the majority is so important.**_
**_**[Now it’s up to the Senate, Peter — so please let leaders know exactly how you feel about Donald Trump’s cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and the safety nets we rely on. name: Stand with Bernie
subject: Reject James Carville’s call for Bernie to retreat

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1011&refcode=email-20250523_v&akid=8527%2E5885482%2Exd2p5l ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

While Trump jails judges, deports citizen children with cancer, and
trashes Social Security, famous Democratic strategist James Carville is
telling Democrats to abandon Bernie Sanders and progressive champions like
AOC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250523&t=1061&akid=8527%2E5885482%2Exd2p5l ]Headline: James Carville says Democrats need to stop letting Bernie
Sanders and AOC define the party

Carville wants the party to retreat—to turn away from two of the most
energizing and powerful voices bringing bold, grassroots energy that’s
packing stadiums and town halls in cities and rural counties alike. He’s
urging Democrats to cling to the same status quo politics that failed to
stop Trump in the first place.

He's dead wrong—and Bernie Sanders says it best: "THE STATUS QUO IS NOT
WORKING AND CANNOT CONTINUE TO BE DEFENDED."

That’s why Bernie is rallying folks across the country on his Fighting
Oligarchy Tour and Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team of 57,000+
volunteers are mobilizing to protect Medicaid, Social Security, and to
Save NPR & PBS from Trump’s attacks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250523nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8527%2E5885482%2Exd2p5l ]We urgently need your help today. Join Bernie and thousands of Our
Revolution activists by making a contribution of $10 or more now, and
let's stop Trump, Musk, and their dangerous right-wing agenda in its
tracks!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

A few weeks back, James Carville was literally advising that “Democrats
should roll over and play dead” and simply let the GOP “crumble.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250523&t=1060&akid=8527%2E5885482%2Exd2p5l ]Headline: Sanders dismisses Carville advice for Democrats to 'roll over
and play dead'

Bernie resoundingly rejected this defeatist advice, and in days turned out
more than 200,000 people to stand against Trump–in big cities like Denver
and LA, but also in smaller towns in red states–igniting the grassroots
revolution we need to take on Trump and his MAGA enablers.

Our Revolution understands this clearly—politics as usual won’t defeat the
right-wing extremism Trump and Musk cheerfully promote: only bold
progressive action that speaks directly to the urgent needs of the
American people can defeat the dangerous MAGA agenda.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250523nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8527%2E5885482%2Exd2p5l ]We can't afford the political cowardice Carville is espousing: the stakes

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Casting the tie-breaking vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
This is why I stayed in Congress.
| **_A LETTER FROM THE DESK OF THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR, REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
I just cast the tie-breaking vote to pass the President’s “Big Beautiful Bill.”
---
**__That__ is exactly why I made the difficult decision to withdraw my nomination to become U.N. Ambassador so I could remain in Congress.**
---
_Without my deciding vote, the President’s agenda may have never passed!_
---
This vote alone makes my sacrifice worth it.
---
As I’ve said before, “America first” is not just a slogan – it’s an _oath_ of leadership to the American people.
---
Ensuring the President’s America First agenda is enacted into law is simply much more important than my own political career.
---
Friend, when I say _America_ FIRST, I mean it!
---
_But all of that being said, the fact that passing the President’s agenda came down to my tie-breaking vote shows just how critical it is for Republicans to PROTECT and EXPAND our House GOP Majority in the midterms._
---
If the Democrats held just **__ONE_ _MORE__** House seat, this vote would have failed.
---
**That is why I’ve unlocked a MAXIMUM 1500% MATCH for the next hour to help us follow up the passage of the President's “Big Beautiful Bill” with our biggest grassroots fundraising surge of the entire year!**
---
[**Please make a contribution to help me continue fighting for the President’s agenda and fulfill his mission to PROTECT the House GOP majority – and for the next 60 minutes, I’ll ensure it goes _FIFTEEN TIMES AS FAR!_ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5127770ca5834c2aab359eb60d873d4d&_e=isby2UZTemMUcdvrLd6cgTX1gf1YWuR5ojdQ-XwmJF-p7XR2fJVQeV_oFFcD7HYkamTgKMRx0-Ndq7xQ943NpS1UE41o32sh_cPxQnkIHS7JvnUab3pizpe0d95rNJoGbtvEG-iGVC_uAyKygqnHzM3vubjCwfI0sAJN9H2Xb5lRuLjp2iSmcl7rJDbuW8eAA2OTMFd_mx52frw1syhAZEI-KpIMdG9aIWMO-szrqCeKywhDmGY9fCaP9v4jlPKVYDOv0ceWA5x9G38wrRC44NIa2nVdHWgJEKroVQdsnBfpd7wPvTcbwuYDtEMVmAS9Pz9Ot8TMtCD57nWu04Kkom4CaJCeQ2NG_U3NbfzWFSw%3D)
---

clean_body: This is why I stayed in Congress. | A LETTER FROM THE DESK OF THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR, REP. ELISE STEFANIK Friend, I just cast the tie-breaking vote to pass the President’s “Big Beautiful Bill.” That is exactly why I made the difficult decision to withdraw my nomination to become U.N. Ambassador so I could remain in Congress. Without my deciding vote, the President’s agenda may have never passed! This vote alone makes my sacrifice worth it. As I’ve said before, “America first” is not just a slogan – it’s an oath of leadership to the American people. Ensuring the President’s America First agenda is enacted into law is simply much more important than my own political career. Friend, when I say America FIRST, I mean it! But all of that being said, the fact that passing the President’s agenda came down to my tie-breaking vote shows just how critical it is for Republicans to PROTECT and EXPAND our House GOP Majority in the midterms. If the Democrats held just ONE MORE House seat, this vote would have failed. That is why I’ve unlocked a MAXIMUM 1500% MATCH for the next hour to help us follow up the passage of the President's “Big Beautiful Bill” with our biggest grassroots fundraising surge of the entire year! - Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This is exactly why we need Donavan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’re in a climate crisis – so why is a Democratic congressman voting with
Trump and Republicans to help polluters?

Rep. Shri Thanedar – Detroit’s Elon Musk – joined 34 other House Democrats
in supporting the GOP’s attack on policies taking on climate change.

The worst part? Shri’s district has the 6th-worst air pollution in the
country. Instead of fighting for environmental justice and bold climate
policies, he’s voting to give handouts to Trump and his ultrarich fossil
fuel backers.

It’s pathetic. And it’s exactly why Donavan McKinney just launched his
campaign to unseat Shri.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250523-dm?refcode=em20250523-36703&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36703_1203867_WA_sTS&akid=36703%2E1203867%2EWA_sTS ]Tweet from Donavan McKinney reading "Our community has the 6th worst
air pollution in the country, and it's gotten worse since even a year ago.
I have an asthmatic cough and my baby boy has pre-asthma because of it. So
why is our Congressman voting with Republicans to rollback policies
tackling climate change?" The tweet is a quote of a headline from Splinter
News, which reads "35 House Democrats Join Republicans in Declaring
Themselves Enemies of Climate Progress"

Donavan knows we can’t afford weak Democrats in office – especially not
ones who vote with MAGA to further poison the air we breathe!

He’s running because he understands exactly what communities like MI-13
are up against. He’s lived through the impacts of environmental racism,
and he’s raising his family in the very neighborhoods being choked by
pollution.

Donavan is rooted in this working-class community, and those roots mean we
can count on him to fight for what the people – not the polluting
corporations and billionaire class – need.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250523-dm?refcode=em20250523-36703&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36703_1203867_WA_sTS&akid=36703%2E1203867%2EWA_sTS ]We’re working hard to help Donavan defeat Shri in the 2026 primary, but
he needs a grassroots movement behind him to take on a self-funded,
multimillionaire incumbent. Will you split $5 between
Donavan’s campaign and Justice Democrats today to elect a real
working-class champion to Congress?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250523-dm?refcode=em20250523-36703&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36703_1203867_WA_sTS&akid=36703%2E1203867%2EWA_sTS ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250523-36703-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36703_1203867_WA_sTS&akid=36703%2E1203867%2EWA_sTS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36703%2E1203867%2EWA_sTS

subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a0fb1b564f7d40528ba7091daa280684&_e=ZytfrmSu5d-6MT68xnT-2jqDJ7EQ1HQQ7rtgvx8p4uxnM06IvqHwvqezTtqdKT_a9p4rRhWnSwylMByXyaYhrqFstqUjxDqllhCf8mnq1KSh7ZNvpfMPLJRslal6Pho61OkcCk2IS1z4NZaRUMRJK4xcgsRN1u8EgG7fiLxlZMj4GVG6LhEkP84KQczOEo-DamGlJC3MRn3P8lC0otE0KNAOQ9D8zIAR_3ge_ScKj_SXx2d2Zpbng2PWd8_5YGIX43MKMy-kmANyTRQR--ggpLrYQp6KZ-2XjM3ceoRiQcI6l9m-G9THqFdgmK5-nydcMwb3luohJwtaHj97Rnaipw0FH4tNr2k3InRSfIvY2Yw%3D)
Peter,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a0fb1b564f7d40528ba7091daa280684&_e=ZytfrmSu5d-6MT68xnT-2jqDJ7EQ1HQQ7rtgvx8p4uxnM06IvqHwvqezTtqdKT_a9p4rRhWnSwylMByXyaYhrqFstqUjxDqllhCf8mnq1KSh7ZNvpfMPLJRslal6Pho61OkcCk2IS1z4NZaRUMRJK4xcgsRN1u8EgG7fiLxlZMhcdGl6Beuvgy3lwrEWItaXlmEeM78-Lo0qWSDhjPs5_IgwcG8G2NRtICBXfKyHtDzHD4qLuthvS-abDDqT6Q9ZEmt1aQZkNMJczo2uxFK6BHCi_vjiQPCYWZjX09bc5F-fJr1865b5Gfq7u1gGrOEzixvqeQqc4VdHdaH4FHpo-VF_YoZAcd-W8PglcYoTrUH3B9vGjGoLIyV0Ig5zerbU)

[Donate >>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a0fb1b564f7d40528ba7091daa280684&_e=ZytfrmSu5d-6MT68xnT-2jqDJ7EQ1HQQ7rtgvx8p4uxnM06IvqHwvqezTtqdKT_a9p4rRhWnSwylMByXyaYhrqFstqUjxDqllhCf8mnq1KSh7ZNvpfMPLJRslal6Pho61OkcCk2IS1z4NZaRUMRJK4xcgsRN1u8EgG7fiLxlZMgterBTYYrg8qujhCs5s_PFexdxT1RoRNDw4gNQtq-UQTnwroUMSpUZph6Qx1a9lKajvk4JxWMqiwczJ2ZF-BO58J4y9y-5AlvAqPGEwjHfXWjZaUWcRuWSGqS93ibxRBWmSOdZCDpbJDVXO0ERnq6K-3JWj8dkFv6eEoGx__24YQ9bMQFLFrUOyklptGwzo-1JrC5GW58nozS_v5lfEASK)

Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."

**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).

Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:

[Donate $10 >>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a0fb1b564f7d40528ba7091daa280684&_e=ZytfrmSu5d-6MT68xnT-2jqDJ7EQ1HQQ7rtgvx8p4uxnM06IvqHwvqezTtqdKT_a9p4rRhWnSwylMByXyaYhrqFstqUjxDqllhCf8mnq1KSh7ZNvpfMPLJRslal6Pho61OkcCk2IS1z4NZaRUMRJK4xcgsRN1u8EgG7fiLxlZMgvvf4nadJZzmAKGtmVfIR4DAfg4vhkw-WxY04iZNGmNrIc18-nAS5w2zCYwIamOwk6KITS1QQjizzFVeb3fopmHBTOFbIRdUpaPSN77LrnjpIMc_jeph7A-c30nQULDI5dFtdfyygxkjigDlT4mumhyU_MScZBuhEg9iG_Mi_NfHeKqOb7dWLk76GyVaxhrGNegKcdTFLQsDcWLjJ1LfdY)

clean_body: Peter, I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine. When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me. FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. Make no mistake: They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for. They failed. SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech. One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society. Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of The Fountainhead by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity. Which is why I am personally reaching out to you. I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country. I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before. So keep reading! My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways. Have you ever read Ayn Rand's Atlas Shrugged or The Fountainhead? These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it. But they are 700+ pages long! Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me: Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today. So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers." Skimmers: Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration. Swimmers: Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets." Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate: Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR: Free market capitalism Rational self-interest Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST: Cancel Culture Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas * Big government I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount. As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000. Thank you for everything, James O'Keefe P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders. These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity. Well, NOT these students. The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same. Thank you, James The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. 1038 Miwok Dr Lodi, CA 95240

Team — Your support fuels our fight for progress for Michiganders and people all across the country. _I really mean that. _ Every contribution you give, no matter the amount, helps us deliver real results for working families and defend our fundamental freedoms. It’s your donations that help us amplify the voices of everyday Americans, support candidates who put our values front and center, and fight like hell to make a real difference in people’s lives. When you give to Fight Like Hell PAC, you’re not just making a political donation to help us reach more voters or train candidates across the country. **You’re investing in the kind of country you want to live in and your children to grow up in — one where your zip code or bank account doesn’t determine your ability to create a better future for yourself and your family. ** Grassroots donations are at the heart of everything we do. clean_body: | Team — Your support fuels our fight for progress for Michiganders and people all across the country. I really mean that. Every contribution you give, no matter the amount, helps us deliver real results for working families and defend our fundamental freedoms. It’s your donations that help us amplify the voices of everyday Americans, support candidates who put our values front and center, and fight like hell to make a real difference in people’s lives. When you give to Fight Like Hell PAC, you’re not just making a political donation to help us reach more voters or train candidates across the country. You’re investing in the kind of country you want to live in and your children to grow up in — one where your zip code or bank account doesn’t determine your ability to create a better future for yourself and your family. Grassroots donations are at the heart of everything we do. subject: An "extraordinary attack"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Sean Wilentz, a professor of American History at Princeton University, makes the stakes of the SAVE act clear: “ It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history .”
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in Congress start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=J/ZfRG43JfkG9LPN1y88wt2MkLVjeFC9ztGwCj41Fw9IF0PqxTk6lDGgUcWZEQHFl2uw7oyslbi135upru7bvzoNmn8ZLVXm+VPxJzuT13o=]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=J/ZfRG43JfkG9LPN1y88wt2MkLVjeFC9ztGwCj41Fw9IF0PqxTk6lDGgUcWZEQHFl2uw7oyslbi135upru7bvzoNmn8ZLVXm+VPxJzuT13o=]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]

Peter, Chip Roy here — I’ll start you off with the good news:**** **House Republicans are moving forward with Trump’s tax cuts.****_That’s a win I’ll take every single time_.** But here’s the bad news: Some of my colleagues seem to have a math problem... **You can’t cut taxes AND spend money like a drunken sailor.** _Expanding Obamacare?_ _Driving up $50 TRILLION in debt?_ _Funding Biden’s so-called “Inflation Reduction Act”?_ **That’s not fighting for Trump’s agenda.** **That’s managing socialism.** As Policy Chair of the House Freedom Caucus, I **REFUSE** to let Republicans continue go down this **SUICIDAL** path. **But I need YOUR help, Peter.****In fact, our entire House Freedom Caucus team needs YOUR help.** **Each one of us are dedicated to ENDING Washington’s SPENDING ADDICTION. ** **After all, tax cuts without spending cuts = INFLATION. **And inflation is nothing but a **HIDDEN TAX** on Americans like you. Believe me – Washington isn’t going to pay the price for their fiscal insanity. **YOU are. Hard-working Americans. Your children. Grandchildren.** The House Freedom Caucus is fighting back – **but we can’t win this battle alone. ** **The Swamp is big. It’s corrupt. And it’s well-funded.****But with patriots like YOU standing with us, we can beat them.** It doesn’t take millions — it takes momentum. After all, if 2024 taught us anything, it’s that Americans like YOU are the _most powerful political force in the nation_. **[$10, $20, or $30 at a time, you can fuel our mission to drain the Swamp, slash spending, and take our country bac k](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/tGxU9FnloP9jq2LZFElIZ0IHWlIbVZeRU0DVhMl0iY3bSIErQk2SRIG5xwxGEoUFyxS1uMevvY4DqO99dCvx_iGxfAUmILjCMbJVu8ixIo9e_ZbIFXBUTpBCS3dTFor9hRVX2NTUBbP30J5ArOfiwgQjANtQhwAFKIoQVHqCyHUKT3n5z1yxpfCMNYWZlhqSX1ehgUihrA4tYtU_YLKt0KfNTcfW6qHHhKPygcHyUDV4a9jWPxiM9UUCwTnSwaBfnjjinOy9VHppMEFAB2rET4dYarV_2MUUCWOFRZJobDwUPXdKg99yqF8xjTh0IM7Rz--cuFILZ6qItIgApxkzhDq4AuHFQfngob-ksWMVt9QyqD58Hcw2Q0auHynUF6o_6854NkvNWjmQvgUQnwisgrCLCqI3MOy6YMmAgBw-HO33v4OHdlgvtKq2XyzA27QIgBKMCkYBxlJLLf0sTmpvd8pAojPG6KliLmJbWB7AXshdJtWoyMAZ/fy_u6ZZr4vd-iFeoKoxC4dSkcE-UOfIL/9).** **Will you chip in today and help us keep fighting?** **Every dollar counts. But I need YOUR help, Peter.In fact, our entire House Freedom Caucus team needs YOUR help. Each one of us are dedicated to ENDING Washington’s SPENDING ADDICTION. After all, tax cuts without spending cuts = INFLATION. And inflation is nothing but a HIDDEN TAX on Americans like you. Believe me – Washington isn’t going to pay the price for their fiscal insanity. YOU are. Hard-working Americans. Your children. Grandchildren. The House Freedom Caucus is fighting back – but we can’t win this battle alone. The Swamp is big. It’s corrupt. And it’s well-funded.But with patriots like YOU standing with us, we can beat them. It doesn’t take millions — it takes momentum. After all, if 2024 taught us anything, it’s that Americans like YOU are the most powerful political force in the nation. . Will you chip in today and help us keep fighting? Every dollar counts. Every patriot matters. | | For Liberty, Chip Roy House Freedom Caucus, Policy Chair P.S. Washington has a spending addiction problem. That ends today. No longer can we allow Republicans dangle tax cuts in front of our faces withoutalso forcing spending cuts. P.P.S. The Swamp outnumbers us, and they HATE the idea of cutting off the spending spigot. The House Freedom Caucus is fighting back, but we need YOUR SUPPORT. | | PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM PO Box 96006, Washington DC 20090-6006 | | |

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Final week to honor our veterans
body:
Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d8cb654dd2aa4268aca9ba667ebf5e94&_e=b3MrjDTABLIHHPz8a5VYzsyqZ0wBdx2hA0MBT1DdWHafSkwl5bgMlQDDuInqiyMOOGnZ3GM7vIImE60c3jr7slOL2eW9HLjz2gF5Q0QzelMHnl_WeMEtEFr_bUNYrbvDZmYZnqa1HwJzW7dIx5m2DTmWhwAgX-140Pg4uBL7PuesvAS1BKe_-Uq0scxaa-qJNz1Gs6pTUpEzTFWWwa44oaeg4WHag-Ql6i4VJ1n6VL5DQ3EhZgzBOkTwjZMWZTPZidDACfOgPBk5PJBM1yel91RFNS-EdcnYbBWJT8rOaaCzaa0DA3qGqD-WLPAVBfca)
