Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d8cb654dd2aa4268aca9ba667ebf5e94&_e=b3MrjDTABLIHHPz8a5VYzsyqZ0wBdx2hA0MBT1DdWHafSkwl5bgMlQDDuInqiyMOOGnZ3GM7vIImE60c3jr7slOL2eW9HLjz2gF5Q0QzelMHnl_WeMEtEFr_bUNYrbvDZmYZnqa1HwJzW7dIx5m2DTmWhwAgX-140Pg4uBL7Pudv-Ot_gtd0fjxM63zA4qpW0q5_wUK8ccLGc7QXGJ5g7T5HMbldtJkFsVw28hF_23WZMZEsgwB_QLkeTcQ9qR8-YFWOFJL4ThZkl7DU7g-mE6CZ5KCRjGiv71M-e5A0flTe-mA2wdQpnJkpl3el8zV_)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d8cb654dd2aa4268aca9ba667ebf5e94&_e=b3MrjDTABLIHHPz8a5VYzsyqZ0wBdx2hA0MBT1DdWHafSkwl5bgMlQDDuInqiyMOOGnZ3GM7vIImE60c3jr7slOL2eW9HLjz2gF5Q0QzelMHnl_WeMEtEFr_bUNYrbvDZmYZnqa1HwJzW7dIx5m2DTmWhwAgX-140Pg4uBL7Puf1EY_4XF6obb0DZbsV6S3hxPiCpsfDdV-rH0omqNSe_1jTksdxzYeqeqH9axnPB4vq735u-4146Nm0Stq6EEDdwyj4_xK6Ezi430WuIn9qxcOqYPndOZtgydfmb0mHrf1yg8Jcmamrnn0XeX3QP2zX)
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d8cb654dd2aa4268aca9ba667ebf5e94&_e=b3MrjDTABLIHHPz8a5VYzsyqZ0wBdx2hA0MBT1DdWHafSkwl5bgMlQDDuInqiyMOOGnZ3GM7vIImE60c3jr7slOL2eW9HLjz2gF5Q0QzelMHnl_WeMEtEFr_bUNYrbvDZmYZnqa1HwJzW7dIx5m2DTmWhwAgX-140Pg4uBL7PufYpYkLUsfFWISFUvZttDmvTRJbt0j3R7Cy6uqNOrtP9tCGA_6QFWxZTzgaOZ1EfSA_8jcCEQSHPklJOfAU2Xfay0qwSp6brDj1uK0bVfSyvztIZNIXvkxAoVMbwBjZQ6bN33wcuPgd7EAX6jAWfYRz)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d8cb654dd2aa4268aca9ba667ebf5e94&_e=b3MrjDTABLIHHPz8a5VYzsyqZ0wBdx2hA0MBT1DdWHafSkwl5bgMlQDDuInqiyMONYnK3sVWN_ew1oooArSWFeW-Evt2ZL8tsN_X5Sd15UUDFDYnzKpyydiWnMC-fyIogbWq4NQ5oMb6NIW8BcbcQg7a8WazgLMkQKlXtYcH-LXK_JXZgEuU7MZXWASF62tUygCGmtIxEjSyfoZjtw_6zeP9R7T32BEdguaEj4lit1kh65ya8StmIHD04zO6HqtnXJSK9AFiQaDgAwjwZtEYBtxz55Ze-sb-qyM7xMlvNo8%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d8cb654dd2aa4268aca9ba667ebf5e94&_e=b3MrjDTABLIHHPz8a5VYzsyqZ0wBdx2hA0MBT1DdWHafSkwl5bgMlQDDuInqiyMOOGnZ3GM7vIImE60c3jr7slOL2eW9HLjz2gF5Q0QzelMHnl_WeMEtEFr_bUNYrbvDZmYZnqa1HwJzW7dIx5m2DTmWhwAgX-140Pg4uBL7PueYklerwW_duWPpnLNuX-VmAAeQK4ymkeGwRrPV8OpxYd0PaXt9nHjZhuG1hUijLZAN_eMwn7OGbhZmfgHFrbLzt2GZenxS_nTee3zG_LugtIo0fHaK9Cv2B06Zn5hdgdY2U_Tt-q58rkq56Oft81jn) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d8cb654dd2aa4268aca9ba667ebf5e94&_e=b3MrjDTABLIHHPz8a5VYzsyqZ0wBdx2hA0MBT1DdWHafSkwl5bgMlQDDuInqiyMOOGnZ3GM7vIImE60c3jr7slOL2eW9HLjz2gF5Q0QzelMHnl_WeMEtEFr_bUNYrbvDZmYZnqa1HwJzW7dIx5m2DTmWhwAgX-140Pg4uBL7PufGRGkjaVIRbWXYqkOvRyLxhjcKnsXasMROXZePLoHGVo_IFDx3mcpsPJrM1jjz5X12F1Hz2rklWGzKvE1l1an1fFmZ7dud4WRn1VcrJZyI6i0fEoYJQviwqzFiRIIM-sQlb_7CXnRi4iHfATfcgOuN)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d8cb654dd2aa4268aca9ba667ebf5e94&_e=b3MrjDTABLIHHPz8a5VYzsyqZ0wBdx2hA0MBT1DdWHafSkwl5bgMlQDDuInqiyMOOGnZ3GM7vIImE60c3jr7slOL2eW9HLjz2gF5Q0QzelMHnl_WeMEtEFr_bUNYrbvDZmYZnqa1HwJzW7dIx5m2DTmWhwAgX-140Pg4uBL7PucxCcWYOB6-mqCI9Vp8o-_Jy9MATL9Mq5PPA577r5Y0ntyYzHom1PuQYVIr_LdbJHzPNq8awbotEJARRorlBQmcIRzPJe9MquHLcearNu-9Knf0HRw6_s5NNOcHA2JXTv9ovi7WUzjv9WP2vaMSl1Jp)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---

Friend, From Las Cruces to Española, Clovis to Farmington, people are facing real consequences from the chaos that Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Republicans have caused. That’s why our team is launching a project across New Mexico. “Voices of New Mexico” is about gathering real stories about how higher prices, from groceries to rent, job insecurity, mass federal firings, frozen federal funds, threats to our public lands, health care access, basic education programs, and more are hurting our families and communities. With your support, we will:
* Collect and amplify stories from all 33 counties, and
* Hold Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Republicans accountable for the harm they are causing.

name: Politibrawl Daily
subject: Genocide or not, South Africa has a disturbing problem
body:
The farmers of South Africa are not statistics; they are people enduring unimaginable horrors. Until we face the truth, the killing fields will only grow bloodier.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..wc2G-GjE_rUT4TltQ2PDpB8z5I8WgyqGL0Q1pmAm4LY?) for more

# [Genocide or not, South Africa has a disturbing problem ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164192830&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MTkyODMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDgwMTQyMTQsImV4cCI6MTc1MDYwNjIxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uZ-Pt38igZLLIz2EJtWvHnmPDpdDlzZtLqaWsG5bSyk)
### The farmers of South Africa are not statistics; they are people enduring unimaginable horrors. Until we face the truth, the killing fields will only grow bloodier.
| | [Matthew Miller](https://substack.com/@mattmiller737)
---
| May 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mattmiller737)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164192830&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MTkyODMwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODAxNDIxNCwiZXhwIjoxNzUwNjA2MjE0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bp4mrLAHxblinEsyTpmgN_1zcTR1zXYuFi1-1h8zelw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164192830&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MTkyODMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDgwMTQyMTQsImV4cCI6MTc1MDYwNjIxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uZ-Pt38igZLLIz2EJtWvHnmPDpdDlzZtLqaWsG5bSyk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164192830&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MTkyODMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDgwMTQyMTQsImV4cCI6MTc1MDYwNjIxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uZ-Pt38igZLLIz2EJtWvHnmPDpdDlzZtLqaWsG5bSyk)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/genocide-or-not-south-africa-has?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf3d4b5b-85a4-4eca-896d-774cc4582f62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This week, President Donald Trump **[confronted South African President Cyril Ramaphosa](https://substack.com/redirect/19e5db44-9f75-49f2-b45a-6fdccf57fc77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the White House, addressing a grim reality that has been largely swept under the rug by the American media: the brutal attacks on white Afrikaner farmers in South Africa.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..K03Ec6IoHadfLK9swiZehKvkc5nQ9HXKAPRfHvESdp4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164192830)
Trump's pointed remarks-- "White South Africans are fleeing because of the violence and racist laws"--echoed the harrowing truths exposed in Katie Hopkins' 2018 documentary, Plaasmoorde: The Killing Fields. While the term "genocide" is debated, the systemic racial violence afflicting South Africa's white farmers is undeniable, and the American media's reluctance to cover this crisis with the urgency it demands is a shameful abdication of responsibility. These farmers, facing targeted attacks for their race, have every right to seek asylum in the United States, and their plight deserves our attention.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ab698609-2f7b-4a46-a64c-b6b847f48d29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hopkins' documentary lays bare the horrific reality of "plaasmoorde," or farm murders, in South Africa. Through firsthand accounts, it exposes a pattern of violence that is both gruesome and racially charged. One woman recounts a nightmarish assault where her jaw was blown off by a shotgun blast during a farm attack, leaving her permanently disfigured and traumatized. Another story details a couple who were threatened with a blowtorch before being robbed in their own home, kidnapped and brutally attacked. Elderly women, defenseless in their rural homes, are subjected to rape and torture, with attackers often citing revenge as their motive. These are not isolated incidents but part of a broader wave of violence that has claimed thousands of lives over decades. Hopkins interviews not only victims but also police officers, who chillingly confirm allegations of corruption and complicity within law enforcement, allowing these crimes to persist with little consequence.
_**" If you know you are being hunted, why stay?"**_ Hopkins poses to the audience.
_A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)_
* * *
**[Together With AMAC](https://substack.com/redirect/ab3fd17c-f4aa-4775-a94b-f41ce3802dd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Tired of AARP? There 's a Better Option - And It's FREE**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ab3fd17c-f4aa-4775-a94b-f41ce3802dd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch.
AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a **FREE membership** for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached.
With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including:
* **Money-saving discounts** on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials
* The **AMAC Magazine** , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective
* Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more!
* A chance to get involved through **AMAC Action** , their grassroots advocacy network

Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started.
**[👉 Join the movement today and claim your free membership at](https://substack.com/redirect/ab3fd17c-f4aa-4775-a94b-f41ce3802dd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Claim My Free Membership](https://substack.com/redirect/ab3fd17c-f4aa-4775-a94b-f41ce3802dd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_(Continued)_
The question of whether this constitutes "genocide" is not the most important question we need to be asking at this time. The term implies intent to destroy a group, and while the scale and brutality of these attacks--often targeting white farmers explicitly--are deeply alarming, the definitional threshold for genocide in this case is debated.
**[The United Nations says a genocide is](https://substack.com/redirect/70df0062-7392-40c2-aba4-946727f44dd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "any of the following acts committed with intent to destroy, in whole or in part, a national, ethnical, racial or religious group, as such: Killing members of the group, causing serious bodily or mental harm to members of the group, deliberately inflicting on the group conditions of life calculated to bring about its physical destruction in whole or in part, imposing measures intended to prevent births within the group, forcibly transferring children of the group to another group."
**Decide for yourself after reading further and watching Hopkins ' documentary. **
What is indisputable, however, is the systemic nature of this discrimination. White farmers, who own a significant portion of South Africa's agricultural land, are being bullied off their properties through intimidation, theft, and even policy in the name of equity. The South African government's policies, including **[land reform initiatives that facilitate dispossession](https://substack.com/redirect/6b3cf2f3-0eee-4475-9d85-47b3ac95d641?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , have exacerbated the situation, allowing for land to be confiscated by the government without fair compensation "in circumstances where it is just and equitable and in the public interest" to do so. This is DEI on steroids.
PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To support our work, consider becoming a paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..K03Ec6IoHadfLK9swiZehKvkc5nQ9HXKAPRfHvESdp4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164192830)
The nuanced truth is that blacks as well as whites are afflicted by these attacks, and all have a right to seek asylum in this situation regardless of race, but I do suspect racial animosity against whites, fueled by revenge for South Africa's colonial past, as well as socioeconomic decay plays a big role in motivating this phenomenon. Extreme factions in South Africa like **[the Economic Freedom Fighters](https://substack.com/redirect/d95be99f-d4cd-4dcc-886d-7788a0fb9a8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , a far-left party lead by Julius Malema, cheer on and promote violence against white farmers, as seen in President Trump's impromptu Oval Office movie. And we are used to hearing similar far-left rhetoric in our own country from factions like Black Lives Matter, who destroyed billions of dollars of private property in the name of equity, called for the police be downsized to the point of extinction, continue to demand financial reparations for America's history of slavery and even cheered on the bloodthirsty October 7th attack on Israel. Anti-colonialism is a hell of a drug.
A popular South African X account by the name of k9_reaper | T.I.A, says he is "documenting the decline" of South Africa and **[posted an explanation of the white crosses](https://substack.com/redirect/7ebb4d26-902a-4d71-b503-60edbb6b2279?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in question.
"For the record.. i have met with the current 'custodian' of the White Cross Monument - in person and on the grounds of the monument last year some time. It is real, and it sits on someone's farm," he writes.
"The Monument represents farmers of all colors - not just whites. It is not a graveyard. It is a Monument," he clarifies, before adding "Not all of the crosses represent murdered farmers or farm workers at this site - from what i understand. I believe some of them, as per the current custodian, represent home invasions and other scenes where people were murdered,... None of this, of course, takes away from the fact that South Africa's farm murders are some of the most brutal crimes that take place in this country."
These farmers have a compelling case for asylum in the United States. Under international law, asylum can be granted to those facing persecution based on race, among other factors. The targeted nature of these attacks, coupled with the South African government's apparent inability or unwillingness to protect its white minority, meets this criterion. The United States, as a nation founded on principles of refuge for the persecuted, should consider these farmers' plight with the seriousness it deserves. Their skills as agriculturalists could also contribute to rural American communities, offering a practical benefit alongside the moral imperative.
PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To support our work, consider becoming a paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..K03Ec6IoHadfLK9swiZehKvkc5nQ9HXKAPRfHvESdp4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164192830)
Yet, the American media has largely downplayed or ignored this crisis. When Trump raised the issue, **[outlets like CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/d6b1ba95-2402-46c2-a686-a05df9f135fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **[The New York Times](https://substack.com/redirect/57de1207-8f44-469e-b383-ce897dc8a908?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** were quick to label his claims "baseless" or "exaggerated," often framing the farm murders as a fringe issue inflated by right-wing narratives. Hopkins' documentary, crowdfunded and produced outside mainstream channels, provides raw, unfiltered testimonies that contradict the sanitized narratives of corporate media. Where is the media's answers to that? How many of these outlets have gone to South Africa to take a look at what is going on, like Hopkins did, before shooting down the White House's concerns? And would there be any challenge at all from the left wing media about this group's persecution if they weren't predominantly white?
The United States has a moral obligation to shine a light on this crisis. Offering asylum to South Africa's persecuted farmers would be a start, but so would pressuring the South African government to address police corruption and protect its citizens, regardless of race. The American media, too, must do better. Instead of dismissing Trump's comments or Hopkins' documentary as provocations, they should investigate the claims, amplify the victims' voices, and hold power to account. The farmers of South Africa are not statistics; they are people enduring unimaginable horrors. Until we face this truth, the killing fields will only grow bloodier.

Until we face the truth, the killing fields will only grow bloodier. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The farmers of South Africa are not statistics; they are people enduring unimaginable horrors. Until we face the truth, the killing fields will only grow bloodier. | | | May 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- This week, President Donald Trump at the White House, addressing a grim reality that has been largely swept under the rug by the American media: the brutal attacks on white Afrikaner farmers in South Africa. Trump's pointed remarks-- "White South Africans are fleeing because of the violence and racist laws"--echoed the harrowing truths exposed in Katie Hopkins' 2018 documentary, Plaasmoorde: The Killing Fields. While the term "genocide" is debated, the systemic racial violence afflicting South Africa's white farmers is undeniable, and the American media's reluctance to cover this crisis with the urgency it demands is a shameful abdication of responsibility. These farmers, facing targeted attacks for their race, have every right to seek asylum in the United States, and their plight deserves our attention. Hopkins' documentary lays bare the horrific reality of "plaasmoorde," or farm murders, in South Africa. Through firsthand accounts, it exposes a pattern of violence that is both gruesome and racially charged. One woman recounts a nightmarish assault where her jaw was blown off by a shotgun blast during a farm attack, leaving her permanently disfigured and traumatized. Another story details a couple who were threatened with a blowtorch before being robbed in their own home, kidnapped and brutally attacked. Elderly women, defenseless in their rural homes, are subjected to rape and torture, with attackers often citing revenge as their motive. These are not isolated incidents but part of a broader wave of violence that has claimed thousands of lives over decades. Hopkins interviews not only victims but also police officers, who chillingly confirm allegations of corruption and complicity within law enforcement, allowing these crimes to persist with little consequence. " If you know you are being hunted, why stay?" Hopkins poses to the audience. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Tired of AARP? There 's a Better Option - And It's FREE | | ---|---|--- If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch. AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a FREE membership for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached. With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including: Money-saving discounts on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials The AMAC Magazine , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more! A chance to get involved through AMAC Action , their grassroots advocacy network Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started. (Continued) The question of whether this constitutes "genocide" is not the most important question we need to be asking at this time. The term implies intent to destroy a group, and while the scale and brutality of these attacks--often targeting white farmers explicitly--are deeply alarming, the definitional threshold for genocide in this case is debated. "any of the following acts committed with intent to destroy, in whole or in part, a national, ethnical, racial or religious group, as such: Killing members of the group, causing serious bodily or mental harm to members of the group, deliberately inflicting on the group conditions of life calculated to bring about its physical destruction in whole or in part, imposing measures intended to prevent births within the group, forcibly transferring children of the group to another group." Decide for yourself after reading further and watching Hopkins ' documentary. What is indisputable, however, is the systemic nature of this discrimination. White farmers, who own a significant portion of South Africa's agricultural land, are being bullied off their properties through intimidation, theft, and even policy in the name of equity. The South African government's policies, including , have exacerbated the situation, allowing for land to be confiscated by the government without fair compensation "in circumstances where it is just and equitable and in the public interest" to do so. This is DEI on steroids. PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To support our work, consider becoming a paid subscriber. The nuanced truth is that blacks as well as whites are afflicted by these attacks, and all have a right to seek asylum in this situation regardless of race, but I do suspect racial animosity against whites, fueled by revenge for South Africa's colonial past, as well as socioeconomic decay plays a big role in motivating this phenomenon. Extreme factions in South Africa like , a far-left party lead by Julius Malema, cheer on and promote violence against white farmers, as seen in President Trump's impromptu Oval Office movie. And we are used to hearing similar far-left rhetoric in our own country from factions like Black Lives Matter, who destroyed billions of dollars of private property in the name of equity, called for the police be downsized to the point of extinction, continue to demand financial reparations for America's history of slavery and even cheered on the bloodthirsty October 7th attack on Israel. Anti-colonialism is a hell of a drug. A popular South African X account by the name of k9reaper | T.I.A, says he is "documenting the decline" of South Africa and in question. "For the record.. i have met with the current 'custodian' of the White Cross Monument - in person and on the grounds of the monument last year some time. It is real, and it sits on someone's farm," he writes. "The Monument represents farmers of all colors - not just whites. It is not a graveyard. It is a Monument," he clarifies, before adding "Not all of the crosses represent murdered farmers or farm workers at this site - from what i understand. I believe some of them, as per the current custodian, represent home invasions and other scenes where people were murdered,... None of this, of course, takes away from the fact that South Africa's farm murders are some of the most brutal crimes that take place in this country." These farmers have a compelling case for asylum in the United States. Under international law, asylum can be granted to those facing persecution based on race, among other factors. The targeted nature of these attacks, coupled with the South African government's apparent inability or unwillingness to protect its white minority, meets this criterion. The United States, as a nation founded on principles of refuge for the persecuted, should consider these farmers' plight with the seriousness it deserves. Their skills as agriculturalists could also contribute to rural American communities, offering a practical benefit alongside the moral imperative. PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. When Trump raised the issue, and were quick to label his claims "baseless" or "exaggerated," often framing the farm murders as a fringe issue inflated by right-wing narratives. Hopkins' documentary, crowdfunded and produced outside mainstream channels, provides raw, unfiltered testimonies that contradict the sanitized narratives of corporate media. Where is the media's answers to that? How many of these outlets have gone to South Africa to take a look at what is going on, like Hopkins did, before shooting down the White House's concerns? And would there be any challenge at all from the left wing media about this group's persecution if they weren't predominantly white? The United States has a moral obligation to shine a light on this crisis. Offering asylum to South Africa's persecuted farmers would be a start, but so would pressuring the South African government to address police corruption and protect its citizens, regardless of race. The American media, too, must do better. Instead of dismissing Trump's comments or Hopkins' documentary as provocations, they should investigate the claims, amplify the victims' voices, and hold power to account. It's Friday, May 23, and time will soon run out before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to an end.
#

👋 Jon Ossoff is asking all Democrats to read this short 1-minute message before you click away. 🇺🇸
It's Friday, May 23, and time will soon run out before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to an end.

We're asking you to reflect on the work Jon Ossoff does in the Senate, and the importance of holding this seat if Democrats are going to have any chance at a majority.
It wasn't long ago Democrats had control of the Senate, and it was Jon Ossoff who put the party over the top. We can get it back, but Jon can't do it alone.

If everyone reading this email donated even just $5 to Jon Ossoff for Senate, he'd reach his fundraising goals and not have to ask again for some time.
Unfortunately, not everyone gives. So Jon Ossoff is counting on people like you who understand the stakes of this moment to step up and give.

[**If you feel like re-electing Jon Ossoff and re-taking control of the Senate is worth $5 to you, then we're asking you to give today. There are no small contributions. Every donation counts. So Jon Ossoff is counting on people like you who understand the stakes of this moment to step up and give. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** 🙏🙏🙏 Show Jon Ossoff you believe keeping him in the Senate matters. Thank you. | | Peter, here’s another example of how our economy is setting up young people for failure: corporations want us to be in debt for... ordering a burrito. Doordash and Klarna recently announced a buy now, pay later option for food delivery orders. So folks can pay off food orders for months if they can’t afford it upfront. It’s more than ridiculous - it’s predatory, and it’s personal to me. When I was running for Congress, I drove Uber to cover my bills, and still had to rack up credit card debt to get by. Even after I won, landlords denied me apartments because of my credit. That's what it's like to be young and working class in America right now. **Debt shouldn’t be big business. Not for medicine, college, and especially not for burritos.** In Congress, I’m fighting against this corporate greed and grifting billionaire class so we can build an economy that _actually_ works for young people, but I can’t keep up this fight alone. Especially as these billionaires prepare to spend big to unseat me. So I’m counting on your support today. [**_If you believe our economy is failing young, working class people, chip in whatever you can so we can organize young voters, challenge billionaire influence, and build the political power we need to change this system from the ground up. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/vk-S0mrScdhMG0lwax029Q~~/AAPPABA~/niwiDWyr1L47y2D-6I6k2Rvq15V6x4kvjhkIBLpIYYCmfmb5BUJo_AEFXt6wy9xqtUB34SjIXmqozUKCQZu1cfHNPKSwKTDLX9pgYxWYeDURCUR-UG4HUwihXLZPpnTonv0rpCDE1-lhJ2NGUatUBZhExPXG9W7RnaOLdFKWHxxe_lTYZd_Rtjc8jOMISxpIj1P33LvZ1sYCjPTPJPiOLcNCClm86nLHYfi-2o6FiYSgoRbliIXSIN3ZQoQk4A9vWL9uc5FyHtkPkBXQzj2LxLazNr-vB0XOe9Of7aI0W1-qHZ3vJReGxSKXdPS3BQmVGkgy64uHwjajza2X_Di-ew~~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/WYS8VgNTHVG7iRLWsaJW-Q~~/AAPPABA~/byQelBJq0n_DfOWKnretB6UvtBM7YaCjzeif5qtCnHEtV0Z7CzlbLnabtChhmA7ycYf1QBG0YB-YLarMdhs7SzbFs3J4x8LanQHcxsI9YpFvjZyKucU5_oPak8aJPKNb64LecrWO7XYgAR1So9O5BG13eWImmZ0hmNpXsCOGA10xaV5JquqiFclGDhoa0Lddpznyf5S6FeO1tcZSa0tC_ZMqdv1OHBSirJo49uZZGk3zkiwI3d4nKbV4wostfirPvW_sr-rqSubRxN0gADzLI-AYc_pq93dqR8p3gL26wbY6glOTwXNTYIGEVdchxw3hYs0LgcWvYrjpFRnDq7xYEL0zVQFXW3TrRtgd_vh4b_3ct4i4woXOnihge0ahx8m2)

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: This isn’t a typical political email.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I know you’ve heard from me dozens of times at this point

Hey, it's Steve Scalise.

I know you've heard from me dozens of times at this point. But let me assure you - this isn't your typical political email.

_I 've talked to thousands of Conservatives from across the country and the vast majority of folks **1)** are very concerned about the Fake News Media coverage of President Trump, **2)** want to make the historic Trump Tax Cuts permanent, and **3)** strongly support deporting criminal illegal immigrants ASAP. _

**Those issues are at the top of my list too, but I was blown away by how many people had more to say. **

That's why I'm launching my _**[Pulse of America Check-In](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zettlm4oso6vjci3ovnjuqsdd08rn1k68hgf6gm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1h61or2c1h2bs)**_ - the FIRST of its kind - to understand where the American People are on the most important issues facing the nation.

If you're receiving this email, I want to hear from you. I'm only reaching out to my closest grassroots advisors and - _based on your previous survey responses and feedback_ - I want you included in my final results.**_JUST RELEASED_****PULSE OF AMERICA CHECK-IN****
****Contact:** [email](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb2d8r7ljltvlvh080t5th0l4pak2m1dtomddjao_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1h61or2c1h2bs)**Response:** INCOMPLETE**Deadline :** 9:00 AM Tomorrow[BEGIN IT HERE ->
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zckakvfpu1jv7amd9n218s8orap3eji6dos48b48_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1h61or2c1h2bs)I value your opinion.

My team and I will review your feedback tomorrow morning. What you say will determine the direction of our House Majority. With President Trump counting on us to pass his agenda, we NEED to be on the same page.

**Consider this your direct line of communication with me.**

I make my best decisions when I know what my best supporters think. Can I tell my team to look out for your response tonight?

_**[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjr95rrcg7ud0r157u9ht8prpkk19bo3emcftva0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1h61or2c1h2bs "Please click any of these secure links to access your survey")**_[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zovqp8eo42rc4pj4e8g6lc0avtmeuvbc9vnl8v18_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1h61or2c1h2bs)[Please click any of these secure links to access your survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaj049c9822hhqsdnt252pcu98tudq4j8gk57vr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1h61or2c1h2bs)
Thank you and God bless,

Steve Scalise
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0da1ktc8virjf51kv90519cuavq30rc15m7du4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1h61or2c1h2bs) If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!
**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztfrd9sr07eljbiimd90a6ca0cticbjq6k7fhfa0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1h61or2c1h2bs)| | |

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you join my focus group? –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable us to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20316%2E9716520%2ECZt3qc)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20316%2E9716520%2ECZt3qc)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20316%2E9716520%2ECZt3qc)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20316%2E9716520%2ECZt3qc)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250523-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20316%2E9716520%2ECZt3qc)

name: Andy Kim
subject: The House passed Trump’s reckless budget bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
This is the moment to speak up. Loudly.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108233065/547283016/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzJlN2VmNy1lYzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fs7-XXQGPLTOiH9wfey20ajXY_E5fbFw9wWWzXor9a0=&emci=108d8af2-d137-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3c2e7ef7-ec37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Yesterday morning, House Republicans pushed through Trump's reckless budget bill. **It's a plan packed with devastating cuts to Medicaid, food assistance, and clean energy investments – all while paving the way for even more tax breaks for billionaires and big corporations.** Let's be clear: this isn't about fiscal responsibility. It's about taking from working families to give handouts to the wealthy and well-connected. At a time when so many families are feeling the pressure of higher costs, this bill would pull the rug out from under them. It threatens healthcare, hurts our economy, and abandons those in need. Now, the fight continues in the Senate. And this is the moment to speak up. Loudly. clean_body: This is the moment to speak up. Loudly. | | | | Yesterday morning, House Republicans pushed through Trump's reckless budget bill. It's a plan packed with devastating cuts to Medicaid, food assistance, and clean energy investments – all while paving the way for even more tax breaks for billionaires and big corporations. Let's be clear: this isn't about fiscal responsibility. It's about taking from working families to give handouts to the wealthy and well-connected. At a time when so many families are feeling the pressure of higher costs, this bill would pull the rug out from under them. It threatens healthcare, hurts our economy, and abandons those in need. Now, the fight continues in the Senate. And this is the moment to speak up. Loudly. I ran for office because I believe government should work for people, not just the wealthy and well-connected. I'm not going to stop fighting for families across New Jersey and across the country, and I hope you'll fight with me. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . subject: One guilty verdict. A hundred more questions

body:
If you think corruption ended with one guilty verdict—think again.
| .
---
| [ ](http://email.email.ourtenn.org/c/eJxMzcFOxCAQgOGngVs3lGELPXCw1fVk9KL3CUy2RFpWOrbp2xs9mL3-yZ8veu0oQCfJt9Y4pXsHSk4egsEzYW9tjM5BD90Z2witNQCWiGTyGDhtyKkszfz4_qwqfL01A4xj9-mm16Z8DE-ZcVkbNR37QOPxIozCuJWA4cB0CmWW2U_Mt1XAg9AXoS_luzIty6nUq6w-3vaUc1o7K4y6zpjy38T3NP1myf4flpvXPwEAAP__JwRD9Q)
---
Dear Peter,

Last week Glen Casada was found guilty on 17 counts of corruption—but if you think the corruption ends with him, you haven’t been watching the Tennessee Capitol.

This wasn’t a courtroom drama. It was confirmation of what we already knew: the corruption in Tennessee’s Republican supermajority is real, it’s rampant, and it’s still in power.

We’re not stopping with this one case. We’re building a movement to make sure **every** corrupt official gets exposed—and replaced.

🔥 We need grassroots power to match their deep pockets. Will you pitch in now?

[ **Yes, I’ll chip in »** ](http://email.email.ourtenn.org/c/eJxMz71yMiEUxvGrgQ5nhX3ZtaB4_dhUmhSJrYOHQ5YRwcBZnb37jCkyaZ95iv_PGdkjKM3RLLu2b-SqVw0fjXdeS1TdP922rUerQYH2Z6_Pq2WHfceDsUDhbinkJK7bj5emqK83sVabjb7046vIx_Uukk1VNOP8WONm3rO2se6ewcJswwLylUczEt0qU_-ZHJgcKsJUcGGBznHC54XJweVkCZkc8lQEYUpYK6LwE00Fxc2CWDI1FPSQHTK1fd8dDqfd_nTE4gLQKYZ04cW42yPEGKruWNt8Xm2IPwn0F4LPmZP5ZfC7kd8BAAD__-gkYA4)**
**
Let’s not just react to corruption.
Let’s end it.

Onward,
Chris Murdock
_Our Tennessee Future PAC_

subject: Reconciliation, MAHA, and More
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pL79DZ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerunDfi0227GenGGon9XAFZbAt6M6cNN4NByrjaHGerUwpNaaQpt3XYm7-2BaDL-2FOwqfbDvjaFavIUDBuBGhailft0Gve9n5qAWWcruGRxLBWo1JQgjjqMGobp9lLs5hCot5ghwvbegbLhNAz8muqXxJu2TGG8-2FxEt3RTKOpufUg-2F7zwGF7NqjPupwBWKKlzIG9nyifxs2by5xiddHP6pWOpV1qauTlY51tTnlMZgBT4LjU-3D)

|

Dear Friend, There is a lot to report today, but before we get into it, summer is a critical season in our fight to defend liberty, uphold the Constitution, and preserve the conservative values that make our nation strong.

The battles ahead require resources—and your generosity ensures we can continue to speak boldly, equip citizens, and stand firm against the growing threats to our freedoms.

Will you help us protect liberty this summer?

Your donation directly fuels our mission to promote limited government, free markets, and individual responsibility. Every gift—large or small—makes a real impact.
---
[ DONATE TO THE NETWORK (Not Tax Deductible) ](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqZvunjMwr5zCo-2BtB7-2FL9OgeaiSIE8G2eKTQGQD-2FQjO19vwXe1zEfU-2FcgC4yHcW3BrU-3DdyRu_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerunDfi0227GenGGon9XAFZbAt6M6cNN4NByrjaHGerUwpNaaQpt3XYm7-2BaDL-2FOwqfbDvjaFavIUDBuBGhailftw52OfEMC955wImkUhf2C7TaFnVJVHHret1lNQ22CZaOrgPwQGDJl5rtuC17s41TRD75zV1GehzL2-2FwOK386ENiFg-2FksKqex5cmx-2B9J-2BnWT4IVGFrFcvA7QJpWka4sMDUGVGqZjM6V1gxc64aCpj8b8-3D)

[ DONATE TO THE FOUNDATION (Tax Deductible) ](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqbovnqpZUIf4h3SdwTQklnrcCP4-2FX8LweycCG63u-2FdKOpSGTVsRnbepH-2Bs95kRO7WM-3DTxCZ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerunDfi0227GenGGon9XAFZbAt6M6cNN4NByrjaHGerUwpNaaQpt3XYm7-2BaDL-2FOwqfbDvjaFavIUDBuBGhailft-2B9oi-2FlTvVSGLGMbLOkeJcHRAa2X9fn3suA4d44I-2F6oECaMobMin9RbtNANynyA4BkLaqgmCAdSYI71r4FqLykG0fcg7-2FnGszkQyQkFKYZBUIxBOnUCJrNW5Ovpfno1sXVAUa4AbSzUE39PbJZhp-2BrU-3D)
---
|
---
**CONGRESS** Our state freedom caucus members applaud their brothers and sisters in the **House Freedom Caucus** , who worked overtime this past week to strengthen the "big, beautiful bill" to cut taxes and enact large, meaningful spending cuts. It wasn't a perfect bill, but the HFC secured far more significant reforms than otherwise would have happened. The HFC's statement from yesterday:
---
---
|
---
**MAHA + FREEDOM = MOMENTUM** A handful of our members were in Washington this week to attend a special "Make America Healthy Again" event at the White House. State Freedom Caucus members have been instrumental at passing pro-MAHA policies at the state level. It was great to have them in town!
---
---
Pictured left to right: Rep. Stephen Frank (SC Freedom Caucus), RFK Jr, Rep. Rachel Rodriguez-Williams (WY Freedom Caucus)
---
|
---
**MISSOURI** The **Missouri Freedom Caucus** wrapped up their legislative session earlier this month. Here are some of the highlights, which includes new funding for their school choice program!
---
---
|
---
**SOUTH CAROLINA** The **South Carolina Freedom Caucus** ended their legislative session as well. Some highlights:

**Killing Bad Bills** \- The SCFC killed a tax hike bill and a bill that would hand out subsidies to Hollywood subsidies. **No More DEI** \- The SCFC helped push through a ban on all DEI in higher education and state agencies. **School Choice** \- The SCFC pushed for a universal school choice bill, but was reluctantly forced to support a more modest version. They will be back next year to get the full loaf.Read more about this year's accomplishments [here](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjnd8aksGIaCV6ckVUGTIurR-2FweSKySSUw3aeXDI7BLHnbvK18ZkFI4lhpnWdEi2rDJBIUTp9z783QLarRqmvGqo-3DLHIf_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerunDfi0227GenGGon9XAFZbAt6M6cNN4NByrjaHGerUwpNaaQpt3XYm7-2BaDL-2FOwqfbDvjaFavIUDBuBGhailftxBQ6YwKLvUY4WWA9pOwxV5JBpXnE24If7W4kJI5I8FUgWiiZgFZrkMJFZoZMbkBQfW4pq3y0-2Blw5jmObDmjYZB6-2FLJvRwupdqmatZV5jKfNM77FZ3DYTW7vQO-2BlobKSjq4o7n6L-2B6lV4pNL6xdApDI-3D).
---
|
---
**GEORGIA** The **Georgia Freedom Caucus** has become Georgia’s conservative truth detector: when any Republican steps up for statewide office, the GAFC tells voters whether they’re looking at a liberty defender or just another big-government RINO. clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, There is a lot to report today, but before we get into it, summer is a critical season in our fight to defend liberty, uphold the Constitution, and preserve the conservative values that make our nation strong. The battles ahead require resources—and your generosity ensures we can continue to speak boldly, equip citizens, and stand firm against the growing threats to our freedoms. Will you help us protect liberty this summer? Your donation directly fuels our mission to promote limited government, free markets, and individual responsibility. Every gift—large or small—makes a real impact. | CONGRESS Our state freedom caucus members applaud their brothers and sisters in the House Freedom Caucus , who worked overtime this past week to strengthen the "big, beautiful bill" to cut taxes and enact large, meaningful spending cuts. It wasn't a perfect bill, but the HFC secured far more significant reforms than otherwise would have happened. The HFC's statement from yesterday: | MAHA + FREEDOM = MOMENTUM A handful of our members were in Washington this week to attend a special "Make America Healthy Again" event at the White House. State Freedom Caucus members have been instrumental at passing pro-MAHA policies at the state level. It was great to have them in town! Pictured left to right: Rep. Stephen Frank (SC Freedom Caucus), RFK Jr, Rep. Rachel Rodriguez-Williams (WY Freedom Caucus) | MISSOURI The Missouri Freedom Caucus wrapped up their legislative session earlier this month. Here are some of the highlights, which includes new funding for their school choice program! | SOUTH CAROLINA The South Carolina Freedom Caucus ended their legislative session as well. Some highlights: Killing Bad Bills \- The SCFC killed a tax hike bill and a bill that would hand out subsidies to Hollywood subsidies. No More DEI \- The SCFC helped push through a ban on all DEI in higher education and state agencies. School Choice \- The SCFC pushed for a universal school choice bill, but was reluctantly forced to support a more modest version. They will be back next year to get the full loaf.Read more about this year's accomplishments . | GEORGIA The Georgia Freedom Caucus has become Georgia’s conservative truth detector: when any Republican steps up for statewide office, the GAFC tells voters whether they’re looking at a liberty defender or just another big-government RINO. Two weeks ago, the spotlight fell on Congressman Buddy Carter as he tested the waters for a U.S. Senate bid (RINO); this week it’s State Senate Majority Leader Steve Gooch, now pitching himself for lieutenant governor. | WYOMING The headline below says it all. POLITICO did a Q&A; profile with Wyoming Freedom Caucus member, Chip Neiman - the Speaker of the Wyoming State House. Read the whole thing . | We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresident State Freedom Caucus Network |

body:
Limited Time: Free Color Map of Rome

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a9da1fbb9a3c42ca92daff1f53617fc7&_e=KNIUvV65LJZ_mWlZ_KMITMX6k-rvFf6IVoQypHhwSfWiTCioRq-jvcDY1y7qqYDEupVhxJBwxs54iJhipmh3XMy7iDIMe6mIBiJPmFfsRe22eVT6yrz1bIjpNmLAanBtul5tL6Qabd_j1S8QywnYEz727XXXgMnhVLLu2iSCMJX0CI8LPRc99vCVycsGrZEq6D-IYEI0WgY9CiT41QEsosGpQBd3QH4YbyZL9YMi5tDkxb6HzEFbl6L6PBO0mSpHROCJ4nKNh0tp9eMs6zlBBG7EhouzF5K4WZoD3K2WKcZI2KjtEjEs2V6LsMYnhRur7Y3z9sdT3NM5D0e455fj9UTlBFAPJoJRJEZO6c_facaaqaEv7nKDBW_f9fA2IyBE_MDhLvYjaLaIRyAx0HQll-12qenXWuSy8-dUkrCSRiQ%3D)

| |
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a9da1fbb9a3c42ca92daff1f53617fc7&_e=KNIUvV65LJZ_mWlZ_KMITMX6k-rvFf6IVoQypHhwSfWiTCioRq-jvcDY1y7qqYDEupVhxJBwxs54iJhipmh3XMy7iDIMe6mIBiJPmFfsRe22eVT6yrz1bIjpNmLAanBtul5tL6Qabd_j1S8QywnYEz727XXXgMnhVLLu2iSCMJX0CI8LPRc99vCVycsGrZEq6D-IYEI0WgY9CiT41QEsosGpQBd3QH4YbyZL9YMi5tDkxb6HzEFbl6L6PBO0mSpHlJTCWo97D2k-h4jDZ5MZb5H9PeSgv5dHFQU_xcXz8_FxO6gFvSIrLytv51pMCqy4jB6Gfo3iKOk25OH9wcqcAY2RdM5PJkD8zwcT0EVH1WP0BJlqPp0aDX3GfdNklNjCmxhksRaf7EAzvyb1O8-jtk7kwEoM7YZ0lfVT1pdesj4%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a9da1fbb9a3c42ca92daff1f53617fc7&_e=KNIUvV65LJZ_mWlZ_KMITMX6k-rvFf6IVoQypHhwSfWiTCioRq-jvcDY1y7qqYDEupVhxJBwxs54iJhipmh3XMy7iDIMe6mIBiJPmFfsRe22eVT6yrz1bIjpNmLAanBtul5tL6Qabd_j1S8QywnYEz727XXXgMnhVLLu2iSCMJX0CI8LPRc99vCVycsGrZEq6D-IYEI0WgY9CiT41QEsosGpQBd3QH4YbyZL9YMi5tDkxb6HzEFbl6L6PBO0mSpH47n1HjhiRUmHPxb4ua8Qrvxu4kexi2m9dwrOmJblv4vUwPymfLG4F5-_c8_F2PaquBuUyNhCDweU7yVkcraWhL0bzpYGi1lHPnOyByvR_0TJIS0JhxqyV3PEh6sGh_ec8VrJ_exoWVIroza6SI3U3QePOT_KND5jvUaQ4Qien_c%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

body:
They are attacking Democratic governors like me.

Hi Peter, it’s Wes Moore. I want to start off by saying _thank you._
It’s thanks to grassroots supporters like you that we’re proving Maryland is ready to lead the country in building a fairer economy, investing in our public education, and more.
**[If you’re with us in that effort, can you chip in to our reelection campaign today? Now, Peter, Trump is attacking Democratic governors like me.
He’s slashing federal funding, disappearing Americans to foreign prisons, and cutting funding for critical programs like Medicaid and SNAP.

With your support, we can keep holding the line – and keep building a Maryland that leaves no one behind.

clean_body: They are attacking Democratic governors like me. Hi Peter, it’s Wes Moore. I want to start off by saying thank you. It’s thanks to grassroots supporters like you that we’re proving Maryland is ready to lead the country in building a fairer economy, investing in our public education, and more. Now, Peter, Trump is attacking Democratic governors like me. He’s slashing federal funding, disappearing Americans to foreign prisons, and cutting funding for critical programs like Medicaid and SNAP. We can’t let him undo our hard-earned progress. With your support, we can keep holding the line – and keep building a Maryland that leaves no one behind. Elevate, Wes

subject: The TRUTH About Magnesium
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e191901/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNWF6d3N1QnN0Vw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjM/LbmNsejE2YzNtZw/qP2hpZHM9bmNZbHZ1M3dRRlhnNVpscw/gaDCddg/sare4d18254)

A 2010 review of natural treatments for anxiety found that magnesium could be a treatment for anxiety.
More recently, a 2017 review that looked at 18 different studies found that magnesium did reduce anxiety.
These studies looked at mild anxiety, anxiety during premenstrual syndrome, postpartum anxiety, and generalized anxiety.
[According to this review](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e191901/VaHR0cDovL21hZ25lc2l1bWJyZWFrdGhyb3VnaC5jb20vbnVjbGVhci8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjM/LbmNsejE2YzNtZw/qP2dsPTY4MmYzY2Q5M2Y1ZDYwMjY2YzhiNDU2NyZfbmxpZD1BZXZwS2NaUHZEJl9uaGlkcz1uY1lsdnUzd1FGWGc1Wmxz/gaDCddg/s4m86580e63), one of the reasons why magnesium might help reduce anxiety is that it may improve brain function. Now, you might be thinking... "there are a gazillion magnesium products out there, if magnesium were the solution to stress — more people would be stress-free."
The problem is two-fold.
FIRST, almost everyone is SEVERELY deficient in magnesium — even those who get the "recommended daily dose"...
Because higher stress levels (common for ambitious folks like us) require much higher than RDA doses. And SECOND...
**Most magnesium supplements fail to help you beat stress...**
Now that you understand how critical magnesium is for everything — it might be tempting to run out to your local drug or health food store and buy some magnesium.
That would be a mistake, though — because most magnesium products do nothing, for two primary reasons:
❌ They're synthetic, unnatural, and not recognized by your body and ❌
❌ They are NOT FULL SPECTRUM ❌
Which means they are missing the various forms of magnesium needed to target various organs in the body and to handle all sources of stress — and boost your performance in every key area.
Most people get 1-2 forms of synthetic magnesium (at best); which is why they typically feel little or nothing from supplements.
**But there's a miracle that occurs when your body gets ALL the magnesium that it needs** , in all the forms that it needs at the optimal dosage.
If You're *Only* Taking ONE Form Of Magnesium — **YOU ARE STILL DEFICIENT!**
**> > [Why Getting ALL 7 FORMS Of Magnesium Transforms Your Stress And Performance ✅](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e191901/VaHR0cDovL21hZ25lc2l1bWJyZWFrdGhyb3VnaC5jb20vbnVjbGVhci8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjM/LbmNsejE2YzNtZw/qP2dsPTY4MmYzY2Q5M2Y1ZDYwMjY2YzhiNDU2NyZfbmxpZD12ZWZCalV2QnA2Jl9uaGlkcz1uY1lsdnUzd1FGWGc1Wmxz/gaDCddg/sel4b7b5cf7 "According to this review")**
| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e191901/VaHR0cDovL21hZ25lc2l1bWJyZWFrdGhyb3VnaC5jb20vbnVjbGVhci8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjM/LbmNsejE2YzNtZw/qP2dsPTY4MmYzY2Q5M2Y1ZDYwMjY2YzhiNDU2NyZfbmxpZD1YZVdWNnJEalZlJl9uaGlkcz1uY1lsdnUzd1FGWGc1Wmxz/gaDCddg/s7lebd77d8f)

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae83410aecf8478d8c745b7f03305aeb&_e=6RqESQxATicy7ureW7BJTi83_h2QfW5DVOxyOwfwDO5RtGjQU2OIUDdIW-KGwxzPH3jbpCR-DR-ewMFkSWqa8Tf7gqGWr24KrHBvnSfYobh3PqJzOhoPhlkYcgV0wzoekY5nw2SiehknfIUp-M7uYe-BTHak326WCSxm3DCF_HA9ST3wUFIle3fz-Ftg_UKrH3qMmtlRBHQP2iIyM1HmIi-wPdJ2m5k-eVQsiJ-ltbh4SBn1r3CYkhfr5yYS-lJwc_4i-GoMKgWYEK8vEcbBHN0OqFM4y4JJn_bNuHM-xXZQm3UbihZonAn3VX44QyUeNK6M34tmywGV1TPldALIB6H23XmwS8j-yUtvGYJwrTc9RSYADMx3v_vyh9-jhaEVV-hichtzhccg2M1CIutRcue9V2biT5ArQBDre4svEpLSVym2ViKJtoT6F31Fq8aD)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae83410aecf8478d8c745b7f03305aeb&_e=6RqESQxATicy7ureW7BJTi83_h2QfW5DVOxyOwfwDO5RtGjQU2OIUDdIW-KGwxzPH3jbpCR-DR-ewMFkSWqa8Tf7gqGWr24KrHBvnSfYobh3PqJzOhoPhlkYcgV0wzoekY5nw2SiehknfIUp-M7uYe-BTHak326WCSxm3DCF_HA9ST3wUFIle3fz-Ftg_UKrH3qMmtlRBHQP2iIyM1HmIi-wPdJ2m5k-eVQsiJ-ltbh4SBn1r3CYkhfr5yYS-lJwc_4i-GoMKgWYEK8vEcbBHN0OqFM4y4JJn_bNuHM-xXZHCmx73fI59xPp54qM6gH5wPh-fOtE7N6iwZUktjBzpAcB7tOOJL_ja6QaEpbloVtQui1J0kw7cAf16zqV4xFtaHeEbVLIQ4XYYeFQQ1O0YDCK8v6bkX4c0taqIsH3GSXxqIZ5lOJE5R_uKnjNXSk8)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae83410aecf8478d8c745b7f03305aeb&_e=6RqESQxATicy7ureW7BJTi83_h2QfW5DVOxyOwfwDO5RtGjQU2OIUDdIW-KGwxzPH3jbpCR-DR-ewMFkSWqa8Tf7gqGWr24KrHBvnSfYobh3PqJzOhoPhlkYcgV0wzoekY5nw2SiehknfIUp-M7uYe-BTHak326WCSxm3DCF_HA9ST3wUFIle3fz-Ftg_UKrH3qMmtlRBHQP2iIyM1HmIi-wPdJ2m5k-eVQsiJ-ltbh4SBn1r3CYkhfr5yYS-lJwc_4i-GoMKgWYEK8vEcbBHN0OqFM4y4JJn_bNuHM-xXZGFvADjpFxbayaRmIP3ny0Y8bkfMbRBKkCkk_t70PrI-ugbc_eYcyFxCCVMTTsTDn3-oYhDaRkrrQGGnqQDhb11SevHJ7MABPLj1Aj8nCbXaKQbPnPFQpOG2MT8ugSVxpC5LuwzUoje3TddgnQZLpx)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae83410aecf8478d8c745b7f03305aeb&_e=6RqESQxATicy7ureW7BJTi83_h2QfW5DVOxyOwfwDO5RtGjQU2OIUDdIW-KGwxzPH3jbpCR-DR-ewMFkSWqa8Tf7gqGWr24KrHBvnSfYobh3PqJzOhoPhlkYcgV0wzoekY5nw2SiehknfIUp-M7uYe-BTHak326WCSxm3DCF_HA9ST3wUFIle3fz-Ftg_UKrH3qMmtlRBHQP2iIyM1HmIi-wPdJ2m5k-eVQsiJ-ltbh4SBn1r3CYkhfr5yYS-lJwc_4i-GoMKgWYEK8vEcbBHN0OqFM4y4JJn_bNuHM-xXbVqqc-c-HuX4z1tE7IzO8iq63uYjcSY8RTd9YjhCEIflY9zJN07M8oB2kzv4iKOfpsC_XEC65a-aLtperSDvX-_Qud3OeO45wPA_YZYn3LXiDnd64OQHOPeXd7JYZNntcUIJ5hU47-BUahZV9HTbm_)

Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I’m asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven’t held in a generation](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae83410aecf8478d8c745b7f03305aeb&_e=6RqESQxATicy7ureW7BJTi83_h2QfW5DVOxyOwfwDO5RtGjQU2OIUDdIW-KGwxzPH3jbpCR-DR-ewMFkSWqa8Tf7gqGWr24KrHBvnSfYobh3PqJzOhoPhlkYcgV0wzoekY5nw2SiehknfIUp-M7uYe-BTHak326WCSxm3DCF_HA9ST3wUFIle3fz-Ftg_UKrH3qMmtlRBHQP2iIyM1HmIi-wPdJ2m5k-eVQsiJ-ltbh4SBn1r3CYkhfr5yYS-lJwc_4i-GoMKgWYEK8vEcbBHN0OqFM4y4JJn_bNuHM-xXZjdVypuvWKyoMlkVWViNkdMnVB9xfXVmTEfcr9-AhNn1J6sjzZ_Tth2Hdy1HZzwSFXzR4eHwoIqcKUub_KLMpFBUbOgSKdTxDI1SaVsF1aTrPsbPlUOvdrHPgOL0GZ9L1xpJ3hX7odM4yM1bUd874e)**.

This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. **I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive.**

**[Your gift today will give our nascent campaign a fighting shot.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae83410aecf8478d8c745b7f03305aeb&_e=6RqESQxATicy7ureW7BJTi83_h2QfW5DVOxyOwfwDO5RtGjQU2OIUDdIW-KGwxzPH3jbpCR-DR-ewMFkSWqa8Tf7gqGWr24KrHBvnSfYobh3PqJzOhoPhlkYcgV0wzoekY5nw2SiehknfIUp-M7uYe-BTHak326WCSxm3DCF_HA9ST3wUFIle3fz-Ftg_UKrH3qMmtlRBHQP2iIyM1HmIi-wPdJ2m5k-eVQsiJ-ltbh4SBn1r3CYkhfr5yYS-lJwc_4i-GoMKgWYEK8vEcbBHN0OqFM4y4JJn_bNuHM-xXYtkfyY1xfeelo5dRS_rAXUx1U8BwbKMNeQfJ4jNlrZCuhvU2rJwdNJr73bgOZogJdAVk7v15fG-L7bF1HlZzefprrxYTONxPleq0_cFGGj26ler5BVl3wBJztUAbWjYAJtwbW_qHp0OPfjTCW67XBr)**

Adam Schwarze

clean_body: You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate -

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Celebrating Reading in PA's State Capitol
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170024.172912.246&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170024.172912.246&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170024.172912.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14467)
**Senator Vincent Hughes and His Wife, Sheryl Lee Ralph, Advocate and Celebrate Reading in PA 's State Capitol** Mrs. Hughes, aka Sheryl Lee Ralph, and Senator Hughes led an event in Harrisburg hosted by Scholastic to get the word out about a new reading program that brings free books to low income schools. Students from across PA joined to celebrate the United States of Readers program and receive new Abbott Elementary books. **The main message: Reading is fundamental!** As we see reading test scores fall and hear more and more that children cannot read, Senator Hughes is encouraging everyone to stand up and take action to fix the country's and Pennsylvania's literacy epidemic. In addition to getting more books in the hands of students,[Senator Hughes is leading bipartisan legislation](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170024.172912.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14468) that will bring a science-based curriculum to schools and promote better reading outcomes for students in third grade and under.
* * *
**" This bipartisan legislation will give students and teachers the tools they need to take an evidence-based approach to reading and succeed. It's a multi-pronged solution and a step in the right direction for the education of our students. It's important that we treat the literacy epidemic with urgency to get all Pennsylvania students and their reading proficiency on the right track."** **-Senator Hughes**
* * *
Make sure you're [subscribed to our e-newsletter](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170024.172912.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14470) and following us on [social](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170024.172912.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14471) for the latest on our work to get more students reading!
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes
---
| | |
---

2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131
Phone: 215.879.7777
Fax: 215.879.7778
| |
---

name: Derek Tran
subject: AANHPI Month is coming to a close, but our fight continues
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108237052/547296709/2039042026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWViYzJlZjAtZjEzNy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bO59U4zM59tywn6WGvA8lpIxRcdd4i2Yt8ZN8AhWW9o=)
AANHPI Heritage Month may be coming to a close, but the fight for our communities continues every single day. As the first Vietnamese American to represent Little Saigon in Congress, I carry with me the stories of my family, my neighbors, and every person who came here seeking a better life. My father put everything on the line to escape a dangerous regime. Now, I’m in Washington fighting for the dignity and rights of all our communities. But our work isn’t over -- not when extremists are pushing hateful, dangerous rhetoric against immigrant communities. And not when Republican super PACs are gunning to retake seats like mine. And I’m not the only one at risk. **My friend Marilyn Strickland -- a proud Korean American and fellow AANHPI trailblazer -- is in the fight alongside me.** We both broke barriers to get here, and Marilyn is among one of the first Korean Americans to serve in Congress. I’m proud to serve with Marilyn and work toward a better future for all. Like me, she understands the challenges our communities face and together we can ensure that our voices are heard. Your support right now will help us send a powerful message that our communities will not be silenced. **[In the spirit of AANHPI Heritage Month, I’m asking you to stand with us – and make a split donation to power both of our campaigns. Will you chip in $10, or whatever you can, to support me and Marilyn in this fight for our shared future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108237053/547296710/-1690255413?refcode=em-5.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWViYzJlZjAtZjEzNy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bO59U4zM59tywn6WGvA8lpIxRcdd4i2Yt8ZN8AhWW9o=)**

clean_body: | = AANHPI Heritage Month may be coming to a close, but the fight for our communities continues every single day. As the first Vietnamese American to represent Little Saigon in Congress, I carry with me the stories of my family, my neighbors, and every person who came here seeking a better life. My father put everything on the line to escape a dangerous regime. Now, I’m in Washington fighting for the dignity and rights of all our communities. But our work isn’t over -- not when extremists are pushing hateful, dangerous rhetoric against immigrant communities. And not when Republican super PACs are gunning to retake seats like mine. And I’m not the only one at risk. My friend Marilyn Strickland -- a proud Korean American and fellow AANHPI trailblazer -- is in the fight alongside me. We both broke barriers to get here, and Marilyn is among one of the first Korean Americans to serve in Congress. I’m proud to serve with Marilyn and work toward a better future for all. Like me, she understands the challenges our communities face and together we can ensure that our voices are heard. Your support right now will help us send a powerful message that our communities will not be silenced. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for standing with us, -Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: Lee Greenwood and the Start of Parade Season!
body:
With the warm weather approaching, we are back on the campaign trail, hitting all over the district!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b21fc3a43a95/lee-greenwood-and-the-start-of-parade-season?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Lee Greenwood and the Start of Parade Season!
---
|
---
| With another week done, I wanted to give an update on what our team has been up to the campaign trail. I first made it up to Monticello to hear the amazing Lee Greenwood speak and sing for the annual White County Lincoln Day Dinner. Chairman Shannon Mattix knows how to run an event and makes me want to come back every year!
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Next, we made it to the start of parade season by participating in the annual Morgantown remembrance parade through their downtown. I was glad to be in my home county to participate in an event that honors our heroes
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Finally I made it up north again to end our weekend on a strong note with the Benton County Lincoln Day Dinner in Earl Park! The food was amazing and I was happy to meet many of the community leaders who keep Benton County going and some great students who wanted to learn more about our elected leaders.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Make sure to always reach out if you have questions and I look forward to providing updates about the state house and will be travelling the district again soon!
---
| [Check out our website here!](https://hoosiersforhaggard.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9e7cbafb97c2110b065cece3&id=bbbd36b856&e=72dace1453)
