name: The Democrats
subject: A question:
body:
---
We’ve got a question for you, Derek: If you knew that a $3 contribution would help Democrats invest in every single Democratic state party across the country and elect more Democrats who will check Trump’s power in their cities, states, and districts, wouldn’t that $3 be worth it? Wouldn’t you donate right away? If you knew that same $3 would help Democrats win back Congress in 2026 and help prevent Trump and his allies from passing more disastrous legislation, wouldn’t you feel like it was $3 well spent? We know it may not seem like $3 can do all of that. But by the time you finish reading this message, lots and lots of people will have chipped in their $3. That’s money we’re putting towards organizing everywhere, communicating with voters year-round, holding town halls across the country, and more. Now they’re hoping you’ll join them with a $3 contribution of your own to help fund that work, too. It has never been more important that we have a strong Democratic Party that fights back against Trump, while also laying the groundwork we’ll need to win back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. name: Jane Fonda
subject: Did you catch my commencement address at USC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I’m reaching out today with an important message.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108238080/547299895/1328794144?refcode=ea.8d7d0d66-f337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.8d7d0d66-f337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkN2QwZDY2LWYzMzctZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LA1dhKgTFczire_dAa14KBy7fvHX9oHIzAW5FA7l1Wg=&emci=0949b78c-af35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8d7d0d66-f337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
Over the weekend, I gave the 2025 Commencement Address at USC’s Annenberg School of Communication (see below!) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108238081/547299896/2105508926?refcode=ea.8d7d0d66-f337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.8d7d0d66-f337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkN2QwZDY2LWYzMzctZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LA1dhKgTFczire_dAa14KBy7fvHX9oHIzAW5FA7l1Wg=) (Photo by Greg Grudt/Steve Cohn Photography and courtesy of USC Annenberg) You may think after years of acting and big speeches that the novelty of events like these goes away, but that couldn’t be further from the truth. **It doesn’t matter the stage, I will do my best to speak truth to power and remind people there are two unprecedented and deeply interconnected challenges before us.** Democracy and climate. And for both, it is now or never. I don't think that a graduating class has ever gone out into a world that is more uncertain and polarized. Right now, we are losing the democratic norms, capacity, and infrastructure that we need to solve the climate crisis. And we're losing the climate stability to solve the crisis in our democracy and well... everything else. We are going to win or lose these two things together, so here’s what you need to know: | **#1: Our voting rights and our civil rights are under attack.** Voting really matters. That's why it's under attack. So we must fight for our rights and encourage others to do the same. Study up on who you're thinking about voting for. Does the candidate take money from oil, gas, and coal or from Big Pharma? If they do, it means they're supporting what benefits corporations and not what benefits YOU.
---
**#2: Another constitutional right that's being criminalized today is legal protest.** Our children and grandchildren having a livable future will depend on whether we end our addiction to oil, gas, and coal. Those who stand to lose the most from a unified and engaged public — like big polluters who drive the climate crisis — don't want us protesting.
---
**#3: The climate crisis is the most existential problem we face today.** Scientists have been clear. If we don’t dramatically cut greenhouse gas emissions soon, we are locking ourselves into a future of irreversible damage.
---
The good news is, and I want you to know this, these challenges are winnable. Times are very hard but not hopeless. Across the country, people are pushing back, holding the line against the dismantling of democracy. People are advancing more climate solutions than you can imagine.
There is definitely reason for hope, but hope takes action. It's easy to be optimistic and say everything's going to be fine, but hope is a muscle like the heart. **It's when we take action that hope comes alive.**
So, I urge you to get involved. Vote with climate in mind. Encourage your friends and family to do the same. Join us in this fight because we can’t do it alone. **[And if you can, please chip in a few bucks before the end of the day to ensure we can continue to make a difference in the climate fight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108238082/547299897/2105508926?refcode=ea.8d7d0d66-f337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.8d7d0d66-f337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkN2QwZDY2LWYzMzctZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LA1dhKgTFczire_dAa14KBy7fvHX9oHIzAW5FA7l1Wg=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I’m reaching out today with an important message. | Over the weekend, I gave the 2025 Commencement Address at USC’s Annenberg School of Communication (see below!) = (Photo by Greg Grudt/Steve Cohn Photography and courtesy of USC Annenberg) You may think after years of acting and big speeches that the novelty of events like these goes away, but that couldn’t be further from the truth. It doesn’t matter the stage, I will do my best to speak truth to power and remind people there are two unprecedented and deeply interconnected challenges before us. Democracy and climate. And for both, it is now or never. I don't think that a graduating class has ever gone out into a world that is more uncertain and polarized. Right now, we are losing the democratic norms, capacity, and infrastructure that we need to solve the climate crisis. And we're losing the climate stability to solve the crisis in our democracy and well... everything else. We are going to win or lose these two things together, so here’s what you need to know: | #1: Our voting rights and our civil rights are under attack. Voting really matters. That's why it's under attack. So we must fight for our rights and encourage others to do the same. Study up on who you're thinking about voting for. Does the candidate take money from oil, gas, and coal or from Big Pharma? If they do, it means they're supporting what benefits corporations and not what benefits YOU. #2: Another constitutional right that's being criminalized today is legal protest. Our children and grandchildren having a livable future will depend on whether we end our addiction to oil, gas, and coal. Those who stand to lose the most from a unified and engaged public — like big polluters who drive the climate crisis — don't want us protesting. #3: The climate crisis is the most existential problem we face today. Scientists have been clear. If we don’t dramatically cut greenhouse gas emissions soon, we are locking ourselves into a future of irreversible damage. The good news is, and I want you to know this, these challenges are winnable. Times are very hard but not hopeless. Across the country, people are pushing back, holding the line against the dismantling of democracy. People are advancing more climate solutions than you can imagine. There is definitely reason for hope, but hope takes action. It's easy to be optimistic and say everything's going to be fine, but hope is a muscle like the heart. It's when we take action that hope comes alive. So, I urge you to get involved. Vote with climate in mind. Encourage your friends and family to do the same. Join us in this fight because we can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = xx Jane P.S. If you want to dive deeper into my commencement address, and enjoy the full speech! | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
The far Left is already dumping money into conservative districts like mine—yes, even in a solid Republican seat. |
---

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b8f824ce73034499a58f39176bf2a6b4&_e=7rH2gEa-knQK1_BEr8v6hapUIixmZ6ScPwEtI2jtI7MHLo6hV4MAyIuG6xbvQBMU4FDhotVmlTwuH_Q98kGssVJtfWAeJxmKsJCrNztQdRzB9CZ0P30niGKQ9QcXSDyaApRnSiSKItOTZG6Hfog81nRDpL_2uejM89UHLqyhfCew2G9dRe-pJ62gEBnOslD0DKGGWAPqQlUjWD0inJMBjNpRpK08Bu8vowQ0HbV037AOL-2tQf7iZdBF2k7uqCzpS74VJWnBnRXXa0Df60G1mAZ26FngG6mP6tdCHiZq-9DXpovUe-3RMwc3RPnDqvueEbD7zv1rCzW0uDLj54Le6KA7DzI95qmQqPs6fg1CfZ9N_zds9KVeQPNfq7H7t7nK-VYPBSvKkgn-b-tNrSo_Mx55uq2j8PZqw3XrV1GqupM%3D)
Fellow American,

We didn’t hit our mid-month goal. Not even close.

We sent out thousands of messages... **and just 11 people donated.**

I’m not saying that to guilt-trip anyone. But I _am_ saying it because this is a wake-up call.

The far Left is already dumping money into conservative districts like mine—yes, even in a solid Republican seat. They know that if they can flip just a handful of races, they’ll seize total control of Congress and ram through their radical agenda.

**And here’s the kicker: House Democrats raised twice as much as Republicans from grassroots donors in Q1.** We’re getting crushed in small-dollar donations—and it’s exactly how they’re funding these attacks.

If we start Summer behind, it only gets harder from here.

[**The end-of-month deadline is coming fast, and we’ve got ground to make up. We need to close the gap _this week_.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b8f824ce73034499a58f39176bf2a6b4&_e=7rH2gEa-knQK1_BEr8v6hapUIixmZ6ScPwEtI2jtI7MHLo6hV4MAyIuG6xbvQBMU4FDhotVmlTwuH_Q98kGssVJtfWAeJxmKsJCrNztQdRzB9CZ0P30niGKQ9QcXSDyaApRnSiSKItOTZG6Hfog81nRDpL_2uejM89UHLqyhfCew2G9dRe-pJ62gEBnOslD0DKGGWAPqQlUjWD0inJMBjNpRpK08Bu8vowQ0HbV037AOL-2tQf7iZdBF2k7uqCzpS74VJWnBnRXXa0Df60G1mIPXHBdk6nFg5UWbZt9l2aEdrmG40M20XtY_hC_S3k67j0ovf8WTHQiBFucPjnoF8Xy8ZMp_XM7XRbsG2najMupI1MSCtWKJAS3wPiynmc3zXJeGqpygzXyiFgKl7Cgt-qrM25d5TyRWOd0jQtGqkw8%3D)

**Can I count on you to step up and fight back?**

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

clean_body: The far Left is already dumping money into conservative districts like mine—yes, even in a solid Republican seat. | Fellow American, We didn’t hit our mid-month goal. Not even close. We sent out thousands of messages... and just 11 people donated. I’m not saying that to guilt-trip anyone. But I am saying it because this is a wake-up call. The far Left is already dumping money into conservative districts like mine—yes, even in a solid Republican seat. They know that if they can flip just a handful of races, they’ll seize total control of Congress and ram through their radical agenda. And here’s the kicker: House Democrats raised twice as much as Republicans from grassroots donors in Q1. We’re getting crushed in small-dollar donations—and it’s exactly how they’re funding these attacks. If we start Summer behind, it only gets harder from here. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Is this extreme?

body:
#
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250523.wm9EbN&refcode=em20250523-8915-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8915%2E2526796%2EdkFozq)
If this is what makes us “extreme,” then we wear that label proudly.
We’ve built a movement fighting for each and every one of these issues — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[Can you please donate $5 or anything you can afford right now to keep our movement strong? Your donation sustains Alexandria’s campaign and keeps our team of dedicated organizers doing their work for a dignified wage.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250523.wm9EbN&refcode=em20250523-8915-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8915%2E2526796%2EdkFozq)
We really rely on your support. It makes all the difference.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

❌ Donald Trump wants to slash **$880 BILLION** from Medicaid. ❌
❌ He’s taking a **HATCHET** to Social Security. ❌
❌ He’s **GUTTING** education and healthcare funding. ❌

** _Trump is making these cuts for one reason only — TO LINE HIS OWN POCKETS._**

_His first order of business with OUR tax dollars and benefits?_ Bankrolling a $92 million tank parade to celebrate his birthday.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

| Friend,
When America was founded, it was more than just a nation; it was an idea, an experiment in liberty and self-governance that no one knew would succeed.
Now, as we approach America's 250th Anniversary, we stand united by one common goal: Protecting the American Dream.
America is at a crossroads, and we need your help to protect the American Dream for generations to come.
As we gear up for the 2026 midterm races, we felt it was important to share our mission with you, so we are thrilled to announce the release of our new video, Team Imer PAC: Our Mission.

name: Team Emerge
subject: What Kristi Noem said about habeas corpus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
This week, Trump’s Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem made a chilling claim: that habeas corpus — the constitutional protection against unlawful detention — gives the president authority to deport people without due process.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108239239/547303395/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1MjAyZTgwLWY1MzctZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RwTy-cdgDqHV8dqipQo3HwAWM0SPqWUZOk3l720nwbQ=)

| Peter,

This week, Trump’s Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem made a chilling claim: that habeas corpus — the constitutional protection against unlawful detention — gives the president authority to deport people without due process.

Kristi Noem either doesn’t understand how our system works, or she doesn’t care. Either way, that’s not just wrong, it’s dangerous. And it signals how far this administration is willing to go to trample on basic rights.

This is the type of authoritarian overreach our country was built to resist. But it’s happening — right now — and it demands a response.

Emerge is preparing Democratic women to lead the fight against these attacks. To step up, speak out, and stop this erosion of civil liberties before it’s too late.

clean_body: This week, Trump’s Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem made a chilling claim: that habeas corpus — the constitutional protection against unlawful detention — gives the president authority to deport people without due process. | = | Peter, This week, Trump’s Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem made a chilling claim: that habeas corpus — the constitutional protection against unlawful detention — gives the president authority to deport people without due process. Kristi Noem either doesn’t understand how our system works, or she doesn’t care. Either way, that’s not just wrong, it’s dangerous. And it signals how far this administration is willing to go to trample on basic rights. This is the type of authoritarian overreach our country was built to resist. But it’s happening — right now — and it demands a response. Emerge is preparing Democratic women to lead the fight against these attacks. To step up, speak out, and stop this erosion of civil liberties before it’s too late. = | = | = | = | = | = Our rights — and our country— depend on what we do next. Team Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: re: the GOP's plan to gut Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1001&akid=10107%2E434096%2Ed7j19i ]John Fetterman

Derek, the House passed the GOP budget bill last night that guts Medicaid to pay for tax breaks for the wealthiest dudes in America.

We won't sugarcoat this: If the GOP budget passes the Senate, it's estimated that over 10 MILLION Americans will lose their health insurance.

And it won't stop there. These cuts could:

* Force rural hospitals to shut down.
* Make already-long ER wait times even longer.
* Evict seniors from nursing homes.
* Increase premiums for millions of families.

Republicans are shamelessly working to trade away a lifeline for Americans just so the richest people in America can get even richer.

The bill now goes to the Senate, and John's not going to stand back and watch it become law. He's ready to fight with everything he's got to stop these cuts – but he needs folks on this team to help by showing MASSIVE public opposition right now.

So we're working to collect 10,000 signatures by midnight to send a clear message to the GOP that the American people are outraged by their plans to gut Medicaid to fund tax cuts for the wealthy. Can John count on you to sign now?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51177?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10107%2E434096%2Ed7j19i

Thanks for being with us in this fight,

Team Fetterman HQ 💛

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Colonel Pam Stevenson
subject: McConnell is out. I am in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108239559/547304417/-1129875431?refcode=250523_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWI4OTRhMC1mNTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQWk8cGhSQ3Bg34dVRaMlU5q0u2EYyXKC0K5JPj2EeY=) Folks, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I'm a nonprofit founder for legal services veterans and seniors in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [**So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Serve America before my deadline at midnight TONIGHT to help me kick off my campaign strong and show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108239560/547304418/-1129875431?refcode=250523_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWI4OTRhMC1mNTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQWk8cGhSQ3Bg34dVRaMlU5q0u2EYyXKC0K5JPj2EeY=) I’m ready to run for Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, education, and shelter. **But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way.** During his 40 years in the Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [**I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you split a $10 between my campaign and Serve America before my deadline at midnight tonight and help me kick off my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108239561/547304419/-1129875431?refcode=250523_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWI4OTRhMC1mNTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQWk8cGhSQ3Bg34dVRaMlU5q0u2EYyXKC0K5JPj2EeY=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108239562/547304420/-1129875431?refcode=250523_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWI4OTRhMC1mNTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQWk8cGhSQ3Bg34dVRaMlU5q0u2EYyXKC0K5JPj2EeY=) In the Air Force, they taught us to live by “Duty. Honor. Country.” I ask you to stand with me and live by **“Duty. Honor. Kentucky.”** Thank you, Colonel Pam

name: Tobias Read
subject: Do you support voting from home?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250523em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250523em-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I believe voting from home gives every Oregonian a fair and secure chance to hold politicians accountable—and it saves money and time, too.
But some Republicans want to block voting from home by imposing unnecessary barriers.
There’s only one explanation for this: Opponents to voting at home want to make it harder for regular people to participate in our democracy.
So I’m standing up to them and I’m fighting to protect the right to vote from home for all Oregon voters.
But I need to know you're with me: If you support my efforts to expand vote-by-mail access, please consider donating to help me continue fighting today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250523em-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250523em-rs]
Thank you for using your voice – speaking out is the most powerful way to make an impact, and I’m grateful to have your support.
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Do you trust the federal government with education?
body:
You may have heard of Hillsdale College, but did you know that we are leading a national effort to restore excellence in American education?

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/lf5_imfS508p3UUfObAEfNV6RTxHzPz1jN9jWusGNvwbpWocKnsSe1_j8nIwgs-Fe6N6Ap2tt4EKu4Mt1AVppqLx5oG60YxzjJmkordrCn28jYVyc01yj_H6qgNJlQMWLiJjFz0ihn1kIkLUmvPKW2S3GHPmkIFmOXLvQaAeiOAH0DbG8GkZ_5UF/GvXR5iZraKx5_LZDUXXGXQ_YRMMGJFux/9)_

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/CLmJQZPHC-sUfuOsQVLy5y9Yuzn2C3NkFnGOcPet_8TccNfNQBJuU4Q99g4wCsQeN-gQb0SuTXdjrgPNaW1hPwtId4bXMZWQ9awbuq5JfPEyPnApFMSi3gU1sVP5IFPYbhX-d_fElJWW8_FnTtnDxmPJYRnvy6WBTgfjJt8UL-uinrxIIVysS_k3Hs8RdNkN4DTEFurKDKBNXjhEtzcOHEZP3l1WdxKLwZvIgNkgD-6y9QM-BXXbFF1k2eczKBCTG_g9N3ElFiYsc78iNU85FnyYwj4jG_qT0LmGlsu4wsf3d_yBev-48LcXmqGTUUF8QzX5kLrwcBpx8UXRzuV_EJDEfOJ5zoX8D024_ZrnCbRlbHxzSNAzXqL5r5FYdR8ULdsM6YuMhFgannhXFxK_2KuFFSs_a-18dpNR0Imt4DJDrGLzg9Y_7FOOVkYajB6T4bYlyZbb/QKkDbHhHT2XEKESnkjhZRUmk4mulN3CX/9)
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

You may have heard of Hillsdale College, but did you know that we are leading a national effort to restore excellence in American education?

For nearly 200 years, Hillsdale College has provided a classical education rooted in the Constitution and the principles of liberty--without taking a single penny of government funding.

[That's why we are conducting the **National Survey on the Department of Education**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/NGuJCzdlfO-S1VQ_Z4mnRUl4NitHpjDeL6uB6Npb60LbC4YXx_40kdEhLQf786SxQFnX8L9uErD_qA8sWRlFDtNUYlZ6o4XgGIH8mrIaWcdrDQneJM_SxUGnoZteXrIlITikaVEOo6GeN2LyApokm9hoGxKsu6DLKVgwtiw6iEQeoTYqQBEuEBUbib7WoX7lll-fNvkkpXUUqek9pWLVRO1VopuwaynTxEXDqbGl90qUdyc4MDEAnCe2zd_WHYuZhlsUmcvc_epxTy1VmlrDZn23z1s08Yk-TkapSVDkfH4uNH3kpPkEWTKG1Q3fon6Q0ytc9EMZih1RMq7amnSFQg2Q8uu4RTgHfZFvAu-O5v8jodswwo_5JabZj1kajV9IGoikXqLBRnVZytrcGztqfVCunEnFUPk988z01tYLTuMZX8Wnfw5IZA9b8RBToUdxL8o2KCh8/Vyv3osqtlJA6Ue3NB94jaDbFli7lNL0G/9)--to hear what Americans like YOU think about the role of the federal government in education, parental rights, and school standards.

Will you take just two minutes to share your opinion?

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-education-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/D4O_gPaxlLqoFcfOG16igOGdZEFOdY7bKc12r88O6dWsaJyt1Ygk76qGkPH920p1w5J1CzREMYOTPJ-yWKywoAayLBBbocrJPmQqciwhHcW3jxYm3AgR39aqY3BUywzY63rWfcc-wzdKbzEj0OFkiQP5lTCh2E3q2KyrqsxkZR65a-igkDOxKf96uGf-a_DhIH4ZdDyD-cRqDpZC3IAVkT_N7gtPwNhgQj-NQd0DTpqkpv_77ROeP_ZUGC_hRfEtuOgAlKAwLUY5UtAQntmmK88RdOxnFuLwVd_D8AFnZPZDUZVoghbU9BmG3PGyUQenah3plzRvGRcuLnTRY1BNNCSD1dIT49gSpPbSEUeJj5lRcUcmD0fe6H5394som-Syw8MU4LO412HMbAy4mhveW0wXBc7nSlZaLzbOczfpwDksAYjceN7FgXrQ-yTApv8B1cW29Ag1/rtoUy_mrEnhIAUlXHgfA5Y3nLezVarpL/9)

Your opinion matters. Together, we can ensure that education remains a foundation of liberty in America.

Bill Gray, '01

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: The So-Called “ Big, Beautiful Bill”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
Yesterday – in the darkness of the early morning – House Republicans pushed through a disastrous bill that includes the largest cuts to health care and the largest cuts to hunger programs in American history. The bill adds trillions to our deficit while prioritizing fiscally unsustainable tax breaks for billionaires and corporations.
The bill includes a $700 billion cut to Medicaid , meaning nearly 14 million Americans could lose their health insurance. It also cuts funding for SNAP benefits leading to an estimated 3 million Americans losing access to nutritional assistance. All of this to support fiscally unsustainable tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy, which will add $3.8 trillion to the deficit over the next decade.
From the top down, Democrats across the country stood against President Trump and his “Big, Beautiful Bill.” We proposed over 500 amendments and stayed all through the night to try to stop this from passing. In the end, House Republicans passed it by the smallest possible margin – one vote.
I proudly voted NO, but as this bill approaches the Senate, this fight isn’t over. We need leaders in Washington that will stand up for health care and working families. Can you chip in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-23]

Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

**Mike Johnson and Republicans just passed their destructive reconciliation legislation in the U.S. House — and it includes a provision that would _bar Planned Parenthood from accepting Medicaid._**

Congressional Republicans are intentionally coming after providers like Planned Parenthood affiliates that offer abortion care, and are trying to ban them from accepting Medicaid reimbursement for health care services like STD and cancer screenings.

[**Donate now to take a stand and split a donation between EMILYs List and Planned Parenthood Action Fund:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108240677/547308123/734455500?refcode=WUEFH544_20250523_PPAF_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056185&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWEzNjg3NS1mNzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cs_OQIRL81Yk5YrXthtQBWvT8NG2Zc83Uvsy9y1EGpo=) | **[SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108240692/547308137/734455500?refcode=WUEFH544_20250523_PPAF_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056185&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWEzNjg3NS1mNzM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cs_OQIRL81Yk5YrXthtQBWvT8NG2Zc83Uvsy9y1EGpo=)**

Planned Parenthood is one of the country's largest providers of family planning services to low-income patients. If Republicans are successful at defunding Planned Parenthood through Medicaid, __hundreds of thousands of patients would be blocked from receiving essential health care_._

Mike Johnson and his anti-choice cronies know that targeting Planned Parenthood could shut down sexual and reproductive health providers across the country. It's just another step in the Republicans' anti-abortion playbook to decimate access to care nationwide.
Please, take a stand right now to support reproductive rights organizations _and_ the leaders who will defend them in Congress.
[**We're not backing down from this fight. clean_body: We're fighting like hell | = Peter, this is urgent: Mike Johnson and Republicans just passed their destructive reconciliation legislation in the U.S. House — and it includes a provision that would bar Planned Parenthood from accepting Medicaid. Congressional Republicans are intentionally coming after providers like Planned Parenthood affiliates that offer abortion care, and are trying to ban them from accepting Medicaid reimbursement for health care services like STD and cancer screenings. = | = Planned Parenthood is one of the country's largest providers of family planning services to low-income patients. If Republicans are successful at defunding Planned Parenthood through Medicaid, hundreds of thousands of patients would be blocked from receiving essential health care. Mike Johnson and his anti-choice cronies know that targeting Planned Parenthood could shut down sexual and reproductive health providers across the country. It's just another step in the Republicans' anti-abortion playbook to decimate access to care nationwide. Please, take a stand right now to support reproductive rights organizations and the leaders who will defend them in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Gary Sinise
subject: 20th Annual National Memorial Day Parade starts SOON!
body:
Last Weekend to Honor These Heroes| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjJadQGRMXybpez4KE4_UvUhAdvoR9RIr_yMPzyPNVnWXMPqVRbDVOhVpgwpKrQuyXiMWFu20VaCHK0wvRlaYcIlCcUZ2unDRN4yieHk4bBYQJxxi3T3lpdRvOvAMkV4Y7iknlmG1YcPIk6w6vysuBRM)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjKAlwS7MwSEIYKK0d2xynYvT87Hf5iRQuqWcXVxta3mk6ZdN5Z9eKKxXPy8Zh2m2pOdaA75lMIXnsDbD776SXSNLfXiLDZdV4RyFJDtNXAOqUl4D9ahHXOf8_htM3HoxYf4ryBCI6pfuUvOvl-8bu0I)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjKpc7W9trhGpK3wNWCKz1dY37jSa3_sPgTEyAPSbu6bm61YjbFXUoUL7Bs6ex9T3012x0yk34Sig4OJ3pwTUnYQYTLmjCAg1_2Ig4OqCTiGPiAuL1xf8DGeKuUMUdpXQqskJYiafSqiX731iY036Xej)
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjLJFt38fT-65popjjUODnRnio7ImqYYPr0SWCOjIpowZeEBcnF98wiMIYkw9vdcS0JaCY0yY6KFx26LEsQ8f-Uue2MEiQPm9Hme4TqC6pd7mS-q8hikG38UcivEpEwA1NPLEKdz91FbI25V5PvT2y9f)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQy7mSAHlyNSrL2AfbNpbV0eL8vkcKuNTDZveKWYtr2hkrd351Q4FSInX0YzIf6vUDYm2BQjWDDAmqN021myRb87-40MmiY_IZ67r_N6KRln5mwz9QBdmCjBFlTP4XF_4PLzlSYJ1pQZIpgZfvxqSfnWify2QIQaSl1nFzDB35V8fgFJkertsi-U02zZXxhLrpFnh1GIS9lbA2zjHSMOee4f-W6UkWHC7gkljKL-Tqu9VA%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjK03sckpm6WQj4XJhCrzchQsfLP1DBxnNGh8wPFiv5KWHdk7N0o5H3oNR015Wl6F6w70lq9T3Awx_Rk3-kn1dC2480i1fXXoHDD37o1ovsmEXb6SQDCuP2ompAlu-ayfQKdE-_iudq0LiPpNjs81J3-) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjL4sADJP1UwiEbDG6XMWyaeHfzGKIHR7jVdK9ZNHploMA0fFSrD81H2wztxyahenry9fi-YpMyOh8XyJLC_6f48HMlVCCOOBpOlFJqDkVREapRiMYWwXysMmzwfQ_6yMiAASqvVVP8zXc2yQ_sNFU3Y)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjJ219WcwD0ygb9MaC294aDctRAo-Jvg8a5HjWIqY_GXy5h00SH8hpKvXBrp9W9OQwVxsVeyt4xgOlQWS2RRAoGTOBUMNK-mzY_9EbPvvhCuxcO6mvIcua1knVns34DcdYM4NCB3TWMlZkyEUccPc3mB)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjLd7gRMUryza3RdsNQALF1qnqBvw7Ck9dkrB40DgCxuwcpbrKudzL7tfaRJIlMdMy0YiTZLgaO7mobMgXN6JB_iWQT2VQZFP5dSMXgdcsSrBdGl9vIuzv--U3l7ZO99EPs44FBKT3GQ1-Xo8wtGV5Dr)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_e=stDyXAKDROuvIPvkW4s2J-dJoXaERSPzgMw2Apd2kvGi5HTSHROwAeupLsdi9jQyBIr1hAc15cweAFUPtXwuKj9UcJY0ZMaYneJmKI-5gfhHhLh6i0SJKMiJn0DOQ5t3XAGnT7xoQ9ndaY_gx0fZdTIrKmTyrqxX1sWv4ro5JjKPtjGKVfCA9rdiJfGk7Fb1dhYaJiVw9lR8ITsm669vY17TZ-omc47m8-D_siSN0XilNVe91D7rT8iJzgXXgsvW1Lg1owJSMclzE7TMxES1HeKT92qHh5r8x57HtLc29OjyO4po_lzRzw_DMVyulNrh)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=8e853d1006784400b02802dfe3d54f06&_t=A0gL-wcw19maEcEkjQTWA2U05EpiE_3CN19mRmMnnCh4XFRMpylOQ1FJbxHvwVup9b85fwmEnxqZ9DcV5DCzT3haNjhPPQ-oFd1qHHMxxCa36M83AdMvDw77OMykdChy)

Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. - If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

Hey friend – it’s Rep. Nikki Budzinski here, and I’m excited to reach out to you to talk about how the IL Dem County Chairs’ Association and I are teaming up to hold Republicans accountable.

As you’re likely aware, Republicans have fully embraced the chaos they’ve unleashed. They just approved the largest handout to billionaires in history, funded by deep cuts to food assistance and healthcare programs. Meanwhile, they continue to rubber-stamp Trump’s extremist agenda, enabling him to impose reckless tariffs that are driving up costs for working families. To add to that, they’re refusing to hold town halls to answer to their constituents and take accountability.

But IDCCA and I are working together to fill that void. If Republicans refuse to hear folks from Illinois, then we’re happy to step up and do that work. I ran for Congress to listen to folks directly and try to solve problems. That work doesn’t stop because Democrats are in the minority.

We’re working together – at all levels – to harness grassroots power and elect changemakers. **[If you want to support IDCCA’s mission and ensure we’re supporting Democrats at every level right now, you can make a split contribution now between IDCCA and my re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108241616/547311020/-718065258?refcode=em-5.23.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzYwOTNlZS1mODM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0XAj6NYKSYsZamtjqu4zx85uf4xcLxS21kLPqYPKR6k=)**

Before running for office, most of my career was in the Labor Movement – so I know firsthand how to mobilize communities, bring people together, and make change.

And I’m committed to doing all of that in the lead up to 2026, and I know IDCCA is too. With all of us at every level up for the fight, we need your support to make it happen.

subject: Tax cuts for billionaires and healthcare cuts for our families

body:
Yesterday, I voted NO on Republicans’ harmful budget reconciliation bill. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWS60p4Iy9NO2JLnovy80Y4WKl-n5HcrcPIaZ6sRRFdN2h3ddM-3L2C1PI9YKp7Rbj30-7o37eCzQuOp1-QPuCwXtPx2SSuylqd1FICvzcmL0mUGdDtJ6G5Fd411_NX0bB_NwTKP3cIGI_-NuFlczoOn46j-PYi_TnyJJOQjjmJ-ZpHRc9xRFsky_ZyNVq3oGIHDH-YgH4_mTWtm1QI6o6PPDqbCx-Le6iMSsTnqfCIxgpyVbLFKkk2Yl2dq_jeJPO/4gq/siYnAy_MTmOeZOk7eOBrjw/h0/h001.jJM9-s3jKzKhv2J-OKCY5nz2D9nsq4XIToJTm45qWQQ)
---
Friend, Yesterday, I voted NO on Republicans’ harmful budget reconciliation bill, which passed through the House of Representatives. They’re betraying our families,**giving a $5.5 trillion handout to the rich and corporations while cutting more than $1 trillion from life-saving programs including Medicaid and SNAP**. This will kick tens of millions of Americans off their healthcare, food assistance, and energy assistance. **Cutting off essential services is a form of violence:** If this budget passes the Senate, thousands of Americans will needlessly die. Already, most Americans live paycheck to paycheck, and many are struggling to put food on the table and pay their bills. Instead of investing in our communities’ needs, **Republicans’ anti-life budget would spend hundreds of billions of dollars**** _more_****on war, deportations, and immigration detention**. **This is an outrage. I’m fighting back, and I’m hoping you’ll join me.** [**Will you chip into my campaign today to resist this administration and fight back against the Billionaire Budget?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGS6wul8IzF2EfTbi9OsgSKh73buZuhpkwWhUVzLrOZeqAcNanFVmweJkte-2f-MU_EE5jG2Ev1_eQ-SKD7t9oDk7lIhFUEvJGrpfHUGieNPBQsR5v4uFSVNVygHYTIztEbhWKsoYF2qS3GN2OlF-6ONeF7nrfQ2Qc__2FcEiEYDx4QKtxXHYpJN_GAab-OPCbrUSPoQY36lTPIQR1poQfMEB8XC1h5MXmi-s53bCRw-ZOk0h8tnMigmj7TOR6KO62aNCV72x6mfKmYc6Ya-rhz59I_Y_-G8m_hkmsG9efZwWsus2HCnt5FGQqjc_dS87f0DCQRyxsvvuImTN_VsTie3uJKR53Ok1nxuVAZ3h50FePA8SnlTtj0YIOJ3z1-kvjkN6roBdflsVXHQIPqywCUx6tPbR2hUGC6rjsd9HoDLGyws5_MQWZMGAWJ8Ah-3M/4gq/siYnAy_MTmOeZOk7eOBrjw/h1/h001.Rn9Am3mtnskIPSwA56nVoMsTKbmYCHq25-AqHGQqLwM) I will keep pushing to block this bill from being signed into law, as it now heads to the Senate. And I’ll keep leading the fight in Congress to cut military and ICE funding and instead invest in human rights like utilities and healthcare.**** We live in the richest country in the world, with the resources to guarantee all Americans what they need to thrive. But we have some of the highest poverty rates among advanced democracies—because poverty is a policy choice. **I’m leading legislation to end poverty by sending money directly to unhoused youth and to all families with children, and pushing to end medical debt.** I promise I will not waver in the fight for marginalized and working class people. I never take money from corporate PACs, and I never will. [**Will you chip into my campaign today to fight for our communities?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGS6wul8IzF2EfTbi9OsgSKh73buZuhpkwWhUVzLrOZeqAcNanFVmweJkte-2f-MXEFNCcvDxyISMnZAzXGhaA7z-XDYbRjL2bl_LDwcqZDsbw4T_hZ8r5UmSFBpUXVGFEAzCnJ1J07rkbkAm-VPTlVOM8OGEJLljLL4GZ0E-O38olH4UjfTkSNMSPuPydXBUbJusZt7vN5blPxeecqH-9ssPvNQ893OUkyFUOZ9VcR1FWnVqI1k8ga1l6Z8ouvJ5Rt1H83034NeAnDsT-3RPQ6BE1GeUYQ--JD18EqGzt5IYwhpTyzb_6BRUf_CV1eQ2gTuJQCGxDDHaBvGLX3M-Q8F6rwRcUxkEvpJgv-S9k1WDKNtv_HbiBqzws0-XZuGJ4ETAAJZBo_4BrRtRyO_nKgH_iG2b0inpPsMNFdjulEBV9OmZbqAzAPpUcjeT8_vI/4gq/siYnAy_MTmOeZOk7eOBrjw/h2/h001.b0sRUD1GTUX6vGvcEVqQj_mR9GxotX9rKfXOFUQX1S0) | [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGS6wul8IzF2EfTbi9OsgSKh73buZuhpkwWhUVzLrOZeqAcNanFVmweJkte-2f-MX9mkRsEwMZxHWaTX8O8yDWQ1HXLkMG5xcYWwyIDNA_ldz03V3UbGPI3_lYaloUivLSwi0sZfxSjWaVSls8v1-_UHhacF-F8dwud5laSb8kF-iZwcUL3OA1t6DpNCvgiY55rE8q4uXTuq_uPDMd4mDbMQA5YXmE2RP-HCHUYsdwZyjIyQnEP3kBnUUjQ57dML2mvXDwkTw0rSQIJ4sXGNMOQqT1J7ofGcMCRAWYqyZHAl31EgBeoxhcc8yts0hpdIk2xjRbHX9hxGZMilQ4MMDoawVy2FtWuqJ0P71u-LRTBIdcoaW-1KJSDBHcd7IKgKauTKgplDRfaTXQTqWdTC86vn_auJEGM5VWj9LFNTxvJnZkoX_7SDR-YDW6CnRLULA/4gq/siYnAy_MTmOeZOk7eOBrjw/h3/h001.8HXt0Oe4XgPUzaiHJoHESWtQYWxYyXI3CwBk_YznKYA)

If passed as-is, this Billionaire Budget will cut off utility assistance to lower-income Americans, cut environmental justice and clean energy funding, weaken crucial environmental protections, and take away opportunities for people to object to corporate polluter projects that are decimating our planet and making our families sick.
As a community activist and lawmaker, I’ve fought for years for the human right to drink clean water and breathe clean air. **I will keep fighting for environmental justice.**
I’ve passed legislation through the House of Representatives to stop water and power shutoffs, and secured more than $1.1 billion in federal funding to assist lower-income households in paying off their water bills and reconnection fees.
I’ve also introduced transformative legislation to address environmental racism, limit harmful emissions, empower frontline communities most impacted by pollution and climate change, and hold corporate polluters accountable.
**I will not back down in the fight for a humane and just immigration system rooted in dignity, with real pathways to citizenship.**
As a former immigration attorney now serving in Congress, I’ve introduced legislation to release people from ICE detention, and to protect immigrant families by ensuring due process in immigration removal proceedings. Our movement is building to protect the right to due process and free speech for all.
**Together, we will continue pushing for a true democracy that puts people over profits, and a liberated future where everyone can thrive.** We’re up against powerful people, but there are so many more of us. Major change has only happened when the people come together.
Together we have power.
[**Can you chip in today to carry on the urgent fight for our rights and our lives?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGS6wul8IzF2EfTbi9OsgSKh73buZuhpkwWhUVzLrOZeqAcNanFVmweJkte-2f-MVtsfOlQA-JgF0BxARAoK2iCwKBYPOelK5HIaHMCvxIitgYxPtQF8XKs2g12KzUJgmjPrL31uRGo1vtEZ1EanDBFmRKwnurvsaWCaBBhoEGu72gvVD9trRQeP0Ov8eqBJXRL74DMVQp0Xpjrqy2q2TT3LqGOUC0y7zkBPD0VZgBgxVaDSpVXqKnfaFzVeKbasEbORl4Q0QsOoLc7PWDUKdJ9wLDBePQuxvzG51MXFvOr6R-jNqJfa-XHaJwkbSg85jACXoN7uYFjJCFPckmNe7osJU2Hv_C3Ht06Jx-X355gEs5yXkOccvPFE9zwOOMYtXahjrczV33VVBpv9WIAUaL4tWzBf9yWxTcei_NlWH9Oaz4L7mOABdOowjYz8-kV1o/4gq/siYnAy_MTmOeZOk7eOBrjw/h4/h001.ErllSRJG48BrwhGgH52FDSNNoejLpanMscPhFHHQXV8)

clean_body: Yesterday, I voted NO on Republicans’ harmful budget reconciliation bill. | | | Friend, Yesterday, I voted NO on Republicans’ harmful budget reconciliation bill, which passed through the House of Representatives. They’re betraying our families,giving a $5.5 trillion handout to the rich and corporations while cutting more than $1 trillion from life-saving programs including Medicaid and SNAP. This will kick tens of millions of Americans off their healthcare, food assistance, and energy assistance. Cutting off essential services is a form of violence: If this budget passes the Senate, thousands of Americans will needlessly die. Already, most Americans live paycheck to paycheck, and many are struggling to put food on the table and pay their bills. Instead of investing in our communities’ needs, Republicans’ anti-life budget would spend hundreds of billions of dollars moreon war, deportations, and immigration detention. This is an outrage. I’m fighting back, and I’m hoping you’ll join me. I will keep pushing to block this bill from being signed into law, as it now heads to the Senate. And I’ll keep leading the fight in Congress to cut military and ICE funding and instead invest in human rights like utilities and healthcare.** We live in the richest country in the world, with the resources to guarantee all Americans what they need to thrive. But we have some of the highest poverty rates among advanced democracies—because poverty is a policy choice. I’m leading legislation to end poverty by sending money directly to unhoused youth and to all families with children, and pushing to end medical debt. I promise I will not waver in the fight for marginalized and working class people. I never take money from corporate PACs, and I never will. | If passed as-is, this Billionaire Budget will cut off utility assistance to lower-income Americans, cut environmental justice and clean energy funding, weaken crucial environmental protections, and take away opportunities for people to object to corporate polluter projects that are decimating our planet and making our families sick. As a community activist and lawmaker, I’ve fought for years for the human right to drink clean water and breathe clean air. I will keep fighting for environmental justice. I’ve passed legislation through the House of Representatives to stop water and power shutoffs, and secured more than $1.1 billion in federal funding to assist lower-income households in paying off their water bills and reconnection fees. I’ve also introduced transformative legislation to address environmental racism, limit harmful emissions, empower frontline communities most impacted by pollution and climate change, and hold corporate polluters accountable. I will not back down in the fight for a humane and just immigration system rooted in dignity, with real pathways to citizenship. As a former immigration attorney now serving in Congress, I’ve introduced legislation to release people from ICE detention, and to protect immigrant families by ensuring due process in immigration removal proceedings. Our movement is building to protect the right to due process and free speech for all. Together, we will continue pushing for a true democracy that puts people over profits, and a liberated future where everyone can thrive. We’re up against powerful people, but there are so many more of us. Major change has only happened when the people come together. Together we have power. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for fighting alongside me for justice and dignity for all. With you in the fight against fascism and for a better future, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

clean_body: The emergency card is closing soon. | | | | | | Peter, Let's remind the world that courage still counts. | In moments of bold leadership and courage, we must not stay silent--we must show our gratitude. That's why I'm reaching out one last time. Our emergency card is about to close, and you still haven't signed your name, Peter! Elon has stood strong for free speech, innovation, and against the radical waste in Washington --and now, it 's our turn to stand up and say thank you. "This is your final opportunity to join us, Peter!" | | | | | President Trump made history with his return to the White House & it's time for our country to rally behind the values that make us Great- AMERICA IS BACK! name: Rick Larsen
subject: Spaghetti on the wall
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
What do penguins, spaghetti, and PBS have in common?
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108242374/547313398/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmIzYmNjYi1mYTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xosZde7YZ7rNKUDNYrRr4r7nJFeu9V73Hg0fkYI1y8I=&emci=5b658a3c-502f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ffb3bccb-fa37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **President Trump and his trade war are a mess.** The increases in tariffs and the use of national emergency powers: Trump is sowing chaos. There was no method to the madness — he was putting tariffs on uninhabited islands as well as a couple of islands only inhabited by penguins. He announces tariffs and rolls them back with no plan, only creating uncertainty for hardworking families across America. **This is the spaghetti on the wall approach that fuels the Republican Rip-Off.** [**Will you donate $3 to take a stand against the chaos? We need every person to take a stand against this President and show that his actions have consequences.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108242375/547313400/1596212816?refcode=2025-05-23-spaghetti&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ffb3bccb-fa37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmIzYmNjYi1mYTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xosZde7YZ7rNKUDNYrRr4r7nJFeu9V73Hg0fkYI1y8I=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108242377/547313401/1596212816?refcode=2025-05-23-spaghetti&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ffb3bccb-fa37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmIzYmNjYi1mYTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xosZde7YZ7rNKUDNYrRr4r7nJFeu9V73Hg0fkYI1y8I=) **The chaos of this madness is impacting Northwest Washington.** Local public broadcasting stations, local rural libraries that provide free wifi for their community, and health care access through Medicaid are all impacted by their indiscriminate budget cuts. These budget cuts are forcing difficult decisions already, and will only get tougher because of the uncertainty of the future. **Trump's focus on the chaos is leading to many broken campaign promises and increased prices.** There is no strategy beyond this chaos, and President Trump is going against the values of Northwest Washington. We need to continue to focus our efforts to take a stand against Trump and be ready to win back the House in 2026. The momentum we build now will be critical for the future. clean_body: What do penguins, spaghetti, and PBS have in common? | | | | President Trump and his trade war are a mess. The increases in tariffs and the use of national emergency powers: Trump is sowing chaos. There was no method to the madness — he was putting tariffs on uninhabited islands as well as a couple of islands only inhabited by penguins. He announces tariffs and rolls them back with no plan, only creating uncertainty for hardworking families across America. This is the spaghetti on the wall approach that fuels the Republican Rip-Off. = = The chaos of this madness is impacting Northwest Washington. Local public broadcasting stations, local rural libraries that provide free wifi for their community, and health care access through Medicaid are all impacted by their indiscriminate budget cuts. These budget cuts are forcing difficult decisions already, and will only get tougher because of the uncertainty of the future. Trump's focus on the chaos is leading to many broken campaign promises and increased prices. There is no strategy beyond this chaos, and President Trump is going against the values of Northwest Washington. We need to continue to focus our efforts to take a stand against Trump and be ready to win back the House in 2026. The momentum we build now will be critical for the future. # [Trump Keeps Losing In Court--But the Fight Is Long From Over](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=162763998&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzYzOTk4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgwMjEyMTEsImV4cCI6MTc1MDYxMzIxMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RSnHEIvQn6BDODlzWGLBxOO6nKGpxbu6bnrw2GSpuUI)
### A win for justice, a recognition that organizing works, but a warning that Trump's extremism is only accelerating
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| May 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=162763998&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzYzOTk4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODAyMTIxMSwiZXhwIjoxNzUwNjEzMjExLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9fdMGe-QBWFlP6sWsy7jiSeKdgaqByhNecfwdnW_zHQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=162763998&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzYzOTk4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgwMjEyMTEsImV4cCI6MTc1MDYxMzIxMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RSnHEIvQn6BDODlzWGLBxOO6nKGpxbu6bnrw2GSpuUI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=162763998&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzYzOTk4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgwMjEyMTEsImV4cCI6MTc1MDYxMzIxMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RSnHEIvQn6BDODlzWGLBxOO6nKGpxbu6bnrw2GSpuUI)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/trump-keeps-losing-in-courtbut-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In recent weeks, Donald Trump has faced a series of significant legal setbacks, and it's important we celebrate these wins. These wins underscore that despite his attacks on the judiciary, the resilience of our judicial system is pulling through on critical matters. It also speaks to the power of civic activism and social push for accountability, especially as our most basic rights like free speech and due process are under attack.
Likewise, the battle to protect our basic rights is far from over. So, while celebrating these wins, it's equally critical we recognize how Trump is advancing his fascist view of the world--and stand united against it. **Let 's Address This.**
**Before you dive in, join 132,000+ activists and become a free or paid subscriber to our movement for justice.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gZho9kwUBjxE47PZ6-5SjgwKxr2bfz57qdH8uefXZB0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162763998)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d30ef38a-5299-4c5e-b491-4e6653b351f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump. Credit: Euronews
## **Courts Repeatedly Block Trump 's Fascism**
These wins not only highlight the checks and balances inherent in American democracy but also serve as a rallying cry for continued vigilance against authoritarian overreach. Here are seven major recent legal wins the American people have so far enjoyed against the Trump regime.
1. **Protecting the Department of Education:** Donald Trump has made clear that he "_loves the poorly educated_." It's why he's prioritized dismantling the Department of Education, which he's tried to do via Executive Order. This week, a Federal Judge blocked his vision of an ignorant society, and forbade him from dismantling the Dept of Ed. U.S. District Judge Myong Joun [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/61160cab-6018-4086-8587-42cd417b9f6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> "The record abundantly reveals that defendants' true intention is to effectively dismantle the department without an authorizing statute...[the] massive reduction in staff has made it effectively impossible for the department to carry out its statutorily mandated functions."
The fight is not over yet, as Trump will likely appeal to the Supreme Court, but this is a win and speaks to the power of collective activism against the Trump regime.
2. **Kilmar Abrego Garcia Case** : In a unanimous 9-0 decision, the Supreme Court [ruled that](https://substack.com/redirect/1b2b0463-7ff5-435d-8420-d09db1109148?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Trump administration must facilitate the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Maryland resident wrongfully deported under the Alien Enemies Act. The Court emphasized the necessity of due process, stating that the administration's actions lacked legal justification. Unfortunately, the Trump regime has refused to act on this order, which speaks to the fact that this man does not care about law and order, but about absolute power.
3. **Mohsen Mahdawi and R umeysa Özturk**: These are actually two major wins. Federal courts ordered the release of Columbia University student Mohsen Mahdawi and Tufts University doctoral candidate [Rumeysa Özturk](https://substack.com/redirect/723e09ff-bcab-4d39-9115-39a1a8c218a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), both detained for their peaceful and entirely legal political expressions. Judges found their detentions violated constitutional rights, reinforcing the principle that free speech must be protected. The courts rejected claims by Marco Rubio that their public criticism of U.S. foreign policy somehow "harmed" the nation's national security interests.
4. **Alien Enemies Act Misapplication** : The Supreme Court [blocked](https://substack.com/redirect/cd493cd8-7ae1-4fb1-8f97-41ad726c0830?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Trump administration's attempt to use the 1798 Alien Enemies Act to expedite deportations of Venezuelan migrants, asserting that such actions circumvented due process rights. The Court's decision emphasized that even during times of national concern, constitutional protections cannot be disregarded. Moreover, let's not ignore the hypocrisy here. Trump wants us to believe that we are experiencing an "invasion" which requires invoking the Alien Enemies Act, while boasting how as President he's made our boarders the most secure they've ever been. Apparently we have Schrodinger's border.
5. **Maine's Title IX Dispute** : In a victory against anti-Trans discrimination, a [federal judge ordered the Trump administration to unfreeze USDA funds to Maine](https://substack.com/redirect/bbf09fb3-b029-45cb-945e-a710aa7f9463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Trump had withheld these funds over the state's policies on transgender athletes, famously berating the Maine Governor for refusing to comply with his discriminatory orders. The court found the administration's actions lacked legal merit, affirming the state's autonomy in educational matters.
6. **Perkins Coie Executive Order** : A federal judge [struck down an executive order targeting the law firm Perkins Coie](https://substack.com/redirect/1640c70e-d711-45b6-aec1-bd367aa49dc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), ruling it unconstitutional. The court determined that the order was a retaliatory act against the firm for its political affiliations, violating First Amendment protections. U.S. District Judge Beryl Howell raged against Trump's grotesque behavior, writing:
> "No American president has ever before issued executive orders like the one at issue. In purpose and effect, this action draws from a playbook as old as Shakespeare, who penned the phrase: 'The first thing we do, let's kill all the lawyers.' [Trump's act] is unconstitutional retaliation and viewpoint discrimination, plain and simple."
As a lawyer myself, it's good to see a judge champion free speech and free expression and protect lawyers from such grotesque discrimination, rather than try to strike down lawyers as some fascist regimes enable.
7. **Blocking Trump 's Ban on Foreign Students: **This week the Trump regime issued an Executive Order banning Harvard University from accepting foreign students--numbering nearly 7000 people. No sooner than he did so, but U.S. District Judge Allison Burroughs issued a Temporary Restraining Order overruling that Executive Order. Lawyers for Harvard wrote in their lawsuit:
> "With the stroke of a pen, the government has sought to erase a quarter of Harvard's student body, international students who contribute significantly to the University and its mission. Without its international students, Harvard is not Harvard."
I am hopeful this TRO becomes a permanent ban on Trump's fascist Executive Order. DHS Secretary Noem stated [that](https://substack.com/redirect/c02ae4d1-1729-4093-99dd-07f0a908f78e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "_Harvard can regain its ability to host foreign students if it produces a trove of records on foreign students within 72 hours_." Definitely nothing fascist about that. Let me share from my experience as someone who did a 1-year fellowship at Harvard University. I am an immigrant. My faculty advisor at Harvard was Dr. Ali Asani. He is an immigrant. Trump's move to ban Harvard from accepting foreign students is yet another example that it was never about merit--it was always about protecting white mediocrity.

**If you 're finding value in this research, join our movement as a free or paid subscriber.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gZho9kwUBjxE47PZ6-5SjgwKxr2bfz57qdH8uefXZB0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162763998)
## **The Power of Collective Action**
Even before Trump took office I called on the Democratic Party to prepare an onslaught of lawsuits against each of Trump's Executive Orders, and force him to fight for every single fascist policy he sought. Many other activists and human rights lawyers made the same call--because we know this is a legal strategy that works. Sadly, the Democratic Party leadership didn't get the memo, and instead we're stuck with Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer writing "very strong letters."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c6c7c92d-ea6c-43c4-a62c-597d9ccdfc89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Now, the Democratic Party leadership should learn from these wins. These legal victories are not solely the result of courtroom deliberations; they are the culmination of relentless efforts by activists, legal advocates, and concerned citizens. Public demonstrations, advocacy campaigns, and unwavering support for civil liberties have played a pivotal role in challenging and overturning policies that threaten democratic principles. Thank you for helping us get this far, and I encourage you to continue your activism, investment, and consistency--and continue to impress upon Democratic Party leadership to actually take action, instead of simply writing letters.
## **Concluding on a Cautionary Note**
Despite these setbacks, the Trump administration has signaled intentions to further test constitutional boundaries. Trump sycophants have floated potentially suspending habeas corpus to expedite deportations, a move that would fundamentally end America as a republic. Moreover, the grotesque budget reconciliation bill that House Republicans just passed is set to cut $500B from Medicare, $800B from Medicaid, and billions more from basic necessity programs. People will die as a result of these cruel policies. Therefore, we must not let up in our efforts to push back and prevent their passage. We must continue to challenge these injustices within our Constitutional rights in the streets, in the courts, and by winning the messaging battle.
As always, I welcome your support of my advocacy. Your support ensures I have the means and resources to continue to research, make sense of, and communicate to you these updates on the human rights issues that impact us all. Subscribe below, be sure to share these articles, and let's continue to stand united for justice.
**Before you go, know that your support makes my human rights advocacy possible. Enter your email below and join our efforts.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gZho9kwUBjxE47PZ6-5SjgwKxr2bfz57qdH8uefXZB0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162763998)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e5ec0d4-3d16-4df5-8817-dedfdbf9f005?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
