The courts rejected claims by Marco Rubio that their public criticism of U.S. foreign policy somehow "harmed" the nation's national security interests. 4. Alien Enemies Act Misapplication : The Supreme Court the Trump administration's attempt to use the 1798 Alien Enemies Act to expedite deportations of Venezuelan migrants, asserting that such actions circumvented due process rights. The Court's decision emphasized that even during times of national concern, constitutional protections cannot be disregarded. Moreover, let's not ignore the hypocrisy here. Trump wants us to believe that we are experiencing an "invasion" which requires invoking the Alien Enemies Act, while boasting how as President he's made our boarders the most secure they've ever been. Apparently we have Schrodinger's border. 5. Maine's Title IX Dispute : In a victory against anti-Trans discrimination, a . Trump had withheld these funds over the state's policies on transgender athletes, famously berating the Maine Governor for refusing to comply with his discriminatory orders. The court found the administration's actions lacked legal merit, affirming the state's autonomy in educational matters. 6. Perkins Coie Executive Order : A federal judge , ruling it unconstitutional. The court determined that the order was a retaliatory act against the firm for its political affiliations, violating First Amendment protections. U.S. District Judge Beryl Howell raged against Trump's grotesque behavior, writing: "No American president has ever before issued executive orders like the one at issue. In purpose and effect, this action draws from a playbook as old as Shakespeare, who penned the phrase: 'The first thing we do, let's kill all the lawyers.' [Trump's act] is unconstitutional retaliation and viewpoint discrimination, plain and simple." As a lawyer myself, it's good to see a judge champion free speech and free expression and protect lawyers from such grotesque discrimination, rather than try to strike down lawyers as some fascist regimes enable. 7. Blocking Trump 's Ban on Foreign Students: This week the Trump regime issued an Executive Order banning Harvard University from accepting foreign students--numbering nearly 7000 people. No sooner than he did so, but U.S. District Judge Allison Burroughs issued a Temporary Restraining Order overruling that Executive Order. Lawyers for Harvard wrote in their lawsuit: "With the stroke of a pen, the government has sought to erase a quarter of Harvard's student body, international students who contribute significantly to the University and its mission. Without its international students, Harvard is not Harvard." I am hopeful this TRO becomes a permanent ban on Trump's fascist Executive Order. DHS Secretary Noem stated "Harvard can regain its ability to host foreign students if it produces a trove of records on foreign students within 72 hours." Definitely nothing fascist about that. Let me share from my experience as someone who did a 1-year fellowship at Harvard University. I am an immigrant. My faculty advisor at Harvard was Dr. Ali Asani. He is an immigrant. Trump's move to ban Harvard from accepting foreign students is yet another example that it was never about merit--it was always about protecting white mediocrity. If you 're finding value in this research, join our movement as a free or paid subscriber. The Power of Collective Action Even before Trump took office I called on the Democratic Party to prepare an onslaught of lawsuits against each of Trump's Executive Orders, and force him to fight for every single fascist policy he sought. Many other activists and human rights lawyers made the same call--because we know this is a legal strategy that works. Sadly, the Democratic Party leadership didn't get the memo, and instead we're stuck with Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer writing "very strong letters." | | ---|---|--- Now, the Democratic Party leadership should learn from these wins. These legal victories are not solely the result of courtroom deliberations; they are the culmination of relentless efforts by activists, legal advocates, and concerned citizens. Public demonstrations, advocacy campaigns, and unwavering support for civil liberties have played a pivotal role in challenging and overturning policies that threaten democratic principles. Thank you for helping us get this far, and I encourage you to continue your activism, investment, and consistency--and continue to impress upon Democratic Party leadership to actually take action, instead of simply writing letters. Concluding on a Cautionary Note Despite these setbacks, the Trump administration has signaled intentions to further test constitutional boundaries. Trump sycophants have floated potentially suspending habeas corpus to expedite deportations, a move that would fundamentally end America as a republic. Moreover, the grotesque budget reconciliation bill that House Republicans just passed is set to cut $500B from Medicare, $800B from Medicaid, and billions more from basic necessity programs. People will die as a result of these cruel policies. Therefore, we must not let up in our efforts to push back and prevent their passage. We must continue to challenge these injustices within our Constitutional rights in the streets, in the courts, and by winning the messaging battle. As always, I welcome your support of my advocacy. Your support ensures I have the means and resources to continue to research, make sense of, and communicate to you these updates on the human rights issues that impact us all. Subscribe below, be sure to share these articles, and let's continue to stand united for justice. Before you go, know that your support makes my human rights advocacy possible. Enter your email below and join our efforts. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: SDC HQ
subject: Two bits of good news for you today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
Two bits of good news for you today, Peter.
**— FIRST —**
Since Donald Trump assumed the presidency in January, he’s caused chaos and disruption across the country — with major impacts on our economy, our federal workforce, and his former "top" issue, immigration.
**That’s why his approval rating has been in freefall for months.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88869?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV)
This is one of the first clear signs that almost everyone is seeing right through Trump’s empty promises — over his disastrous first 100 days and beyond.
**— SECOND —**
All that chaos we mentioned earlier has the GOP more divided than ever.
Whether it’s the deep cuts to Medicaid congressional Republicans proposed this month or the fact that Trump is committing a blatant act of corruption by accepting a $400 million jet as a gift from Qatar, Republicans are in disarray.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88869?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV)
**Meanwhile, Democrats are gaining incredible momentum** — holding rallies, town halls, and local actions in communities big + small across the country.
While the GOP scrambles and fights with each other, we need to keep organizing and mobilizing in red + blue states alike. That’s the only way we’ll be able to save our country from the destruction of this Trump administration.
**[So Peter, will you help us support Democrats doing this work in competitive races across the nation by chipping in $5 or more today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88869?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88870?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88870?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88870?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88870?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88870?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88870?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88869?refcode=em20250523-8962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=8962%2E614464%2EjvsuvV)

---
# Demand a Living Wage for All in Allegheny County
---
Keystone Progress Education Fund is a proud member of the Raise the Wage coalition. On Thursday, May 15th, we joined union members, community activists, faith leaders, and elected officials in **demanding that PA legislators raise the wage to $15/hr and grant local wage freedom!** To quote Allegheny County Executive, Sara Innamorato (pictured right), "Just to meet basic needs as a single working adult over $22/hr...[we need to] set a respectable wage that takes care of working people and working families throughout the region." We will not stop fighting until every Pennsylvanian is afforded the basic respect of a living wage. It is unacceptable for a working person to have to decide between paying for food and heat-- one job should be enough! **Couldn't watch the press conference in person?** Check out the [full livestream](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.RNKlYhK-gnABEpCnH88uwF03oJ5zVXUokB-zKl2OgTXVJuphIRn9yNmOfq8Uz8R4xvo8hVdxih_47iP3-IsSm8HtwHKSBsfaqFK5xj6GUXfDGZ3DXTWYDoKcPSTHgZJFrnSzvKh5Qi5tn0zX95YAKy3U9LNXHginyXlkM8m3A3-OaR9rlIZF5ts_zZEt3OJdnzLh2O7CBgY4ESMv7O8mHPrn9ciQkgeaf4PI93nmUMpXk2-AQTuEpQP9SSqhy9z5-m8Xdz2ymy7iWcVJ9r3MA3txudN2CTou3nfIf20mp7lbO5rqQcsVZUa_BKzQS_sfvzDWVe--VII5SLDrHumksKNpav8YbEA69qjSTPJxshY/4gq/ynO0AdXBQVeTc17tsoeVfQ/h1/h001.wfK8Z7pw1GF_Nv3ntmR8GQgeSsHE41rtioH3mHN2GJ8) on our Facebook Page!
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.RNKlYhK-gnABEpCnH88uwF03oJ5zVXUokB-zKl2OgTVO0ApeciBVhpnjR-JSg_tOjPRpilPjePczZ4VJRuXl_TGnjqGSYE_rwKJCxP52Q1N3P9f6yaWdi9KQBcooM4ZfMllMWw5DvTnBZwpFaOHPvFpNpMIwogBUwOUs2NmO6ZZ6n7R0w6OpZWaJ9hla8mHCvdP46x9nQTf61jiecZ_nEq-iT5xdBBV7Hyz2ip7Uc1EFagusJQ0L9RS4UpJcNaJLeD3tHVf9wwlLMnVR9ZkrSz6NsEUvN4rTpT8OkitM1AeQXarmZZiqWKK01qTJVBbo_xLdRkgaPOpjwMemT7THJPqksu_3bjDTQ3dIK9-vmcE/4gq/ynO0AdXBQVeTc17tsoeVfQ/h2/h001.3qQrtAwFF2-dkIj-zbtzp5EN4jon6ksCcgXUkd2kgy0)
---
## Take Action
---
**This year our state representatives will vote on a living wage bill!** Rep. Roni Green's bill, HB1525, will raise the wage to $15/hr for all workers, include an annual cost of living increase, and grant local control to municipalities so they can raise their own higher wage. **Tell your Reps to raise the wage -- [sign the petition here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRMdJziQYq9L7TCLxkuprwbG-rRj07vGVN0Ol6xw9a8LV8AHwNZxMJKz8WgNxljS3Zq5nTOUAHyufIXJjRS2baeb5isQpA9AT4w6B7_CPod6lSzVEmop7M1YEsJFB4ri8_FnDbGyvueSxG1XHA9pDh-JtYn_3vdpNK2o_c_y5YYcl8BpSha-KPi5Wwo2Bzp4BbYwxmjnMrL-Qr7-vyELL39OriSqhF82vt8x-2rWWDxq26CZYUga2ubf7bcqY1Ol4lQNDk1v3zwfPvwQ97wrxe_u2_E3GrZND-XVMq4xWyYxw52vQ0Fxa06rtUcjNi79rdh4HZHMpHrWVfKXDzAjr2nqE7ZrLzpg18KOb8PjpO6kY/4gq/ynO0AdXBQVeTc17tsoeVfQ/h3/h001.ZAsNsF4rzEspMSwOVt0vAknX9eisBRSbhDXM7f9Npek)** This week, the FDA abruptly suspended its milk and dairy quality-control testing program. This is just one of the casualties following the termination of 20,000 Department of Health and Human Services employees. Originally launched in response to the H5N1 bird flu outbreak in dairy cattle, the program was a vital safeguard to ensure the safety of our milk supply.
---
# Repro Roundup
---
### Contraception Access for All in PA
---
Did you know that [9 of 10 women in the U.S.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWDi79hBECkSTdvrPENCAPRJ_57I5iPLwlmn7Z7sPv9zmez2ufPNWnx3cH2usllCBfqJUTHqz94TugSW5-ZIPnNAQ5AioQyPqJRGyruLmbV4ax8uGvDis0vVh6l6u00KjstCfdyXUVEHRFyilZV2XDAUOAtpEDzYBCsQAOwPIWefyvVn8QHMqLUsJlvi2EKsatgjjZj16yZZqI_HrN_h5MJJMDUEGdcSQV84Ia5XN3aPbyXx7JL423izDy3daQRG2hf12cAvG_Ip-EA4BGgKudw9PiIMdOAFQNxqhNlN4otjfqMJXGnitv49vncyPazjQAgBkb_FT_Q0KlTFYn5Rb6muutmKM0MO-f6Nsqw-Dc-bFVG3mYIex6NDvv7zGKV4vovuiKfYXNBH4x95l0ZItmk/4gq/ynO0AdXBQVeTc17tsoeVfQ/h4/h001.Jj6SEV6xJsiuwPtkXGrMVwUkyvBogsdY7XfrmiL_BXs) will use contraception at some point in their lives? For millions, it's key to deciding if, when, and how to start a family, and to securing their health, education, and financial future. ### Union Yes! Reproductive Healthcare Workers Organize in Pittsburgh
---
**There 's no repro care without repro workers!** Pittsburgh only has two abortion clinics, and these essential workers are often overworked and undervalued. The workers at Planned Parenthood of Western PA are unionized, and now the staff at Allegheny Reproductive Health Center (ARHC), Pittsburgh's independent abortion clinic, have formed the [Allegheny Reproductive Justice Union](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg47kLht_3tccVpre3HiFCREjDHZH3XMhZgtMiBr3LJ-v_7ZFB3-NMC9W14MJeHMrbBWVld7trRACGhQ08IglbLAs_yhLR8G4kNp1Dp7to-XLNyqgw-HgxNbym5vO1-8gKB3vsDWNIv3h9IMQ9ts__WdmxKN7NJ6sJZZW0ec1RyLEQfTl3j1FYRany34P29ZW0aja-BAHWf4G-N_v-c12m3uZod-PZ5IXh4FmyG1o6E4FC3-5tdHdjcQq8BBDPlKMCwAGbMozDwHetsIvlXEz0bHXQougEi5LmsQ0ewvjM_lys-yt3Ja46DZUXGKUmf-Tom0/4gq/ynO0AdXBQVeTc17tsoeVfQ/h6/h001.BH7kzlT4E50xt0lsmGgS52tzYnEcKHebCcfOrYEM4cQ) working to organize with OPEIU Local 98236. ### Healthcare

### Education
---
Deaf Education is under fire at local and federal levels. Both the Indiana School for the Deaf and NJ School for the Deaf are facing budget cuts and may lose their remaining residential faculty. In Washington D.C., faculty at Gallaudet University [released an open letter](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxb3KGce75HzITXMkezezkWtN5QX2pCqI7odLSt5wJ0DrK7CiMtitow0NYRE8lIKtll61vgikdSW1coB8T1xC8XYMtqsXrk25NnGtyOQ_KxOnw1RcCJK-Mid3LM93p21aovZjQ3LxalvsnKly4v1fqxY_So26JPNn8BL2dDxpAn707yH-bb35JLwuD6SITiDKMjbYan8WRyfUGF6iPNtMI83idHw-OX5vYK0V44pXoTCLiIRiHCH9DOV5QwiGCOj1uPpnvr4ABYzx9MXm-8PHSnbs2R-oKXUWcm1oc6MYBdWVmC_33scYBGpv-g69JCkNHjkvqqPIOwdT6WLeD3oBq8zL7mvLIKIOFtSobnox4WIDKLx1ufovvLODQLBB_0aWeysMiEJuvnXMHAyWQFIU9hg/4gq/ynO0AdXBQVeTc17tsoeVfQ/h9/h001.NrW-Qn_jrN0scBxpG9F2ZXkbiJ9oBvmeFGVcg7QZe3o) this week expressing concern over the recent budget cuts. ### Community
---
Proposed cuts to SNAP, housing subsidies, and ASL interpretation at the Social Security Administration make it harder to be disabled and alive. On Thursday, May 15th, we joined union members, community activists, faith leaders, and elected officials in demanding that PA legislators raise the wage to $15/hr and grant local wage freedom! To quote Allegheny County Executive, Sara Innamorato (pictured right), "Just to meet basic needs as a single working adult over $22/hr...[we need to] set a respectable wage that takes care of working people and working families throughout the region." We will not stop fighting until every Pennsylvanian is afforded the basic respect of a living wage. It is unacceptable for a working person to have to decide between paying for food and heat-- one job should be enough! Couldn't watch the press conference in person? In Solidarity, The Team at Keystone Progress Education Fund + Keystone Progress | Online resources combating disinformation Organizing with the disability community to advocate for their rights Our repro rights (In)Accessible Podcast, and Educational programs like the Art of Democracy We're bringing info and resources to people who need them tofight for our rights at the polls and beyond! | | | Sent via . name: Left Action
subject: The White House is removing Trump transcripts from the website. Sign to demand transparency about Trump’s mental state
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell the White House: Don't cover up Trump's cognitive decline](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab845398-2289-4e6d-b1a9-986b59f53aed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e59c610-6164-4514-b6da-84b81e4a192b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The White House is [removing transcripts](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40f18d9d-0db0-4e2d-b05a-b4f1af3256fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) of Trump's speeches and appearances from their website, possibly trying to control Trump's image and cover up his rambling, nonsensical comments and outright lies. While videos of these unhinged moments are still available, the transcripts are an important part of providing the transparency that we, the American people deserve from our president. This could be the Trump administration's strategy to hide Trump's cognitive decline. We deserve to know the truth about Trump's mental state. Our national security, our economy, and our democracy are all at stake. If Trump is not cognitively fit to be in office, we need to know. [**Sign to tell the White House: Don't cover up Trump's cognitive decline >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5bc064e-a40c-4581-98a7-1592e3c97ff5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108244231/547318317/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250523_EN_TYCard_0_12MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICE&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM2YzQ3Mi1mZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVoFNY4M2BMYq7wQYbCDof6DyfDEIkrBmvdr1gsMZwM=&emci=6adeb86c-fe37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6b36c472-fe37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098) | As you have likely heard, Bonnie has had a lot going on the past week, but that hasn’t stopped her from standing up for the American people.

After exercising her legal right to conduct congressional oversight of an ICE facility, Bonnie has been threatened with potential arrest by the Trump Administration, House Republicans are threatening to strip her of her committee assignments, and even potentially censure her.

But that didn’t stop her from fighting hard to stop it. While in her Budget committee meeting late into Sunday night, Bonnie fought back as Republicans voted to pass despicable cuts to Medicaid, which will rip health care away from millions of Americans, deep cuts to critical nutrition programs, Headstart, and more. And when Republicans kept the House in session all night last night to pass their budget while Americans were sleeping, Bonnie still kept fighting! And she isn't done yet.

**_Bonnie won’t be intimidated by these threats. She has never and will never stop fighting for the people of New Jersey._

[Sign our card today to thank Bonnie for never backing down, even in the face of Republicans' abuse of power.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108244232/547318318/-1320397415?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250523_EN_TYCard_0_12MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICE&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM2YzQ3Mi1mZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVoFNY4M2BMYq7wQYbCDof6DyfDEIkrBmvdr1gsMZwM=&emci=6adeb86c-fe37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6b36c472-fe37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108244233/547318319/-109993730?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250523_EN_TYCard_0_12MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICE&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM2YzQ3Mi1mZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVoFNY4M2BMYq7wQYbCDof6DyfDEIkrBmvdr1gsMZwM=) Trump and Republicans are undermining our democracy at every turn. And they are doing it in part to distract from their attempts to gut key programs that help working Americans, all so they can give huge tax cuts to their ultrawealthy donors like Elon Musk.

Bonnie will not be bullied by the Trump administration, House Republicans, or anyone else into abandoning the job that she was elected to do. She is ready to speak and fight for a government that will actually improve the lives of the American people.

She will fight back against this abuse of power. She will fight back against Republicans’ attempts to hurt working Americans to satisfy their donors. And she will fight back against their attacks on our democracy.

**[Now it’s time to stand with her. Add your name to Bonnie’s thank-you card before we surprise her with it tomorrow night. Let’s show everyone, including Trump and House Republicans, we have her back, just like she always has ours.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108244234/547318320/-1320397415?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250523_EN_TYCard_0_12MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICE&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM2YzQ3Mi1mZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVoFNY4M2BMYq7wQYbCDof6DyfDEIkrBmvdr1gsMZwM=&emci=6adeb86c-fe37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6b36c472-fe37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098)** | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108244235/547318321/-1320397415?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250523_EN_TYCard_0_12MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICE&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM2YzQ3Mi1mZTM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZVoFNY4M2BMYq7wQYbCDof6DyfDEIkrBmvdr1gsMZwM=&emci=6adeb86c-fe37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6b36c472-fe37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098)

body:
President Trump heard me and yanked her nomination, saving us from an unqualified US Surgeon General.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kEFz8iAQhn8N3MzAAiE5cPj8nDid2o72YMfekJCIBRNJTPTfd7Q2191n93nn1aH1rropJOcI4ODKDgEg9g8BnHdjiJdjeF3OtrG2s3P6HsR9C_-f6AATfDL6Suf9bvP9su78Ku_lx-ZzoBPe31o7wU9pYoN2_j6VC1wqVpWEY6uo5BkBkEzggwK6J_u9lJKVmbRQ5dTknBBeGajyjBjsFBAQRACjUgCFJJdW2IynKckyxq1EnDw8iQ42OqNp1486xqYJiWkC9urQ9233CFYgKMbYJKeL8fbS_Z6ZJiAonpERFAOC4m2tx-3yeqxzxIpHaWyxJvWXEa1c4ajKdnTeuy692-u_N3hQ8BMAAP__NVVuTg)

[****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkzzGPnDAQBeBfYzqQGYMNhYtc0EZRoiiXItFVJy-eZZ14MGcMm_v3kdFqm7TP39P4GVq8u7xrpp4YwNXZlQEw8YEBvL3cKG6_6cun8mecsHyT36jNr_DxTnd44Hk0f-un9PL85_P31X_tk_rx_GuvHzy9L_jA96MVknE-p2oorBYXy5sCda2ajgMo0RZXbaVtzgrAiho5mL47K7Cy77kVF3kRXeE0cGh5C6JWLdRQ9Qpb7BopedeJBhVr-HGnMoTRjaZe083EGAJVY6DC62tKy3p87MTg5EMgjGiriPtejSFHvly3OGGYywlnjMaXdC4D5YI4bYle17DFEZkY_qcMZBaE1m3ExJBrRzIaWoybZiYGOjOQhsI2JyYGaO8iYcwN4K1oXm-xLqK2y81571aZZ03HrDxi1_AvAAD__7bkjWA) Patriot,

**DC is a swamp of self-serving snakes—politicians, profiteers, and fame-chasers who’d sell out President Trump for a pat on the head from the elite.. These swamp dwellers don’t give a damn about America.**

They’re motivated by greed, power, and their next TV hit.

**I'm Laura Loomer, and I'm here to drag them into the light and ensure Trump is surrounded by warriors who fight for YOU, not their egos.**

Last month, I exposed Dr. Janette Nesheiwat, Trump’s pick for Surgeon General, as a pro-vaccine globalist with a medical degree from a Caribbean school she hyped as elite.

[**Please help me keep going by donating to support my work.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkzzGPnDAQBeBfYzqQGYMNhYtc0EZRoiiXItFVJy-eZZ14MGcMm_v3kdFqm7TP39P4GVq8u7xrpp4YwNXZlQEw8YEBvL3cKG6_6cun8mecsHyT36jNr_DxTnd44Hk0f-un9PL85_P31X_tk_rx_GuvHzy9L_jA96MVknE-p2oorBYXy5sCda2ajgMo0RZXbaVtzgrAiho5mL47K7Cy77kVF3kRXeE0cGh5C6JWLdRQ9Qpb7BopedeJBhVr-HGnMoTRjaZe083EGAJVY6DC62tKy3p87MTg5EMgjGiriPtejSFHvly3OGGYywlnjMaXdC4D5YI4bYle17DFEZkY_qcMZBaE1m3ExJBrRzIaWoybZiYGOjOQhsI2JyYGaO8iYcwN4K1oXm-xLqK2y81571aZZ03HrDxi1_AvAAD__7bkjWA)

She wasn’t a patriot—she was a Big Pharma darling, ready to push **propaganda for profit** while being deceptive about her medical credentials.

As a result of my investigation, **President Trump heard me and yanked her nomination** , saving us from an unqualified US Surgeon General.

[**I have so much work to do and need your help to keep up the fight.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkzzGPnDAQBeBfYzqQGYMNhYtc0EZRoiiXItFVJy-eZZ14MGcMm_v3kdFqm7TP39P4GVq8u7xrpp4YwNXZlQEw8YEBvL3cKG6_6cun8mecsHyT36jNr_DxTnd44Hk0f-un9PL85_P31X_tk_rx_GuvHzy9L_jA96MVknE-p2oorBYXy5sCda2ajgMo0RZXbaVtzgrAiho5mL47K7Cy77kVF3kRXeE0cGh5C6JWLdRQ9Qpb7BopedeJBhVr-HGnMoTRjaZe083EGAJVY6DC62tKy3p87MTg5EMgjGiriPtejSFHvly3OGGYywlnjMaXdC4D5YI4bYle17DFEZkY_qcMZBaE1m3ExJBrRzIaWoybZiYGOjOQhsI2JyYGaO8iYcwN4K1oXm-xLqK2y81571aZZ03HrDxi1_AvAAD__7bkjWA)

**President Trump needs the best people—patriots who will be loyal to the America First agenda rather than fame.**

The Swamp is thick with these traitors, and with your support, **I’m wading through it to protect Trump’s agenda.**

My work isn't cheap. I'm funding my travel—flights to DC, hotels, and databases to track the corrupt. The establishment wants me to be broke and silent, but I answer to you, not them. [**Your donations keep me free to fight.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkzzGPnDAQBeBfYzqQGYMNhYtc0EZRoiiXItFVJy-eZZ14MGcMm_v3kdFqm7TP39P4GVq8u7xrpp4YwNXZlQEw8YEBvL3cKG6_6cun8mecsHyT36jNr_DxTnd44Hk0f-un9PL85_P31X_tk_rx_GuvHzy9L_jA96MVknE-p2oorBYXy5sCda2ajgMo0RZXbaVtzgrAiho5mL47K7Cy77kVF3kRXeE0cGh5C6JWLdRQ9Qpb7BopedeJBhVr-HGnMoTRjaZe083EGAJVY6DC62tKy3p87MTg5EMgjGiriPtejSFHvly3OGGYywlnjMaXdC4D5YI4bYle17DFEZkY_qcMZBaE1m3ExJBrRzIaWoybZiYGOjOQhsI2JyYGaO8iYcwN4K1oXm-xLqK2y81571aZZ03HrDxi1_AvAAD__7bkjWA)

[**Please chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me continue exposing the vetting crisis in DC.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkzzGPnDAQBeBfYzqQGYMNhYtc0EZRoiiXItFVJy-eZZ14MGcMm_v3kdFqm7TP39P4GVq8u7xrpp4YwNXZlQEw8YEBvL3cKG6_6cun8mecsHyT36jNr_DxTnd44Hk0f-un9PL85_P31X_tk_rx_GuvHzy9L_jA96MVknE-p2oorBYXy5sCda2ajgMo0RZXbaVtzgrAiho5mL47K7Cy77kVF3kRXeE0cGh5C6JWLdRQ9Qpb7BopedeJBhVr-HGnMoTRjaZe083EGAJVY6DC62tKy3p87MTg5EMgjGiriPtejSFHvly3OGGYywlnjMaXdC4D5YI4bYle17DFEZkY_qcMZBaE1m3ExJBrRzIaWoybZiYGOjOQhsI2JyYGaO8iYcwN4K1oXm-xLqK2y81571aZZ03HrDxi1_AvAAD__7bkjWA)

clean_body: President Trump heard me and yanked her nomination, saving us from an unqualified US Surgeon General. | | | | Patriot, DC is a swamp of self-serving snakes—politicians, profiteers, and fame-chasers who’d sell out President Trump for a pat on the head from the elite.. These swamp dwellers don’t give a damn about America. They’re motivated by greed, power, and their next TV hit. I'm Laura Loomer, and I'm here to drag them into the light and ensure Trump is surrounded by warriors who fight for YOU, not their egos. Last month, I exposed Dr. Janette Nesheiwat, Trump’s pick for Surgeon General, as a pro-vaccine globalist with a medical degree from a Caribbean school she hyped as elite. She wasn’t a patriot—she was a Big Pharma darling, ready to push propaganda for profit while being deceptive about her medical credentials. As a result of my investigation, President Trump heard me and yanked her nomination , saving us from an unqualified US Surgeon General. President Trump needs the best people—patriots who will be loyal to the America First agenda rather than fame. The Swamp is thick with these traitors, and with your support, I’m wading through it to protect Trump’s agenda. My work isn't cheap. I'm funding my travel—flights to DC, hotels, and databases to track the corrupt. The establishment wants me to be broke and silent, but I answer to you, not them. Thank you so much for all that you do. With Vigilance, Laura Loomer

## Trump's productive "vacation"...
Everybody loves a good vacation.
For the record, while the media loves to use vacation any time the president isn't in the White House, its a 24/7 job no matter where the president is physically.
But perhaps nobody enjoyed long trips quite to the level of Biden. There have been reports that he spent up to 40% of his time in office on vacation (well over a year total).
Of course, he was so MIA that his trips and vacations often weren't noticed.
But after just a few months of Trump's second term, we're seeing exactly how a president should handle international trips.
It's not just a welcome change, it's a masterclass in how to get results on the world stage.
And there's no better example of this kind of presidential productivity than Trump's recent trip to the Middle East
Let's break it down...

body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108244896/547320679/1173272649?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Walz_250523_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk3ZDJkOC1mZjM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTDrBscUonDwjLRCqYGOJ7VktTvgGSR4PVJHR3QbZZ8=) Team,

When Donald Trump took office in January, it was only a matter of hours before he and Elon Musk began wreaking havoc on the federal government—attacking Social Security, gutting critical programs, stripping away our fundamental rights, and imposing reckless tariffs that are driving up costs for families and small businesses.

And Republicans in Congress doing Trump’s dirty work? They’re nowhere to be found. Take Ohio for example, where I just held town halls with the Ohio Democratic Party... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108244898/547320682/1173272649?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Walz_250523_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk3ZDJkOC1mZjM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTDrBscUonDwjLRCqYGOJ7VktTvgGSR4PVJHR3QbZZ8=) Reports reveal that Ohioans have been unable to reach their GOP senators. Calls are going unanswered. Voicemail boxes are full. **Republicans think that if they hide from their constituents, they can’t be held accountable for the damage they’re doing to our nation.**

So when I was there, elevating Ohioans whose voices are being ignored, every single seat in the main room and the overflow space was packed— _two nights in a row._

And the message from Ohioans was heard loud and clear: **they’re fed up with Republican politicians who work for billionaires while leaving their own constituents behind.**

**They’re tired of being ignored and wondering if anyone in power actually cares.**

Look, I know it can feel impossible to find a silver lining these days. Yet, our sold-out town halls in Ohio are proof that we are not powerless. When we show up, listen, and fight, we can push back against Trump and Musk and stand up for the values we share.

[_**That’s why today, I’m asking if you can chip in to support the Ohio Democratic Party. Because after packing those rooms with folks tired of the Trump status-quo, Ohio Dems are jumping right back into their fight to give Democrats the resources they need to win next year so they can take back control of Congress and stand up against the GOP’s billionaire-first agenda. Can I count on you to donate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108244900/547320685/1173272649?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Walz_250523_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk3ZDJkOC1mZjM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTDrBscUonDwjLRCqYGOJ7VktTvgGSR4PVJHR3QbZZ8=) And the message from Ohioans was heard loud and clear: they’re fed up with Republican politicians who work for billionaires while leaving their own constituents behind. They’re tired of being ignored and wondering if anyone in power actually cares. Look, I know it can feel impossible to find a silver lining these days. Yet, our sold-out town halls in Ohio are proof that we are not powerless. When we show up, listen, and fight, we can push back against Trump and Musk and stand up for the values we share. = _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = I’m grateful, Tim Walz = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: Have a minute, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108245055/547321191/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZThlZDVkMi1mZjM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExOXjfNYFL6GWKkd4SZ4ykhihLrPOZMsaQ2fzKpfbIk=)
---
Hi Peter, I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself and explain why this fight is so important to me. | **[SKIP THE EXPLANATION: CHIP IN $3 TO SUPPORT RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108245058/547321196/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250523_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZThlZDVkMi1mZjM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExOXjfNYFL6GWKkd4SZ4ykhihLrPOZMsaQ2fzKpfbIk=)**
---
I’m a gay Afro-Latino man and a proud product of the Bronx, _born and bred._

I was raised by a single mother who kept my family afloat on a $4.25 minimum wage. I grew up in public housing ridden with mold, leaks, vermin, and without consistent heat or water.

I don’t have a college degree or the fancy connections that come with one.

**But Peter, what I lack in credentials, I make up for in lived experience.**

Peter, because of my upbringing, I know what it’s like to be left behind by political leaders who pledged to serve you.

I know what it’s like to fight with everything you’ve got to make your voice heard.

And I know what it’s like to have to hide who you are for fear of violence.

So in 2020, I ran for Congress to deliver real and meaningful change for the hardworking people of the Bronx – _**the people who raised me.**_

**We’ve achieved so much together, but there is still so much work to do.**

[That’s why I have to ask: Before our May deadline hits, will you chip in $3 to support this people-powered movement so I can continue fighting for you for years to come? We need to raise $25,000 this month through emails like this. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108245063/547321201/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250523_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZThlZDVkMi1mZjM3LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExOXjfNYFL6GWKkd4SZ4ykhihLrPOZMsaQ2fzKpfbIk=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | = Hi Peter, I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself and explain why this fight is so important to me. | = I’m a gay Afro-Latino man and a proud product of the Bronx, born and bred. I was raised by a single mother who kept my family afloat on a $4.25 minimum wage. I grew up in public housing ridden with mold, leaks, vermin, and without consistent heat or water. I don’t have a college degree or the fancy connections that come with one. But Peter, what I lack in credentials, I make up for in lived experience. Peter, because of my upbringing, I know what it’s like to be left behind by political leaders who pledged to serve you. I know what it’s like to fight with everything you’ve got to make your voice heard. And I know what it’s like to have to hide who you are for fear of violence. So in 2020, I ran for Congress to deliver real and meaningful change for the hardworking people of the Bronx – the people who raised me. We’ve achieved so much together, but there is still so much work to do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Why I’m riding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg)
Derek,
In just a few weeks, I’m participating in the AIDS/LifeCycle ride, and I’m hoping you’ll consider pitching in to support the San Francisco AIDS Foundation and the Los Angeles LGBT Center today.
**[You can chip in through my link here — 100% of the proceeds go toward these important organizations.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=4&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg)**
[DONATE 🚴♂️](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=5&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg)
---
Derek, I’ve done this ride before.
You may not know this, but I was the first member of Congress to participate in the ride back in 2014, and now, I’m going to be the first U.S. Senator to do the ride in early June. In 2014, I did the whole 540 mile ride, but with votes during the week of the ride, this year I will only be able to participate in the first 80 mile leg.
From San Francisco to Los Angeles, bikers from around the world ride through the beautiful California countryside for a worthwhile cause: supporting the LGBTQ+ community, helping young people experiencing homelessness, and taking a stand against the stigma of HIV.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=6&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg)
I’ve long championed the LGBTQ+ community — from participating in this bike ride to passing legislation to expand access to lifesaving HIV medications — I’m doing all I can to lift people up.
This cause is dear to me, as I’m following in the footsteps of my predecessor, the late Senator Dianne Feinstein, who was also a champion for LGBTQ+ Americans.
The first time I did this ride, it was deeply meaningful – and fun.
From so many of the other riders, I heard their stories, of loss, and of hope. Those they were riding in remembrance of, and those they were still fighting for.
It was one of the most moving weeks I’ve had as a public servant (in more ways than one). And I’m excited to do it again.
That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you chip in to support the LGBTQ+ organizations sponsoring this ride and help me raise funds and awareness for the LGBTQ+ community?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=7&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg)**
[DONATE 🚴♂️](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=8&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg)
---
Thank you — I’ll keep you posted on my ride!
— Adam
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---
Sign up to receive [fewer emails](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/em-fewer-emails/?t=9&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg) or [visit our store](https://store.adamschiff.com/). Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=8609%2E5257348%2EKeuLHg)

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5f6dc38-845f-4068-a526-afa7de68b212/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8672130a-71e3-40fb-a4d9-a6d808691e11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first — and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. [We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc12e82f2-f292-4e1d-b513-50ebbab57636/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat. [To ensure everyone who dares to speak truth to power is safe from political persecution, we must make as much noise and as big an impact as possible. Split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action and share this with your friends.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T177ac362-9409-49a8-9428-c6ead8ae2bcf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We're in this together, LaMonica

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:
The move is being made out of fear that Trump could have the U.S. Marshals conduct mass arrests of the judges in their protection with a single order - a fear only made possible because of Trump’s consistent attacks on our courts. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-1opXgubgqIRkxApwXRichBUnr-CtHXsxCo4uAlaKdUHIPgbKDk87pv2SmDldlFNn2Td0S2TvFiSv8l8uJbiBy-idykY-f2pHNPDFDoJZorcV7pcfCn92bMwCJ6F1WgqCbtDhcoi_Rl9F0sEVSwWCoHfrMQgwamstSES7EGn44Sz0OimT_BZpoRzRZFysmiRobcYnCJVuWJnhJOfrJdAGvYQvFXzozLNwLV2UQs4wShHP8rsE02rVKGfuFf1uMsHauvpPpYMaJ0-xevULcr9RLD__HPoS1xhEO9Ylf54dWIlzXv5eyCvarh99TSApR5XJQ/4gq/UBOAEbT2QOOwn91xi7W1GQ/h0/h001.UiywnxXs3G0_7jZ1kWnRTsT1al0utxN6Zgo-Hc4-hio)
---

Peter, Trump's war on judges has caused senate Democrats to take an _unprecedented_ action:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-1opXgubgqIRkxApwXRichDAX3IpIXhchFAKeAHm2EeeV4rSVanKiBg4jzfooCAYTIucsWJxYOxgt3sHtpUpvJ6f1B95szG0O5zxjyG5mq1aAkEQTBrSHQU6Xb2JC0i5T_EWMGdogUK2-YGR9ako3-0yKkf_ZfzL0DNzx903TQnGKRYKpkWV4OJNSoaTjh20VSSyX3fG73PHkfaKrIzUrXmsJVdo17UFsN7wuBbElkjkK4tLwyKlj5Mk_sv4zEnLV1xTQf-IPYZnH6OTxpa5kgBb0S6osM3PQDlIw_d4NNTzeVaFZWerUHxPTqqI7_h4yw/4gq/UBOAEbT2QOOwn91xi7W1GQ/h1/h001.F8CB4AbyQBkaNcPtNKODLYQnE_h1YerucpCTcWNyrdQ)
---
Yesterday, senate Democrats introduced a bill that would shift control of the U.S. Marshals Service from Trump's Justice Department to a new special board whose members include the Chief Justice of the United States and other members of the Judicial Conference, a committee made up of judges.
**The move is being made out of fear that Trump could have the U.S. Marshals conduct mass arrests of the judges in their protection with a single order** \- _a fear only made possible because of Trump and MAGA 's consistent attacks on our courts in this second rendition of his fascist regime._
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-1opXgubgqIRkxApwXRichBxWJnmN8Qp877KpRTnrOuiDeqY1lTsxoqVDHAYIZPnZ_KyIVqQltjp4Dm78oHZyw1bGBkexGNtn2QQgIKJZFw1wD6ounqMk7gVtqlu94C5TKsRYrqBh3Z_OeGxQe6BgeHj3wtUJmUAy6XjMwa6Y3G2P2cxacg7C5uk5xztUKq6U2dWru9DhYK_DHviUCt-ZYj1juELeDd4x4v3d99r4YEcyj3PrlxejhHIUsV7qe7ykdBFvy4hiAZVTi-KNZp1WYSmFYwPneF7emjT3v3wZcNbRqu3OGNJZAkhd8HG8QDXHg/4gq/UBOAEbT2QOOwn91xi7W1GQ/h2/h001.GAbyrFjS0OjZhlr6PI8dgeFXf4SluNHX9xreKNhKSMw)
---
_This shouldn 't happen in America_. Our founding fathers designed our federal government to have co-equal branches of government and checks & balances to prevent things like this from ever happening. **But under Trump, our constitution is being torn to shreds as he arrests political opponents & judges, defies court orders, and has made moves to strip the American people of their constitutionally protected rights of speech and assembly.** It should be no surprise then that Trump is taking his war on judges to the state where the constitution was drafted -_Pennsylvania_. Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. **Their goal is to replace these judges with loyalists who will let Trump act as a dictator and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive - turning it deep red.** [**Defend Our Courts is launching a counter attack in Trump 's war. PA law limits the ability of state Supreme Court justices to campaign - so we are stepping up in their stead. Can you chip in whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts & protect Pennsylvania's Supreme Court majority?**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-1opXgubgqIRkxApwXRichA7tBPRpz6toSCOWUONN9CjGRSUkWYmKrGKAIIDIbUzZiL-CsyZETAbPON1FaFfzME_ibS40uy2SsZhffabBu-kue2Hov2eU77C9FyNhwALEpCCW-_Ghpr_Gl-8XcQwgqecoWLArK_A1JDjS9j1tiwACEeOD8xTvxZX0tA4B-cwgkQ9j6g3ET7Xg4Docsnpb74lj6sI8ZRHQCly5ZA2YceSTcZJuJ6Z6rlMKhyIxK5Gtb3oy8FBranZpc3uZxFvWyuoo2nh-bc_819JAggKj6ujmY3hBET-8VfQNLtXHzCAtQ/4gq/UBOAEbT2QOOwn91xi7W1GQ/h3/h001.emR2sNB9w-ZrLbZWaNhlMKU7nTB7g1WGnsQ3Mjqji8g)

clean_body: The move is being made out of fear that Trump could have the U.S. Marshals conduct mass arrests of the judges in their protection with a single order - a fear only made possible because of Trump’s consistent attacks on our courts. | | Peter, Trump's war on judges has caused senate Democrats to take an unprecedented action: | Yesterday, senate Democrats introduced a bill that would shift control of the U.S. Marshals Service from Trump's Justice Department to a new special board whose members include the Chief Justice of the United States and other members of the Judicial Conference, a committee made up of judges. The move is being made out of fear that Trump could have the U.S. Marshals conduct mass arrests of the judges in their protection with a single order \- a fear only made possible because of Trump and MAGA 's consistent attacks on our courts in this second rendition of his fascist regime. | This shouldn 't happen in America. Our founding fathers designed our federal government to have co-equal branches of government and checks & balances to prevent things like this from ever happening. But under Trump, our constitution is being torn to shreds as he arrests political opponents & judges, defies court orders, and has made moves to strip the American people of their constitutionally protected rights of speech and assembly. It should be no surprise then that Trump is taking his war on judges to the state where the constitution was drafted -Pennsylvania. Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. Their goal is to replace these judges with loyalists who will let Trump act as a dictator and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive - turning it deep red. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, Team Defend Our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: I’m starting with nothing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0d86213e18b54fc8bbd5315c912462f1&_e=zmDI4oVZ2MF1X3d_g6_P9RPVd2sfZDNrHLRDn1Xfc7Aah-ePdGCpejcPjcn6R6DFMlh6_Sbwpxabj-F3Q6a4_3pcYQSVzDc63luovLzV1tu6-aXxW9n7YpKB3nPjHKn465tWlMlIhRJs5oR-hCgAOp9nrSWJTdba2p-CUlvbFC_gvzf-V4zB97Ab9eNGj4Kv1orijuH-AhChN2kepHNSsTBFNgdoCiyWFgs6ZPs1dD4P6CJ68E47qScGMDZOSJn-AsoAK_JIapEcCVDnfvI-dhMg6folx-pFu7HUk1k-rEuDqG7j2IuwpheywFkHO3W0j3IHdBm-Snuxs6zZgNkYDmOM_PWUvFX6W0eP5geXst9ZbBuytF-J-zLSesb6pP9RWthgwXO-PetshrIlx39ZXi6NYCllnrTImddf0jfp772_hWXbLWmtxz81BwYdOhsn)

---

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0d86213e18b54fc8bbd5315c912462f1&_e=zmDI4oVZ2MF1X3d_g6_P9RPVd2sfZDNrHLRDn1Xfc7Aah-ePdGCpejcPjcn6R6DFMlh6_Sbwpxabj-F3Q6a4_3pcYQSVzDc63luovLzV1tu6-aXxW9n7YpKB3nPjHKn465tWlMlIhRJs5oR-hCgAOp9nrSWJTdba2p-CUlvbFC_gvzf-V4zB97Ab9eNGj4Kv1orijuH-AhChN2kepHNSsTBFNgdoCiyWFgs6ZPs1dD4P6CJ68E47qScGMDZOSJn-AsoAK_JIapEcCVDnfvI-dmIGvvHuu9PC1F__efXjejHpK30M-8RvUyG6HYGgeMjJfzah1uymcPg9hpBERrXxpHHQee74ZWlEJ85SECw5ObR-lFOjtnfH18mFhUWEh1AvHDa6Odndrl_jehHMil_GBPbPfmCkfDF4mAC1edxPudvbdtnZm4B7ompxhJ75JDCA)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0d86213e18b54fc8bbd5315c912462f1&_e=zmDI4oVZ2MF1X3d_g6_P9RPVd2sfZDNrHLRDn1Xfc7Aah-ePdGCpejcPjcn6R6DFMlh6_Sbwpxabj-F3Q6a4_3pcYQSVzDc63luovLzV1tu6-aXxW9n7YpKB3nPjHKn465tWlMlIhRJs5oR-hCgAOp9nrSWJTdba2p-CUlvbFC_gvzf-V4zB97Ab9eNGj4Kv1orijuH-AhChN2kepHNSsTBFNgdoCiyWFgs6ZPs1dD4P6CJ68E47qScGMDZOSJn-AsoAK_JIapEcCVDnfvI-djcIQTG9EkUeZwpEPXgnTEz6YRL11EVd7KpfAGwcdSfTMB7hm1Rx6s9gy_PtZiy9Lpu7QAfzhTkULB7aod9evurg8apKw2r_dTLeipXD-3UjImbAQo3-OLmyLO77EA-pTfGWZ0srDlMJaEMOA0DN-eWMCywnl_oZWG0mjvbDKIem)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0d86213e18b54fc8bbd5315c912462f1&_e=zmDI4oVZ2MF1X3d_g6_P9RPVd2sfZDNrHLRDn1Xfc7Aah-ePdGCpejcPjcn6R6DFMlh6_Sbwpxabj-F3Q6a4_3pcYQSVzDc63luovLzV1tu6-aXxW9n7YpKB3nPjHKn465tWlMlIhRJs5oR-hCgAOp9nrSWJTdba2p-CUlvbFC_gvzf-V4zB97Ab9eNGj4Kv1orijuH-AhChN2kepHNSsTBFNgdoCiyWFgs6ZPs1dD4P6CJ68E47qScGMDZOSJn-AsoAK_JIapEcCVDnfvI-dnizX-UWYuq2dimRZOSiTgexIzetnyCPx5i-GJ_92LN35UpbA6u8ykONI3o0D4LsvEZOK_bhMCXl3BQeNtkObh5nLOj5MMur72vmmfpS2MnbiiTOtxCfQqTMsrr0lFtvIa7dagTiBY0wtgvKvSoY-A5o4tR7Mi3S5CPIVGq0JDYA)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. name: Team TOP PAC
subject: Keeping Elon out of Washington for good
body:
Texas Organizing Project's aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=QIiRkWvUkk4sDlO48GXRag6Uj7MsefzKmVOUHmuXXRqNDW4aq0TKU36QCzd5kWSm%2BlVLh73ApesUGlm8ahOWUw6AwRFYv3LXTAihbA23mwkGSzc8AUYSS8GV7ftFhBUs3ez54ed%2Fl0jt87hqewweyckcUQdwa%2FNVCdmFCQJjLNgobx3W54VN3m8%2BZITH89IBVO4bWYVg9r65GhBP4V0B2pfdIAWnX%2FF0EiAsW2OsqJ9bdNbG1UUFMTmf0IWMFcQhozSdvECwrZBga5HpedammwSTgfIEW4l63fBRw0nz7dUmKZUuwRLx3LE70l43cgyuXhz6R4AaxlBQt1V63uVlzblTjorysFLn9YLKNOHYK31YGVMZc7SLsgE%2Fx3R34GnIqpPH73sKjgBEqsjDXYnt3L2jgxzGCFydM1RVoJKD7Hw%3D]

"Elon Musk says he will step back from politics and government"

Peter, Elon Musk says he’s stepping back from politics. He says, "I think I’ve done enough," and you know what? We couldn’t agree more. Good riddance!

His decision shows that the message we’re sending matters. As the people, we have the power to fight back and protect our country from slipping into an oligarchy where only billionaires can succeed. Will you sign on to our petition now to keep Elon out of politics for good? ↓ ↓ ↓

ADD YOUR NAME » https://secure.everyaction.com/b5sXTvaEokmFcIXpVl82FQ2?refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_052325_ELON_30DO_D1_S1

Under his oversight – as a completely unelected official – thousands of jobs were lost, the clock was rolled back on environmental research and protections, and Medicaid and Social Security were jeopardized.

So, hearing he’s finally stepping back is like music to our ears. Will you help us send the message that we’re happy to see him go and we DON’T want him back?

ADD YOUR NAME » https://secure.everyaction.com/b5sXTvaEokmFcIXpVl82FQ2?refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_052325_ELON_30DO_D1_S1

Bye, Elon! You won’t be missed.

– Team TOP PAC

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: A breaking news report suggests AIPAC is targeting me again.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bring it on.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1649%2E791427%2EwKWxyJ)

Here we go again.
New reporting indicates that AIPAC is looking to recruit another challenger against me.
Well, I say bring it on. Our movement has defeated them before, and if you have my back, we will again.
**[So I’m personally asking you to stand with our movement today by making a $5 donation or any amount you can spare to my re-election. It will send a loud and clear message that we’re ready for whatever they throw at us.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250523-2-180&t=2&akid=1649%2E791427%2EwKWxyJ)
A new, anonymous poll is being pushed around in my district, and the reporting says the poll “has the hallmarks of the American Israel Public Affairs Committee’s strategy.”
Their poll names a specific potential challenger, and then it runs through a gauntlet of the same tired, false attacks from last time.
But we already know that they will have Trump’s billionaire backers and right-wing corporate interests ready to fund these attacks on me.
They will spend obscene amounts of money to try to oust me and silence our movement.
AIPAC spent more than $100 million on primaries last cycle, so we have to make sure we have the resources to compete. So I have to ask:
**[Will you please consider making a donation to my re-election today? If you believe my voice and leadership in Congress matter, I need you in this fight with me. Any amount will help because it all adds up when we each give just a bit.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250523-2-180&t=3&akid=1649%2E791427%2EwKWxyJ)

clean_body: Hi Peter, Let me walk you through the Republican playbook: | = | Hi Peter, Let me walk you through the Republican playbook: ✅ Tax cuts for billionaires ❌ Health care for working families Yep, seriously. House Republicans introduced a bill that slashes hundreds of billions from Medicaid, ripping health coverage away from millions of people. If this sounds cruel, it’s because it is. Working families are already stretched thin—paying more for food, gas, rent, and medicine. Meanwhile, GOP lawmakers are handing out more tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy and big corporations. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We should be expanding access to healthcare, not gutting it. name: Ryan Busse
subject: I’ve had enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I am working alongside GIFFORDS to hold the gun industry accountable and help save our country.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250523-1-no&t=1&akid=10464%2E3935704%2EWIKP78)
---
Team,
My name is Ryan Busse. For more than 25 years, I worked as a firearms executive who helped build one of the world’s most iconic gun companies.
When I first started, the gun industry was a different place. It was a place where people like me could still advocate for responsibility and decency.
But over time, I saw firsthand how the gun lobby changed. It gave up its values to stoke fear and extremism. The NRA entertained dangerous conspiracy theories — including attempts to undermine our democracy.
I had enough. Now, I am working alongside GIFFORDS to hold the gun industry accountable and help save our country.
[**Before I share more, can you make a donation to help GIFFORDS PAC continue their fight? Every donation has an impact.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250523-1-no&t=2&akid=10464%2E3935704%2EWIKP78)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250523-1-no&t=3&akid=10464%2E3935704%2EWIKP78)**
Growing up on a ranch, my dad taught me to shoot at a young age. He instilled in me both a love of shooting and a deep sense of responsibility. I still shoot and hunt with my own boys any chance I get and I believe in our rights.
The way I use guns hasn’t changed. What has changed is the NRA.
The NRA was founded to teach firearm safety and promote hunter education. It’s given all that up.
Now, it’s a tool for extremists to push their agenda and undermine even the most basic and common sense regulations like background checks. They spend millions of dollars every year lobbying lawmakers to bend to their will — even though a majority of gun-owning Americans support these same commonsense solutions.
This isn’t okay, and it doesn’t have to be this way.
**Since leaving the industry, I have joined forces with Gabby Giffords to continue our fight back against the radicalization of the gun lobby.**
GIFFORDS has worked to build a national coalition of grassroots supporters committed to advancing commonsense gun safety laws. And with your support, we can continue countering the NRA’s lies.
[**If you’re able, please contribute $10 or more to power GIFFORDS PAC’s work. Grassroots support makes a big difference in this work, and our fight cannot wait.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250523-1-no&t=4&akid=10464%2E3935704%2EWIKP78)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Sarah McBride
subject: trans-obsessed accounts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m pulling back the curtain on the Republican efforts to use vulnerable communities as pawns.
#
Hi, Sarah here.
The trans-obsessed accounts in my comments and mentions on social media are up. That must mean the GOP did something unpopular again.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250523-1?refcode=em20250523-2029&amount=5&refcode2=2029_21716_UWziWl&akid=2029%2E21716%2EUWziWl)
Whenever Republicans need someone to blame for their failed policies, they turn to bullying folks like me. It needs to end.
We need some real accountability for the suffering that Republicans are causing, and we need leaders who are willing to tackle the real issues, like lowering costs and protecting our freedoms.
[**We need to push back on the petty distractions and bullying – that’s why I’m pulling back the curtain on the Republican efforts to use vulnerable communities as pawns. Can I count on your support today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250523-1?refcode=em20250523-2029&amount=5&refcode2=2029_21716_UWziWl&akid=2029%2E21716%2EUWziWl)

Thank you,
Sarah McBride

clean_body: I’m pulling back the curtain on the Republican efforts to use vulnerable communities as pawns. Hi, Sarah here. The trans-obsessed accounts in my comments and mentions on social media are up. That must mean the GOP did something unpopular again. Whenever Republicans need someone to blame for their failed policies, they turn to bullying folks like me. It needs to end. We need some real accountability for the suffering that Republicans are causing, and we need leaders who are willing to tackle the real issues, like lowering costs and protecting our freedoms. Thank you, Sarah McBride

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: We need leadership that doesn't take the Heartland for granted.
body:
| |
---
Friend, my home community has never been the first place to attract real investments from Washington, but that never stopped our family from believing in this community’s potential. My parents didn't have a college education, and they never had much money. But they made a good life for us here, the same way so many Ohioans did: with hard work, perseverance, and the support of their community. **Unfortunately, that same American dream is out of reach for too many people in our Heartland today — and too many politicians in Washington take our communities for granted.** Instead of going to work for working families, Trump and his allies are rolling back the infrastructure investments that are rebuilding Northwest Ohio, and attacking the vital programs that Americans rely upon. They would rather pass tax breaks for billionaires than deliver for us. **[We deserve better, friend. Will you chip in to help us take back the House and deliver for Heartland communities like ours?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108247575/547329601/1039792322?refcode=250522_mk_granted_l1&ms=250522_mk_granted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTUzY2NiNS0wNTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYYgbV238shzzu-u3PU44Gu416U_zfKrz1dndFn07M=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108247582/547329608/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250522_mk_granted&ms=250522_mk_granted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTUzY2NiNS0wNTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYYgbV238shzzu-u3PU44Gu416U_zfKrz1dndFn07M=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108247583/547329609/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250522_mk_granted&ms=250522_mk_granted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTUzY2NiNS0wNTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYYgbV238shzzu-u3PU44Gu416U_zfKrz1dndFn07M=)

https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Let’s put this in medical terms.
When a patient crashes, we don’t ignore the signs—we assess the damage, trace the cause, and intervene fast.
Our democracy is sick, and Maxine is taking action to treat it.
She’s tracking the symptoms: MAGA extremists choking off the truth, gutting climate protections, and auctioning off public lands. They’re dismantling the systems that keep us safe—disaster response, clean air monitoring, and even access to care.
Together, we can fight back.
Maxine is working to call out corruption, stand up for our rights, and stabilize the institutions we all rely on.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Every Texas Republican in the House just cruelly voted to cut Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
We recently held 7 town halls in Congressional Districts represented by Republicans – from Amarillo and Wichita Falls to Garland and Fort Bend County.
Nobody at those meetings stood up and asked for their representative to take food away from kids, kick millions of families off their health care, jack up our costs, or close down more of our rural hospitals in the least insured state in the nation.
**Yet every Texas Republican in the House just cruelly voted to do so anyway** , and our senators are giddy to do the same.
Why? By hurting our neighbors and communities, they can once again give away our tax dollars to their billionaire donors, the wealthiest corporations, and Trump’s favorite oligarchs.
**What do we do about it? We fight back.** We organize everywhere, contest every race up and down the ballot, and do the work to win political power. Texas can help take back the House, flip the Senate, check Trump, and deliver a government that delivers for the people.
There are two actions you can take right now to fight back:
1. **[Sign up to volunteer with Powered by People.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65153?t=1&akid=240124%2E444211%2EzM4tYH) **If you’re in Texas or elsewhere, I hope you’ll get involved.
2. [**Chip in a few bucks to support our work.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250523.hwzSa8&refcode=ema20250523-240124&t=2&akid=240124%2E444211%2EzM4tYH) I’m a proud Powered by People volunteer—grassroots donations make our organizing work possible.

More soon,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250523-240124-footer&t=3&refcode2=240124_444211_zM4tYH&akid=240124%2E444211%2EzM4tYH)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240124%2E444211%2EzM4tYH), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=240124%2E444211%2EzM4tYH).

## **Feeding Billionaires While Starving Kids. The Republican Way**
There are many parts of the burnt-okra dunce's "Big Beautiful Bill,"--does he always have to talk like a chud who got pantsed in high school?--that are some of the most repressive, repulsive and un-American things I've ever seen. We'll get to authoritarian provisions in another piece. **Let 's talk about Republicans' forced starvation of kids.**
Because, if this doesn't make you determined to crawl through broken glass covered in lava, smelling like Steve Bannon on his off-month from showering to absolutely vote in every election to de-throne these scum-sucking psychopaths, I dunno what will. If this doesn't make you hate these pasty white panopticons into Satan's soul, I don't get you, and never will.
**KIDS.** Who when in fetal form Republicans champion like blow at a Madison Cawthorn party, or a White House screening of Birth of a Nation. But now these fetuses have become actual humans, so let God sort out their nutrition. Yeah?
Yes, House Republicans just voted to change SNAP benefits so only adults with kids under _seven_ --_**seven!!**_ --are exempt from SNAP work requirements. Let me break that down for you: **You have a 9-year old, so now you must work so your child can eat**. They're sick one day, can't go to school? Hope you read _Lord of the Flies_ , kid! Try to scavenge! Just imagine you're in _Fear of the Walking Dead_. This is any day your child is not in school, and if memory serves, we have this period of time known as "summer."
Question: Do you jackwad jabberwockies have no fucking souls? You spoiled, bitchy, brattish, delinquents who married into, were born into or insider traded into wealth (hi Marge!). Most families don't make millions in illicit meme coins or get $400 million jets as bribes. You heartless whores hand out duckets to creepy incellionaires like Elon, who you allowed to destroy our economy in a backroom when _not one of us voted for that venal Apartheid vampire_. But You Will Let Kids Starve??
**Nothing says "pro-life" like letting an eight-year-old go hungry while Jeff Bezos uses his latest tax break to buy a yacht for his yacht.** Then telling a single mom working two jobs that her 10-year-old doesn't deserve dinner because, well, General Dynamics needed another corporate loophole to bomb more shit? I don't know about you, **but I 'd sure let kids starve to death for a company whose description is this**:
> General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:[GD](https://substack.com/redirect/7d743a5c-0e04-404b-b067-2d2e1f8a9e50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) are [expecting](https://substack.com/redirect/5be7810c-8aa6-45a5-ba1c-e7a1b17c46be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the situation in Ukraine and Israel's war against Palestinian group Hamas to drive up revenue flow.
Republicans are gutting food for kids while handing _trillions_ in tax cuts to billionaire donors--many of whom already pay less taxes than the teacher who stocks granola bars for hungry students. This shit bill **isn 't just a fiscal atrocity--it's a moral crime.** Dickensian cruelty wrapped in a Newsmax chyron joyriding on RFK Jr.'s slippery brain-buddy. But, c'mon kid, bootstrap your way through malnutrition, anaemia, thyroid disfunction and cognitive impairment to a sweet hedge fund gig!
To Republicans, like fake "reasonable" Reps. Bryan Fitzpatrick, Don Bacon, Mike Lawler, Marianette (marionette?) Miller-Meeks, David Valadao, Mike Turner et al (**yes, we 'll be naming you constantly For-Ever** _)_ , I say this with all my heart & soul (_and a message to readers it 's an expression, violence is not the answer_): **Rot In Hell.**
* * *
🎥 **Missed yesterday 's "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter?" Don't worry! We clipped the best parts.**
Watch Cliff, David Schuster and guest Jonathan Larson tear into Trump's economic con job, the gutting of Medicare & Medicaid, and how Walmart got muscled into silence. It's equal parts outrageous, hilarious, and terrifying.

Well, Trump's already slow-walked compliance with courts, disputing words like "facilitate." This will put the onus on plaintiffs to have posted a bond, making court decisions _harder to enforce_. It's authoritarian to its core--like Trump. **The Frankenstein bill must be stopped**

Team, The GOP has spent the last few months attacking the programs and services that Americans depend on, like Medicaid. Their **dangerous** plan to radically slash Medicaid funding will leave countless people – especially children, working families, and people with disabilities – unable to afford lifesaving medical care! I made a commitment to the Delawareans to fight for their needs, which is why I have spent the past few months fighting tirelessly to keep Medicaid fully funded. **But Republicans aren’t giving up – _they’re pressing forward with their radical budget cuts that will gut healthcare access for millions_.** **[That’s why I need your help today, team. I am going to need major resources to continue taking on the GOP. subject: Your 3X-match to elect state Dems

body:
Every dollar you contribute could help flip key seats, protect hard-won victories, and pass meaningful legislation. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Since Trump took office, he’s dived headfirst into authoritarianism, deporting legal migrants without due process, blocking DEI initiatives, and slashing Medicaid funding – all while refusing to address rising costs and economic insecurity. **In state legislatures across the country, Democrats are taking action to fight back against Trump and stand up for working families.** |
* In Connecticut, Democrats introduced legislation to protect abortion providers.
* In Georgia, Democrats introduced legislation to expand Medicaid under the Affordable Care Act.
* In Illinois, Democrats fought to lower the cost of prescription drugs.
* In Maryland, Democrats reallocated state funds to federal workers affected by the Trump layoffs.
* In New Mexico, Democrats passed legislation to increase pay for teachers by $5,000.
* In Pennsylvania, House Democrats passed legislation to allow in-person early voting and expand ballot drop boxes.
* In Washington, Democrats passed legislation to require permits for firearm purchases.

**[Elect State Dems →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDJlBRz_PasGKn-5Y68umRbxhL8FxJImC-pdObYYTd-7-LzE_Cuv8cfzKYbRczwrD_2Jxo1c5jLEM0tx-Q_RDj2OnwpBUHhBrTTjnTcNHvigdzCCN3cbXKlRc4WwSHpCEdCbxhO5FqMybsci9mfah5FEEZUkw1sLUC6ndkWRWb2ldoEWKLpX9taEeeG-jW6oT4pkQ4rOw2BkNKFH8QoAZ8w-31nSDq-Xes55lk1MEGJiu0ooBP0ehWGTCTlYnUCgul260R8tINk6-SZvjFMeTOLL0Hhh0A-D0Nkhxg5YtnMXy381Blg3kMYcXgpLeMBpv2YvIsV5xLqaPCpyV4rNhOP7jz7ZJBPwxM_nTVUkZ_SvR9osMg9jmKnYa0ZhK38hGcuaUZ0Azfo45ObkgCLkf8wcs3-92igajQV-kksp0CR89aqzvMn9G4F5bsgRWTP5UCN-P_88zetugCoVCR5d83FT04B9ZrDepbXPTdXPgvhGfmKpAFA9w_ElYyfapGOovdx6mtZ97d7c-u8Wb3yhnYC20ZEL8FzRZuBSKp2fzg-1g/4gq/Hpud9G0nQwONFH4bXbPPsw/h0/h001.Bdea4zSPos9uQCUoZDiGmpnbaRAh47ZRDmZzcYb4REI)**

There’s so much more work to be done, but when we work together, nothing can stop us from electing state Democrats who will fight right-wing extremism and work to pass legislation to improve the lives of working families.
With Trump and his allies doubling down on their extremist agenda, the states are our last line of defense and our best opportunity for progress. **Every dollar you contribute could help flip key seats, protect hard-won majorities, and elect Democratic champions nationwide.**
[It’s clear that when state Democrats have power, they deliver.
