clean_body: Every dollar you contribute could help flip key seats, protect hard-won victories, and pass meaningful legislation. | | | | | ---|--- Since Trump took office, he’s dived headfirst into authoritarianism, deporting legal migrants without due process, blocking DEI initiatives, and slashing Medicaid funding – all while refusing to address rising costs and economic insecurity. In state legislatures across the country, Democrats are taking action to fight back against Trump and stand up for working families. | In Connecticut, Democrats introduced legislation to protect abortion providers. In Georgia, Democrats introduced legislation to expand Medicaid under the Affordable Care Act. In Illinois, Democrats fought to lower the cost of prescription drugs. In Maryland, Democrats reallocated state funds to federal workers affected by the Trump layoffs. In New Mexico, Democrats passed legislation to increase pay for teachers by $5,000. In Pennsylvania, House Democrats passed legislation to allow in-person early voting and expand ballot drop boxes. In Washington, Democrats passed legislation to require permits for firearm purchases. There’s so much more work to be done, but when we work together, nothing can stop us from electing state Democrats who will fight right-wing extremism and work to pass legislation to improve the lives of working families. With Trump and his allies doubling down on their extremist agenda, the states are our last line of defense and our best opportunity for progress. Every dollar you contribute could help flip key seats, protect hard-won majorities, and elect Democratic champions nationwide. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC ** | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108249978/547338007/-319689629?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRkNjkwNTAtMGIzOC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cMtVn8bF_sG9-q2rlHhVhJ_2wbERj7PqDvplD6m1vAw=) Friend, In the dead of the night, House Republicans pushed through huge cuts to healthcare to pay for giant new tax breaks for billionaires – keeping the process from the public because they don’t want anyone to see what’s actually in it. Take it from me: There’s so much to hate in the Republican “budget” bill – a complete gift to the ultra-wealthy that will cost millions of Americans their healthcare and force cuts to Medicaid and Medicare. Fewer doctors, higher premiums, and countless hospitals forced to shut their doors.**It is quite literally robbing from struggling families to line the pockets of the rich.** Simply put, under House Republicans seniors and hardworking Americans are being sold out — and we won’t forget it. Anger right now is valid, but we cannot give in to despair. And I will not let up. I voted no on this abomination, and I will keep fighting for you – to curb the worst far-right impulses, and build the blue wall to end this grift for the richest 1%. [**The best way to put a check on this Trump/GOP budget is to flip the House blue next November, and that starts with building a blue wall across California. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I won’t back down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=339%2E181023%2EXhDJVj)
Team,
Yesterday, Michigan House Republicans voted to hold me in contempt for refusing to give them access to sensitive information that could undermine the security of our elections.
The truth is that we’ve already given them thousands of documents. They want documents with details that could allow bad actors to tamper with voting machines or impersonate clerks.
**Let me be clear: This is no way to govern.**
Every day that House Republicans spend time playing political games like this — while the people of Michigan are struggling to pay for housing, child care, and basic needs — is an affront to the people they’re elected to serve.
**We need to put people over politics. Progress over partisanship.**
I’m tired of the cruelty and chaos in politics, and I’m running for governor to be a leader who rises above this.
[**Help me fight back. Pitch in today to my campaign to send a signal to these Michigan House Republicans that I won’t back down, and that you’re with me.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250523_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=339%2E181023%2EXhDJVj)

These House Republicans’ dangerous rhetoric will further inspire violence and conspiracies around our elections, harming the hardworking state and local election officials who are _just doing their jobs._
I will always fight for safe and secure elections, even in the face of these partisan attacks.
Thanks for standing with me,
Jocelyn Benson

clean_body: Team, Yesterday, Michigan House Republicans voted to hold me in contempt for refusing to give them access to sensitive information that could undermine the security of our elections. The truth is that we’ve already given them thousands of documents. They want documents with details that could allow bad actors to tamper with voting machines or impersonate clerks. Let me be clear: This is no way to govern. Every day that House Republicans spend time playing political games like this — while the people of Michigan are struggling to pay for housing, child care, and basic needs — is an affront to the people they’re elected to serve. We need to put people over politics. Progress over partisanship. I’m tired of the cruelty and chaos in politics, and I’m running for governor to be a leader who rises above this. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | These House Republicans’ dangerous rhetoric will further inspire violence and conspiracies around our elections, harming the hardworking state and local election officials who are just doing their jobs._ I will always fight for safe and secure elections, even in the face of these partisan attacks. Thanks for standing with me, Jocelyn Benson

name: David Hogg
subject: This is about more than opposing Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Our young leaders are laying the foundation for the future.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250523-1&t=1&akid=2172%2E587540%2ETl8bQw)
Peter, this movement is about more than opposing MAGA and Donald Trump.
This work is about electing the leaders we deserve who will fight for the future we all want to see. We’re putting new leaders in power who will not only defeat the GOP, they will lay the foundation for a brighter future for all of us.
🌎 Our leaders will fight for a resilient future that fully addresses the climate crisis.
🏫 Our leaders will do everything in their power to pass commonsense gun laws that will keep our schools, churches, and communities safe from mass shootings.
⚕️Our leaders will work to make high-quality health care a right, not a privilege.
💰 Our leaders will strive to bring down the sky-rocketing costs that are burdening folks across the country, from high grocery bills to the affordable housing crisis.
We’re supporting a new generation of leaders to bring real change to Congress and state legislatures to make sure the government actually works for the people.
**But we can only do this work with your continued grassroots support, Peter.**
**[Peter, our vision for the future is front and center in this fight. If you want to help us make that future happen, please pitch in $5 to support our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250523_1_future?refcode=em20250523-2172&amount=5&refcode2=2172_587540_Tl8bQw&akid=2172%2E587540%2ETl8bQw)**

David

name: With Honor Action
subject: Today, We Honor: A Memorial Day Tradition with the For Country Caucus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ac10340a16a4/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14052849?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=2d9db26a00&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=c84b642df5&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Friends,

Yesterday, With Honor Action joined a dozen bipartisan members of the For Country Caucus to clean the Vietnam Veterans Memorial. Together, we honored the 58,395 names etched into the wall—not just with words but by our actions.

Despite the rain and an all-nighter in the U.S. House of Representatives, Members gathered in the early hours to pay tribute, brushes in hand, shoulder to shoulder in quiet reflection and action. Each stroke across the black granite was a reminder: service doesn’t end when the uniform comes off. It continues through leadership, remembrance, and unity.

Today, only three Vietnam War veterans are still serving in Congress. Among them:
**Representative Jim Baird** , a former Vice Chair of the For Country Caucus
---
|
---
---
| **Representative Jack Bergman** , a member of the For Country Caucus
---
|
---
---
| This annual tradition is more than a tribute. It’s a testament to With Honor Action’s values: integrity, civility, and courage in public life. And it’s a reminder that honoring the fallen is a responsibility we share. You can click on the image below to hear Rep. Bergman's reflections on what this annual tradition means to him.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=88596b3e5c&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Before the Vietnam Veterans Memorial cleaning, we co-sponsored _wear blue: run to remember_ , a 2-mile PT run in remembrance of our fallen service members. The Secretary of the Army, Dan Driscoll, joined us, and the run included a stop at the future site of the Global War on Terrorism Memorial, a memorial that was made possible by the leadership of the For Country Caucus in the 117th Congress. You can click on the image below for an overview video of the entire day's events.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=87495b63fc&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Finally, For Country Caucus Co-Chair Rep. Don Davis and caucus member Rep. Zach Nunn sat down for an interview with CBS Face the Nation's Margaret Brennan at the wall cleaning. You can click on the image below to hear Margaret's preview of the interview this morning on Bloomberg Radio, and keep an eye out for the interview to air this Memorial Day weekend, including a segment on CBS Evening News tonight.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=e93e780372&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| We have put together a [social media toolkit](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=f8fefff2e6&e=33f53a5b1a) that you can use to share this weekend's moment of reflection with us in a small but meaningful way.

Thank you for supporting With Honor Action's mission to reduce polarization through principled veteran leadership in Congress, Washington D.C., and beyond. Please take a moment this Memorial Day weekend to remember and honor the sacrifices of our fallen service members.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=657ecc9db6&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | Please follow With Honor Action on Twitter via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=68ce16692b&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.
---
| | | | | | [](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=8c4a594f4d&e=33f53a5b1a)
---

Fellow American,

In just a short time, RFK Jr. has hit the ground running as Secretary of Health and Human Services--and Washington insiders are _panicking_.

While the media launches attacks, **RFK Jr. is delivering results:**
* Worked with President Trump to _slash prescription drug prices_
* Launched the _MAHA initiative_ to tackle the _chronic disease epidemic_
* Directed the CDC to study _potential links between vaccines and autism_
* _Banned eight artificial food dyes_ in medications and the national food supply
* Worked with Republican governors to _ban soda from the food stamp program_
* Proposed an initiative to _ban fluoride from drinking water_
* Ordered major _agency restructuring and budget cuts_
* Promoted a focus on _mental health, addiction, nutrition, and physical activity_ as pillars of the department's new priorities

The liberal media and Washington swamp are furious. But we know these are the changes America needs.

**[Do you approve of what RFK Jr. is doing, Fellow American? clean_body: Do you approve of RFK Jr.’s bold reforms? Fellow American, In just a short time, RFK Jr. has hit the ground running as Secretary of Health and Human Services--and Washington insiders are panicking. While the media launches attacks, RFK Jr. is delivering results: Worked with President Trump to slash prescription drug prices Launched the MAHA initiative to tackle the chronic disease epidemic Directed the CDC to study potential links between vaccines and autism Banned eight artificial food dyes in medications and the national food supply Worked with Republican governors to ban soda from the food stamp program Proposed an initiative to ban fluoride from drinking water Ordered major agency restructuring and budget cuts Promoted a focus on mental health, addiction, nutrition, and physical activity as pillars of the department's new priorities The liberal media and Washington swamp are furious. But we know these are the changes America needs. Do you approve of the job RFK Jr. is doing as HHS Secretary? | Your support is CRITICAL to keeping these reforms on track, so we need to know what you think. Paid for by Elect Common Sense. 53 South Jefferson Road, Suite L, Whippany, NJ 07981

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: The reason I’m doing this.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=277c35306f4c475cb0566a184e17950b&_e=hwIfCqXw33FmnUWb0GN-_Z0jEK2ufNL_HmfMSezby1CmzsjKYxSQmKfUBJ4GFMYjLPq_XCY3nXrUt7iR22MLYoA9kbn5XcY2eUHPCCyWXsH9TtTiBfSqUetFt0Ui-2OVjjrIAZ3PwLg5Se3LWyaDllj9fViZ_lGM1otBFnUHsMqRMRA4UqJCCvIstCWR-z3M6Fqk-l9R7HDrc9oCvqWdq8yAcGQpXHHqS86Rl9rciGRQ0YibhOqqC7vItxU6cjz19AhuCkOlc0Pyb8BNfzaKL6AdWa6s9Q0LhygqM5--WF7x-pKI52cABz00TKtdITLfPdpwodBZUVd4hhtDR4MVby69CP38BGM4qH3nH0ozSTeqBolQPzVqm3MKTOwNBqaR)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=277c35306f4c475cb0566a184e17950b&_e=hwIfCqXw33FmnUWb0GN-_Z0jEK2ufNL_HmfMSezby1CmzsjKYxSQmKfUBJ4GFMYjLPq_XCY3nXrUt7iR22MLYoA9kbn5XcY2eUHPCCyWXsH9TtTiBfSqUetFt0Ui-2OVjjrIAZ3PwLg5Se3LWyaDllj9fViZ_lGM1otBFnUHsMqRMRA4UqJCCvIstCWR-z3M6Fqk-l9R7HDrc9oCvqWdq8yAcGQpXHHqS86Rl9rciGT2MMfgiQaEvHUCQ-EmlQSD-qzEQSGOVjKYKkE6b8HdIVAp_Sk0L0Tq7T857EqTfzHbSpigdWxPsNXUtQhXOvm-itlHDyXsJuwUUncDoafuPPQr8WavyFx-2LwwUeAw2AVEwkTsqULuuM9LNTZRP9au)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=277c35306f4c475cb0566a184e17950b&_e=hwIfCqXw33FmnUWb0GN-_Z0jEK2ufNL_HmfMSezby1CmzsjKYxSQmKfUBJ4GFMYjLPq_XCY3nXrUt7iR22MLYoA9kbn5XcY2eUHPCCyWXsH9TtTiBfSqUetFt0Ui-2OVjjrIAZ3PwLg5Se3LWyaDllj9fViZ_lGM1otBFnUHsMqRMRA4UqJCCvIstCWR-z3M6Fqk-l9R7HDrc9oCvqWdq8yAcGQpXHHqS86Rl9rciGSPSQMe3tUJBWJPaD26GeDPwakb2kj4SIjLxvtV669aV4Vv-3khF1vcEqBUMRPAQt21sgmLhmCLLx6WDHEmC4JChKISPqnFXMrSXKNh_VFHPqi6F0bkIjRA_kcDvB35r6tNgeyouWCzerh3d592f46u)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=277c35306f4c475cb0566a184e17950b&_e=hwIfCqXw33FmnUWb0GN-_Z0jEK2ufNL_HmfMSezby1CmzsjKYxSQmKfUBJ4GFMYjLPq_XCY3nXrUt7iR22MLYoA9kbn5XcY2eUHPCCyWXsH9TtTiBfSqUetFt0Ui-2OVjjrIAZ3PwLg5Se3LWyaDllj9fViZ_lGM1otBFnUHsMqRMRA4UqJCCvIstCWR-z3M6Fqk-l9R7HDrc9oCvqWdq8yAcGQpXHHqS86Rl9rciGReu0lYWZ66PRoxAmY3w4mSiMmXWv_JRtx54Hm__iwPYAXBKyJwGwrc0XkPTKlxU1nkIPDX1dBj3mwGm7J5-Oql_yvPq98wf6ybZwym7aCQvwHESisHzgXmBF6mfLKrMDJJePYkVgujrlE09sLIBLgt)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=277c35306f4c475cb0566a184e17950b&_e=hwIfCqXw33FmnUWb0GN-_QwpPpA_CBe65vBNFC4EkwArg15ec_CBachwTGx-gnnefZmYaApRULaP6PqR2T4FCUeXxHA3dqPdN2ikPiCpnSdqU-ZVYqCZtrlnusy8tjY4AhFbjL6OF5VjKskzp0FCOusf42hWkZZ8Z7bmWquETytwXz6HdT7rwgkQxqez90erW45UmREqlpDafoRfo9o52l4_FUj4hgF9afBN6FDJM4E%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=277c35306f4c475cb0566a184e17950b&_e=hwIfCqXw33FmnUWb0GN-_Z0jEK2ufNL_HmfMSezby1CmzsjKYxSQmKfUBJ4GFMYjLPq_XCY3nXrUt7iR22MLYoA9kbn5XcY2eUHPCCyWXsH9TtTiBfSqUetFt0Ui-2OVjjrIAZ3PwLg5Se3LWyaDllj9fViZ_lGM1otBFnUHsMqRMRA4UqJCCvIstCWR-z3M6Fqk-l9R7HDrc9oCvqWdq8yAcGQpXHHqS86Rl9rciGT-9iANURwgbH5rV57IHt5AHKfjv-xs0KjtY5xYFOY0ZJ-oPFz6S3DQnUmta3enxhCEU4OjANPFJIzAyXeStJHymv3Ahp2J8zjPLBnutY-S2tzy-8Qpggh7wdjNdPiGbz3Yjtkd1ALIv1Z-ngPnXmvC)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** SUPPORT SENATOR GRAHAM **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=277c35306f4c475cb0566a184e17950b&_e=hwIfCqXw33FmnUWb0GN-_Z0jEK2ufNL_HmfMSezby1CmzsjKYxSQmKfUBJ4GFMYjLPq_XCY3nXrUt7iR22MLYoA9kbn5XcY2eUHPCCyWXsH9TtTiBfSqUetFt0Ui-2OVjjrIAZ3PwLg5Se3LWyaDllj9fViZ_lGM1otBFnUHsMqRMRA4UqJCCvIstCWR-z3M6Fqk-l9R7HDrc9oCvqWdq8yAcGQpXHHqS86Rl9rciGSV-Bhmf-F7W7oFmSl9OBV2j9vtitjpVcK3vwJZq7EljjpXTcvMUWyDn80_tIBr3BAIUJ5walOMVKlBUV9zDf5KKUQbaGmFl3BbJuVVcpUBTgqbgon9TIV-Hev8SBP20cWq2P0nwer9DiNXHtlVCpwr)

[** BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=277c35306f4c475cb0566a184e17950b&_e=hwIfCqXw33FmnUWb0GN-_Z0jEK2ufNL_HmfMSezby1CmzsjKYxSQmKfUBJ4GFMYjLPq_XCY3nXrUt7iR22MLYoA9kbn5XcY2eUHPCCyWXsH9TtTiBfSqUetFt0Ui-2OVjjrIAZ3PwLg5Se3LWyaDllj9fViZ_lGM1otBFnUHsMqRMRA4UqJCCvIstCWR-z3M6Fqk-l9R7HDrc9oCvqWdq9HSf0HcyueuvRdEuy9YyolwsAQf0ZYlGgu_8VRE9dZBA2lssQ8bpWAVYKPcgX5ayZp6P9QRE6nzlDTWNHLFrmwCMIoqWj6W9zSo-NCJkVzs-6Xj8lEEm2xICFnRfnNlV1MBuAZogTJ6Z3khWXJBsRVXWGA17DYF0xkInUwLOhJoMh7C3Kt0Uh-6NKe6u9wQmQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Three Weeks Away From Our 2025 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner = We’re less than a month away from our = We’re excited to invite you to join us for a night of celebration, connection, and classic Hoosier hospitality on Friday, June 13, 2025, at The Indiana Roof Ballroom , a historic landmark in downtown Indianapolis. = We’ll be announcing our 2025 Keynote Speaker very soon. Last year, we welcomed an incredible crowd of Democrats from every corner of Indiana – this year promises to be just as great! We can’t wait to see you there! 📅Event Details Date: Friday, June 13, 2025 Location: The Indiana Roof Ballroom 140 W Washington St, Indianapolis, IN 46204 Evening Schedule VIP Reception: 5:30 PM General Admission: 6:30 PM 🎟️Ticket Options🎟️ VIP Ticket (Reception + Dinner) – $500 General Admission (Dinner only) – $150 Every Indiana Republican Votes For Trump’s Big Bill Every Republican Congressman from Indiana voted for the Republican big stupid bill on Thursday morning, including Rep. Victoria Spartz, who said for weeks that she had concerns with the proposal. The bill only passed by one vote, 215-214. A ‘no’ vote by any of the Republican members would have stopped this bill from passing. This bill is a scam to the middle class and a hand out to the wealthy. It guts Medicaid by over $600 billion, and SNAP by over $300 million. According to data from the Kaiser Family Foundation, around will lose their healthcare coverage if this new law is passed by the Senate. Advocates are already sounding the alarm, warning of major impacts to Hoosier families. Hoosiers, let’s hold the Republicans accountable for this dangerous legislation and vote them out next November. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. U.S. Rep. Frank Mrvan reintroduced bipartisan legislation with Virginia Republican Jen Kiggans to support law enforcement personnel at the VA. Rep. Mrvan has been focused on veterans’ healthcare throughout his first three terms in Congress. He has authored and sponsored several pieces of legislation to help our veterans ensure they get the care they need, when they need it. People’s Town Hall Series We have more upcoming People’s Town Hall events! Sign up for our event in Fort Wayne in Early July! Muncie – Tuesday, July 8, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Allen County Public Library Theater, 900 Library Plz, Fort Wayne, IN 46802 Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects SOUTH SHORE LINE RATE INCREASE – NITCD is taking public comment until June 12 on a potential 10% rate increase for riders on their line. Public hearings will be on May 8 and June 12. NEWBURGH - Residents in Newburgh are encouraged to submit community input about an upcoming Parking Study. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, June 2nd from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Building Your Campaign Website. [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74177&L=35265&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9zdGFqdzRodENEND91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=de70014e5fa9eee2d89fa23952cef24968393abb11c532700c45fb702fa1a527)**
Dr. James A. Thorp is a board-certified obstetrician-gynecologist and maternal-fetal medicine specialist with over 44 years of clinical experience. A U.S. veteran and widely published physician, he has testified internationally, served as a journal peer reviewer, Board Member of the Society for Maternal-Fetal Medicine, and Examiner for the American Board of Obstetrics and Gynecology. He is the author of “Sacrifice: How the Deadliest Vaccine in History Targeted the Most Vulnerable.” Dr. Thorp also serves as the Chief of Maternal Medicine and Prenatal Medicine for the Wellness Company.

name: Tammy Baldwin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4730%2E35263%2E98jetH)
Peter, When _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, the Supreme Court turned back the clock and sent reproductive rights back in time. I was sad and angry, and just as so many of us did in the wake of this decision, I turned those emotions into action. I wrote and introduced the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ to protect those seeking abortions and those performing them. **I will continue to fight until every Wisconsinite can make their own healthcare decisions without government involvement.** But with abortion access in our state in legal limbo, Wisconsin Republicans see a major opportunity to lay the groundwork to attack reproductive rights even further. This was evident at last weekend’s Wisconsin GOP Convention, where Republican delegates approved a resolution supporting an 1849 abortion law that outlaws all abortions except when necessary to save a woman’s life. While this vote carries no authority, it is a clear warning of what is to come. The midterm elections present an opportunity for us to make progress — but also for Republicans to turn back the clock on reproductive rights. I’m not backing down from the challenges ahead. After all, I never gave up the fight to protect marriage equality and get the _Respect for Marriage Act_ passed into federal law. **[Progress IS possible when we work together, Peter. I’m fighting to re-establish our rights and support candidates who will do the same here in Wisconsin and across the country. I’m hoping you can join that fight with a grassroots donation today. Can you chip in?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-may25.qIHRRA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250523_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4730%2E35263%2E98jetH)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-may25.N_R_0O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250523_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4730%2E35263%2E98jetH)

name: Sam W. (Campaign Manager)
subject: I’ll tell you what Kat Abughazalehwon’t
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
Her biggest weakness? Asking for money
---
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/GMpZjnXfdvWP)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/RS8Jj8dChCai)
---
Hi Friend, this is Sam Weinberg, Kat Abughazaleh’s campaign manager. As you probably know, most of our campaign’s emails come from Kat but I just **_had to_** chime in briefly to tell you something kind of crazy: as a person my favorite thing about Kat is the thing that bugs me most about her as her campaign manager. It’s that she **_hates_** asking people for money. Personally, I think that’s a good quality. It means she’s considerate and thoughtful and generally non-imposing. But as her campaign manager, it annoys the hell out of me. So here’s the compromise Kat and I came up with... To stay competitive in this race, I set a goal of raising $600,000 this quarter (before July 1). But to get Kat on board, I told her that we can stop asking for money this quarter once we hit that goal _and donate every penny we raise beyond that to local charities._ If you’ve never heard a candidate say “Don’t give me any more money this quarter!”, here’s your chance. Kat doesn’t like asking, but I know that we have to: [**Chip in $32**](https://ka4il.us/l/0uGi77GTPT4d) (our average donation) or whatever you can afford to give to help us reach this goal. And once we hit that goal of $600,000 we promise to stop emailing you until the next fiscal quarter. If you want to know more about the weirdness behind these quarterly deadlines, Kat made an **[excellent video about it that you can watch here!](https://ka4il.us/l/xd7FrOG6QJOK)** And unlike other campaigns, we’re not going to tell you that the world will end if we don’t hit this goal. Personally, we’ll be fine. But it will make it harder to win — and that, of course, is our main goal. To hit that goal, we need to raise an average of $9,746.79 per day between now and July 1. As of today, we’re less than halfway there. Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/DYYp7PhwdQtD)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/sce8UiGm95w9)
---
_If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly._ | | | ******[DONATE $15](https://ka4il.us/l/pFMd6RastooX)**
---
********
| ******[DONATE $35](https://ka4il.us/l/OutFag860Grv)**
---
********
| | ******[DONATE $50](https://ka4il.us/l/wwtlGeIrMEZl)**
---
********
| ******[DONATE $100](https://ka4il.us/l/6t9ev6dB2M8A)**
---
********
| | ******[DONATE $250](https://ka4il.us/l/IbeA8HNXA0PT)**
---
********
| ******[Another amount](https://ka4il.us/l/db9yjCO5H5ov)**
---
********
Thank you so much for your contribution, Sam Weinberg Campaign Manager In solidarity, Kat Abughazaleh
---
|
---
Email is a really important way that grassroots campaigns can actually win: **we have power when we use technology to organize a large group of people.** We also understand that it can be overwhelming.

If you only want to receive the most important emails, click [here](https://ka4il.us/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&t=3jX2zgqrXGRA).

If you're really just sick of every email, click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/KJ6nJkVO5uEF) and you'll be unsubscribed!
---
| **_Democratic leaders are abandoning us._** Our District deserves a fighter in Congress — someone who shows her constituents every day that she is doing everything possible to stop the authoritarian takeover of the United States. Kat has fought fascists before as a citizen, union rep, and independent journalist. Now, she's going to do the same in Congress. **Let's win this together.** **[Chip in!](https://ka4il.us/l/hhUecuVHBt5H)**
---
| | Paid for by Kat for Illinois
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The budget the House passed yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If it becomes law, millions of people will lose their health care. Millions will lose food assistance that keeps their families from going hungry.
#

Team, by now you’ve likely heard that the Republican controlled House passed their budget bill yesterday.
If it becomes law, millions of people will lose their health care. Millions will lose food assistance that keeps their families from going hungry or broke.
But it goes further than that. Clean energy tax incentives are cancelled. That’s going to make it a lot harder for a ton of growing businesses, and American companies are going to have to scale back, lay off staff, or shut down altogether.
They even took a $200 tax off of gun silencers that has been on the books for 90 years. That’s going to make it harder for law enforcement to track down threats during the mass shootings that have become all too common over the last several years.
They’re making the wealthiest people in this country even richer, taking services from the folks working to make ends meet, and adding trillions and trillions of dollars to our national debt.
That budget goes to the Senate now, where I will do whatever I can to stop it. This is not over, and there is still a lot of time on the clock.
I need you with me, speaking out and doing what you can in your community. The only way we’ll keep this from passing is by building a national movement against it. We’ve got to show them how unpopular this bill is, and the price they’ll pay if they force it through.
Hope I can count on you.
As always, thanks for reading.
Mark

🚀 Wait! Before you go: 🧑🚀
[**If you can afford it, we are humbly asking you to make a donation to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1420?c0=mek-em-may25/.TsSx9N&refcode=em250523-1-550&t=1&akid=6074%2E6688874%2EFpbgRP) As Mark holds the line, it’s on us to defend him and make sure he has the resources he needs to fight back. Any amount helps, and it adds up fast when tons of us are chipping in together.
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25/.03Y6gu&refcode=em250523-1-550&t=2&akid=6074%2E6688874%2EFpbgRP)**
Thank you!

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6074%2E6688874%2EFpbgRP).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Fighting again for YOU!

| Peter,
---
I've fought battles most people would've walked away from. I will never stand down.
I have sacrificed years of my life running for office--not for power, not for praise--but because I know we believe in something bigger: the American Dream.
And I'm telling you now--I'm not tired. I'm not discouraged. I'm just getting started.
Las Vegas has been ignored, lied to, and sold out by the political class for too long. But Nevada didn't vote for more of the same. Nevada voted for change. Nevada voted for hope. Nevada voted for the American Dream.
Now, let's FIGHT together, once again!
[👉 Donate $25 and let's finish what we started.](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015HXQLLz7kIe8YoWiMjYHG1cUcbaeoPFEwWY9cqmnrSqFb7jKXg87cXuX1c23E90AVixxkJee3W7-9ktfifBQbuo7imWsZikhbYG2F_hK8Il8nlT133qe8TMWC1oit3fz5_nSoL320ejaWESJx5lDbrMwS3BoqpqshLLUS6nzpNmKNXnz8fJ0yevpOq1jYmykRZc2ZQ_RYiQ=&c=47ZJJOtOgKEV9c5bhyAX3oCH1QbMR7d9oBmmeZH-0Co0JXI2niSIBQ==&ch=PyWe_v-_6ob7AHXoyQ6B6V1T3_52Vqqf54FVXcMDwVSzqVlOnXwl1g==)
I'm Jim Marchant. I don't quit. I don't bow down. I will never stop fighting for Nevada.
✔️ I've stood up to the Radical Left and Uni-Party.
✔️ I've exposed corruption and rigged systems.
✔️ I've championed election integrity, economic freedom, and America First values.
⬆⬆⬆ This is why the Radical Left and Uni-Party Hates Me! ⬆⬆⬆
Please help me help President Trump implement his America First agenda!
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY! ➡️ Stand with me--let's take back our Country!](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015HXQLLz7kIe8YoWiMjYHG1cUcbaeoPFEwWY9cqmnrSqFb7jKXg87cXuX1c23E90AVixxkJee3W7-9ktfifBQbuo7imWsZikhbYG2F_hK8Il8nlT133qe8TMWC1oit3fz5_nSoL320ejaWESJx5lDbrMwS3BoqpqshLLUS6nzpNmKNXnz8fJ0yevpOq1jYmykFUja2xXkHwQ=&c=47ZJJOtOgKEV9c5bhyAX3oCH1QbMR7d9oBmmeZH-0Co0JXI2niSIBQ==&ch=PyWe_v-_6ob7AHXoyQ6B6V1T3_52Vqqf54FVXcMDwVSzqVlOnXwl1g==)
This race isn't about politics. It's about the future of Las Vegas families who believe hard work should count for prosperity. When we fight, we win. But I need you in this fight with me.
[➡️ Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can. ](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015HXQLLz7kIe8YoWiMjYHG1cUcbaeoPFEwWY9cqmnrSqFb7jKXg87cXuX1c23E90AVixxkJee3W7-9ktfifBQbuo7imWsZikhbYG2F_hK8Il8nlT133qe8TMWC1oit3fz5_nSoL320ejaWESJx5lDbrMwS3BoqpqshLLUS6nzpNmKNXnz8fJ0yevpOq1jYmykrYdUz023UUQ=&c=47ZJJOtOgKEV9c5bhyAX3oCH1QbMR7d9oBmmeZH-0Co0JXI2niSIBQ==&ch=PyWe_v-_6ob7AHXoyQ6B6V1T3_52Vqqf54FVXcMDwVSzqVlOnXwl1g==)

subject: Here’s the reality:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
#
Hi there, I wanted to reach out one last time before the weekend. We launched this campaign just last month – and the energy we’ve seen so far has been incredible. From day one, we’ve been building something real: a grassroots campaign powered by working people, and grounded in the values of the Central Valley. But here’s the reality:
* **CA-22 is one of the most competitive districts in the nation.** President Biden won here by double digits. Democrats outnumber Republicans. And national analysts just downgraded my opponent’s chances of holding this seat.

* **That’s why the attacks are already starting.** This month, a GOP dark money Super PAC – the American Action Network – announced it would begin spending in this district within the week to prop up my opponent David Valadao.

I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs – and I never will. That means we rely on people like you to power this campaign and respond when these kinds of attacks come our way. [**So please, I need your support right now. name: Team Bass
subject: Making sure you didn’t miss this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Karen Bass for Mayor 2026 (FPPC ID #1471359)
body:
|
---
Team — Earlier this month, Mayor Bass sent around our team’s official May Priorities Survey to hear what’s on your mind. Mayor Bass is more ready than ever to keep up her work to move L.A. forward and make life better for all Angelenos — and that’s why she wants to hear from you. **[Don’t miss your chance to make your voice heard! Fill out our survey now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108251342/547342767/-1178969950?refcode=AU_KRB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250523_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc5ODM5YS0xMDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJ7wtb4dGrUndaXdxjvEgW_P1y2nAXlyxIGYQXalLe4=&emci=c69d09f1-6837-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ea79839a-1038-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2429742)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108251348/547342777/-1178969950?refcode=AU_KRB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250523_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc5ODM5YS0xMDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJ7wtb4dGrUndaXdxjvEgW_P1y2nAXlyxIGYQXalLe4=&emci=c69d09f1-6837-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ea79839a-1038-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2429742)
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Karen Bass** <info@karenbass.com>
Date: Sat, May 10, 2025
Subject: What’s on your mind?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Hey there,
As the Mayor of Los Angeles, my highest priority is to move Los Angeles forward. I want to make sure our agenda is aligned with the needs of Angelenos — and that’s why I want to hear from you.
I’m fighting to protect our democratic values and build a city where everyone can thrive, but I need to know what your priorities are so that we can craft policies with working families in mind.

---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108251444/547343034/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE558_20250522_HoldVA_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTc5ODM5YS0xMDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tdq89aUnw-wLavIC_xVLqs3YwcGbHY6Md4cs4T6vJXc=) Peter, If you're wondering what's at stake in Virginia this year, the answer is: _everything._

But here's the good news — we've been here before. In November 2023, we defied the odds. Pundits didn't think we could succeed against political headwinds, but abortion rights were on the ballot, **_and we won_**.

We protected the Democratic majority in the Virginia Senate AND flipped the House, stopping Republican extremists from passing a devastating abortion ban. That happened because grassroots supporters like you, Peter, showed up when it mattered most.

Now, we need to do it again, and go even bigger. ****[**Will you donate now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women and protect abortion access in Virginia?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108251445/547343035/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE558_20250522_HoldVA_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTc5ODM5YS0xMDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tdq89aUnw-wLavIC_xVLqs3YwcGbHY6Md4cs4T6vJXc=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108251446/547343036/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE558_20250522_HoldVA_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTc5ODM5YS0xMDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tdq89aUnw-wLavIC_xVLqs3YwcGbHY6Md4cs4T6vJXc=)

On Election Day, in Virginia, we need to:
* Defend our razor-thin majorities in the House and Senate
* Elect a pro-choice Democratic lieutenant governor and attorney general
* Flip the governorship — and shut the door on MAGA extremism in Virginia

Virginia is the last Southern state without an abortion ban. If we lose ground this year, Republicans won't hesitate to tear away reproductive rights — not just in Virginia, but nationwide.

That's why EMILYs List is all-in. We're mobilizing to elect pro-choice champions like Abigail Spanberger for governor and EIGHT Democratic women running to flip Republican-held seats in the House of Delegates.

We've already proven what’s possible in Virginia when abortion is on the ballot. We can do it again.

clean_body: Democratic pro-choice women are at the heart of the fight for fundamental freedoms in the South. | = Peter, If you're wondering what's at stake in Virginia this year, the answer is: everything. But here's the good news — we've been here before. In November 2023, we defied the odds. Pundits didn't think we could succeed against political headwinds, but abortion rights were on the ballot, and we won. We protected the Democratic majority in the Virginia Senate AND flipped the House, stopping Republican extremists from passing a devastating abortion ban. That happened because grassroots supporters like you, Peter, showed up when it mattered most. Now, we need to do it again, and go even bigger. **= | = On Election Day, in Virginia, we need to: Defend our razor-thin majorities in the House and Senate Elect a pro-choice Democratic lieutenant governor and attorney general Flip the governorship — and shut the door on MAGA extremism in Virginia Virginia is the last Southern state without an abortion ban. If we lose ground this year, Republicans won't hesitate to tear away reproductive rights — not just in Virginia, but nationwide. That's why EMILYs List is all-in. We're mobilizing to elect pro-choice champions like Abigail Spanberger for governor and EIGHT Democratic women running to flip Republican-held seats in the House of Delegates. We've already proven what’s possible in Virginia when abortion is on the ballot. We can do it again. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Interim Vice President of State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. clean_body: In the dead of night... | = | Hi there, In the dead of night, Congressional Republicans passed Donald Trump’s budget by a single vote. That one vote? It will strip healthcare from 13.7 million Americans — just to shower more tax breaks on the ultra-wealthy and Trump’s biggest donors. And the worst part? Four swing seat Republican Congressmembers from California voted for it. Reps. David Valadao, Young Kim, Ken Calvert, and Kevin Kiley. These are the same Republicans who’ve spent all year dodging their constituents and hiding from accountability. They have long pretended to be “moderate” or “reasonable” but now they’ve shown their true colors. = = = = = = Let’s be crystal clear: — Trump’s budget slashes Medicaid and ACA subsidies; — It makes it harder for working families to see a doctor or afford lifesaving prescriptions; — And it funnels billions to the richest of the rich — including GOP megadonors like Elon Musk. Any *ONE of these California Republicans could’ve stopped this. But they didn’t. Once again, they cow-towed to Donald Trump and sold out their constituents. We cannot let this stand. California is home to some of the most competitive House races in the country — and we only need to flip a handful of seats to fire Speaker Mike Johnson and take back the Democratic Majority. But to do it, we need to fund organizers, open regional offices, and get the truth out to every voter about this outrageous betrayal. = = Let’s send a message so loud they can hear it in Washington: You betray our healthcare, you lose your seat. \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to .** | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: A multiracial, working-class movement
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250523-1364-foote&t=1001&akid=1364%2E342411%2Egzy6ou ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Donald Trump’s game plan is clear: Divide us by race, gender, and class to
weaken our power and seize control.

But we can’t let him win. If he succeeds, millions could lose their health
insurance, climate progress could be erased, and immigrant communities
will face even more racist attacks. The stakes are simply too high.

What matters right now is how we respond. Our country is at an inflection
point – and the Squad is committed to fighting for a better future. While
Trump and the far-right try to make us feel small and powerless, we’ll
build a multiracial, working-class movement so powerful it can’t be
ignored.

Our strength lies in our unity. From day one, the Squad has fought to lift
up working families of every race and background. While Trump pushes
fascism and white supremacy, the Squad is in the halls of power fighting
for policies that protect and empower working people everywhere.

But they can’t do this alone. Our Squad needs a grassroots team to fuel
their fight, keep them in Congress, and continue building this inclusive
movement.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250523-movement.YwS3ln&refcode=em20250523-1364&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1364%2E342411%2Egzy6ou ]Can you pitch in any amount that makes sense today to help us grow our
movement to defeat Trump's divisive agenda?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250523-movement.YwS3ln&refcode=em20250523-1364&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1364%2E342411%2Egzy6ou ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Troy Downing
subject: URGENT: "Mega-Cartel" Threatens U.S. National Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
A new cartel superpower is forming near our border, and our safety is on the line.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUyM19TTi1SUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NDUyMjktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MjNfU04tUlAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjQ1MjI5LTI4OTkifQ/u8zSBGC9mVLayjKs3HmP3Q) _**URGENT: "Mega-Cartel" Threatens U.S. National Security**_
* * *
Peter,
A catastrophic alliance between Mexico's two most violent cartels has formed just beyond our southern border. This unprecedented alliance threatens not only Mexico but also the security of the United States.
If left unchecked, this "Mega-Cartel" will exponentially expand its influence to America, fueled by greater access to guns, smuggling routes, and corrupt officials. Mexican law enforcement is on the brink of being overwhelmed, and the violence is poised to spill across our border.
These cartels brazenly defy both Mexican and U.S. authority, bringing ruin to American communities through increased narco-trafficking, violence, and exploitation of our porous border under the previous administration.
**However, President Trump has committed to confronting this threat head-on. He's taking the crucial step of designating these cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations, unlocking the resources needed to dismantle their networks. Time is running out, and we need your help to keep the pressure on.**
**We must take decisive action now:**
_– Fortify our border security_ _
_ _– Boost law enforcement funding_ _
_ _– Pass legislation to shred cartel operations_
But it all starts with completing President Trump’s border wall, Peter. [If you still believe in defending our border and building the wall, add your name now to demand its completion.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUyM19TTi1SUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NDUyMjktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MjNfU04tUlAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjQ1MjI5LTI4OTkifQ/5CR39AJ_ZMOZkuHwvQC0Sg) [ BUILD THE WALL
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUyM19TTi1SUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NDUyMjktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MjNfU04tUlAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjQ1MjI5LTI4OTkifQ/eQX0xJFI7dJY1YQy3dyTag) Every minute we delay strengthens these narco-terrorist organizations. The stakes are too high to ignore.
Thank you for your immediate response.
**Troy Downing** U.S. Congressman, Montana’s Second District Combat Veteran | America First Conservative | | |

name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: A Cabin Rescue, Superhero Washers, and a Fetching Chicken
body:
What began as a quick three-day solo camping trip turned into a 24-day [journey of survival](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAURb9GOwwe8KEFxTR2b9opDeJBz70IN4Aa_37iZP7gdSvZyc7e68_39G3IU1h_mx21W91UXJwCXtljKZgmY81MIWG2B-bjg2nDFC-Ttwk4dIx3DMS0GPL31NWLdoiAokbdKtlz0cLQ1ZtWFmBWreSzncE5N_SAFlrupFBq-JI16aeNdyCAt7KDZkG5qK4Xg5uVE2quJMeFSkzNK1IoGzp_xxNTY-Nee72V8smV-FXBWMF4XVcTZvu8ePIKxgcrGI_M_tNGb0xsp5wprEywC_Gd2YLFkM8sH-mk03j2ikcKeLNCzplws-xNiYElGwxwBUNfJ718LvKe8peqJF93Q_7fqPJjm6eGvwEAAP___PqNRw) for Tiffany Slaton, who went missing for weeks in California's Sierra Nevada mountains. Injured and without cell service, she survived on wild leeks, melted snow, and daily journaling to stay sane.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAUheHV2F0suICxC4rXpMtrp0QYLobRjbGAJMruR5ktTHHK8xX_183eXKZ87P_dHU3co-2x2ANfjbB3rNZ5t-WjYvMPbI8Ta8JaXq4lCwzUhakLCBtcprdVYzAREVCMaLiWCxMcVjUmA1zHuGj0TPp1mUGuEZT3HJdNcJy3MZuPxhQIYFwqmALKoNUi1rjpKPQ2SIYh91Kn75KPnjDSuzyxTr7cRzKp97MN4t8A1wGuZy18orJn7yiho54cdayH6_mJ7XMZ4PoZSAmzmsdqwvnKRLnNepBsv7tMv3L_c5KngZ8AAAD__5S8dvw) | |
# FRIDAY, MAY 23, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Ninety years young and still climbing. Utah's Henry Miles just celebrated his [90th birthday by hiking](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVssfIHYHhgqtdnSjlUnhM3FUBET8RGUPn3lvkLXc6Tf8P-8qqv2we_bu76htJtVxUa1Y8sBS8Gk9KoXvyfMa8Vc75gcpth0dgooiBMVJ2DKaB-eSnRGWkRA1qEcRj5RNsAsOicny2ZYz7NYhrMxnAnK9UQ5oNBU83XpvDw0KoABHbiA3iA3o5jYbJfRsnEhnKLxJab-O_q9OLThGR-Y-jXeuiBdKfdM2AuBC4FLa61_xlrqgsd_LLqsjrDLg7DXsX691Z8Pvp2mLklzbz4En88j4XS7aR_-yPLvFg8JvwEAAP__-190Gw) the Y Mountain Trail for the 4,000th time--and he's not slowing down. Read more below. It's the kind of dedication that makes you wonder: what's your version of the mountain? We're sponsored by [Logical Health Alternatives.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAUheHV2F0suICxC4rXpMtrp0QYLobRjbGAJMruR5ktTHHK8xX_183eXKZ87P_dHU3co-2x2ANfjbB3rNZ5t-WjYvMPbI8Ta8JaXq4lCwzUhakLCBtcprdVYzAREVCMaLiWCxMcVjUmA1zHuGj0TPp1mUGuEZT3HJdNcJy3MZuPxhQIYFwqmALKoNUi1rjpKPQ2SIYh91Kn75KPnjDSuzyxTr7cRzKp97MN4t8A1wGuZy18orJn7yiho54cdayH6_mJ7XMZ4PoZSAmzmsdqwvnKRLnNepBsv7tMv3L_c5KngZ8AAAD__5S8dvw) Be sure to check them out in today's edition.
|
---
## A Miracle Mountain Rescue
What began as a quick three-day solo camping trip turned into a 24-day [journey of survival](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAURb9GOwwe8KEFxTR2b9opDeJBz70IN4Aa_37iZP7gdSvZyc7e68_39G3IU1h_mx21W91UXJwCXtljKZgmY81MIWG2B-bjg2nDFC-Ttwk4dIx3DMS0GPL31NWLdoiAokbdKtlz0cLQ1ZtWFmBWreSzncE5N_SAFlrupFBq-JI16aeNdyCAt7KDZkG5qK4Xg5uVE2quJMeFSkzNK1IoGzp_xxNTY-Nee72V8smV-FXBWMF4XVcTZvu8ePIKxgcrGI_M_tNGb0xsp5wprEywC_Gd2YLFkM8sH-mk03j2ikcKeLNCzplws-xNiYElGwxwBUNfJ718LvKe8peqJF93Q_7fqPJjm6eGvwEAAP___PqNRw) for Tiffany Slaton, who went missing for weeks in California’s Sierra Nevada mountains. Injured and without cell service, she survived on wild leeks, melted snow, and daily journaling to stay sane. Slaton pressed on, guided at one point by her phone’s suggestion of a Starbucks 18 miles away. She eventually found a remote cabin left unlocked by Vermilion Valley Resort owner Christopher Gutierrez, who keeps it open in case stranded hikers need shelter. Inside, she found warmth and what she called “the best sleeping bag I had ever seen.” Gutierrez arrived at the cabin the next day—thanks to a newly plowed road—and found Slaton. Her rescue, just one day before her 28th birthday, is being hailed as a miracle by local officials. [Watch the press conference](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u8yAUQJ8Gb7HwBfwzMHwLW76lQ0cE5t6YlpgIiK28fZW-Qvejc6TzebVXF1Pcb__dHTXdyDbKdsezJmwNi3Wr83EvWNcn1ucDy4Yln65uFjioC1cXEDa4mF5WdUETIqDoUA-TnLkYYFHdpoOnBdSwSi9nEqhE8EgIkvthBCnGLuq3jSsQwAepoA8ow6RmsZCfSEyeSY4htlz6rxz3tiGlVz6w9Gu-d0lvrT0qE_8YGAbmPM-e3Io-5-83wMCYgnXPHxuWSMTAHDFgrgzMyNWogC_DtAjFZwamKzo8zphSrOPEJL_dXUy_nfbnQYeGnwAAAP__fM96BA).
## Retired Social Worker Offers Free Ear
Paul Jenkinson, a 70-year-old retired social worker from Nova Scotia, is crisscrossing Canada offering strangers a quiet, [judgment-free space to talk](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGOpCAUgOHT4E4DDyh1wWI27mq2syQoD30TCgxgmbp9p_sKfYH_T75_T_t0FCntf90LTdiDbSHbhHeN2BoW6za3UipYtwvrdWI5sOTb1cMCB91z3YO03lH8WN15ExABZYdGjGriUsCsu8N47aYHnx2AmkSYZg8zd16NkxBceKU6Mt81rkECF0rD4FH5UU9yDusY5LgyxdFTy2X4nym1A0P85DeWYcuvLpqjtbMy-YfBwmC573vY1m3YHIOlOE-ZweIqtcOdJ6bKYHnneKWGWPpItWGitPctX6UXw6il4qC7Yvx5U4xUHyNTfH85ij-79munt4GvAAAA___KXX2Y), free of charge. Armed with two chairs, a folding table, and a sign reading _"You are not alone. I will listen,"_ Jenkinson sets up in public spaces to hear stories from anyone willing to sit down. A former board member of the B.C. Association of Social Workers, Jenkinson draws on personal hardships—including the death of his daughter—to offer calm and empathy. There's no fee, no time limit, and no topic off-limits—just a man volunteering his time to connect. He funds his travels through donations and lives a nomadic lifestyle during the tour._"[I’m there as a fellow human to make connections,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGyozoQRL8GsqHwCBkcELzE2X3phtQgDaC9QuOSxlflv99if2HzrtPd59fX8kUhhrT_TyfP274tusmSuJbIqpwXcrSGlLm4N5f3i_PBWSqVY8EeLfQW0CyeQvwstvXzxoxsWp5v4zD15oYP2x7zzRDereHHOuLk2a54n1xvJufc6tyKbZgvWm_RYH8bLHaeBz_ayTy2ddzMuDZDzz6o5O63hKQHb_EjP5w7J2cb50P1VRrzX4PPBp-11m4X8deNxFolf3eS9wafeoQCJyWoIUaIoSgnUIGPvEEpfgOt8lag9NEjpB2qJAV3UN4ZCHw4GSh5CAWcnFdABQhUaoLElC9Og882z_51NYRyH5uh308K8e9S_WfFPzP-CQAA__9SJpZb)” _Jenkinson says.
## Reggie the Boxer to the Rescue
[A remarkable act of canine loyalty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OpCAYha9GOw28_GlBsY3dbLslQXkRNigTYDRz919mbuFrz0nOyfP8e5iHjSme-197oPa7N81nc-JdE7aGxdjNrvEsWLcX1tcTS8CSb1uDAQJiIGIAZpyN6W1E77RHBGQ9aqr4RBiFWfRBTysCkYq7lUo-b1IQTmFjTnHG5kmxPurPGhHAgFAuYHTInRITm_2qPFNrxwm62HIZ_-d4toA-vfOFZdzy0ScdWnvWjv3pYOlgue97fNuQ86ftYPngdLBc0WEeXN6Hai-sgz1zC1i-CZUwsVlKOoZ2pL5o97xjSrFK1XGyHzam71X7taNLw08AAAD__5Nte8Q) has people across Connecticut praising a dog named Reggie after home surveillance video captured him helping his housemate, a dog named Yogi, during a seizure. The footage shows Reggie, a boxer, nudging and rolling Yogi to help him breathe, [preventing him from aspirating,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpSAUx58GOwyC-FFQbGN3t93SIByEDYIBlNx5-ol3HmHa3zn5f_17rS_pvAv7X3mAMLtZi4lrgJo9lAJplUpuLiTI6oJ8nZAspFhltisllGPCMWWrls6_V95oYQAosAZEN_YTYR2deWOF6jeiOdN0nmc2D_2w6Q4mwifoukkNc-PEo0Y4ZZR0Paethl6PfGKz2UbDxg31BLQrMbX_owvFgvHveENqVTwaL2wpZ0bsD6ILokutta0l2OeI6PK0QXRRMQRQxamr_EBs5Q0B0eV2GiLWccdZ3pCxDLFYSB9SbcRV5ufXhR1ncF9XAnw4b2LSWMXr9ICzfD8WTRL6rM57l4cR9WQ_pPOfiOXX296CfgcAAP__nuiSdA) a serious risk for flat-faced breeds like French bulldogs. The dogs’ owner, Sarah McCardle, [shared the dramatic video on Facebook](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL8Gd1j4AsYuKNK4e25TWthcDAlrVsAavXx9tCvlC9KNRqPR0fn5tX2ZEMN1ruaB2p1uqy5tF7YSsVbMmznMHq6M5XhheT0xe8ypmeI3YCApkxT4Zk2I35vsrHaIgLxDPSgxMT7ALDuv-W4HCZILJaUbd8FwQmkBYRrneTpUF_T7jUngwAYhobcorJITn92uHFc7EQxtqCn3v1K4qkcXv9ONuT_So4va1_oshP8gsBBYWmu9MwfuKf1-DwgsK7aymhrStaZGYLmDxVT-BWrTSYu5sVBzpeoxf5rmE22mUG_ucJ20YPjzykhgGWYm5KTe-KNQMxBYuqzts4UYQxkVEex8mBA_dPW_td4a_gYAAP__ePGNaQ), where what initially appears to be play turns quickly into a life-threatening emergency. Yogi, who has suffered from seizures since he was a year old, was found unresponsive and turning blue by McCardle when she got home. Thanks to Reggie’s quick thinking, Yogi was rushed to the vet and stabilized. The story touched hearts online, and Reggie was rewarded with a steak dinner—and the title of true best friend.

clean_body: What began as a quick three-day solo camping trip turned into a 24-day for Tiffany Slaton, who went missing for weeks in California's Sierra Nevada mountains. Injured and without cell service, she survived on wild leeks, melted snow, and daily journaling to stay sane. | | | | | | FRIDAY, MAY 23, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Ninety years young and still climbing. Utah's Henry Miles just celebrated his the Y Mountain Trail for the 4,000th time--and he's not slowing down. Read more below. It's the kind of dedication that makes you wonder: what's your version of the mountain? We're sponsored by Be sure to check them out in today's edition. | A Miracle Mountain Rescue What began as a quick three-day solo camping trip turned into a 24-day for Tiffany Slaton, who went missing for weeks in California’s Sierra Nevada mountains. Injured and without cell service, she survived on wild leeks, melted snow, and daily journaling to stay sane. Slaton pressed on, guided at one point by her phone’s suggestion of a Starbucks 18 miles away. She eventually found a remote cabin left unlocked by Vermilion Valley Resort owner Christopher Gutierrez, who keeps it open in case stranded hikers need shelter. Inside, she found warmth and what she called “the best sleeping bag I had ever seen.” Gutierrez arrived at the cabin the next day—thanks to a newly plowed road—and found Slaton. Her rescue, just one day before her 28th birthday, is being hailed as a miracle by local officials. . Retired Social Worker Offers Free Ear Paul Jenkinson, a 70-year-old retired social worker from Nova Scotia, is crisscrossing Canada offering strangers a quiet, , free of charge. Armed with two chairs, a folding table, and a sign reading "You are not alone. I will listen," Jenkinson sets up in public spaces to hear stories from anyone willing to sit down. A former board member of the B.C. Association of Social Workers, Jenkinson draws on personal hardships—including the death of his daughter—to offer calm and empathy. There's no fee, no time limit, and no topic off-limits—just a man volunteering his time to connect. He funds his travels through donations and lives a nomadic lifestyle during the tour."” Jenkinson says. Reggie the Boxer to the Rescue has people across Connecticut praising a dog named Reggie after home surveillance video captured him helping his housemate, a dog named Yogi, during a seizure. The footage shows Reggie, a boxer, nudging and rolling Yogi to help him breathe, a serious risk for flat-faced breeds like French bulldogs. The dogs’ owner, Sarah McCardle, , where what initially appears to be play turns quickly into a life-threatening emergency. Yogi, who has suffered from seizures since he was a year old, was found unresponsive and turning blue by McCardle when she got home. Thanks to Reggie’s quick thinking, Yogi was rushed to the vet and stabilized. The story touched hearts online, and Reggie was rewarded with a steak dinner—and the title of true best friend. | Flying together with our sponsor In 1918, this was in every household in America. Valuable enough to get caught in the crossfire during both World Wars... And powerful enough to be studied by the founding members of a massive Big Pharma dynasty... There was nothing else like it on Earth. In fact, was on track to become a game-changer for fighting the cancer epidemic. But then it just... disappeared. To this day, it’s not being taught in medical schools—or prescribed in major US cancer centers. But the results of lab studies are impressive. () ➤ Henry Miles, a 90-year-old hiker from Utah, celebrated his milestone birthday with a familiar routine--trekking up the Y Mountain Trail, a 2.2-mile climb he's done roughly 4,000 times. clean_body: | | | Women make up just a third of the Virginia General Assembly. Mom, social worker, and union leader Elizabeth Guzman has a chance to flip a red seat blue in a nationally-watched, DLCC Spotlight race. Only one third of America’s 7,000 state legislators are women. Friend, we need your help to close the gap. The National Women’s Political Caucus Virginia, Her Bold Move, Vote Mama, Virginia’s List, and the Virginia National Organization of Women are UNITED behind Elizabeth Guzman to flip VA-HD22. Elizabeth’s opponent, Del. Ian Lovejoy, votes against reproductive rights, access to contraception, and paid sick leave. Pro-choice, pro-family champion and mom of 4 Elizabeth Guzman needs your help to win. Virginia’s 2025 elections will be an important bellwether before the 2026 and 2028 elections, and Elizabeth’s running in a seat Trump lost ... one of our top pickup opportunities nationwide. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Team Haley
subject: Guess who Nancy Pelosi just endorsed…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Stand with Nancy Pelosi by adding your name by midnight

| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2863?t=1&akid=169%2E49239%2EMa-UaP)
| | **BREAKING: Nancy Pelosi just officially endorsed Haley Stevens for Senate in Michigan!**
---
Nancy Pelosi agrees that Haley is THE Democrat who can keep Michigan blue, take back our Democratic Senate majority, and deliver the leadership our families deserve.
But experts are saying this race could decide Senate control, and _The Cook Political Report_ has ranked Michigan as a "Toss Up."

That means the full force of the GOP, Donald Trump, and his billionaire buddy Elon Musk will be coming after Haley as a TOP target for defeat – and she needs the biggest grassroots team possible to fight back.
**That's why we're looking for 25,000 grassroots supporters to join Nancy Pelosi in personally endorsing Haley Stevens before midnight tonight, and we're counting on YOU to be one of them.**
**[Take 30 seconds now to personally endorse Haley Stevens for Senate in Michigan before midnight tonight:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2864?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=169%2E49239%2EMa-UaP)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2864?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=169%2E49239%2EMa-UaP)
---
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2863?t=4&akid=169%2E49239%2EMa-UaP) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2863?t=5&akid=169%2E49239%2EMa-UaP)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Kevin Mullin
subject: Under the cover of darkness, Republicans make largest Medicaid cuts in American history.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We can’t let them get away with this.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinmullinforcongress/big-news-i-was-just-appointed-to-the-house-energy-commerce-committee-9133020?e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=4c6147edf4&e=292fde286a)
| Dear Peter,On Thursday night, Republicans brought their extreme budget to the House Floor under the cover of darkness. My Democratic colleagues and I debated this bill through the night and stood united in our opposition until after dawn.Ultimately, the bill passed by one vote. 215 Republicans supporting and 214 Democrats opposing. That’s 215 Republicans who voted for:
* Adding $3.8 trillion to America’s already ballooning national debt
* Ripping critical health care away from 13.7 million Americans with the largest Medicaid cut in American history
* Taking school lunches away from 18 million school children while increasing prices for American families

---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=2b73579975&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Even moderate Republicans in vulnerable swing seats - who [signed a letter](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=c99ead69d8&e=292fde286a) saying they wouldn't cut Medicaid - caved to Donald Trump’s pressure and supported this cruel legislation. Trump promised to lower prices when he got into office. But his policies are making life worse for working families and seniors. Trump’s tariffs are already raising prices on basic household goods. Now, his tax plan will make healthcare and groceries more expensive by slashing funding for Medicaid and food assistance. All so they can give massive tax breaks to the ultra wealthy.
The party that once stood for fiscal responsibility has abandoned their values and abandoned the American people. It is a one-two punch that will make life worse for working class communities across the nation.
---
| | | | | [DONATE TODAY](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=09b81d23f1&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | We must ensure these broken promises won't be forgotten at the ballot box in 2026. That’s why I’m asking for your support - so I can direct resources to Democratic House candidates who are challenging Republicans in critical swing districts.If you’re able to give today, please click the link below. Together, we can take back the House next year and protect Medicaid once and for all.Thank you,
Rep. Kevin MullinCongressman, CA-15
---

name: Jason Miyares
subject: I love this job — and I’m not done fighting.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Serving as your Attorney General has been the greatest honor of my life.| | | Friend, _**I love this job.**_

Serving as Attorney General has been _the greatest honor of my life._ Every day, I wake up with a mission: to protect Virginia families, defend our values, and ensure justice is real for every single citizen.
---
_**We’ve made serious progress:**_
* Virginia’s **murder rate is down** by 30%, and down 66% in Operation Ceasefire cities.
* Fentanyl deaths have **dropped 48%** because we treated it like the national security threat that it is.
* We’ve secured over **$1.2 billion to fight the opioid crisis** — the largest settlement in state history.

---
**_But now, that progress is under threat._**

**Jay Jones** and **Shannon Taylor** are trying to bring their soft-on-crime, defund-the-police, anti-parent politics back to the Attorney General’s office. _I won’t let that happen. Not on my watch._

If you believe in what we’ve built—and the future is worth fighting for— _**[_**I need you with me.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/nSFHx-NQ4Za2o3W4KkdS5jqvzXVaVNFx8xn2-JAsuNjIlqNNk262nRJrokwed9LlHpFAW4LDPmQs7TJc9MIp1MiHFnXcQLDF1AVUCMq8L-cel1hy12XKIN2lYHBsgeIskjw3oMQMfCTrA2HuOaiEtVvoq6keA8HMQwgnWBIryae7JazVFze1dyKWDTBmWviAu7KyRDAMsUD2VRQnMJd38T77jFgPsVCDbNb_tbiuGGoEereR0rdzpU-3d4QCAN6qLSQL2K9wL0q8gnLo3usF2ycDX54tTJTpy4n0sQxE1RGZoRcbZpPtWP2O-qGtwjawS-7HQnlVfTvyhZBKhGOi3rA3ljRt0_FfBr9uojvW6gfh4VwHZhyQOy_o3cU/3LZDy7smi4LjXKaRnEJ3JJ5OB7LwH3LT/9)**_

I am not running to make headlines. I am running to protect your kids, your community, and your freedom.

And with your support, _**we will win.**_
