name: Team Frost
subject: Team Frost Updates, Events, and a Note from Maxwell 💬
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL ALEJANDRO FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter,

Thanks for being part of Team Frost! You’re receiving this newsletter because you’re a key part of our people-powered movement. Here, we’ll share campaign updates, upcoming events, and ways you can stay involved and connected with Congressman Maxwell Frost and our team.
From hitting the doors to spreading the word online, your support makes everything we do possible.

Stay Tuned,
Team Frost

💬 Stay Connected: New Volunteer Signal Channel

We’ve launched a Signal Channel just for Team Frost volunteers! It’s a great space to connect, share updates, and stay in the loop.
Join here: Team Frost Signal Chat! [https://signal.group/#CjQKIEKC2HbKQsSPgo18peZHt_kugDkUtReM_pgADZ3bbxWLEhAQdtps8g5fXdp4pZWvU_eJ] (And don’t worry — no classified info, we promise 😉)

Support Our Movement

Everything we’re building—from year-round grassroots organizing to community events and town halls—is powered by people like you stepping up when it counts.
Your support helps us reach more voters, stay active between election cycles, and fight for bold, progressive change—both in Washington and right here at home.
If you believe in this movement and want to help drive the work ahead, please consider making a contribution today:

Make a contribution online here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mafnewsletter]

Location: Virtual

SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/nokings/event/785972/]

Voter Registration @ Facets of Freedom Juneteenth Festival

Time: 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM
Location: Provided upon RSVP
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/frostforcongress/event/792167/]

The ‘Trump honeymoon’ is over: Democrats continue town hall push in deep red districts [https://www.msnbc.com/the-weekend/watch/-trump-honeymoon-is-over-democrats-continue-town-hall-push-in-deep-red-districts-239310405802]
Today, Senator Chris Murphy (D-CT) and Representative Maxwell Frost (D-FL) continued their town hall push in Florida’s GOP-held 17th congressional district, the latest stop in their tour of deep red districts where Congress members are refusing to hold town halls with their constituents.
Read More [https://www.msnbc.com/the-weekend/watch/-trump-honeymoon-is-over-democrats-continue-town-hall-push-in-deep-red-districts-239310405802]

‘On the road’: Chris Murphy, Maxwell Frost, Nikki Fried rally Dems in Greg Steube’s district [https://floridapolitics.com/archives/737541-on-the-road-chris-murphy-maxwell-frost-nikki-fried-rally-dems-in-greg-steubes-district/]
The youngest member of Congress is showing his older colleagues how to punch back in the age of Trump.
Read More [https://www.google.com/url?q=https://floridapolitics.com/archives/737541-on-the-road-chris-murphy-maxwell-frost-nikki-fried-rally-dems-in-greg-steubes-district/&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1748031247165240&usg=AOvVaw2efWE6F7UJuQBflg7ob92s]

'Call This What It Is—Theft': Republicans Approve Largest Medicaid, SNAP Cuts in US History [https://www.commondreams.org/news/republicans-cut-medicaid]
"The people stealing from Americans are not folks with tattoos and hoodies—it's people wearing suits and ties and congressional pins, sitting in this Capitol right now," said Rep. Maxwell Frost.
Read More [https://www.commondreams.org/news/republicans-cut-medicaid]

Why Maxwell Frost Wants Democrats to “Get Caught Fighting” [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/05/maxwell-frost-democratic-opposition-doge-elon-musk-donald-trump/]
The youngest member of Congress is showing his older colleagues how to punch back in the age of Trump.
Read More [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/05/maxwell-frost-democratic-opposition-doge-elon-musk-donald-trump/]

'Why did the president lie to me?': Rep. Frost says Trump's voters are getting angry [https://www.msnbc.com/the-weeknight/watch/-why-did-the-president-lie-to-me-rep-frost-says-trump-s-voters-are-getting-angry-239041093796]
Democratic Rep. Maxwell Frost joins The Weeknight to break down Trump’s inconsistent trade policies – and how they’re hurting everyday Americans.
Read More [https://www.msnbc.com/the-weeknight/watch/-why-did-the-president-lie-to-me-rep-frost-says-trump-s-voters-are-getting-angry-239041093796]

Hey Peter,
This month, I hosted a Town Hall in Sarasota with Senator Chris Murphy. Their Congressman refused to hold a town hall, so over 800 people showed up to hear from us instead. It was incredible to see so many folks come together to fight for our democracy and demand answers.

I’ll tell you, going to someone else’s district and holding a town hall is kind of a disrespectful thing. But you know what’s even more disrespectful? Not meeting with your own constituents. We believe we’re in a moment where we can’t play politics as usual.

Meanwhile, back in Washington, House Republicans passed what Trump is calling the “One Big Beautiful Bill.” But let’s be clear about what it really is: a tax scam that makes life more expensive for working families while giving more breaks to billionaires and giant corporations.
Trump’s plan cuts over $600 billion from Medicaid and food assistance just to pay for more tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy. At a time when people are already struggling with the cost of groceries, rent, and healthcare, this will make life worse for millions of Americans.

That’s why I showed up on the Capitol steps in the pouring rain at 1 a.m. to stand with protestors and demand hands off our healthcare, hands off our food assistance, and hands off the communities we fight for every day. This fight isn’t over. And I’ll keep showing up whether it’s at 1 in the morning or in a district where their own member of Congress refuses to listen because people deserve better than this.
As we head into Memorial Day, we pause to honor and remember the brave service members who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. Their courage, service, and dedication to protecting our freedoms will never be forgotten. I’m thinking about how we honor their legacy by continuing the fight for our democracy.
This kind of energy is what powers our campaign, and we need all hands on deck. If you haven’t already, please sign up for a shift or come out to one of our upcoming events. Together, we’re building the people-powered campaign Central Florida deserves.
With love & gratitude,
Maxwell Frost

info@frostforcongress.com ✦ frostforcongress.com [frostforcongress.com]
PAID FOR BY MAXWELL ALEJANDRO FROST FOR CONGRESS
Maxwell Frost for Congress
PO Box 772671
Orlando, FL 32877-2671
United States

That’s why I showed up on the Capitol steps in the pouring rain at 1 a.m. to stand with protestors and demand hands off our healthcare, hands off our food assistance, and hands off the communities we fight for every day. This fight isn’t over. And I’ll keep showing up whether it’s at 1 in the morning or in a district where their own member of Congress refuses to listen because people deserve better than this. As we head into Memorial Day, we pause to honor and remember the brave service members who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. Their courage, service, and dedication to protecting our freedoms will never be forgotten. I’m thinking about how we honor their legacy by continuing the fight for our democracy. This kind of energy is what powers our campaign, and we need all hands on deck. If you haven’t already, please sign up for a shift or come out to one of our upcoming events. Together, we’re building the people-powered campaign Central Florida deserves. With love & gratitude, Maxwell Frost info@frostforcongress.com ✦ frostforcongress.com [frostforcongress.com] PAID FOR BY MAXWELL ALEJANDRO FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

I won't beat around the bush - I know you're busy.

_**We're about to miss our most important deadline to date. Apparently, we're only a few hundred bucks away**_ _**from meeting our goal, but it looks like we're going to come up short. **_

name: Katie Porter
subject: This is what a grassroots movement looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39752%2E3422442%2EsW01Ho)
Derek,
This week, I joined the Canyon Democrats in Orange County for their largest meeting ever. Take a look 👇
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250523_2_ak?refcode=em20250523-39752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39752_3422442_sW01Ho&akid=39752%2E3422442%2EsW01Ho)
**I’m so grateful for the over 600 people who showed up to the event to hear about my campaign for governor and my vision for California.** It was truly energizing, and made me think back to the 2018 election cycle, when I was a member of Canyon Dems who was running in a tough race to flip a Republican congressional seat blue. **There were just about 30 people in the room back then, but we got to work, and we flipped that seat blue—helping give Democrats the House majority.**
This is what democracy and growing a movement looks like.
There’s no substitute for being in direct contact with voters. Especially in a big state like California, where we have millions of votes to win, it’s important to me that my campaign is intentional about creating opportunities for voters to hear from me and for me to learn from them. I can’t knock on every voter’s door, but that’s not an excuse to skip out on these kinds of personal conversations.
I have never been the type of candidate who spends all my time at receptions and high-dollar fundraisers, because that’s not how I show people that they can trust me to do the job of representing them.
From my three competitive Congressional races to now, every campaign I’ve ever run has been 100% grassroots powered, right down to how I fundraise—rejecting donations from corporations, lobbyists, and Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Bank CEOs.
**[In advance of our monthly fundraising deadline, can you chip in $5, so this campaign has the resources to send me into every part and pocket of California?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250523_2_ak?refcode=em20250523-39752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39752_3422442_sW01Ho&akid=39752%2E3422442%2EsW01Ho)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250523_2_ak?refcode=em20250523-39752&refcode2=39752_3422442_sW01Ho&akid=39752%2E3422442%2EsW01Ho)
See you soon,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250523-39752&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39752_3422442_sW01Ho&akid=39752%2E3422442%2EsW01Ho)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39752&t=4&akid=39752%2E3422442%2EsW01Ho)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39752)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39752&t=5&akid=39752%2E3422442%2EsW01Ho)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

| | Peter, they did it. In the early hours of Thursday morning, House Republicans passed a budget that puts money in the pockets of the ultrawealthy and hinders the working class.

This budget will still have to pass in the Senate, but if passed, the package will cut billions of dollars from Medicaid, food assistance, affordable housing, and more. Americans across the country are in danger of losing critical resources.

_[**Peter, I need to hear from you. name: Rep. Maxwell Frost
subject: I was up late protesting at 1 AM
body:
Me and Rep. Nellie Pou won't rest.

| |
---
Team, while most Americans were asleep, Republicans were wide awake... trying to gut Medicaid and Medicare without you knowing. At 1:00am on Wednesday morning, they snuck votes for over $500 BILLION in cuts to Medicare and to rip Medicaid from nearly 14 million Americans. They know this is wildly unpopular, which is why they did it when they thought no one would notice — under the cover of night, behind closed doors. _I noticed. _ That’s why I rushed over to the Capitol at 1am in the rain to rally with protestors and demand NO cuts to Medicaid, NO cuts to Medicare, and HANDS OFF our hard-earned benefits. I won’t let them gut the programs our communities rely on to survive. This is about our parents, our children, our neighbors — working Americans who earned these benefits and depend on them every day. I will always fight for them and for you, even if it requires protesting at 1 in the morning. **[But, team, I can’t do this alone. clean_body: Me and Rep. Nellie Pou won't rest. | | Team, while most Americans were asleep, Republicans were wide awake... trying to gut Medicaid and Medicare without you knowing. At 1:00am on Wednesday morning, they snuck votes for over $500 BILLION in cuts to Medicare and to rip Medicaid from nearly 14 million Americans. They know this is wildly unpopular, which is why they did it when they thought no one would notice — under the cover of night, behind closed doors. I noticed. That’s why I rushed over to the Capitol at 1am in the rain to rally with protestors and demand NO cuts to Medicaid, NO cuts to Medicare, and HANDS OFF our hard-earned benefits. I won’t let them gut the programs our communities rely on to survive. This is about our parents, our children, our neighbors — working Americans who earned these benefits and depend on them every day. I will always fight for them and for you, even if it requires protesting at 1 in the morning. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Let’s show them we won’t be silent. Not at 1 AM. Not ever. Thank you, Maxwell Frost | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

Happy Memorial Day weekend from the Sean Spicer Show. Today we are replaying a conversation we had with Alex Bruesewitz, he was the mastermind behind President Trump's digital campaign during election season. From Theo Von educating President Trump on the effects of cocaine to the "Trump Dance" with Adin Ross and " the weave" with Andrew Schultz. These viral moments took fire on the internet and boosted President Trump's popularity like no other. One of the biggest viral moments was the "cats and dogs" song that President Trump mentioned during the debate with Kamala Harris . It was a crucial turn and left Democrats in the wilderness. President Trump with Bruesewitz and team, had as successful a media run you could have and it all culminated with the 3 hour conversation on the Joe Rogan show. Today, Alex walks us through the behind the scenes strategy, including working with Barron Trump, the Trump family and creating one of the most epic social and digital media campaigns of all time.
Featuring:
**Alex Bruesewitz**
CEO | X Strategies
https://xstrategies.com/

Hi Peter, it’s Becca. I have a personal request: **Before you log off for the long weekend, can you pitch in $10 or any amount to my campaign? ** Here’s the best link to donate: **[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rab-em-may2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108256330/547359469/-999049517?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250523_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjNjNmU0My0yMTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-6b6tGHYaOUVqY-xZr_yyain_o6bH03QjLQ96_TyTM=)** I hate asking for your money, Peter. It’s by far my least favorite part of the job, but my team said we're behind on our fundraising. I get it. Times are tough, and people are tired of fundraising emails. But I need your support because I'm not in Washington to play it safe or schmooze with special interests. I'm there to speak truth to power, push back against the authoritarianism coming out of the GOP and the Trump administration, and stand up for working people like you. That's never going to change, and it means that Republicans can make me an easy target. The best way we can push back against that is by showing the strength of our grassroots movement — and every grassroots donation is a show of your support, no matter the amount. **So if you can give today, here’s that link one more time:** **[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rab-em-may2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108256331/547359470/-999049517?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250523_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjNjNmU0My0yMTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-6b6tGHYaOUVqY-xZr_yyain_o6bH03QjLQ96_TyTM=)** If not, thank you for reading and keeping up with my campaign. It will take all of us to fight back against Trump’s authoritarianism. Thanks for sticking with me in this fight. In solidarity, Becca

name: Josh Harder
subject: Dems have to message better
body:
Frustrating

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108257065/547361301/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQwYjE2ZWUtMjEzOC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tXqVshl758KdRlv5OhHGVvblwBv4a5bUvjeW_qVMp24=) | Peter, I’m incredibly frustrated with Democrats’ messaging. We wonder why we keep losing, but then you look at what we’re talking about and where we’re saying it and it becomes a lot clearer. We do _a lot_ of talking in circles, to ourselves. **I understand swing voters, because they are my voters.** The only way I win this toss-up seat is by talking to persuadable voters and proving to them they can trust me. That’s why I’m a huge proponent of Democratic messengers getting out of their comfort zone and reaching voters where they actually get their information. That means social media, churches, FOX News, podcasts. You name it, we have to be there. Over the past week, you may have caught me on MSNBC, the _New York Times_ , the _Wall Street Journal_ , Brian Tyler Cohen’s YouTube show, local TV, Sirius XM radio, and even going viral across social media for standing up to RFK Jr. **Why? Because I believe it's absolutely critical that we push back against the Trump Administration and don’t stay stuck in our own messaging silos.** If Democrats want to break through the noise, we need to reach voters everywhere — through traditional media, new media, social media, town halls, in-person events, knocking on doors, and beyond. name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I won’t be intimidated by Donald Trump or Nancy Mace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
MAGA extremist Nancy Mace filed a resolution to expel me from Congress. Bless her heart.
Peter,
On Wednesday, two days after Trump’s Justice Department charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight at an ICE facility, MAGA extremist **Nancy Mace filed a resolution to expel me from Congress.** Bless her heart.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250523-1?refcode=em20250523-5079&refcode2=5079_420207_EwN-61&akid=5079%2E420207%2EEwN-61)
Let's be clear about what's happening: Donald Trump and his loyalists in Congress are doing everything they can to silence their political opposition—even if it means weaponizing the Justice Department and the Constitution to punish dissent.
[**I won’t back down from Nancy’s threats or the fight for our democracy. That’s why we set a goal of 1,000 grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight. Can I count on you to donate $10 or whatever feel right between me and Pramila Jayapal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250523-1?refcode=em20250523-5079&amount=10&refcode2=5079_420207_EwN-61&akid=5079%2E420207%2EEwN-61)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250523-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250523-5079&refcode2=5079_420207_EwN-61&akid=5079%2E420207%2EEwN-61)**
We cannot allow the Trump administration to attempt to silence politicians through political persecution—it’s authoritarian and anti-democratic. Together, we’ll hold them accountable and restore real oversight to our government.
[**We have to send a strong message that these attacks on democracy will not stand. Any donation amount you can split between me and Pramila will help us send that message loud and clear.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250523-1?refcode=em20250523-5079&refcode2=5079_420207_EwN-61&akid=5079%2E420207%2EEwN-61)
We're in this together,
LaMonica

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250523-5079-footer&t=1&refcode2=5079_420207_EwN-61&akid=5079%2E420207%2EEwN-61)**

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: I’m not the average politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
As the Congresswoman for Oakland, Berkeley, Emeryville, Piedmont, Albany, Alameda, and San Leandro, I consider it both my privilege and duty to bring the voices and needs of working-class, diverse communities straight into the halls of power where people like us have historically been left behind.
I’ve been an organizer for over 30 years, so I know what it takes to bring communities together, hold the powerful accountable, and demand results.
That’s why I asked my team to create a quick form for you to fill out on what issues you’re most concerned about, how Congress can better serve you, and if you’ve been affected by the Trump administration. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
At every step — whether we’re fighting for affordable health care access, education programs, or accessible transit — I know that the people closest to the pain are also closest to the solutions, and we need to use every tool in the toolbox to create solutions. This survey will help us to hear directly from the folks who matter most: the organizers, caregivers, riders, and neighbors like you in our communities - so we can continue lifting up your voices in Congress.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250411_recurring_act&recurring=1]
I know you’ve got wisdom that can’t be found in any policy memo or campaign talking point. So please, Friend, take a minute or two to fill out this form. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
SHARE YOUR RESPONSE → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
Thank you for always showing up for me, for your community, and for real change.
— Lateefah Simon
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250411_recurring_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250411_recurring_act] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit
LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwva-11-email-2025-fr-footer?refcode=-footer-]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwva-11-email-2025-fr-footer?refcode=-footer-&recurring=true]

# ACTION ALERT: HB 3441 BEING HEARD IN SENATE STATE AFFAIRS!
|
---
HB 3441 (Rep. Luther) would make vaccine manufacturers liable for injuries and deaths if they advertise their products in the state of Texas. This bill is being heard in the Senate State Affairs on Sunday, May 25. **TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE SENATE STATE AFFAIRS COMMITTEE TO SUPPORT THIS BILL!**
**1- Email the Committee Members**

|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:Bryan.Hughes@senate.texas.gov,Angela.Paxton@senate.texas.gov,Paul.Bettencourt@senate.texas.gov,Brian.Birdwell@senate.texas.gov,Bob.Hall@senate.texas.gov,Adam.Hinojosa@sentate.texas.gov,Mayes.Middleton@senate.texas.gov,Tan.parker@senate.texas.gov,Charles.Perry@senate.texas.gov,charles.schwertner@senate.texas.gov,Judith.Zaffrini@senate.texas.gov?subject=Vote%20YES%20on%20HB%203441&body=Dear%20Senator%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20support%20HB%203441%20to%20promote%20transparency%20and%20accountability%20in%20pharmaceutical%20marketing.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|
---
___[](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1MjI5ODExNDcyNTk4OTg0LFwiclwiOjE1NTIyOTg0MDU1Mjc1NzE4NX0iLCJzIjoiZjY0OWY3OTAyOWQwOTRiMSJ9)The button above_ _will populate with a sample message. You are welcome to use it as is_** _by signing your name._**
_If this button does not work on your device, please copy and paste all of the emails below in the TO: field of your draft to send just one email to all committee members at once:_____[](mailto:angie.button@house.texas.gov)[](mailto:gary.vandeaver@house.texas.gov)Bryan.Hughes@senate.texas.gov; Angela.Paxton@senate.texas.gov; Paul.Bettencourt@senate.texas.gov; Brian.Birdwell@senate.texas.gov; Bob.Hall@senate.texas.gov; Adam.Hinojosa@sentate.texas.gov; Mayes.Middleton@senate.texas.gov; Tan.parker@senate.texas.gov; Charles.Perry@senate.texas.gov; charles.schwertner@senate.texas.gov; Judith.Zaffrini@senate.texas.gov[](mailto:lauren.simmons@house.texas.gov)[](mailto:keresa.richardson@house.texas.gov) [](mailto:carl.tepper@house.texas.gov)[](mailto:lauren.simmons@house.texas.gov) [](mailto:lauren.simmons@house.texas.gov)_[](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_**SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:
SUBJECT: Vote YES on HB 3441**
Dear Senator, I am writing to you today to ask you to please support HB 3441 to promote transparency and accountability in pharmaceutical marketing
Thank you,
[YOUR NAME] _____Or use your own personal experience in your email to the committee regarding why vaccine manufacturers should be held accountable for their products!__
________
_******2- Call the Committee Members:**
Chair Bryan Hughes - 512-463-0101
Vice Chair Angela Paxton - 512-463-0108

clean_body: | Peter— With our progress and fundamental rights under near-constant attack by the Trump administration, it’s never been more urgent to elect leaders who aren’t afraid to fight back. I know firsthand what it takes to flip a seat from red to blue. I won my very first election by just 102 votes, facing off against dozens of attack ads millions of dollars in outside spending. It’s no small feat—it takes early preparation and serious resources. That’s why I’ve adopted a swing district to focus our energy on flipping in 2026. Our team will be directing our grassroots support to Joanna Mendoza, running in Arizona’s 6th District! From fundraising to remote volunteer efforts, phone and text banking, postcard campaigns, and more, we’ll do whatever it takes to help “Jo” defeat the GOP incumbent and turn AZ-06 blue. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Juan Ciscomani, the Republican currently representing AZ-06, has been nothing but a rubber stamp for Trump and Musk’s agenda, voting in lockstep with the party regardless of his constituents’ best interests. The people of AZ-06 deserve a representative who listens to them and brings their voices to Congress. That’s what Joanna Mendoza will do. Ciscomani won by just 2.5% last year, so flipping this seat is well within reach—but only if we get started now. = = I’m so excited for this partnership, and to see all that we will accomplish together. Thanks for being on this team. —Emily 💙 = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. | | **Senator Katie Britt Urges Bipartisan Support for Child Care Legislation on Senate Floor**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=db3667f1e6764439a5d14c3c7b9e20ad&_e=POfBx7qbEM35PlV1THqUUg9kzQqUFAy_nYLY5bOevOIl2_JjBvrsioIITeLNOZlTZAA7OmlWzVxgKuHiq4O7h60hAiVo2zkEtPAqrMmDwl1FJvi5MfRW0mG9GIav7xrw3SV2O_zGiSICZeWFEhjVEKMC7eP1ph1-RCalwYsbwv4vm5n7XVUo_ZYGwLQSYHCOuy9lPW0Z59IF4itjOs5S6TMLSDhClOrSzI7-X4w2SOwyi_9qjp9KRJgK4jEZYeiIXwHPDAqs6-CQ_oQjt0GJ3bqMzH1Tw75JueEtKR6PH1SZaCZ8mfYNCfMwwDHiLPWh)
---
U.S. Senator Katie Britt delivered a speech on the Senate floor this week in support of her Child Care Availability and Affordability Act, a bipartisan bill aimed at addressing the nation’s ongoing child care challenges. Her remarks emphasized broad and growing support for the legislation, both among lawmakers and the American public. The bill, which Senator Britt introduced alongside Senator Tim Kaine (D-Va.), proposes updates to three longstanding federal tax credits—the Child and Dependent Care Tax Credit (CDCTC), the Dependent Care Assistance Program (DCAP), and the Employer-Provided Child Care Tax Credit (45F).
---

| | **Katie Britt continues fight against rural pharmacy closures in judiciary hearing**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=db3667f1e6764439a5d14c3c7b9e20ad&_e=POfBx7qbEM35PlV1THqUUq0dha0OT7e7MWwY1-z53am4VmlfCntsJ8tGODDsczFEgRss-Z_XOpJpeaj5HNTE3txDj3Vtq1-hAy08Een9X5CCacX1Yi0Y48ZtPhfFvWfPcq8FtIklLSfMs8DDvZyCpNhnymWLMTdmteNaid37nqyDJ8G8iI3iC-OH756AuOxady31tLfGgT8MyZ-EqWYKC32D3A3751c7UzctX8qOakuPdbfwqDYt8q3l7ho5dOqMrANdujG7QnlonW0tBhDXB1IkNFXspqj5UirbaVMYMMGnIXF9ZvQ8oFJjm3b65txJ)
---
U.S. Senator Katie Britt is continuing to push for solutions to a problem affecting rural communities across the country. In a recent Senate Judiciary Committee hearing, Britt spoke to a panel of experts regarding the continuing closures of rural pharmacies, particularly in Alabama. The lawmaker began her remarks by drawing attention to the high number of pharmacies that have shut down over just the past 15 years.

| | **U.S. Sen. Katie Britt: Why the party of parents must pass the MOMS Act now**

[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=db3667f1e6764439a5d14c3c7b9e20ad&_e=POfBx7qbEM35PlV1THqUUk_xqI1c55pdbdxvQliUz5xbjoBPwpEJeZPlnTLoJ5dF4wzDjjWtjOCMVvCsgmSZ_rqA07Rd5WxNv2usLlkgw9g-NEOlEM2CPBvvHHvm9tli3HLGN0sIA0kp6pu4wkO_3c10sEZ8YhKFnfSA2Zh1zWV-1fCtjOn32IdCHL_IKow3OmHuklaSWOuh3e26j3pdpOY9fR6itYAKDG5NQVvFE3mR__-W6YX5OsJ5Iw-1YJuOJGUF1N9IVW65mulogIiiHhm246wNu8bijoTiIyjHHpYqAUvnnScFmGweV4S3_Kpm)

Republicans controlling the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives means we have a rare opportunity. For years before we swept to victory in November – and for the first two years of my Senate term – we were stuck. Despite our attempts to pass legislation and actually address the issues Americans care about, Democrat leadership refused to put our bills on the floor. But now, with the GOP holding majorities in both chambers of Congress and President Donald Trump in the Oval Office, we can finally get things done for the American people.

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Senator Katie Britt Urges Bipartisan Support for Child Care Legislation on Senate Floor U.S. Senator Katie Britt delivered a speech on the Senate floor this week in support of her Child Care Availability and Affordability Act, a bipartisan bill aimed at addressing the nation’s ongoing child care challenges. Her remarks emphasized broad and growing support for the legislation, both among lawmakers and the American public. The bill, which Senator Britt introduced alongside Senator Tim Kaine (D-Va.), proposes updates to three longstanding federal tax credits—the Child and Dependent Care Tax Credit (CDCTC), the Dependent Care Assistance Program (DCAP), and the Employer-Provided Child Care Tax Credit (45F). | | Katie Britt continues fight against rural pharmacy closures in judiciary hearing U.S. Senator Katie Britt is continuing to push for solutions to a problem affecting rural communities across the country. In a recent Senate Judiciary Committee hearing, Britt spoke to a panel of experts regarding the continuing closures of rural pharmacies, particularly in Alabama. The lawmaker began her remarks by drawing attention to the high number of pharmacies that have shut down over just the past 15 years. | | U.S. Sen. body:
These races were extremely close!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108257710/547363504/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkNjU1ZGFiLTI1MzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6XPcckoLpNeaWBnobwIszTngaY3gTEovxndlzI07ak8=) | Peter, Last year, Blue Dogs helped secure some of the most hard-fought victories in the country — but they came down to razor-thin margins:
* Adam Gray flipped the only seat from red to blue by **fewer than 200 votes.**
* Jared Golden won by just **2,706 votes** in Maine.

These weren’t landslides — they were battles, decided by the slimmest of margins. [_**We need your help to defend these districts once again in 2026 to take back the House. name: Deb
subject: A broken leg and 3 options
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a bit of a tumble.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2136%2E400544%2E-56z5v)
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a _bit_ of a tumble.
I was hiking up the side of a mountain when I slipped on a loose rock. It was a total freak accident — I couldn’t believe it! But there I was, covered in dirt with a pain in my leg and ankle and three options:
* Get airlifted down in a helicopter,
* take eight National Park staff away from their jobs to carry me down,
* or hike down myself.

**I chose to walk back down the mountain** because I couldn’t stomach the idea of taking our National Park staff away from their work, even for a few hours. It turns out I hiked down all that way with a broken leg. I’ll be honest, I didn’t think my leg was actually broken at the time.
The federal workers who care for our public lands have absolutely crucial jobs to do. They preserve and protect our public lands for millions of visitors each year and for future generations. **Donald Trump and Elon Musk have made it clear they intend to auction off our lands to extractive industries like Big Oil. They’ve attempted to fire our dedicated National Parks and National Forests workers en masse.**
As Governor of New Mexico, I will be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests. I will always stand up for the dedicated workers who serve our communities. **[If you’re with me, will you donate $5 to support our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250523_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250523-2136&refcode2=2136_400544_-56z5v&akid=2136%2E400544%2E-56z5v)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250523_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250523-2136&refcode2=2136_400544_-56z5v&akid=2136%2E400544%2E-56z5v)**
As a former Secretary of the Interior, it breaks my heart to see what this administration is doing to exploit our lands and those who care for them.
**But just like the day I chose to hike down the mountain on my broken leg, I am determined to stand up and do right by the workers who proudly serve our nation.**
**[New Mexicans need a governor who isn’t afraid of the tough fights that lie ahead. I can’t win this campaign without you, so please chip in $5 if you can afford it today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250523_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250523-2136&refcode2=2136_400544_-56z5v&akid=2136%2E400544%2E-56z5v)**
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. In case you’re wondering, not even a broken left fibula could keep me away from our beautiful parks for long. Here’s a photo of me from one of my favorite places to visit, Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250523_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250523-2136&refcode2=2136_400544_-56z5v&akid=2136%2E400544%2E-56z5v)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250523-1&t=2&refcode2=2136_400544_-56z5v&akid=2136%2E400544%2E-56z5v)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2136%2E400544%2E-56z5v)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2136%2E400544%2E-56z5v)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

This thing blows up the deficit by $3.8 trillion, hikes up your healthcare and energy costs, and makes it harder for folks to access Medicaid—like charging someone extra to fix a car you never bothered to repair in the first place.

It includes outrageous tax breaks for billionaires while hardworking people get stuck footing the bill.

clean_body: | | Hey Peter, Early yesterday morning, I stood up for us in D.C. and voted against a budget bill that just doesn’t pass the smell test. This thing blows up the deficit by $3.8 trillion, hikes up your healthcare and energy costs, and makes it harder for folks to access Medicaid—like charging someone extra to fix a car you never bothered to repair in the first place. It includes outrageous tax breaks for billionaires while hardworking people get stuck footing the bill. You know me—I don’t mind getting my hands dirty. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and fight back. We deserve something that’s fair, balanced, and actually helps working families. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = We’ve got to let the far-right know we’re not buying what they’re selling. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Who are we as a nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Right now, House Republicans are proposing devastating cuts to critical social safety net programs – including Medicaid – all under the guise of fiscal responsibility.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108257815/547363958/463868053?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-05-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWVkNDJmNC0yNjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGszMx3tZCDQT97xDNNlQYnSnWGNkpHDBd3NbJX7GCQ=)
---
| I don’t know that I’ve faced a more consequential moment in my time serving this district.

House Republicans voted to pass devastating cuts to critical social safety net programs – including Medicaid – all under the guise of fiscal responsibility.

But here’s the kicker: they’re also raising the debt ceiling by _four trillion dollars_. And how are they justifying it? By handing out _massive tax breaks_ to the ultra-wealthy and big corporations.

This isn’t just a budget proposal. It’s a statement of values.

Are we a nation that kicks kids off their health insurance? That takes food away from struggling families?

**We are not.**

Trump wants to tell American children how many pencils and dolls they should have. I say we tell billionaires they can make do with one yacht this year. We're making sure kids are fed and families have healthcare.

This is why I’m fighting so hard to hold the line in Congress – and why we need to defend this district with everything we’ve got. Because if we lose ground here, we lose the ability to stop this reckless agenda.

[_**Can I count on you to pitch in today to help us defend MI-03 and stand up for the values we believe in?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108257817/547363959/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-05-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWVkNDJmNC0yNjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGszMx3tZCDQT97xDNNlQYnSnWGNkpHDBd3NbJX7GCQ=)

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Not great.
body:
We have two choices.
---
Derek — **Here’s the good news:** So far this year, Democrats have overperformed in nearly every major election — including in districts that went to Trump by double digits in 2024. People like you are fed up with Trump’s agenda, you’re organizing everywhere, and you’re showing up at the ballot box. **Here’s the bad news:** Our team relies on donations from supporters like you to fund our work to organize across the country, but in the last few months, we’ve seen a significant slowdown. It’s understandable — especially as Trump and his allies have wreaked havoc on our economy — but it makes it that much harder for Democrats to fight back. Look at this chart. | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=15&refcode=em_202550523_3552_fr&refcode2=3552_22930333_hX7MUp&akid=3552%2E22930333%2EhX7MUp)
---
You can see the dropoff we’re talking about — and with our end-of-month FEC deadline coming up, the timing isn’t great.
**That means we have two choices to catch up.** Either we need more people to chip in, or we are hoping people can give a few more bucks when they donate.
Derek, normally, we ask people making their first donation of the year to give $3 or $7. But today, we are asking you to give a bit more at this critical time — $15 if you can. It would help us reach our fundraising goals and elect more Democrats across the country.
[**That’s why we’re asking if you can donate $15 directly to the Democratic Party today. Help us stay on track to reach our fundraising goal, so we can keep electing Democrats who will check Trump’s power:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=15&refcode=em_202550523_3552_fr&refcode2=3552_22930333_hX7MUp&akid=3552%2E22930333%2EhX7MUp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_202550523_3552_fr&refcode2=3552_22930333_hX7MUp&akid=3552%2E22930333%2EhX7MUp)**
---
****
Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Victor Riches
subject: They told her daughter to lie. We can’t let them get away with it.
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/b8j7ih9RRvWKJUBASakaKPIKdpCXCEDq-60H3f_33-gAfY-DIIY7aoY8Vf2dEMOEVYJyutjLFScCJxKMZJDjL9N8Zdw0_8CAuQtQu4XtCwgU6BtnID10zQnmlrdRrVuEfmsndC-PjjPutlteKN9KkU_p5kLjHklx2EMQILn09jSYYNh95Z12cBTj5NAYrYz3ssQvX8uZg80eqEBqfbSGuSv-yrhmWlj916A1cZvvtjmLOy1PiM8UVOsmHy-teM9ECijqM4cM5vKrQJ07fJ-OBDwZKItXM1iKYWrZNf91ykGhQ1mCVAvdxswBJ_go_oKhnDA7wSmlA-2SBGKTNZQsVzkUxOfdYmiJJKijNqxQobiWfGS-Nc4Sz7-fhICVQPTWz5fhPvvGV3XA7JvkdgH6PkOGZmhuOVOhfPzEhaINkE78bVNfGxFVYK5YxQW-wXkqqKOnoDXaqdq42FxM8r9E40G3aKwzlOw/reO_TIMA6EGRal0DDP-xxdF1yfC7mL3h/9)

Peter,

When Amber Lavigne discovered a chest binder in her daughter's bedroom, she did what any loving mother would do: She asked questions.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ptvFlrNcfc5RejqayoY6T6yk6LWd-vX2t91UemVHUYqGdGqWzQx5vB1iUs3d2dqyxry4uiOVo-TTdT_mi8n0Mf3CuXZKHBF_HzcOfq26Tf8divG550j2uHz9oSz7u9kowy2u_dcwXkTnhTn0VaZuhYJ84-RkKvKIQDeNiSagfW3ndFRvXYqIEuzayCLva5C1XucgrnqU3JJVcNTSS8dRj20eYpyoQumnvREq9w0BmoX6dso7ZPL-mzB8X1jkWzgQ8hEBAQ-KGm1Wrww1TFqJo_y6PRZJPUGvsz2iaqqAKhq_PMQ_BlfveyiDDIT32KfkaO-BuphVstnfqSi-qZ4IPJlw6qyk1MpQ1Kso9Qltl-SZiKwmAvqb3-lQiqc4TlKDe6z9rIADHLQ-jvMtelfnyrmXXrHg8wY1tJSQbU_kkmAHI16qVve0pSqpXSch-3GxPettXzuSEVNWU9xoOKUQ92Y9aNo4bf7nPw/0EIuvNgH5HSHV-eWWGOmFyoCZEQyK_Eo/9)

What she discovered was SHOCKING!

Public school officials in Maine **secretly provided her 13-year-old daughter with the chest binder** and encouraged her to _" socially transition" _her gender, without Amber's knowledge or consent.

Even worse, a school counselor encouraged her daughter to _hide all of it from her mother_.

They didn't treat Amber like a parent. They treated her like the enemy.

**That 's why Amber turned to the Goldwater Institute.**

I am Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's leading liberty organization. Our American Freedom Network of pro bono attorneys provides legal support to protect the constitutional rights of parents like Amber Lavigne.

We filed a lawsuit on Amber's behalf against the school district for violating her constitutional rights.

We need to make sure this never happens again.

But we can't do it alone.

[We need your help to defend the rights of parents like Amber across the country.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/8ZCWyDBkuEkQuB4b3D-HyB2LAXNrHX2t-iFNFCXFUNnJFcSUyLkMf8HEhk6qeemhhW1H1b2kBYmIQjsA76PhTFNPq10yBENEEHTx451wDrg3JbOmHhw64xQqdLVZnDTnoGECQk19x87Ydu7PNr65Y89M4_YOy_t7oeU6gH1DBVHfa62SMjNncOXOHZEICePg-MG0h4OTvxlfRfdBKm1WiDFMdwNkHvJd9VywFGMgMAncLLt8nrMJSPfaR91LnbFsY13_dZax85JpfXqVG7em7YEi4jDRXozH-n7wOUqm9p2RtMK2KvrOBxYGQRvOPkM8yHc4iU9NamgwRx7qMfSB49WWns5xhsT1TRsm9VQEYzSEMFYtUfQqDWoPFMjboOhmukQFR7lPDTx2t36ktEOzxWsxJhHPGDZAUTKdu2rKxfpBSZbIB8pTa9Ko_U3fErRbaHVdX0s6LWkOvXQtB-u6uQUYO36o_hHno7LXYSY/Zj1KudMsUNLieCL1P0zEs1HZzy6-_cw0/9)

Will you stand with us today?

[Stand With Parents](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/EDWX8gmWU8kqZZzhXrFUdJtA0zqNac83yeW3aXhAKPoq30SE4nvpn4Nvb2p74CsCDaJyxZm7Hln3onOgsaGOI9zT8GwlS0ro_gpZ_bjFRe1uO7teJhVr99XQLSXPWzk1cpzFqQ27XrOFtXTxp6lxavozgSJi6bIYjFKfKsYYI57Lkay-rhqKw6_EHRp6nx9oNdlMhcD0iBwgCQmsHeO6fVT8fP1Yld5Q1nY3LxQSuNk24dk9MFyuEd-4lVXYEqnAFyFRlPLF87zZZCdJRvEanzhQ0JeOAubc_oDLhoXbpCGUcOmjGcsLRtP9QXe452AcwBDSoeylw5kx8TYpNMzKOusJJ0PSxFMCTBmhbBaCMxXJg4CuswcEY_Ti2vrSaIQmWj5JvWE2dFsHTiyM1wpg3ZNCoWa1iDgr0e5_SUzwVCEnc1oILVjoZqe_dRt0OrMGq2fgcLUV07ad5fF5oXxnvviV_kI9NGX64gBJQvxlbuBQ/PSiLxq-RyCBYH_7NCqxk4vp4dWdFka68/9)

Amber's story is not an isolated one.

School districts nationwide have decided they -- not the parents -- should have the final say over children's lives.

It's disturbing, it's unethical, it's wrong... and yes, it's _unconstitutional_.

For more than three decades, the Goldwater Institute has led the fight to protect liberty, including the rights of parents to raise and care for their children.

Now, we're leading the legal battle to protect parental rights and promote academic transparency in public education.

[Please pitch in a tax-deductible donation of $10, $35, or even $100 to help us fight for parental rights in every state >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/29820kMu9kvyCXt8KHFb-btAZ0Uxevj4rG-3t1ENNrTBZDUfcm5Srl4diRdKJr7Pq91OxANQ606S7z1R2kzenkzEMV5NpBxoAG9Y_Pt318DrvoP-NCI9azhzB-sOLA6ufR-MJ5hax_QEjgKoBIohiwpL6ga2_22cnLd7CarqsGby8jsE9ESI5nCU9dSXa6Eq_Z4GCNmykADrkG70DHUB7gCLzgcdj-YMqH1wGhkgrNDnv8Anb3YRSKhLYUdXkuRPdlpbzDcpMxpWDGRQ8Jc2niz52GrBVtkvUZoBJj_NUnNE7FAuG47qhk3eSHdrA7JHtZyvDPqBpHfrYXtSMUE1-qREwzZ5trhMv093JTAIrwBS3UwaLZYI8Ggr7Kz4HTTqsT8qYMiRhDQXB074UeDXU7JI7hNDy_zpBmOxI8WRqS_jMKKvs_4WkJwP-39jX5ud8aYq7RKBnbmulD-xzc7Bg0gWtpXgXzbc_3Dn5Dk/eUdBnYAuA73oBvUcPY5GsfBT3piWRuva/9)

clean_body: Peter, When Amber Lavigne discovered a chest binder in her daughter's bedroom, she did what any loving mother would do: She asked questions. What she discovered was SHOCKING! Public school officials in Maine secretly provided her 13-year-old daughter with the chest binder and encouraged her to " socially transition" her gender, without Amber's knowledge or consent. Even worse, a school counselor encouraged her daughter to hide all of it from her mother. They didn't treat Amber like a parent. They treated her like the enemy. That 's why Amber turned to the Goldwater Institute. I am Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's leading liberty organization. Our American Freedom Network of pro bono attorneys provides legal support to protect the constitutional rights of parents like Amber Lavigne. We filed a lawsuit on Amber's behalf against the school district for violating her constitutional rights. We need to make sure this never happens again. But we can't do it alone. Will you stand with us today? Amber's story is not an isolated one. School districts nationwide have decided they -- not the parents -- should have the final say over children's lives. It's disturbing, it's unethical, it's wrong... and yes, it's unconstitutional. For more than three decades, the Goldwater Institute has led the fight to protect liberty, including the rights of parents to raise and care for their children. Now, we're leading the legal battle to protect parental rights and promote academic transparency in public education. Amber's case has sparked national outrage - and earned her national support - from parents, legal experts, advocacy groups, and even attorneys general from multiple states. But there are still school boards across the U.S. that have decided they know better than parents what's best for kids, and they are cutting families out of the equation. That's where we need your help. Your support powers this fight. Thank you for standing with us in defense of parental rights. Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. name: BiOptimizers
subject: The TRUTH About Magnesium
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e15733305/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvanhXZVpZbUJRZg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjM/LbmNsMURMdVJyeQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNyR1B1NUs2dFBFQmxscw/gaDD9SA/sfk55cba7d9)

A 2010 review of natural treatments for anxiety found that magnesium could be a treatment for anxiety.
More recently, a 2017 review that looked at 18 different studies found that magnesium did reduce anxiety.
These studies looked at mild anxiety, anxiety during premenstrual syndrome, postpartum anxiety, and generalized anxiety.
[According to this review](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e15733305/VaHR0cDovL21hZ25lc2l1bWJyZWFrdGhyb3VnaC5jb20vbnVjbGVhci8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjM/LbmNsMURMdVJyeQ/qP2dsPTY4MmYzY2Q5M2Y1ZDYwMjY2YzhiNDU2NyZfbmxpZD1tdHVreFVmU0YyJl9uaGlkcz1uY3JHUHU1SzZ0UEVCbGxz/gaDD9SA/s2s06f430ad), one of the reasons why magnesium might help reduce anxiety is that it may improve brain function. Now, you might be thinking... "there are a gazillion magnesium products out there, if magnesium were the solution to stress — more people would be stress-free."
The problem is two-fold.
FIRST, almost everyone is SEVERELY deficient in magnesium — even those who get the "recommended daily dose"...
Because higher stress levels (common for ambitious folks like us) require much higher than RDA doses. And SECOND...
**Most magnesium supplements fail to help you beat stress...**
Now that you understand how critical magnesium is for everything — it might be tempting to run out to your local drug or health food store and buy some magnesium.
That would be a mistake, though — because most magnesium products do nothing, for two primary reasons:
❌ They're synthetic, unnatural, and not recognized by your body and ❌
❌ They are NOT FULL SPECTRUM ❌
Which means they are missing the various forms of magnesium needed to target various organs in the body and to handle all sources of stress — and boost your performance in every key area.
Most people get 1-2 forms of synthetic magnesium (at best); which is why they typically feel little or nothing from supplements.
**But there's a miracle that occurs when your body gets ALL the magnesium that it needs** , in all the forms that it needs at the optimal dosage.
If You're *Only* Taking ONE Form Of Magnesium — **YOU ARE STILL DEFICIENT!**
**> > [Why Getting ALL 7 FORMS Of Magnesium Transforms Your Stress And Performance ✅](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e15733305/VaHR0cDovL21hZ25lc2l1bWJyZWFrdGhyb3VnaC5jb20vbnVjbGVhci8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjM/LbmNsMURMdVJyeQ/qP2dsPTY4MmYzY2Q5M2Y1ZDYwMjY2YzhiNDU2NyZfbmxpZD1TWEFNVUc0dzVxJl9uaGlkcz1uY3JHUHU1SzZ0UEVCbGxz/gaDD9SA/s7mb9507b1b "According to this review")**
| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e15733305/VaHR0cDovL21hZ25lc2l1bWJyZWFrdGhyb3VnaC5jb20vbnVjbGVhci8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjM/LbmNsMURMdVJyeQ/qP2dsPTY4MmYzY2Q5M2Y1ZDYwMjY2YzhiNDU2NyZfbmxpZD1VN1A3RTlnekJTJl9uaGlkcz1uY3JHUHU1SzZ0UEVCbGxz/gaDD9SA/s5meb3d1962)
---
|
Be well,
~BIOptimizers

body:
This week, House Republicans narrowly passed a partisan budget bill that will raise costs for working families and rip health care away from millions of Americans.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108258469/547366403/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-05-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQ2OTZiZC0yOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5fhngk7gOPR9TH47mDRKg_Z-cKUr3EOM4dz5ALlI24=)

| Peter,

This week, House Republicans _narrowly_ passed a partisan budget bill that will raise costs for working families and rip health care away from millions of Americans.

This bill was drafted behind closed doors, debated in the dead of night and rushed through without bipartisan input. It is fiscally irresponsible and will do irreparable harm to our most vulnerable communities.

Health care costs will rise, women’s health services will be defunded and 14 million Americans will lose Medicaid coverage under this bill.

Now more than ever, I need your help to defend this seat so we can take back the House in 2026 and secure a strong Democratic Majority that will deliver for working families.

Our district is one of the most competitive House races in the country and your support today will go a long way in ensuring we hold this seat. This is HUGE >>
| **FIRST:** Trump gave Elon Musk UNBRIDLED access to YOUR private Social Security data.

**THEN:** Senator Ossoff fought BACK — and Republicans are FURIOUS: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90334?t=6&akid=19940%2E878179%2EChXbjK) **NOW:** Trump and Musk are going after Senator Ossoff, so we need to URGENTLY round up public support for him!

[**We’re sending Senator Ossoff a letter to stand with him in the face of escalating MAGA attacks, and we need 10,000 Democrats to sign before we can hit send. Please: Will you add your name to our time-sensitive letter in support of Senator Jon Ossoff? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90334?t=7&akid=19940%2E878179%2EChXbjK) | [**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90334?t=8&akid=19940%2E878179%2EChXbjK)
---
TO: Senator Jon Ossoff
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: I stand with you. Senator Ossoff,

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Elon Musk resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we _can_ fight back.

From fighting for Social Security to introducing a bill to guarantee the right to vote for all Americans, we KNOW we have someone in the Senate that we can ALWAYS count on to protect our rights.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump, Musk, and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and Elon Musk from destroying our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90334?t=9&akid=19940%2E878179%2EChXbjK) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90334?t=10&akid=19940%2E878179%2EChXbjK)

# [Pelosi Joins Illegal Alien Activists At SCOTUS To Protest In Support Of Birthright Citizenship As Democrats Double Down on Open Borders Advocacy ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=164274156&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0Mjc0MTU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgwNDI4NDQsImV4cCI6MTc1MDYzNDg0NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3A0UK2yxjI2cq6bGbWpp1JNRM3QT_Ql_CSEb7sB4cWM)
### The former Speaker of the House joined pro-illegal alien protesters outside of the US Supreme Court to fight against President Trump's Executive Order eliminating birthright citizenship.

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ca71793-71b8-4380-960c-1b5648f747af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today!_
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aKdKFMsYGu-X3uQazwnmIyUHrhKuQjxUnEKjf1UzKBY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164274156)
Last week, former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi refused to answer questions from _Loomer Unleashed_ while attending a pro-open borders, anti-Trump protest organized by [CASA ](https://substack.com/redirect/6ee3a8d0-888c-4161-8ee5-bed8f4fa28a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)on the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court. The demonstration coincided with [oral arguments](https://substack.com/redirect/3e83a26b-061a-419a-af88-5b7606e40138?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over President Trump's executive order aimed at restricting birthright citizenship.
## **CASA in Action PAC Tied to 501(c)(3) Group Behind SCOTUS Protest**
The protest was organized by CASA, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit closely affiliated with CASA Action and CASA in Action PAC to advocate for birthright citizenship as a constitutional right. It coincided with Supreme Court arguments on lower federal court injunctions targeting President Trump's executive orders--primarily his order ending automatic citizenship for children born to individuals residing in the U.S. illegally.
This was not CASA's first coordinated anti-Trump demonstration. Earlier this month, _Loomer Unleashed_ [captured](https://substack.com/redirect/70572783-a8c7-4258-b0a4-c8b2ffb55293?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) exclusive footage of buses unloading CASA-linked demonstrators at a May Day rally in Washington, D.C, just blocks away from the White House.
## **Pelosi Shielded by CASA Operatives After Confrontation by** _**Loomer Unleashed**_
As Pelosi arrived at the court steps to join anti-Trump, open border [activists](https://substack.com/redirect/840908e1-b7eb-46cb-bb0e-d9cfc556ec66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), _Loomer Unleashed_ confronted her with a direct question:
"Why do Congressional Democrats have an obsession with supporting dangerous and unpopular open border policies?"
Rather than respond, Pelosi was shielded by individuals wearing CASA t-shirts and masks--some of whom physically [pushed](https://substack.com/redirect/c17aa710-f11c-4102-913a-c4e423916577?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _Loomer Unleashed_ DC Correspondent Charles Downs away.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8119cb20-1888-4ce9-9692-38cf97801986?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **CASA Website Calls for Abolishing ICE, Echoes Democrat Open Border Agenda**
Pelosi's appearance at the CASA-organized protest [underscores](https://substack.com/redirect/6a90e7d2-895e-48b0-8281-07689220f763?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Congressional Democrats' continued embrace of open border policies--including calls to abolish Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE).
CASA's official website [demands](https://substack.com/redirect/e692fb61-8671-4db5-8a35-3191ba250df8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the dismantling of ICE, describing it as "an agency that caused immense harm to our communities." The group also refers to ICE as a "rogue agency" that has eroded public trust and helped spark the rise of the Sanctuary Movement.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7e2e8dca-e738-4f81-8c1b-541c421eb434?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **CASA in Action PAC Funneled Funds to Support Kamala Harris, Bob Casey in 2024 While Opposing Trump**
Federal Election Commission (FEC) records reveal CASA in Action PAC [used](https://substack.com/redirect/c1ed41fc-ba44-48eb-8fbf-92c96eda58f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an email address tied to _wearecasa.org_ --the same domain used by CASA's 501(c)(3) nonprofit. This overlap is a serious red flag under the [Internal Revenue Code](https://substack.com/redirect/9c893ab5-25d7-4608-872e-6bd95e7617fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and raises questions about CASA's tax-exempt status.

Under [federal law](https://substack.com/redirect/2aee3fdf-254e-4510-853d-27feb911e080?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), 501(c)(3) organizations are prohibited from directly or indirectly participating in political campaigns. This includes PACs or 527s [using](https://substack.com/redirect/f8043b10-8882-48b0-ba97-aa7ec30a1675?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) nonprofit resources--such as domains or email infrastructure--to file FEC reports or communicate political support or opposition. Such actions risk blurring the lines between charitable activity and unlawful political advocacy.

According to FEC filings, CASA in Action PAC spent:
* **$730,191.50** [supporting](https://substack.com/redirect/3c1b2ba0-f3c0-4f95-b7ad-05dce180e99c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) former Vice President Kamala Harris's failed 2024 presidential campaign
* **$239,215.23** [supporting](https://substack.com/redirect/3c1b2ba0-f3c0-4f95-b7ad-05dce180e99c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) former Senator Bob Casey's unsuccessful re-election bid in Pennsylvania
* **$109,122.98**[ opposing](https://substack.com/redirect/d115df32-738f-454c-911b-f968a5d1566d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) President Donald J. Trump's return to the White House

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e2cff7-d103-43ed-b0a0-3cc136cd08de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Democrat Lawmakers Rally with Bused-In CASA Activists Near White House on May Day, the International Communist Holiday**
_Loomer Unleashed_ previously [exposed](https://substack.com/redirect/70572783-a8c7-4258-b0a4-c8b2ffb55293?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Congressional Democrats' collaboration with CASA during a May Day protest in Franklin Park, Washington, D.C. Representatives Ilhan Omar and [Maxwell Frost](https://substack.com/redirect/85208ec2-35e6-4478-b99a-cf9fcf3415ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), along with Senator [Mazie Hirono](https://substack.com/redirect/209b5c97-bbfd-4837-91bb-8568fab56d04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), addressed a crowd of CASA-affiliated protesters--many of whom were bused in by the organization. When _Loomer Unleashed_ attempted to question the lawmakers, CASA operatives again [blocked reporters](https://substack.com/redirect/d0ec1ae6-08d2-4410-8603-89386d5beee9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from engaging with them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/23e8bea2-9e20-470f-8d3f-50bfba711e44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aKdKFMsYGu-X3uQazwnmIyUHrhKuQjxUnEKjf1UzKBY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164274156)
## **Democrats Refuse Bipartisan Border Solutions, Rely on Courts to Undermine Trump 's Orders**
It has become increasingly evident that House and Senate Democrats have doubled down on extreme open border policies since their 2024 defeat to President Trump and the Republican majority. Rather than work with Republicans on meaningful immigration reform, Democrats continue to obstruct legislative progress and rely on lower court injunctions to block the President's executive actions.
President Trump's executive orders remain the most direct and effective instrument for securing America's borders. But, with Republicans now holding the White House, Senate, and House, any failure to codify the President's America First agenda ahead of the 2026 midterms could drive the final nail in the coffin for U.S. border security and election integrity alike.
Democrats have already made their intentions clear: retake control of the House and Senate in 2026, impeach President Trump, and dismantle what remains of America's border protections. If Republicans fail to act now, they may never get another chance to defend our national sovereignty--or stop the radical Left's open border invasion.

clean_body: The former Speaker of the House joined pro-illegal alien protesters outside of the US Supreme Court to fight against President Trump's Executive Order eliminating birthright citizenship. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The former Speaker of the House joined pro-illegal alien protesters outside of the US Supreme Court to fight against President Trump's Executive Order eliminating birthright citizenship. | | | May 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- NOTE: Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary. Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today! LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Last week, former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi refused to answer questions from Loomer Unleashed while attending a pro-open borders, anti-Trump protest organized by the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court. The demonstration coincided with over President Trump's executive order aimed at restricting birthright citizenship. CASA in Action PAC Tied to 501(c)(3) Group Behind SCOTUS Protest The protest was organized by CASA, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit closely affiliated with CASA Action and CASA in Action PAC to advocate for birthright citizenship as a constitutional right. It coincided with Supreme Court arguments on lower federal court injunctions targeting President Trump's executive orders--primarily his order ending automatic citizenship for children born to individuals residing in the U.S. illegally. This was not CASA's first coordinated anti-Trump demonstration. Earlier this month, Loomer Unleashed exclusive footage of buses unloading CASA-linked demonstrators at a May Day rally in Washington, D.C, just blocks away from the White House. Pelosi Shielded by CASA Operatives After Confrontation by Loomer Unleashed As Pelosi arrived at the court steps to join anti-Trump, open border , Loomer Unleashed confronted her with a direct question: "Why do Congressional Democrats have an obsession with supporting dangerous and unpopular open border policies?" Rather than respond, Pelosi was shielded by individuals wearing CASA t-shirts and masks--some of whom physically Loomer Unleashed DC Correspondent Charles Downs away. | | ---|---|--- CASA Website Calls for Abolishing ICE, Echoes Democrat Open Border Agenda Pelosi's appearance at the CASA-organized protest Congressional Democrats' continued embrace of open border policies--including calls to abolish Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). CASA's official website the dismantling of ICE, describing it as "an agency that caused immense harm to our communities." The group also refers to ICE as a "rogue agency" that has eroded public trust and helped spark the rise of the Sanctuary Movement. | | ---|---|--- CASA in Action PAC Funneled Funds to Support Kamala Harris, Bob Casey in 2024 While Opposing Trump Federal Election Commission (FEC) records reveal CASA in Action PAC an email address tied to wearecasa.org --the same domain used by CASA's 501(c)(3) nonprofit. This overlap is a serious red flag under the and raises questions about CASA's tax-exempt status. Under , 501(c)(3) organizations are prohibited from directly or indirectly participating in political campaigns. This includes PACs or 527s nonprofit resources--such as domains or email infrastructure--to file FEC reports or communicate political support or opposition. Such actions risk blurring the lines between charitable activity and unlawful political advocacy. According to FEC filings, CASA in Action PAC spent: $730,191.50 former Vice President Kamala Harris's failed 2024 presidential campaign $239,215.23 former Senator Bob Casey's unsuccessful re-election bid in Pennsylvania $109,122.98 President Donald J. Trump's return to the White House | | ---|---|--- Democrat Lawmakers Rally with Bused-In CASA Activists Near White House on May Day, the International Communist Holiday Loomer Unleashed previously Congressional Democrats' collaboration with CASA during a May Day protest in Franklin Park, Washington, D.C. Representatives Ilhan Omar and , along with Senator , addressed a crowd of CASA-affiliated protesters--many of whom were bused in by the organization. When Loomer Unleashed attempted to question the lawmakers, CASA operatives again from engaging with them. | | ---|---|--- Democrats Refuse Bipartisan Border Solutions, Rely on Courts to Undermine Trump 's Orders** It has become increasingly evident that House and Senate Democrats have doubled down on extreme open border policies since their 2024 defeat to President Trump and the Republican majority. Rather than work with Republicans on meaningful immigration reform, Democrats continue to obstruct legislative progress and rely on lower court injunctions to block the President's executive actions. President Trump's executive orders remain the most direct and effective instrument for securing America's borders. But, with Republicans now holding the White House, Senate, and House, any failure to codify the President's America First agenda ahead of the 2026 midterms could drive the final nail in the coffin for U.S. border security and election integrity alike. Democrats have already made their intentions clear: retake control of the House and Senate in 2026, impeach President Trump, and dismantle what remains of America's border protections. If Republicans fail to act now, they may never get another chance to defend our national sovereignty--or stop the radical Left's open border invasion. You're currently a free subscriber to . Dear Peter, If you’ve missed our Major Threat emails, let me tell you about the Wolf Depredation Compensation Program Bill ([**SB 777 A**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108258956/547368098/1140938071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4NjQwNjdlLTJkMzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0bo40ShFHUulHpuq3YTyumR5kYNtOjCbAI5uKQHHd_Y=&emci=f041e3f7-fd37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e864067e-2d38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)). This bill would allow for up to 5x the fair market value paid for livestock confirmed killed or injured by wolves, draining the program's funds and jeopardizing wolf recovery. For those who are already familiar with this bad Wolf Depredation Compensation Program Bill ([**SB 777 A**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108258957/547368099/1140938071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4NjQwNjdlLTJkMzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0bo40ShFHUulHpuq3YTyumR5kYNtOjCbAI5uKQHHd_Y=&emci=f041e3f7-fd37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e864067e-2d38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)), you know that this bad bill endangers the recovery of Oregon’s wolves, and we must stop it. [**Will you take a moment to send a message to your representatives asking them to stop this bill?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108258958/547368100/1168664123?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4NjQwNjdlLTJkMzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0bo40ShFHUulHpuq3YTyumR5kYNtOjCbAI5uKQHHd_Y=&emci=f041e3f7-fd37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e864067e-2d38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)

As of now, Oregon farmers and ranchers are already paid the fair market value for livestock losses due to wolf predation. Installing an unnecessary 5x multiplier would put Oregon on the list of highest multipliers in the nation. We can’t afford to set back the recovery of our wolves anymore. We’ve been fighting this Major Threat the majority of the session, and we need your help to stop it. This bill did pass the Senate earlier this session, but now we have the chance to stop it in the House, as we are coming up on some important legislative deadlines. [**Now is the time that your representatives need to hear from you!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108258960/547368102/1168664123?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4NjQwNjdlLTJkMzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0bo40ShFHUulHpuq3YTyumR5kYNtOjCbAI5uKQHHd_Y=&emci=f041e3f7-fd37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e864067e-2d38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230) [**Our wolves are calling for your help! clean_body: Peter, help us stop our Major Threat, SB 777: a bill that sets back the recovery and management of wolves. We need one final push from you to eliminate this bill!| | | Dear Peter, Whether or not you saw my last email, I'm writing to you today to follow up and let you know that the Wolf Depredation Compensation Program Bill () has moved out of its committee and onto the House floor. In other words, one of our Major Threats this session is progressing in the legislature. This moment matters more than ever for your legislators to hear from you. We can't afford to let this Major Threat pass because it sets back the recovery of Oregon's wolves. Time is running out to stop this bill. Thank you for your support, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | Dear Peter, If you’ve missed our Major Threat emails, let me tell you about the Wolf Depredation Compensation Program Bill (). This bill would allow for up to 5x the fair market value paid for livestock confirmed killed or injured by wolves, draining the program's funds and jeopardizing wolf recovery. For those who are already familiar with this bad Wolf Depredation Compensation Program Bill (), you know that this bad bill endangers the recovery of Oregon’s wolves, and we must stop it. As of now, Oregon farmers and ranchers are already paid the fair market value for livestock losses due to wolf predation. Installing an unnecessary 5x multiplier would put Oregon on the list of highest multipliers in the nation. We can’t afford to set back the recovery of our wolves anymore. We’ve been fighting this Major Threat the majority of the session, and we need your help to stop it. This bill did pass the Senate earlier this session, but now we have the chance to stop it in the House, as we are coming up on some important legislative deadlines. Sincerely, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
